Hi friend, this is Mariannette Miller-Meeks.

I wanted to fill you in on the situation with my friend and colleague Zach Nunn. He's an Air Force Reserve Lieutenant Colonel Reserve who just reported for reserve duty.

As you're reading this, Democrats are jumping on the opportunity to fundraise while Zach is serving our country. We need your help to keep this seat RED!

**Zach is fighting in one of the closest races in the country. Democrats are already calling it a Top Pickup Opportunity.**
I know Zach. He's one tough cookie. But this is a fight where he'll need reinforcements to win.

I'm asking you personally, could you contribute today to help boost his numbers while he's serving our great nation?

| [**BOOST ZACH'S NUMBERS**](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=f42e4bd06f2c4bf59844a6f6cfe03ff5&_e=V-Pv0YoIXDnkRoLlaVmkuX5PvKG4OyrRxLRnRQQyARQKNLgsD6UfcANJX6VwpLhpX3TQhFidUNoyzz4WCvP9Bi1RTl5DOIWKh2Yh69PDHbTqjsVmYCp5y5KrNM-ieCCYC0aQ4QqJtSKkH3V2_wuJkcA71PXR2FQEzm7iFbxN4K9l_gTffpie3FAvEAVZXY-W43m_fHHWGZuwdtF4r-4WyQK9B-cGWZRShrlPR4PCdvBSs2TKLuY1bO1JK3b1_JoypuzrsVBreemdm-U824qN76UrU9d1DycpvmBwO0NmeCcGEXaCF9CWn-HAuokmczvJ)

Zach needs all the help he can get right now. Your contribution today will help him maintain his flight path through election day.

[**BOOST ZACH'S NUMBERS**](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=f42e4bd06f2c4bf59844a6f6cfe03ff5&_e=V-Pv0YoIXDnkRoLlaVmkuX5PvKG4OyrRxLRnRQQyARQKNLgsD6UfcANJX6VwpLhpX3TQhFidUNoyzz4WCvP9Bi1RTl5DOIWKh2Yh69PDHbTqjsVmYCp5y5KrNM-ieCCYC0aQ4QqJtSKkH3V2_wuJkcA71PXR2FQEzm7iFbxN4K99M8TeJb7aR3uL6EQY6zriXQwa6n3DEMRCFOcv91NHJdCzo2FJy89K7zEblbKvefyiNZz90_aWWYqtojeGpTyX9K_jA7_W0GGmT7lMFlxkuWUthc-uo06WGWUTo7ATGz_2A_vzAoNISRODZbTYXD9y)

name: Kevin Lincoln
subject: First to fight
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR BY
KEVIN LINCOLN FOR CONGRESS
body:
No Marine goes into battle alone, which is why I need your support in my fight to win one of the most competitive Congressional seats on the ballot in 2024. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=c7d42b266d1145e48e111dc308e18fc4&_t=eQIbn0PfDBhj6CRXZ7-4ITHVQef0v7UrdoMXwZ7Wf8IBzKVpVVwHAzIvlE6y1wnPdbmS7E_aV18SJwfkip_txAAPCsrLkGVXycTObDDtNiM%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=c7d42b266d1145e48e111dc308e18fc4&_t=eQIbn0PfDBhj6CRXZ7-4ITHVQef0v7UrdoMXwZ7Wf8IBzKVpVVwHAzIvlE6y1wnPdbmS7E_aV18SJwfkip_txAAPCsrLkGVXycTObDDtNiM%3D)

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c7d42b266d1145e48e111dc308e18fc4&_e=kTp-vWcvQ9xJK2Phm8v7CowuBhBGzAOoPnKv0Iuv5sLLMQPY-2ZfuMcEpQ50mSiyUVeNXB9wQgZ1Flsp3DUzaTY3wlnw33hB4ybsAd_SK8N-UP6LnrgSWNsL_NDLwMm1Cbq87CnLfWeflvV3jnyXjzScfnIjsZHrntUGXU54Alc5_YYXI7KwwfGT0nrIrHulsF9WSPEvSyHspybqeOu1KKjfZNz6Q3TESjJEuUHFl-gK3_9djjSDRXhTtat7T4gQDLN_BCelUiRLXqdoLX7WfY33rjFKX3dW3Vixf2snvkh7L5uLm5C5WjBh3j2XSfmT3e35dZyZBp0xz9uledlSnCC5kqiUTAcUR2-TDVPcMHnI-OWEALIqtHaQhWMdTR6g)
Fellow patriot,

If you’re fortunate enough to know a Marine, you know we carry our identity as a Marine with us to the grave.

My service in the United States Marine Corps was a life-changing commitment, and it has continued to shape mine as I have returned to civilian life.

**Even now, as I’m fighting to win a seat in the United States Congress, I’m doing so with Honor, Courage and Commitment.**

I don’t back down from a fight, and when there is a fight, I make sure I’m there first.

When I saw my city suffering from economic hardship and rampant crime due to poor leadership, I took on an entrenched & well-funded incumbent and won election as Mayor.

Now, I see the country that I served to protect suffering from the exact same crises _and worse_ , [**so I’m jumping into the fight to fix it.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c7d42b266d1145e48e111dc308e18fc4&_e=kTp-vWcvQ9xJK2Phm8v7CowuBhBGzAOoPnKv0Iuv5sLLMQPY-2ZfuMcEpQ50mSiyUVeNXB9wQgZ1Flsp3DUzaTY3wlnw33hB4ybsAd_SK8N-UP6LnrgSWNsL_NDLwMm1Cbq87CnLfWeflvV3jnyXjzScfnIjsZHrntUGXU54Alc5_YYXI7KwwfGT0nrIrHulsF9WSPEvSyHspybqeOu1KKjfZNz6Q3TESjJEuUHFl-j_RdCIufX5UazfksMEKLhk5qMlc1u9pWKqEF_3ypJfelcsQXd7aHQ9mzgsgqcwDZK_oRfubXPD1JDFF1kFdoT0mVfbRYF0qIpqjv2L4nWxho9K6IJROBiW7AK7gAAM2f4Etmdbm7g0SowaYdWZkwH7)

[ ** SEND A MARINE TO CONGRESS ➞ **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c7d42b266d1145e48e111dc308e18fc4&_e=kTp-vWcvQ9xJK2Phm8v7CowuBhBGzAOoPnKv0Iuv5sLLMQPY-2ZfuMcEpQ50mSiyUVeNXB9wQgZ1Flsp3DUzaTY3wlnw33hB4ybsAd_SK8N-UP6LnrgSWNsL_NDLwMm1Cbq87CnLfWeflvV3jnyXjzScfnIjsZHrntUGXU54Alc5_YYXI7KwwfGT0nrIrHulsF9WSPEvSyHspybqeOu1KKjfZNz6Q3TESjJEuUHFl-hGalC9PhU9o6D7-T7QDjiWw9YVx9OJ9a_XmxFkE_oa-I36SociLyN0P4GZqp6fb17EPMfJTABKsEED7BhQ2vW9WAy0LV6zXbSk-76yS0XmAIEgvFdcybm3dqXWY9Js7NkRVcILYeaM1H1HrAt-q18Y)
**But no Marine goes into battle alone** , which is why I need your support in my fight to win one of the most competitive Congressional seats on the ballot in 2024 – California’s 9th District.

[**Will you send a Marine and conservative patriot to Congress by chipping in anything you can to my campaign today?**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c7d42b266d1145e48e111dc308e18fc4&_e=kTp-vWcvQ9xJK2Phm8v7CowuBhBGzAOoPnKv0Iuv5sLLMQPY-2ZfuMcEpQ50mSiyUVeNXB9wQgZ1Flsp3DUzaTY3wlnw33hB4ybsAd_SK8N-UP6LnrgSWNsL_NDLwMm1Cbq87CnLfWeflvV3jnyXjzScfnIjsZHrntUGXU54Alc5_YYXI7KwwfGT0nrIrHulsF9WSPEvSyHspybqeOu1KKjfZNz6Q3TESjJEuUHFl-jmpjsVnoKk0XGVhGwn7ZDTG5QS4cd0QMP-dWxs7LgSC1GyCASE-iWttQv1PyMQ2lxRIkRLlA7GKjVLwsW1LItvn3JBjup5NWcCguyJu11YKuXXceb3rOPMSJUlJw8m9Z0QvegOtmtdX9r0fy5cxVJ-)

Our current leadership has failed to secure our borders and compromised our national security; they’ve allowed drugs & crime to take over our communities; they’ve been reckless spenders – driving up our national debt and burdening families with out-of-control inflation; they’ve abandoned our military & veterans; and they’ve made our nation weaker.

**It’s the work of politicians, and it’s time we relieved them of their duties.**

I need your help to win this seat so we have leaders in Washington who will serve our country and our people, instead of their own agendas.

You trust our Marines to protect our nation. _Will you trust one to help save it?_ [**Please join my campaign today with a contribution of any amount, and let’s take our country back!**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c7d42b266d1145e48e111dc308e18fc4&_e=kTp-vWcvQ9xJK2Phm8v7CowuBhBGzAOoPnKv0Iuv5sLLMQPY-2ZfuMcEpQ50mSiyUVeNXB9wQgZ1Flsp3DUzaTY3wlnw33hB4ybsAd_SK8N-UP6LnrgSWNsL_NDLwMm1Cbq87CnLfWeflvV3jnyXjzScfnIjsZHrntUGXU54Alc5_YYXI7KwwfGT0nrIrHulsF9WSPEvSyHspybqeOu1KKjfZNz6Q3TESjJEuUHFl-ibLdLR0O_iJD2GqK0CsllMDB6g_zlMduAgGgyEHn0s2bRCLCfwH5LLO0AvsMOY9puyJU-Lb0Of_mCbCPY-8Yp-2Snt_97wJ-Z80bvKU0sa7Xtddz_4qHlcrQ5Pd8tTZSRePPMGoIrbOegUdSN9w2gM)

Semper Fi!

Kevin Lincoln
Veteran, USMC
Republican for Congress

[ ** SEND A MARINE TO CONGRESS ➞ **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c7d42b266d1145e48e111dc308e18fc4&_e=kTp-vWcvQ9xJK2Phm8v7CowuBhBGzAOoPnKv0Iuv5sLLMQPY-2ZfuMcEpQ50mSiyUVeNXB9wQgZ1Flsp3DUzaTY3wlnw33hB4ybsAd_SK8N-UP6LnrgSWNsL_NDLwMm1Cbq87CnLfWeflvV3jnyXjzScfnIjsZHrntUGXU54Alc5_YYXI7KwwfGT0nrIrHulsF9WSPEvSyHspybqeOu1KKjfZNz6Q3TESjJEuUHFl-gjVq6EAUQzt8gWqxdtDuJAV6haAhQLNJCOi8zcGRnMppzEgYrfz9XHdul2Msg0NnHVayLYrwbO-vrW1rTPATLANsxBeYfTHpOFi1gWxEnsxOuhLgnFYxOZenpMeOVegBdcPk9X37U8RaqeM56Gi04K)

| **Meet Kevin Lincoln
**
My name is Kevin Lincoln, and my story, is the Valley’s story. I am a 3rd generation Stocktonian, raising a 4th generation in the city I love. I’m the grandson of Mexican immigrants, and my stepfather is an Army veteran.

Like many Stocktonians, my family has overcome economic setbacks. My own father struggled to survive on these streets, and was at one time, homeless. But I never let adversity define me. I joined the Marines and served in the White House Military Office, assigned to Marine One. I graduated college while working full-time and raising a family. I’ve worked in corporate America and served our community as a pastor, and as a non-profit leader.

I’m blessed with a beautiful wife, Bonnie, and two amazing children. I’ve lived a life of service, but the greatest honor of my life has been giving back to my community, through serving as Mayor of my hometown, Stockton.
[ ** SEND KEVIN TO CONGRESS ➞ **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c7d42b266d1145e48e111dc308e18fc4&_e=kTp-vWcvQ9xJK2Phm8v7CowuBhBGzAOoPnKv0Iuv5sLLMQPY-2ZfuMcEpQ50mSiyUVeNXB9wQgZ1Flsp3DUzaTY3wlnw33hB4ybsAd_SK8N-UP6LnrgSWNsL_NDLwMm1Cbq87CnLfWeflvV3jnyXjzScfnIjsZHrntUGXU54Alc5_YYXI7KwwfGT0nrIrHulsF9WSPEvSyHspybqeOu1KKjfZNz6Q3TESjJEuUHFl-gxrd1xMcsll-PeEokM0qUJDURwVCmIeWqBAGXwDJozBRqp82E3eT5sveKM6VLTzY2oNsfEsMmRoqRRxE7fGWmuosTclsFu6rC3TKaKKDRasj1J2ag9k13OdNYQJCbhQHabarPQHo--Mxj8kicrH944)

name: Stephen Miller (America First Legal)
subject: We Are Investigating Pro-Hamas Events
body:

Fellow Conservative, I have important news to share with you related to the shocking, seemingly ubiquitous pro-Hamas events and actions at American college campuses... **_We have opened an aggressive investigation into the Biden Administration 's Department of Education regarding the pro-Hamas actions taking place on college campuses_** and their response to them. We strongly suspect there to be significant government misconduct afoot, which is being suppressed by the corporate media and the Biden administration itself. These shocking pro-Hamas riots and rallies have included physical attacks, vandalism, intimidation, threats of violence, and overt advocacy for Hamas. In many cases, Hamas terrorism has been promoted and even celebrated by professors, staff, and administrators. American law has long prohibited advocacy and material support for known terrorist groups, including Hamas. Many of these events are extremely anti-American and include calls for the destruction of America. So why do we see no action being taken by the Biden administration? In our view, foreigners in the United States on student visas who support Hamas and terrorism should be immediately deported. _**People who hate our country and our way of life are not welcome in America.**_ _**We must demand that the Biden Administration take action or be exposed ...**_ [ **_DONATE NOW TO HELP US FIGHT BACK >>_**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=4b0b6c1105bc40d29d69d39a9fd7c4f2&_e=fZh2eHkeUzkFhmliU4dIbxHmvr-0cVnwBYYrwuM3ddzGTgteG4F7E8E-21FC7EET7hbHrVmoGg6RQ7gBt0svgp_PjDMlxUa7jQnKhQ1va5c4JxLg_UZhzsWTyzMqHcC6305uKQqwlFMRlgM015_xFpXev0weF4cDfGYl97HG5T0AEYg3-6vaP7ZigIdcKnAjmG5ZUTiN77Z6w5KFOykOx1E6NjcgJyJo486Ww5Rp_hgFrY6wki2GcBV4iNbuewzwKhDw9-d7fF0hhuHH7oXwRTvf_tk7eeF8fYknjtmxZOS-qgUB7EDwNppKRzenZOR3LjMhdETrdguEybKHLTSQqa-oZA48oNcknBtStQ1J53nikqqYrKe-FstrKr6C-mTbA5w2Rwsd0bQzUy6_PQ_mLWF21o6eTyKMOuVBdD3eO3z7AO1GZzGkDBjIV4VkwUaB) American taxpayers deserve to know what Biden's Department of Education is doing to enforce our laws and to hold college administrators and the vicious, disgraceful, un-American anti-Semites they coddle and empower, accountable. **Our investigation is the first step in our effort to stop this hateful chaos and expose those who allow it.**[**_Please_**** _rush financial support_**** _to America First Legal right now_ >>**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=4b0b6c1105bc40d29d69d39a9fd7c4f2&_e=fZh2eHkeUzkFhmliU4dIbxHmvr-0cVnwBYYrwuM3ddzGTgteG4F7E8E-21FC7EET7hbHrVmoGg6RQ7gBt0svgp_PjDMlxUa7jQnKhQ1va5c4JxLg_UZhzsWTyzMqHcC6305uKQqwlFMRlgM015_xFpXev0weF4cDfGYl97HG5T0AEYg3-6vaP7ZigIdcKnAjmG5ZUTiN77Z6w5KFOykOx1E6NjcgJyJo486Ww5Rp_hgFrY6wki2GcBV4iNbuewzwKhDw9-d7fF0hhuHH7oXwRTvf_tk7eeF8fYknjtmxZOTXD2XzdV01jfzoLINp8RUy8otZ-gfQVFsJ4yjHyyf3JH4Uec7hwkE3YsgS5nkQhjKDZnj9BaqM4tzAG8Nai837MtcOBv9l25wb3KL7rIsQxQ4mFmle0GWo3fZIK7Jqqoxg_Wt4ZkGmA2xx5hWHKHB1)** ** _**Thank you! **_

**The GOP spent a whopping $77 million to win last year’s Senate race in Wisconsin, and won by ONE percentage point.** It’s clear that they intend to do (and spend) whatever it takes to squeak by again to flip my seat red this time around.
Senate Republicans are looking to recruit candidates with massive personal wealth to jump into the race — including right-wing megamillionaire, Eric Hovde, who said he’d spend **$15 to $20 million out of his own pocket to defeat me.**
Going up against an opponent with a virtually unlimited campaign warchest would be a tall order, Peter. That’s why it’s so important we get to work building the resources it’ll take to fight back against the inevitable flood of GOP attacks and keep this seat blue for Democrats. But I can’t do it without you.
[_**Will you split a donation between HER Time and my reelection campaign to help us defend our Democratic Senate majority and keep Wisconsin blue in 2024? clean_body: | = Hi Peter, Tammy Baldwin here with an important update on our campaign: CNN just named my U.S. Senate seat in Wisconsin as one of the top 10 most likely to flip next year. = | = The GOP spent a whopping $77 million to win last year’s Senate race in Wisconsin, and won by ONE percentage point. It’s clear that they intend to do (and spend) whatever it takes to squeak by again to flip my seat red this time around. Senate Republicans are looking to recruit candidates with massive personal wealth to jump into the race — including right-wing megamillionaire, Eric Hovde, who said he’d spend $15 to $20 million out of his own pocket to defeat me. Going up against an opponent with a virtually unlimited campaign warchest would be a tall order, Peter. That’s why it’s so important we get to work building the resources it’ll take to fight back against the inevitable flood of GOP attacks and keep this seat blue for Democrats. But I can’t do it without you. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Tammy Baldwin and HER Time will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thanks for being a part of this team. — Tammy Baldwin HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

body:
In 2022, Hillary became the first woman in history to represent this district in Congress. In the same election, Michigan passed a ballot initiative to secure access to reproductive healthcare in Michigan and elected pro-choice champions up and down the ballot.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73782641/439615450/664569766?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2023-11-21_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjEzNTAzMi1jZjg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=85ffWMyYBsu2k8gW7A9Sg0gNE_eMeku0tialNnMBLiQ=)
---
| Team, Here is a fun riddle for your Tuesday afternoon. _**What do all of Hillary’s opponents have in common (other than being MAGA extremists, of course)?**_
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73782642/439615451/664569766?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2023-11-21_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjEzNTAzMi1jZjg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=85ffWMyYBsu2k8gW7A9Sg0gNE_eMeku0tialNnMBLiQ=)
_**Yep, you got it. They are all men.**_ They have never once had to worry about their bodily autonomy being threatened by a group of legislators in some faraway back room. In 2022, Hillary became the first woman in history to represent this district in Congress. name: Ron Wyden
subject: I held the first Congressional hearing on protecting access to mifepristone
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
Over 30 years later, I’m still fighting with everything I've got to protect reproductive care.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73782813/439622296/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzk5ZmQ4ZC1kMTg4LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KoEFoX0hMTNaSKWZODbPPG4HmufEc_wSV1R_1yJK0SY=&emci=a7feb22d-b488-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=0799fd8d-d188-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=9818364)
---

| | When the far-right overturned _Roe v. Wade_ in 2022, I – and many others – warned that Republicans wouldn't stop at overturning _Roe_. I've long been afraid that they will go after every facet of reproductive freedom. **Unfortunately, they're continuing to prove me right. In 2023, they've done everything they can to attack another pillar of reproductive care: access to the abortion medication mifepristone.** This spring, right-wing activists hand-picked an extremist judge in Texas to rule in their favor and further restrict access to the most commonly-used abortion medication in the country – even in states where abortion remains legal. Fortunately, the Supreme Court temporarily blocked the lower court's radical and illegitimate decision. This means that for the time being, mifepristone remains on the market for millions of Americans. Now, as we wait for the Supreme Court to decide whether or not it will take up the mifepristone case, anti-choice Republicans are desperate and trying _yet again_ to rig the game and rip away Americans' constitutional rights to privacy and reproductive freedom. Earlier this month, three GOP state attorneys general (of Missouri, Kansas, and Idaho) filed a motion to join the suit of the plaintiffs who kicked off this period of legal chaos. They're trying to advance a radical argument that states have standing to sue the FDA for allowing mifepristone to be bought and sold. **In effect: they want to see the harsh anti-choice policies of their states take effect in other states.** I'll be clear: I'm not about to let right-wing extremists impose their policies — policies that keep losing at the ballot box across the country — on Oregonians or the rest of the country. As we just saw days ago, voters across the country continue to send the strong message that they want to protect their reproductive freedom, not have it clawed back by far-right extremists. I held the first Congressional hearing on protecting access to mifepristone back in 1990. Over 30 years later, I'm still fighting with everything I've got to protect access to reproductive care. Even before the initial Texas decision on mifepristone came down, **I took to the Senate floor and called on the Biden administration to guarantee access to mifepristone by ignoring illegitimate rulings and keeping mifepristone on the market**. The days and weeks ahead demand vigilance. We must continue to ensure that folks have the correct information about mifepristone, and we have to keep shining a light on the despicable attempts by the GOP to impose their will on the reproductive healthcare decisions of millions of Americans. clean_body: Over 30 years later, I’m still fighting with everything I've got to protect reproductive care. | | | | When the far-right overturned Roe v. Wade in 2022, I – and many others – warned that Republicans wouldn't stop at overturning Roe. I've long been afraid that they will go after every facet of reproductive freedom. Unfortunately, they're continuing to prove me right. In 2023, they've done everything they can to attack another pillar of reproductive care: access to the abortion medication mifepristone. This spring, right-wing activists hand-picked an extremist judge in Texas to rule in their favor and further restrict access to the most commonly-used abortion medication in the country – even in states where abortion remains legal. Fortunately, the Supreme Court temporarily blocked the lower court's radical and illegitimate decision. This means that for the time being, mifepristone remains on the market for millions of Americans. Now, as we wait for the Supreme Court to decide whether or not it will take up the mifepristone case, anti-choice Republicans are desperate and trying yet again to rig the game and rip away Americans' constitutional rights to privacy and reproductive freedom. Earlier this month, three GOP state attorneys general (of Missouri, Kansas, and Idaho) filed a motion to join the suit of the plaintiffs who kicked off this period of legal chaos. They're trying to advance a radical argument that states have standing to sue the FDA for allowing mifepristone to be bought and sold. In effect: they want to see the harsh anti-choice policies of their states take effect in other states. I'll be clear: I'm not about to let right-wing extremists impose their policies — policies that keep losing at the ballot box across the country — on Oregonians or the rest of the country. As we just saw days ago, voters across the country continue to send the strong message that they want to protect their reproductive freedom, not have it clawed back by far-right extremists. I held the first Congressional hearing on protecting access to mifepristone back in 1990. Over 30 years later, I'm still fighting with everything I've got to protect access to reproductive care. Even before the initial Texas decision on mifepristone came down, I took to the Senate floor and called on the Biden administration to guarantee access to mifepristone by ignoring illegitimate rulings and keeping mifepristone on the market. The days and weeks ahead demand vigilance. We must continue to ensure that folks have the correct information about mifepristone, and we have to keep shining a light on the despicable attempts by the GOP to impose their will on the reproductive healthcare decisions of millions of Americans. = Thank you, Ron | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate. | This email was sent by Wyden for Senate P.O. Box 3498 Portland, OR 97208 United States Email is an important way for Ron Wyden to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. name: =?utf-8?Q?Dan=20Cox?=
subject: MD Gun Law Struck Down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Cox for Congress, Inc
body:
In the MD House I have fought for your Second Amendment rights; in Congress I will defend those rights unwaveringly. | | | |
---
| | |
---
| [Contribute to Dan Cox for Congress Here](https://coxforfreedom.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=0a119c8d19&e=5bb5efcda7 "Contribute to Dan Cox for Congress Here")
---
|
## Constitutional Win:
Maryland Gun "HQL" License Law Struck Down by U.S. Fourth Circuit Court of Appeals.
Friend,
As the former Second Amendment Work Group Chair in the Republican Caucus of the Maryland House of Delegates, and as an attorney, I have fought in the public Arena for many years in support of our Second Amendment rights.

As your next Congressman I will stand with unwavering support of our natural and constitutional right to self defense and to keep and bear arms.

There are few other organizations in Maryland who are doing such good work to defend the Second Amendment than my friend Mark Pennack and Maryland Shall Issue. And today he has won for Marylander's a major victory for our right to keep and bear arms.

This is a bi-partisan issue, with nearly half of Americans owning firearms, and nearly a quarter carrying a sidearm for self-defense on their person daily or on some occasions, according to Statista.

Today, the United States Court of Appeals for the Fourth Circuit in Richmond, Virginia, which includes Maryland in its jurisdiction, held that Maryland's "HQL" law requiring licensure before a United States citizen can purchase a handgun is unconstitutional and unlawful. After seven years of litigation, the law was struck down. You can read the opinion [here](https://coxforfreedom.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=db12c0122f&e=5bb5efcda7).

**_This again shows we must never give up the defense of our Constitutional rights. _** Will you help me tonight to raise the war-chest needed to stand for those Constitutional rights, unwaveringly, as I have proven in the Maryland Legislature? I need your help now to show the Democrats our strength for this important seat that could determine who controls Congress, and prevent radical gun licensure and confiscation.

Thank you in advance. Please help Valerie and me run this race with your contribution. The Sixth District is more than winnable - it is listed by the NRCC as one of four districts nationwide slated to be flipped RED in 2024. And with your urgently needed help, we have the team, strategy and name recognition to win. Please contribute tonight.

Yours for saving America for our children,

---

name: Adam Schiff
subject: David
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=4543%2E5257348%2Elb0grZ ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek —

I’m a very lucky man. I’ve been blessed with a loving family, a wonderful
wife, amazing children, and good friends.

This week, I’m also thinking about my chosen family: my little brother,
David.

We met over thirty years ago when we were paired together through Big
Brothers of Greater Los Angeles – a mentorship program that empowers youth
by pairing them with a “Big Brother.”

The first question in David’s application for a Big Brother was, “If you
could have three things, what would you wish for?”

Derek, his wishes
were for a Big Brother, a puppy, and a beautiful world. At the time of his
application, he was little more than five years old. What five year old
uses one of his precious wishes for a beautiful world?

I had to meet him. We were paired for a day as a “trial run.” We went to
the beach in Venice, where I was living at the time. And after an
afternoon battling the crashing waves and having a blast, we dubbed
ourselves “The Survivors.” That was the start of one of the most important
relationships of my life.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2023_abs_em.uaqk5d&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231121_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=4543%2E5257348%2Elb0grZ ]A throwback photo of Adam giving his brother, David, a piggy-back ride

David was a groomsman at my wedding. I had the privilege of watching him
graduate from Yale, USC film school, and go on to a career as an
award-winning TV writer and producer. I even walked the picket line with
him and his WGA family earlier this year, fighting for and winning a
better contract.

We have learned so much from each other, and we’re family. I wouldn’t be
here — and running for U.S. Senate — without David.

Derek, I’m
running for Senate to create a beautiful world — the one that David wished
for as a child. A world where our children and grandchildren have clean
air to breathe and clean water to drink. A world where people do not
struggle to keep a roof over their heads or to pay for their prescription
drugs. A world where the truth and decency matter.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2023_abs_em.uaqk5d&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231121_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=1005&akid=4543%2E5257348%2Elb0grZ ]If you support this vision, please chip in
$3 or
another amount to my campaign today.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=nov2023_abs_em.5RW9ow&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231121_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=1006&akid=4543%2E5257348%2Elb0grZ ]EXPRESS DONATE
$3

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=nov2023_abs_em.5RW9ow&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231121_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1007&akid=4543%2E5257348%2Elb0grZ ]EXPRESS DONATE

clean_body: [ ]Adam Schiff for Senate Derek — I’m a very lucky man. I’ve been blessed with a loving family, a wonderful wife, amazing children, and good friends. This week, I’m also thinking about my chosen family: my little brother, David. We met over thirty years ago when we were paired together through Big Brothers of Greater Los Angeles – a mentorship program that empowers youth by pairing them with a “Big Brother.” The first question in David’s application for a Big Brother was, “If you could have three things, what would you wish for?” Derek, his wishes were for a Big Brother, a puppy, and a beautiful world. At the time of his application, he was little more than five years old. What five year old uses one of his precious wishes for a beautiful world? I had to meet him. We were paired for a day as a “trial run.” We went to the beach in Venice, where I was living at the time. And after an afternoon battling the crashing waves and having a blast, we dubbed ourselves “The Survivors.” That was the start of one of the most important relationships of my life. [ ]A throwback photo of Adam giving his brother, David, a piggy-back ride David was a groomsman at my wedding. I had the privilege of watching him graduate from Yale, USC film school, and go on to a career as an award-winning TV writer and producer. I even walked the picket line with him and his WGA family earlier this year, fighting for and winning a better contract. We have learned so much from each other, and we’re family. I wouldn’t be here — and running for U.S. Senate — without David. Derek, I’m running for Senate to create a beautiful world — the one that David wished for as a child. A world where our children and grandchildren have clean air to breathe and clean water to drink. A world where people do not struggle to keep a roof over their heads or to pay for their prescription drugs. A world where the truth and decency matter. [ ]If you support this vision, please chip in $3 or another amount to my campaign today. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $3 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $10 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $25 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $50 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $100 [ ]ANOTHER AMOUNT I wouldn’t be who I am today without David. I hope that this week, you have the opportunity to express love and gratitude to the important people in your life. Thank you for reading this message. — Adam [ ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner [ ]DONATE MONTHLY 135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502 [ ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ ]Privacy Policy PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

Fellow Patriot,
Our government gets bigger and bigger every year – and lately, no one seems to question it.

_That needs to change.

In the words of great President Ronald Regan, “The nine most terrifying words in the English language are ‘I’m from the government and I’m here to help.”_

And look at what Javier Mileli did in Argentina where he vowed to slash spending and shrink the government by axing useless ministries like the one for "Women, Genders and Diversity."

Kat Cammack is serving her second term representing the people of Northeastern Florida in Congress. She won the seat on a conservative platform of growing jobs, securing our southern border, standing up for law enforcement, defending our Second Amendment, promoting fiscal responsibility, and defending life.
Congresswoman Cammack sits on the House Committee on Energy and Commerce and House Committee on Agriculture, where she is the only Florida Republican serving the Sunshine State's farmers, ranchers, and producers. She was also appointed to the Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government.
Kat and her husband Matt, who is a firefighter, paramedic, and SWAT medic, proudly call Gainesville, Florida home.

clean_body: | | | | Our government is out of control. | Fellow Patriot, Our government gets bigger and bigger every year – and lately, no one seems to question it. That needs to change. In the words of great President Ronald Regan, “The nine most terrifying words in the English language are ‘I’m from the government and I’m here to help.” And look at what Javier Mileli did in Argentina where he vowed to slash spending and shrink the government by axing useless ministries like the one for "Women, Genders and Diversity." | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you, Team Cammack | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- | Kat Cammack is serving her second term representing the people of Northeastern Florida in Congress. She won the seat on a conservative platform of growing jobs, securing our southern border, standing up for law enforcement, defending our Second Amendment, promoting fiscal responsibility, and defending life. Congresswoman Cammack sits on the House Committee on Energy and Commerce and House Committee on Agriculture, where she is the only Florida Republican serving the Sunshine State's farmers, ranchers, and producers. She was also appointed to the Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government. Kat and her husband Matt, who is a firefighter, paramedic, and SWAT medic, proudly call Gainesville, Florida home. | | FOLLOW KAT ONLINE | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- Donate by Mail Kat For Congress 5200 NW 43rd Street SUITE 102-180 Gainesville, FL, 32606 | | [PAID FOR BY KAT FOR CONGRESS]() Cammack Surveys 5200 NW 43rd St, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 = \- =

subject: A bit of tough news. (But you can help turn things around!)

body:
We can’t let our Republican opponent get any more traction in the polls.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=33523%2E3422442%2EIRieFP)
Derek, this is tough news:
With just over three months until the primary election, a brand new poll shows Katie trailing behind our top opponent. In this same poll, our GOP challenger is inching up higher and is close to over-taking Katie.
We can’t let our Republican opponent get any more traction with voters. A reminder: California has a “jungle primary” which means the top two vote-getters, regardless of party, move on to the general election in November. We can’t let Katie fall out of the top two.
Katie will be the Senator Californians deserve. Whether she has her whiteboard or not, you can count on her to hold power to account.
**Katie is the only candidate in this race rejecting contributions from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, and Big Oil, Big Pharma and Big Bank CEOs.**
[**We’re funding this campaign the right way—with grassroots contributions from emails like this one. Will you rush a $5 contribution right now to help ensure we have the resources to reach the voters who will decide the outcome of this election?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231121-2?refcode=EMAN21_2_POL_20231121_V1_F&refcode2=33523_3422442_IRieFP&akid=33523%2E3422442%2EIRieFP)

-KPHQ

Peter - when I became Speaker of the House on October 25th, I knew one of the first things we needed to do was build out our team of supporters online.

So, we got to work immediately and [**set a goal of finding 100,000 conservatives to join Team Johnson by the time Thanksgiving rolled around.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=07fcf1e0dbc547c09dce7b4bee07417d&_e=RlrtrRVBYprKwSXcpI2SY2xhNmjzcjbJOi26O6xDaHL21vlMPzA_rjeVCwL-OaExwHetGsBQnUbcKpU6xd4CQXD63ebf6FVliYFb84XaW7UGmI_1_rTFwRKpxuL4KGesY_I8oJ61g3invq4Yv7ywWCBDkxHT_ChVW2wfxNJG4xxb2M3-hyCN5xuw1A0GJNAYHLh9FyN23OcyYhR34J89KBvt4Vpm7TZg_A5DuQxRtXqRTmDeBIuQwQMVAnvswzkyl7uBQA1xMD3sb6p5yxbrjtLJ2D90rBMfmYtNSClSwGx5BDPzQgnycq7CczqOKsYfD6svIHcCo63Gzhlf84rMBoZnMDnqdbCKclMdzTGQBPXuCKOv3U71cD48Texj2ar3lXNHWsyBzaofbGOHv0vA4vG-sG4iz3iPDGjVTJuL6sE%3D)

To date, we have not hit our goal. With Thanksgiving just around the corner, we have a lot of work to do.

If you've already signaled your support for our team as we work to hold onto our thin majority heading into next year's election, _thank you._ If you haven't, [**please consider being one of the thousands of signatures I need to find before the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade begins on Thanksgiving morning.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=07fcf1e0dbc547c09dce7b4bee07417d&_e=RlrtrRVBYprKwSXcpI2SY2xhNmjzcjbJOi26O6xDaHL21vlMPzA_rjeVCwL-OaExwHetGsBQnUbcKpU6xd4CQXD63ebf6FVliYFb84XaW7UGmI_1_rTFwRKpxuL4KGesY_I8oJ61g3invq4Yv7ywWCBDkxHT_ChVW2wfxNJG4xxb2M3-hyCN5xuw1A0GJNAYHLh9FyN23OcyYhR34J89KBvt4Vpm7TZg_A5DuQxRtXqRTmDeBIuQwQMVAnvswzkyYnLiT-uzqydDQ1ATzzJA3N4u1RLzsWpkaOdL5tRDrZhfke0wsHO2cGwBnIHd8gSIMkq3aR6DyWlv7U8AmMZVJUhk3RpT8A2yL-nQyENl_xpz7DVdQr3a1xyeEnXrDlSY9vBHMosD3wbwsMpk1Pk_BQ2d8cFhyVldY6TPAmDoNFg%3D)

Peter, Democrats have spent the last three years under President Biden trying to turn our great nation into a banana republic.

While voters don't seem to have much of an appetite for Joe Biden, Democrats in the House and Senate have done everything they can to prop up his failing presidency while undoing all the critical work President Trump and Congressional Republicans moved forward in recent years.

We're doing our best to continue providing conservative solutions to our nation's most vexing concerns. _Still, I must be honest - doing so would be infinitely easier if we had a more significant majority._ [**We only have a slim cushion right now, meaning there is ZERO room for error.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=07fcf1e0dbc547c09dce7b4bee07417d&_e=RlrtrRVBYprKwSXcpI2SY2xhNmjzcjbJOi26O6xDaHL21vlMPzA_rjeVCwL-OaExwHetGsBQnUbcKpU6xd4CQXD63ebf6FVliYFb84XaW7UGmI_1_rTFwRKpxuL4KGesY_I8oJ61g3invq4Yv7ywWCBDkxHT_ChVW2wfxNJG4xxb2M3-hyCN5xuw1A0GJNAYHLh9FyN23OcyYhR34J89KBvt4Vpm7TZg_A5DuQxRtXqRTmDeBIuQwQMVAnvswzkydHFe8wEjFZtju8Gcjf9MhRG2i_FcCj0xVIVKW1xRtcGzGyC4SL0i4q9IxiAV8ykcrOdCT3prrM12E_qIZmBt2Zrpj3CP3m2KxCWgteKS-mzJMjv5w2f4G2Ct0isbVK8_t6kG87PIzHRb8D7c5IW0tZK8LhLu0JNuu9WVF-JdXys%3D)

Our immediate goals for next year are two-fold:

1. Hold onto the House majority
2. Expand our House majority

**We've seen what happens when Democrats are in the majority: they'll add trillions more to the national debt and launch assaults on our Constitutional liberties.**

[ ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=07fcf1e0dbc547c09dce7b4bee07417d&_e=RlrtrRVBYprKwSXcpI2SY2xhNmjzcjbJOi26O6xDaHL21vlMPzA_rjeVCwL-OaExwHetGsBQnUbcKpU6xd4CQXD63ebf6FVliYFb84XaW7UGmI_1_rTFwRKpxuL4KGesY_I8oJ61g3invq4Yv7ywWCBDkxHT_ChVW2wfxNJG4xxb2M3-hyCN5xuw1A0GJNAYHLh9FyN23OcyYhR34J89KBvt4Vpm7TZg_A5DuQxRtXqRTmDeBIuQwQMVAnvswzkyijl_RTvUYeU3XejzgemDg4_guKgkuY1Qw4S3lWPqM2-FAtHVAB-FZ3kHShLmcU_IvuxUjgYEP19V8sANXxRi8J6JZHls6oldcvwbIq3FsOHMFQQvCLZnc-UzRgepKebtUDIQu1sVXOGezwIqu1GhQWv1CmjrcXO7WWmXfWdx4_8%3D)
[**SIGN HERE ➞**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=07fcf1e0dbc547c09dce7b4bee07417d&_e=RlrtrRVBYprKwSXcpI2SY2xhNmjzcjbJOi26O6xDaHL21vlMPzA_rjeVCwL-OaExwHetGsBQnUbcKpU6xd4CQXD63ebf6FVliYFb84XaW7UGmI_1_rTFwRKpxuL4KGesY_I8oJ61g3invq4Yv7ywWCBDkxHT_ChVW2wfxNJG4xxb2M3-hyCN5xuw1A0GJNAYHLh9FyN23OcyYhR34J89KBvt4Vpm7TZg_A5DuQxRtXqRTmDeBIuQwQMVAnvswzkyjke83Aei2nJZe8pUZUR1pvp6pAkEN40cmTo0DI4blJbLO8GqeCYfiv6OJohv9jqY08886tjnHnb1bOH1C6D2DSf3Y4zr9MbxroR_bgqalXqof8iMO1-X_UpxEolg38UGh7J9ULy1q70wILosmuad9x9VR2KUIyTvlU5I5SyNtmc%3D)
I'm writing today because if we're going to hold onto our slim majority, we must start now. We need help - [**we need more Republicans in the House. We MUST have reinforcements to help us prevent the Biden administration from doing even more damage to our nation.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=07fcf1e0dbc547c09dce7b4bee07417d&_e=RlrtrRVBYprKwSXcpI2SY2xhNmjzcjbJOi26O6xDaHL21vlMPzA_rjeVCwL-OaExwHetGsBQnUbcKpU6xd4CQXD63ebf6FVliYFb84XaW7UGmI_1_rTFwRKpxuL4KGesY_I8oJ61g3invq4Yv7ywWCBDkxHT_ChVW2wfxNJG4xxb2M3-hyCN5xuw1A0GJNAYHLh9FyN23OcyYhR34J89KBvt4Vpm7TZg_A5DuQxRtXqRTmDeBIuQwQMVAnvswzkyN5y8TPVvyN5HU9jU_9PR--R9rFSNAnwkJ7-EA9iaBJbIQSLcKhjPuHPUQMB2KCA1Ruv98cHi0OWkvn30sKlSNyKsHZVrvK2uErDEChCX2oEL8yr79QxH6W_eh2OGx1Xj2fiVpZJIFtfIXtF9OSkBtIIl3Sg1Bv_C19UYyke6a_c%3D)

While the election may not be this month, _**we MUST begin our work today**_ if we're going to defend our majority successfully.

To stop radical legislation from making its way through the Capitol, we need a united conservative movement to stop Joe Biden.

We had a great election night last year and flipped the House after four years of DISASTROUS Democrat control. [**We need you to commit to helping our team EXPAND our majority in 2024.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=07fcf1e0dbc547c09dce7b4bee07417d&_e=RlrtrRVBYprKwSXcpI2SY2xhNmjzcjbJOi26O6xDaHL21vlMPzA_rjeVCwL-OaExwHetGsBQnUbcKpU6xd4CQXD63ebf6FVliYFb84XaW7UGmI_1_rTFwRKpxuL4KGesY_I8oJ61g3invq4Yv7ywWCBDkxHT_ChVW2wfxNJG4xxb2M3-hyCN5xuw1A0GJNAYHLh9FyN23OcyYhR34J89KBvt4Vpm7TZg_A5DuQxRtXqRTmDeBIuQwQMVAnvswzkyvaTw015zzFvvNAdNSu6-7sI9l6bSP1o3UBC9eiXrI6DOyNaTopCtQ8Lwx3o-37ZE_sk1SH9qlYwVfw8zqJ4oE6v3NHYaqSzxXytTGpkcRMtY8gfYL_CozuY9UyFw1uNZRJQV2QKwlItHbWICm4Agp6cxBz6O1p-Nytl181QyUQU%3D)

clean_body: I desperately need you to open this email. While the election may not be this month, we MUST begin our work today if we’re going to defend our majority successfully. | | Peter - when I became Speaker of the House on October 25th, I knew one of the first things we needed to do was build out our team of supporters online. So, we got to work immediately and To date, we have not hit our goal. With Thanksgiving just around the corner, we have a lot of work to do. If you've already signaled your support for our team as we work to hold onto our thin majority heading into next year's election, thank you. If you haven't, Peter, Democrats have spent the last three years under President Biden trying to turn our great nation into a banana republic. While voters don't seem to have much of an appetite for Joe Biden, Democrats in the House and Senate have done everything they can to prop up his failing presidency while undoing all the critical work President Trump and Congressional Republicans moved forward in recent years. We're doing our best to continue providing conservative solutions to our nation's most vexing concerns. Still, I must be honest - doing so would be infinitely easier if we had a more significant majority. Our immediate goals for next year are two-fold: 1. Hold onto the House majority 2. Expand our House majority We've seen what happens when Democrats are in the majority: they'll add trillions more to the national debt and launch assaults on our Constitutional liberties. I'm writing today because if we're going to hold onto our slim majority, we must start now. We need help - While the election may not be this month, we MUST begin our work today if we're going to defend our majority successfully. To stop radical legislation from making its way through the Capitol, we need a united conservative movement to stop Joe Biden. We had a great election night last year and flipped the House after four years of DISASTROUS Democrat control. For America, Mike Johnson Speaker of the House As Speaker, I want to hear from you on the top issues of the day. It's important for us to deliver results for the American people. An invasion the likes of which our country has never seen... | | | [](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=4bb56ccb451041d4829b94cea40e0077&_e=tLUuEDkq-RPp3bA_JJu3g9KG9hyzCp9ngwwgtk8lst6a6oG7hGrq4-nrWWL8jCSEDzWee3GOGMAZZqrT5fJYVanBGFizYWu6DRoWCcdWwSAp7lFrJDJW9lpUq3ffnN79UUcO7KixfBIajlDQ6rbyiWskrGpakq1LFFiQcKZeJ6ZdJ0zb87LD-Ioux2QBfw4Y4xII0e0SqQ6UYv4GbR-PcEkHfCnkkYdBsxq7vzx6yyCNn5F-Sjr_kdxPMGSnJbmV2k2uc4DnCfq7RzV7nhiPXivytIQBPrxHbE2RgvYfyKrRE3CLv-mAbp33NzFxU6Juxo6-Auly_afLJoAlg8fVQnAMioYHqA7xdxDN_vT2Vhr01pzIuk1YLMNiOGQfTpzPn3dx2cgxsTaDKG79Kr9Fb9H_v7-LyeMV3aEpLG7stVml-kt5PExPrTNDkjBQOf19GondzghQAaqb7qurEefEEShTb52SxndjuKpqdfcPIiabRi8YN8bfcjaudpj4sxxk)
---
| | Patriot,

---
I was just in the great state of Texas where I visited the city of Edinburg along our southern border...
---
And let me tell you, we're facing an **I _NVASION_** under Crooked Joe the likes of which our country has never seen.

---
Just four short years ago, under your all-time favorite President _(me)_ , we had the strongest, safest, and most SECURE border in history.

---
But today, our southern border is the most wide-open border in the entire world.

---
**It’s very simple: We are not a country without borders.**

---
_**And we are not** _**safe**_**without borders!**_

---
Crooked Joe has allowed the worst of the worst – the cartels, murderers, rapists, and those on the Terrorist Watchlist – to illegally pour into our country unchecked by the MILLIONS.

---
__But just as I reminded the great people of Texas on Sunday, I want YOU to know that very soon, when I’m back in the White House, America will be SAFE AGAIN!_
_
---
If you’re struggling right now due to the incompetent Crook in the White House who’s destroying America, then please know that I completely understand, and I don’t want you to even _think_ about donating.

---
But if you can contribute, God knows our country needs patriots like YOU now more than ever to help FIRE Crooked Joe once and for all.

---

clean_body: An invasion the likes of which our country has never seen... | | | | | Patriot, I was just in the great state of Texas where I visited the city of Edinburg along our southern border... And let me tell you, we're facing an I NVASION under Crooked Joe the likes of which our country has never seen. Just four short years ago, under your all-time favorite President (me) , we had the strongest, safest, and most SECURE border in history. But today, our southern border is the most wide-open border in the entire world. It’s very simple: We are not a country without borders. And we are not safewithout borders! Crooked Joe has allowed the worst of the worst – the cartels, murderers, rapists, and those on the Terrorist Watchlist – to illegally pour into our country unchecked by the MILLIONS. But just as I reminded the great people of Texas on Sunday, I want YOU to know that very soon, when I’m back in the White House, America will be SAFE AGAIN! If you’re struggling right now due to the incompetent Crook in the White House who’s destroying America, then please know that I completely understand, and I don’t want you to even think about donating. But if you can contribute, God knows our country needs patriots like YOU now more than ever to help FIRE Crooked Joe once and for all. | | Thank you, Donald J. Peter - when I became Speaker of the House on October 25th, I knew one of the first things we needed to do was build out our team of supporters online.

So, we got to work immediately and [**set a goal of finding 100,000 conservatives to join Team Johnson by the time Thanksgiving rolled around.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8ba460f58fea407daa50a3fb501b7a92&_e=vlV1Aj77IalAS2aqrf4N-ZMLWRBp6Al9G0ajI7_tibCXCWE71vEt3uzKZCPWdBbAplpbDUOkZeS-Ub6LOMN8EGMLuQj6MvoAerKvqR47yNy7W9UBZjD5DUPwpfqIvu23_L5RAtVTiRBAUkzxj-vEkV9XQ1rqVHSWkHGA4-FTJgmBHrEW4S1ioU0_hL3xvxVFwPqRg1X-9ybitXJO7noJDmiLIODW-f7hkRDhxerWtmBLqLxxIwztAZLshlHAJbqVMeKhR_gPjodbEL20gI6ohqU7F-ecqxzK2hFAn4TtrvErFWmtgkDPcnYJzb4_n0EWrvfDvseFfTc-Pwe4_4Avrcnp4lIzVEjjRe4uDZS827aq_eRUKAS2F1BXa2Fadj4WHIBhsJXVhDWu0tOJZKbC7A%3D%3D)

To date, we have not hit our goal. With Thanksgiving just around the corner, we have a lot of work to do.

If you've already signaled your support for our team as we work to hold onto our thin majority heading into next year's election, _thank you._ If you haven't, [**please consider being one of the thousands of signatures I need to find before the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade begins on Thanksgiving morning.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8ba460f58fea407daa50a3fb501b7a92&_e=vlV1Aj77IalAS2aqrf4N-ZMLWRBp6Al9G0ajI7_tibCXCWE71vEt3uzKZCPWdBbAplpbDUOkZeS-Ub6LOMN8EGMLuQj6MvoAerKvqR47yNy7W9UBZjD5DUPwpfqIvu23_L5RAtVTiRBAUkzxj-vEkV9XQ1rqVHSWkHGA4-FTJgmBHrEW4S1ioU0_hL3xvxVFwPqRg1X-9ybitXJO7noJDmiLIODW-f7hkRDhxerWtmBLqLxxIwztAZLshlHAJbqV7FffvK3_mGdQdSiKrKduOq9fARHb7kddqVN76zMPW7t4lLTYe7SJjOsJBjYb9VVxXmt4DsoKRcQdLpHQh6XLvwUpTSHCsG3ZjsH8Ah8K091Io1kSXk1HzWVFnhF8_ZLKb45phH9gypPgi6dQSrevOQ%3D%3D)

Peter, Democrats have spent the last three years under President Biden trying to turn our great nation into a banana republic.

While voters don't seem to have much of an appetite for Joe Biden, Democrats in the House and Senate have done everything they can to prop up his failing presidency while undoing all the critical work President Trump and Congressional Republicans moved forward in recent years.

We're doing our best to continue providing conservative solutions to our nation's most vexing concerns. _Still, I must be honest - doing so would be infinitely easier if we had a more significant majority._ [**We only have a slim cushion right now, meaning there is ZERO room for error.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8ba460f58fea407daa50a3fb501b7a92&_e=vlV1Aj77IalAS2aqrf4N-ZMLWRBp6Al9G0ajI7_tibCXCWE71vEt3uzKZCPWdBbAplpbDUOkZeS-Ub6LOMN8EGMLuQj6MvoAerKvqR47yNy7W9UBZjD5DUPwpfqIvu23_L5RAtVTiRBAUkzxj-vEkV9XQ1rqVHSWkHGA4-FTJgmBHrEW4S1ioU0_hL3xvxVFwPqRg1X-9ybitXJO7noJDmiLIODW-f7hkRDhxerWtmBLqLxxIwztAZLshlHAJbqVxrfp0OjgAJ349aHUFW9oKjkG5WCWRspjFxcTmqp5-cFFIGvXgvuQr_QMkUw3FME7P26A3N8b4WAmZzJx-L3UIE6v8VUjO2lrSIqlzPz53MV6DPZKFI6CWEDUcXOKc-30mRFKVa5-BtDFkDGL54fRwA%3D%3D)

Our immediate goals for next year are two-fold:

1. Hold onto the House majority
2. Expand our House majority

**We've seen what happens when Democrats are in the majority: they'll add trillions more to the national debt and launch assaults on our Constitutional liberties.**

We MUST have reinforcements to help us prevent the Biden administration from doing even more damage to our nation.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8ba460f58fea407daa50a3fb501b7a92&_e=vlV1Aj77IalAS2aqrf4N-ZMLWRBp6Al9G0ajI7_tibCXCWE71vEt3uzKZCPWdBbAplpbDUOkZeS-Ub6LOMN8EGMLuQj6MvoAerKvqR47yNy7W9UBZjD5DUPwpfqIvu23_L5RAtVTiRBAUkzxj-vEkV9XQ1rqVHSWkHGA4-FTJgmBHrEW4S1ioU0_hL3xvxVFwPqRg1X-9ybitXJO7noJDmiLIODW-f7hkRDhxerWtmBLqLxxIwztAZLshlHAJbqVARYVkSG5Z5o-dQ5m3B5-stHT6ULa2gpTfvHlj_kV3s1LNwYpS5wdeoCITfJgOffQq6kebJKkR7J3sV3f-z3KZtkGSJ7hmhGFI3CfKgty1tN6G6MWQNL304oCxrOn9rdjAomJAv-G1FSfQrNmObhY9g%3D%3D)

To stop radical legislation from making its way through the Capitol, we need a united conservative movement to stop Joe Biden.

We had a great election night last year and flipped the House after four years of DISASTROUS Democrat control. clean_body: I’m writing today because if we’re going to hold onto our slim majority, we must start now. | | Peter - when I became Speaker of the House on October 25th, I knew one of the first things we needed to do was build out our team of supporters online. So, we got to work immediately and To date, we have not hit our goal. With Thanksgiving just around the corner, we have a lot of work to do. If you've already signaled your support for our team as we work to hold onto our thin majority heading into next year's election, thank you. If you haven't, Peter, Democrats have spent the last three years under President Biden trying to turn our great nation into a banana republic. While voters don't seem to have much of an appetite for Joe Biden, Democrats in the House and Senate have done everything they can to prop up his failing presidency while undoing all the critical work President Trump and Congressional Republicans moved forward in recent years. We're doing our best to continue providing conservative solutions to our nation's most vexing concerns. Still, I must be honest - doing so would be infinitely easier if we had a more significant majority. Our immediate goals for next year are two-fold: 1. Hold onto the House majority 2. Expand our House majority We've seen what happens when Democrats are in the majority: they'll add trillions more to the national debt and launch assaults on our Constitutional liberties. I'm writing today because if we're going to hold onto our slim majority, we must start now. We need help - While the election may not be this month, we MUST begin our work today if we're going to defend our majority successfully. To stop radical legislation from making its way through the Capitol, we need a united conservative movement to stop Joe Biden. We had a great election night last year and flipped the House after four years of DISASTROUS Democrat control. > ## Coming Soon: ToddCast
> ##
> ### _T_ ruth _o_ n _D_ emand _D_ aily
> ### _Join me, Todd Watson - NEGOP Political Director as I host a series of interviews with Republican elected officials, 2024 candidates, coalition organizers, and leaders from across Nebraska. As we develop our library of podcasts, look to receive emails on the most current events or go to our website for the archives.
>
> This is where I ask the hard questions to bring you truth in Nebraska politics. This is where 2024 candidates can have an opportunity to voice their values outside of the liberal media "gotcha" ugliness.
>
> We have to build our message on our values from election integrity to Pro-Life to Epic tax reform to education...and you, the people of this party, are making a difference. We have to discuss our past election wins/loss, our past legislative priorities, the change in leadership on July 9th 2023, and the upcoming 2024 legislative session. We have to be BOLD and seek the TRUTH._
>
> The NEGOP is funded by hard-working Republicans like **__YOU,__** and again, nationally you are being noticed. Our current fundraising drive has almost achieved something historical.
>
> **We are only about $5,000 away from reaching our $35,000 goal and YOU did this in under 30 days. Individual donations ranged from $5-$5000, but its the number of NEW donors that stands out. **
>
> **Can you help us with this last _push to top $35,000_?**
>
> We have a little over TWO weeks left to meet this fundraising goal. Your dollars are used for operations and resources, NOT direct contributions to politicians. Your dollars fund the county party growth and the resources to connect the Republican Values to the people of Nebraska. **For this grassroots movement to continue, for the NEGOP to stand for OUR VALUES, we need you and every person receiving this message to contribute $25 today. **
>
> Remember, this is a _**true grassroots party**_. We are funded by the people of Nebraska and their **generous donations. **
>
> **Your support is vital in this endeavor, and we will continue this GO FUND NEGOP campaign until we have achieved the TOTAL $35,000 goal. ** There are many different ways to help **_TODAY:_**
> * Contribute $25 ([_CLICK HERE TO SEND YOUR DONATION_](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=69a345b8a7&e=25844e23a8))
> * If you’ve already donated, consider doubling or tripling your contribution.
> * Become an [NEGOP+](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=4574dd4abe&e=25844e23a8) member or increase your [NEGOP+](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=105790d84c&e=25844e23a8) member level.
> * Pray that thousands of Nebraska Republicans (there are 600,000 Nebraska Republicans) provide support to their NEGOP.
>
_**We can do this if we all work together.**_ **Your NEGOP needs your help now.** Todd Watson
> Political Director
> political@ne.gop
>
> The NEGOP cannot do this without YOU. Now is the time to bring your time, talents, and treasures. Donate below and join me in the fight for Nebraska!
>

I desperately need you to open this email. Fellow American - when I became Speaker of the House on October 25th, I knew one of the first things we needed to do was build out our team of supporters online.

So, we got to work immediately and [**set a goal of finding 100,000 conservatives to join Team Johnson by the time Thanksgiving rolled around.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=bea370f7b5094fd2866935983e05dd9a&_e=KITQOGj1nXAnpYGhuBUmvz8xEDSQ7n3hcmYZi2osJ0dRgWB20q2kFqG9byQduhxGqvGEoHyzbKUcbn1-F_Yp2S5pHEk36sg76X-NHFsQayAfgLFmBDM2_IA-UYRxbzeZ2-87-BKfgHkEJT02kb0YcKsBWLifpdSVJfmFV0AbWio9OXIRqMbYFney75XUZfBhLCG-g-sOqhBaXcCo5UjsX2d1tyJVcSGu9ckCZN6op0RqoSjAvNYYv1HvdU3J4tgxRclNoHB1ccS3BDHhIMr_bss7jIiuaiT8WORMtk68BaDkYJaa5BToWBApIL8COJcXuuVVF2M--Xey9NSIcR1999iJCTONMZbA_S4P0qzDEH2Gt6KrrRybuiSWcZzgUw1Wif9kbxnfp5AAfomv7lrgnA%3D%3D)

To date, we have not hit our goal. With Thanksgiving just around the corner, we have a lot of work to do.

If you've already signaled your support for our team as we work to hold onto our thin majority heading into next year's election, _thank you._ If you haven't, [**please consider being one of the thousands of signatures I need to find before the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade begins on Thanksgiving morning.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=bea370f7b5094fd2866935983e05dd9a&_e=KITQOGj1nXAnpYGhuBUmvz8xEDSQ7n3hcmYZi2osJ0dRgWB20q2kFqG9byQduhxGqvGEoHyzbKUcbn1-F_Yp2S5pHEk36sg76X-NHFsQayAfgLFmBDM2_IA-UYRxbzeZ2-87-BKfgHkEJT02kb0YcKsBWLifpdSVJfmFV0AbWio9OXIRqMbYFney75XUZfBhLCG-g-sOqhBaXcCo5UjsX2d1tyJVcSGu9ckCZN6op0RqoSjAvNYYv1HvdU3J4tgxR2yfftETNWzktRebmOPhpqul_xwwseEKXmcBU_PYfmu8aIGzgLKa-n_aMT4lPB4HVA-rgk_c4pnXuki0y0dUcBz9u-YvByrkFAJCQnjYQGILP7lwVpKpQ1wng7FJNn0jnmM0W5i3ygr1rVKLgpGbbg%3D%3D)

Fellow American, Democrats have spent the last three years under President Biden trying to turn our great nation into a banana republic.

While voters don't seem to have much of an appetite for Joe Biden, Democrats in the House and Senate have done everything they can to prop up his failing presidency while undoing all the critical work President Trump and Congressional Republicans moved forward in recent years.

We're doing our best to continue providing conservative solutions to our nation's most vexing concerns. _Still, I must be honest - doing so would be infinitely easier if we had a more significant majority._ [**We only have a slim cushion right now, meaning there is ZERO room for error.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=bea370f7b5094fd2866935983e05dd9a&_e=KITQOGj1nXAnpYGhuBUmvz8xEDSQ7n3hcmYZi2osJ0dRgWB20q2kFqG9byQduhxGqvGEoHyzbKUcbn1-F_Yp2S5pHEk36sg76X-NHFsQayAfgLFmBDM2_IA-UYRxbzeZ2-87-BKfgHkEJT02kb0YcKsBWLifpdSVJfmFV0AbWio9OXIRqMbYFney75XUZfBhLCG-g-sOqhBaXcCo5UjsX2d1tyJVcSGu9ckCZN6op0RqoSjAvNYYv1HvdU3J4tgxAXavGUypr9VCmojp2hzk1Lj00hCyEAWQqX9T-WdUi8f-C-88zMlPaLvhLJitG7NLw4bjWJ1h6U0V-y8IZ6Cdqbu5pgKykG7OlmCXykCVtduSPzq8x9o3yte4c2G6Q-rdNzKWdhEFuPnnRWZDiPp-IQ%3D%3D)

Our immediate goals for next year are two-fold:

1. Hold onto the House majority
2. Expand our House majority

**We've seen what happens when Democrats are in the majority: they'll add trillions more to the national debt and launch assaults on our Constitutional liberties.**

[ ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=bea370f7b5094fd2866935983e05dd9a&_e=KITQOGj1nXAnpYGhuBUmvz8xEDSQ7n3hcmYZi2osJ0dRgWB20q2kFqG9byQduhxGqvGEoHyzbKUcbn1-F_Yp2S5pHEk36sg76X-NHFsQayAfgLFmBDM2_IA-UYRxbzeZ2-87-BKfgHkEJT02kb0YcKsBWLifpdSVJfmFV0AbWio9OXIRqMbYFney75XUZfBhLCG-g-sOqhBaXcCo5UjsX2d1tyJVcSGu9ckCZN6op0RqoSjAvNYYv1HvdU3J4tgxVMh_pW3QXSky4AG2sLnm6UQA3jfcRgh0lTtinUGCDyc1kjXUa8Svx7Dfced73WU-1xMiogjB0k4fFnL_JaP32qKOQWWXypa1Rbkoh3nRD2kf6gv4JeRGc2MwQp3coDV9BGyhkaculWhI5YxQ8WQkUQ%3D%3D)

I'm writing today because if we're going to hold onto our slim majority, we must start now. We need help - [**we need more Republicans in the House. We MUST have reinforcements to help us prevent the Biden administration from doing even more damage to our nation.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=bea370f7b5094fd2866935983e05dd9a&_e=KITQOGj1nXAnpYGhuBUmvz8xEDSQ7n3hcmYZi2osJ0dRgWB20q2kFqG9byQduhxGqvGEoHyzbKUcbn1-F_Yp2S5pHEk36sg76X-NHFsQayAfgLFmBDM2_IA-UYRxbzeZ2-87-BKfgHkEJT02kb0YcKsBWLifpdSVJfmFV0AbWio9OXIRqMbYFney75XUZfBhLCG-g-sOqhBaXcCo5UjsX2d1tyJVcSGu9ckCZN6op0RqoSjAvNYYv1HvdU3J4tgxmmhYuG42p4-oBqC1hpVB5M5UaaLaM-usapUoSncKNi_zYKRq-Wt81vn3ffa11Zq2Dp1NS9LQfVsJu38WHwA-N3aseodErCFIFimXFz8UQ-7_7AvaAUmZ1_x1QzBI85bEgzegBiBYM4aNAvr922CHYw%3D%3D)

While the election may not be this month, _**we MUST begin our work today**_ if we're going to defend our majority successfully.

To stop radical legislation from making its way through the Capitol, we need a united conservative movement to stop Joe Biden.

We had a great election night last year and flipped the House after four years of DISASTROUS Democrat control. [**We need you to commit to helping our team EXPAND our majority in 2024.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=bea370f7b5094fd2866935983e05dd9a&_e=KITQOGj1nXAnpYGhuBUmvz8xEDSQ7n3hcmYZi2osJ0dRgWB20q2kFqG9byQduhxGqvGEoHyzbKUcbn1-F_Yp2S5pHEk36sg76X-NHFsQayAfgLFmBDM2_IA-UYRxbzeZ2-87-BKfgHkEJT02kb0YcKsBWLifpdSVJfmFV0AbWio9OXIRqMbYFney75XUZfBhLCG-g-sOqhBaXcCo5UjsX2d1tyJVcSGu9ckCZN6op0RqoSjAvNYYv1HvdU3J4tgxrqWYhsfMWIP1UsuFBhKX1gF2oS3nE0jw91MwxRqm2Av0MYbAKMM2dbJRfzkSrYnUVuJezyRMMzuIEffVV76-rFcfeDTjEnHMzfErMDexgC9RRBMF1llFIktBUusNsdKw744AkDLpApfjLnlDyc-qWg%3D%3D)

While the election may not be this month, we MUST begin our work today if we’re going to defend our majority successfully. | | Fellow American - when I became Speaker of the House on October 25th, I knew one of the first things we needed to do was build out our team of supporters online. So, we got to work immediately and To date, we have not hit our goal. With Thanksgiving just around the corner, we have a lot of work to do. If you haven't, Fellow American, Democrats have spent the last three years under President Biden trying to turn our great nation into a banana republic. While voters don't seem to have much of an appetite for Joe Biden, Democrats in the House and Senate have done everything they can to prop up his failing presidency while undoing all the critical work President Trump and Congressional Republicans moved forward in recent years. We're doing our best to continue providing conservative solutions to our nation's most vexing concerns. Still, I must be honest - doing so would be infinitely easier if we had a more significant majority. Our immediate goals for next year are two-fold: 1. Hold onto the House majority 2. Expand our House majority We've seen what happens when Democrats are in the majority: they'll add trillions more to the national debt and launch assaults on our Constitutional liberties. I'm writing today because if we're going to hold onto our slim majority, we must start now. We need help - While the election may not be this month, we MUST begin our work today if we're going to defend our majority successfully. To stop radical legislation from making its way through the Capitol, we need a united conservative movement to stop Joe Biden. We had a great election night last year and flipped the House after four years of DISASTROUS Democrat control. For America, Mike Johnson Speaker of the House As Speaker, I want to hear from you on the top issues of the day. It's important for us to deliver results for the American people. Would you take a moment to complete my today? Your input is important to making sure we move America forward. I appreciate you taking the time to send me your input. | SPEAKER MIKE JOHNSON Speaker Johnson is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana. | PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: This is about Israel
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Republican Jewish Coalition
body:
Israel is our greatest ally in the Middle East, and we cannot abandon them in their darkest hour.

| |
---
| | |
Friend,

Hamas's terrorist attack on Israel was the greatest atrocity since the Holocaust, and it has never been more important that we stand shoulder to shoulder with our greatest ally.

October 7th was Israel's 9/11, but they were not alone in their losses. Amongst the innocents massacred by Hamas were 32 Americans - and these terrorists are still holding Israelis and Americans hostage.

**[Now is the time for bold action, Friend. We must stand with Israel and stop appeasing their enemies.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zr8pn0cs7jjtlrkjtvrne16tmd7n49fjgaut8rd8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdgmeoj4cth2bs "Now is the time for bold action, Friend. We must stand with Israel and stop appeasing their enemies.")**

---
| | [STAND WITH ISRAEL](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlusbk2g7jfsnu9d1r0brt8mbk6suut2fl71r6n0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdgmeoj4cth2bs)
---

Hamas could not have gone forward with their attack without the approval of Iran, the largest state sponsor of global terrorism. Since Biden took office, he's perpetuated the Obama era policy of appeasing Iran, which has emboldened our enemies.

As a result, Israelis and Americans have been slaughtered and taken hostage, and antisemitism is skyrocketing at home.

Anti-Israel, pro-Hamas extremism has risen to such a level that it's even gone unchecked in the halls of Congress. Yet Biden has done _nothing_.

As our greatest ally faces an existential threat, it's never been more important that our leaders:
* Rescue every American hostage
* Provide Israel the full support they need
* Stop appeasing Iran
* Put an end to antisemitism in the United States

**[If you agree, please join me in supporting the Republican Jewish Coalition today.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqncdbq27v8op9dnl1bjl7mh1o36napbm32m6rjo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdgmeoj4cth2bs "If you agree, please join me in supporting the Republican Jewish Coalition today.")**

---

---

The Republican Jewish Coalition is the leading Republican organization devoted to supporting Israel, fighting antisemitism, and electing strong leaders who align with our shared mission.

Israel is our greatest ally in the Middle East, and we cannot abandon them in their darkest hour.

**[So please, take action today.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqvk83mno571g7i9pb785llirt9tmceobak7l64g_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdgmeoj4cth2bs "So please, take action today.")**

Sincerely,

---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgvl3b28ralrbm115ppcpr34hqgn9520s7kvvdoo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdgmeoj4cth2bs)
---
Kevin McCarthy

---
| | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z61duqfood9i56pj3h62uh4ubesg40be62tgt138_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdgmeoj4cth2bs)
---
**America 's greatest ally needs YOU. As Americans, we lived through the horrors of 9/11 and during that trying time, our Israeli friends stood shoulder to shoulder with us in our war on terror.** **Right now is Israel 's 9/11, and they need our unwavering and steadfast support.**

name: Senator Katie Britt
subject: The Harsh Reality
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc
body:
Stories from the Border

| | |
---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c674202%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3zEz8r%2bTY%2bwcIlQtLf3JlA&sysid=1)
---
Friend, Under the Biden administration, the situation at our border has escalated into nothing short of an American nightmare. The media's complicity and Biden's dismissive lectures have only fueled the fire, neglecting the gravity of the crisis. I feel compelled to share with you some of the horror stories I’ve heard during my time at the border. These are not just statistics; these are the chilling, harsh realities of the crisis gripping our nation: \- A victim of human trafficking endured repeated assaults, forced to lie on a bed as men came and went. \- A border patrol agent recounted pulling lifeless bodies of children and pregnant women from the river. \- Even in Alabama, now effectively a border state, a constituent warned of drug cartels infiltrating his community to collect from illegal migrants. President Biden, the root cause of this crisis, audaciously lectures us about the "soul" of our nation while turning a blind eye to the suffering. **[Friend, I am both mad and heartbroken. ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c674203%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Zy03BnaV5cq6NnWG1zZonw&sysid=1)** Any objective person witnessing the assaults, murders, and drug trafficking at our southern border would immediately demand an end to this crisis. **[While Biden lacks the courage to act, I am committed to fighting for a secure border.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c674204%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EdCErHbm6R62zuKQkLp1Dg&sysid=1)** **[Can I count on you to join me in taking a stand to end this crisis?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c674215%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SyUCAWRvRBDiaFZdVIVphA&sysid=1)** Sincerely, Senator Katie Britt
---

---
| | [**CONTRIBUTE**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c674216%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ugmIZXF6hINX%2b5fvYozkSQ&sysid=1)

Waukesha County Republicans have been staying busy these past few weeks! From Pints and Politics to movie nights, the Republican Party of Waukesha County is working hard to celebrate the Republican message. **Saint Croix**
The Republican Party of Saint Croix County and its members came together to demonstrate their patriotism and honor our veterans this past weekend. **Calumet County**
The Calumet County Republican Party showed up to one of our latest installments of FARM Team Training. The members heard from Chairman Brian Schimming and Representative Glenn Grothman. **Dane County**
The Dane County Republican Party was recently joined by Former Governor Tommy Thompson to discuss ways to build "Republican infrastructure." The event was a huge success! **Jefferson County**
Jefferson County hosted an incredible Pints and Politics Event with Judge Lazar! **Wood County**
Congressman Derrick Van Orden joined Wood County Republicans at their annual Veteran's Day Dinner. We appreciate all Wood County Republicans who have served our country. **Kenosha County**
The Republican Party of Kenosha County came out to show their support for Alliance Women's Clinic. This organization aims to protect life by offering vital services to mothers in need! name: Your America
subject: #1 Survival Item of 2023
body:
This Pocket-Sized "Power Plant" Sold Out in Less than 48 Hours - Now It's Finally Back in Stock

# #1 Survival Item of 2023
**This Pocket-Sized "Power Plant" Sold Out in Less
Than 48 Hours - Now It's Finally Back in Stock** [**Tested by former Navy SEAL: See it in action!**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36874%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tV90Mkw9%2fZF9VsM%2btECANA&sysid=1) [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36885%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gt8myNvYyqxq2oX1txvd8Q&sysid=1) [**People are buying these in 4 packs - Learn More**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36886%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TvsU3z571Th4maPQO9mtcg&sysid=1) Oh no. We slapped our foreheads. We had just released the Patriot Power Cell. And the response was so strong, we couldn't believe it. The launch went WAY better than expected. We sold out completely in a matter of hours. The second time, we doubled our inventory thinking that would be enough to meet demand. And then... poof! GONE! Our inventory manager was asking... _**"Why were customers getting these 2... 4... or even 12 units at a time? Were they holiday gifts? Or just incredibly useful?"**_ Since then, the Patriot Power Cell has become one of our best-selling products of all time. Wow! And after making as many as we can, we think we finally have enough to meet demand... at least for now. That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you: [**Tested by Former Navy SEAL:
A Pocket Power Plant That's
Weather-Resistant, Has An Ultra
Bright LED Flashlight And
Charges 2 Devices At Once!**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36887%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0hzG1iGsL5xHjfSnYp%2bFpw&sysid=1) [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36885%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gt8myNvYyqxq2oX1txvd8Q&sysid=1) | | **Melanie D.** I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. They work so well, I bought eight more to give to my kids and friends for Christmas. I work outdoors a lot, so I take mine along to plug in my cell phone. They also have a flashlight on them, which comes in real handy. This is a good buy, you won't regret it.
---|---
| **Shirley C.** I'm very happy with the 4Patriots products. I've gotten the Power Cell, which is fantastic to charge my cell phone anywhere. It's rechargeable and I'm very happy with all of the 4Patriots products. And I'm very happy with Frank Bates, he's very truthful, honest and helps others in need. I really appreciate his products and his emails that I get. I'm really, really happy. I would recommend his products and him to anyone. Thank you so much.
---|---
| **Wing C.** I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. I know they will come in handy. Because I know people with their cell phone, saying "oh I have no battery left." And you know what? They're getting it for Christmas. That's what I'm doing for them. We live here in New York, things are quite ample here at this time, ya know. But for emergencies like that - to have your cell phone, your contact to the outside world - it's important. Thank you very much, Frank.
---|---
| **Richard G.** It's a great item for me on weekends out in the country, the swimming pool, wherever else I don't have electricity available. Oftentimes people have come out to the pool, for example, and brought their power adapter to keep their cell phones or laptops or whatever charged up. They wound up losing them. With the Power Cell, it works great to recharge in the shade and I highly recommend it. Thank you very much.
---|---
[**Click here to see it in action!**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36888%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YjlkPt7o5PAMwdY5RgiIOw&sysid=1)
Featured reviews are from real customers. Sometimes customers are given a free product to test, or received a free product as a thank you for submitting honest feedback. Cade Courtley is a former Navy SEAL who served 9 years of active duty and has been compensated by 4Patriots for his hard work in helping test and endorse products. The United States Military & U.S. Navy SEAL Team are not affiliated with 4Patriots. They have not endorsed, sponsored or recommended this product; no affiliation or endorsement is claimed.

Your America News
---
_Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314_

_[**unsubscribe**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36889%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bCcoVr%2bz9r1C1nAVMhMOow&sysid=1)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36880%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lrww9StLjmFAy9%2bQV3ZJ%2fw&sysid=1)_
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c9525%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=6ypQIIdrUkgAPTPLVkGpug&sysid=1)
