body:
We are pleased to announce that YOU have been selected to take House Republican Leadership’s Battleground 2024 Survey.

| |

---
| | | Friend -

We are pleased to announce that YOU have been selected to take House Republican Leadership's _**[2024 Battleground Survey.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z05bitu3i8ntcvs0njqcfqtfqeon7hhnd1a2ljf8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim0o75c5h2bs "2024 Battleground Survey.")**_

Right now, we're laying the groundwork we need to win the most important election of our lifetimes. We're recruiting top-tier candidates in competitive races, expanding voter outreach programs, and organizing extensive grassroots ground operations - but we can't do this alone.

That's why we could really use your advice. Your responses to the survey below will provide Republicans with the most up-to-date data ahead of the next election - the most critical in HISTORY. **Would you mind quickly filling in your responses for our records? **

_It should take no more than 90 seconds of your time._

---
| **Battleground 2024 Survey**

Contact:**_[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zmbv53bahm1q2ugmmkqrqoamdshbjofqobrihjs0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim0o75c5h2bs "dpwillis67@gmail.com")_**
Member ID:**2024-SJS-W4C**
Status:**INCOMPLETE**
---
_Did you vote in the 2020 Presidential Election? _

_**[>> Yes <<](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zd2ldsonsue8d9mmnlsbk1190nb0m9of9kaces8o_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim0o75c5h2bs "Yes")**_
_**[>> No <<](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zltoned9f11mq76086cri8ut3ubf89h74nc2dnm8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim0o75c5h2bs "No")**_

_Who did you vote for in the 2020 Presidential Election? _

_**[>> Donald Trump <<](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zet3uro2fpg0v8j2eiptqaqaob818r8elj4fablo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim0o75c5h2bs "Donald Trump")**_
_**[>> Joe Biden <<](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zdhrb7s15k672uqkben8lt1uhbv6h6cr8lam7qi8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim0o75c5h2bs "Joe Biden")**_
_**[>> Neither <<](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zlua8apj3ui1lcft1859n4jj8178c7dqo17bl0ng_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim0o75c5h2bs "Neither")**_

_Did you vote in the 2022 Midterm Election? _

_**[>> Yes <<](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zrul4rgrbn71o7pe5u9s8chur4th76ikg5q9qk8g_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim0o75c5h2bs "Yes")**_
_**[>> No <<](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqplm6ql3mncvau8m73gnrtp08pghlk998rf3sbg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim0o75c5h2bs "No")**_

_Who did you vote for in the 2022 Midterm Election?_

_**[>> Republicans <<](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ziti0b45ebsitet972rn97p2ssn0jt503bph5gs8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim0o75c5h2bs "Republicans")**_
_**[>> Democrats <<](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z74i46kgp3nhrbs5jk1657t4cc9enjdmjhsdk7k8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim0o75c5h2bs "Democrats")**_
_**[>> Mixed Bag <<](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zhmhibm5j13crcl8kaau6be305b70a4v7r9g8v50_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim0o75c5h2bs "Mixed Bag")**_

_Who do you plan on supporting in the 2024 Presidential Election?_

_**[>> Submit Your Response <<](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2b5nqjtd7vb3ce8vkdlik98p55mlccc76hg7p70_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim0o75c5h2bs "Submit Your Response")**_
| | [SUBMIT](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zf25nfblvv9mvimm0citq7377l74900ppjplua9o_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim0o75c5h2bs "SUBMIT")
---

We thank you in advance for your participation,

House Republican Leadership

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zb3fs79ildbhotd041v6a1ut664l9lm3vi2f52s0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim0o75c5h2bs "Please take my Majority Leader Survey!")
---

It's House Majority Leader Steve Scalise.

I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my _**[MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zi4kepj6m0mh03767kpretek24vgrnd20phf1pv8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim0o75c5h2bs "MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY")**_ at your earliest convenience. It's important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else.

_What would you like me to keep in mind when I'm taking on the Radical Democrats?_
---
| | | [BEGIN YOUR SURVEY >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ziqa2u8rq4iecnf8qkqsfvm9sqq32ln6d4gbg5j8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim0o75c5h2bs "BEGIN YOUR SURVEY")

name: Nikki Haley
subject: You need to hear this from me, Friend.
body:
What we have accomplished because of YOU

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmje6sdnc54akv3opsrri14mrgmc99toj3h159go_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim0o76chh2bs)
---

_Friend, I want to reach out to you personally and say thank you._

My team announced that we have booked our **FIRST** campaign ad buy to air on television, radio, and digital platforms across Iowa and New Hampshire in a few short weeks.

**Here 's why this is a MAJOR campaign milestone:**
1.) Placing ads on the airwaves is **NOT** cheap. But thanks to grassroots supporters like you, we had the resources to book our initial ad buy for **$10 MILLION.**

2.) Once our first campaign ad goes **LIVE** , we will have the opportunity to reach **MILLIONS** of Americans with my message and vision for our future so we can win every vote and take one step closer to**VICTORY!**

3.) Although ads are expensive, this is one of the best ways to amplify my message. **[That is why I am beyond grateful for grassroots supporters who stepped up to the plate and provided my team with the resources to make this possible.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztea5vj2mcp5p0fe0vtc8a0ncqdkgqd2eaa1g770_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim0o76chh2bs "That is why I am beyond grateful for grassroots supporters who stepped up to the plate and provided my team with the resources to make this possible.")**

---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zh1eab2u2b2167l3hmshas3mm9ka9ja95dqg1h98_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim0o76chh2bs)
---

At the end of the day, this is a tried and true grassroots operation. Our staff is lean and mean and you better believe we're working every hour of the day to spend our money wisely and go big when it counts the most.

_But, just because our first initial ad buy has been booked does**NOT** mean we can stop now._

We have to keep working, amplifying our message, placing more ads across the airwaves, traveling and hosting more events, and winning every vote.

Which is why I'm asking for your help today. **[Will you help fuel my campaign with a donation of just $5 or more today?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ze4f3d8hoottq1ugpl3qq1mbub3tmd1opi108is8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim0o76chh2bs "Will you help fuel my campaign with a donation of just $5 or more today?")**
---
| | [DONATE](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsur4vdlhtgpcpocrignjg890qi9d9evj5b5ijgo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim0o76chh2bs)
---
We're closer than ever to **VICTORY** , but I need your help to finish the race strong and win.

With _**less than 60 days**_ until the first votes are cast, we can't lose sight of what's to come and what we still have left to accomplish.

**[Will you rush an immediate donation to help me FUEL my campaign, keep our momentum going, and WIN the fight for our future?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zc0em1p5vo0ridqkekoolepn9h3icil19got85jo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim0o76chh2bs "Will you rush an immediate donation to help me FUEL my campaign, keep our momentum going, and WIN the fight for our future?")**
---
| | [DONATE](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgo8b9m7d45dvc825um4qfa8k23k1too86ohiduo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim0o76chh2bs)
---
_We have a country to save, but I need your help to make it happen._

My very best,
---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrj83at5dnch5a3mk2f8m691fvol9vo2ev5cs15o_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim0o76chh2bs)
---
Nikki Haley
---
| | | | |
---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z88nvdr38in018lo6or03dln03ft2ho1fshfjh70_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim0o76chh2bs "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zd8tb9idmft39sb6a3bq2l40134qsa5m38hpkv7o_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim0o76chh2bs "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7ghbhbtqjoooanlbquume1egmt136clotc62kn8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim0o76chh2bs "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z22pls4ak21a66kopk3ah58fjit84qmrf639v720_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim0o76chh2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

---
| | [DONATE](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrr3p9oc76o8n08mibmfvq478sk7ahhmn1pcrq70_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim0o76chh2bs "DONATE")
---

Jim Jordan Subpoenas DOJ Prosecutor Who Allegedly Stonewalled Hunter
Biden Probe

The House Judiciary Committee subpoenaed a top prosecutor in Special
Counsel David Weiss’ Hunter Biden probe on Tuesday. House Judiciary
Chairman and Republican Ohio Rep. Jim Jordan sent a letter to
Assistant U.S. Attorney Lesley Wolf Tuesday notifying her that she is
required to come before the committee for a deposition Dec. 7,
according to the letter.

DOD Spokeswoman Insists Biden Admin Is ‘Deterring’ Iran-Backed
Militias Despite Wave Of Recent Attacks

A Department of Defense spokesperson claimed that the United States
was deterring attacks by Iranian-backed militias Tuesday, even as the
total has climbed. A Lockheed AC-130 airborne gunship carried out a
strike against enemy militants Monday after members of an
Iranian-backed militia group launched a ballistic missile at a U.S.
military base.

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Increase your understanding of Russia
body:
This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
Winston Churchill once described Russia as “a riddle, wrapped in a mystery, inside an enigma”—words that still ring true.

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmkvgfu1bptcuo8ril9ldlijngpknfqgcd6c9j4o_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim0o75c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

Winston Churchill once described Russia as "a riddle, wrapped in a mystery, inside an enigma"--words that still ring true.

But given Russia's current war with Ukraine--and Russia's role in the shifting balance of power in today's world--a better understanding of Russia is critical.

Since Peter the Great, Russia's place among nations has only grown. As it transformed itself from a regional backwater to a great power, its politics and culture influenced significant events in our own history.

At the time of the American Revolution, for instance, Russia was the first nation to recognize the U.S. as a sovereign state. And in the Cold War period between World War Two and the fall of the Soviet Union in 1991, American-Russian relations became the focus of world attention.

**The need for a better understanding of post-Cold War Russia, in light of its current importance and its long history as one of the world 's great powers, is why Hillsdale College has created a [FREE online video series on Russia](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zoi6liae39vi222qhlb0q2jp0dglq3dci1f4e8m8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim0o75c5h2bs). **

In our online video series, based on a recent conference held at Hillsdale College, you'll learn more about Russian history--including the "Greats" such as Peter and Catherine--with special attention to the Russian Revolution through the fall of the Soviet Union.

The video series also explores Russia's significant contributions to literature, through such authors as Dostoyevsky and Tolstoy--and to classical music, through such composers such as Tchaikovsky and Rachmaninoff.

**You 'll also gain a deeper understanding of Russia's enigmatic relationship with the West today, and about the causes and complications of the current Ukraine war. **

You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/russia-cca/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zot6543jafd7k7k2itemrv7i256pdt3thp0acdeo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim0o75c5h2bs)

**Please use the secure link above to immediately receive your video series on Russia.**

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **
**

---

---

1600 Daily

body:
Write him a short note to read >>

Friend,

President Trump ALWAYS fought for the American people when he was in office. _The least we can do is tell him, "THANK YOU!"_

Nothing would be more epic this Thanksgiving than **[sending President Trump a card signed by MILLIONS of MAGA supporters all across the country.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zikcnp52u05fumvmnrcdm5hl870tb5pna385ius0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim0o75c5h2bs) **Well, that's EXACTLY what we're doing, Friend.

**[Sign President Trump's card RIGHT NOW to wish him a HAPPY THANKSGIVING!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zobghoqibjb90r7248tu554edd86g4em6la3jct8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim0o75c5h2bs)**

This is truly a ONCE-IN-A-LIFETIME opportunity, Friend. You can even write a short note for President Trump to read, _and if you submit it in the next five minutes, we 'll put it at the VERY TOP of the card._
**[So what are you waiting for?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4m3rbfckvk6nc7vdigrse0ahnvglrd0od5qn510_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim0o75c5h2bs)**

name: Nikki Haley
subject: You need to hear this from me
body:
What we have accomplished because of YOU

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za1lrl9tms6odkcpf16a7bojrjp8hc19klg17keg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim0o75c5h2bs)
---

_Friend, I want to reach out to you personally and say thank you._

My team announced that we have booked our **FIRST** campaign ad buy to air on television, radio, and digital platforms across Iowa and New Hampshire in a few short weeks.

**Here 's why this is a MAJOR campaign milestone:**
1.) Placing ads on the airwaves is **NOT** cheap. But thanks to grassroots supporters like you, we had the resources to book our initial ad buy for **$10 MILLION.**

2.) Once our first campaign ad goes **LIVE** , we will have the opportunity to reach **MILLIONS** of Americans with my message and vision for our future so we can win every vote and take one step closer to**VICTORY!**

3.) Although ads are expensive, this is one of the best ways to amplify my message. **[That is why I am beyond grateful for grassroots supporters who stepped up to the plate and provided my team with the resources to make this possible.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj66v6qe9argmqi1eqe3p2oaept9dg664sfkhm08_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim0o75c5h2bs "That is why I am beyond grateful for grassroots supporters who stepped up to the plate and provided my team with the resources to make this possible.")**

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb1qtnagvv6hmn2gchqo56rtp34muecajmba9h18_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim0o75c5h2bs)
---

At the end of the day, this is a tried and true grassroots operation. Our staff is lean and mean and you better believe we're working every hour of the day to spend our money wisely and go big when it counts the most.

_But, just because our first initial ad buy has been booked does**NOT** mean we can stop now._

We have to keep working, amplifying our message, placing more ads across the airwaves, traveling and hosting more events, and winning every vote.

Which is why I'm asking for your help today. **[Will you help fuel my campaign with a donation of just $5 or more today?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5r06o81p97f6e2nv0n0r3l5fsucqn9e4g4ot3o0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim0o75c5h2bs "Will you help fuel my campaign with a donation of just $5 or more today?")**
---
| | [DONATE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbepsdq6313jrk0abei3d4b5862mbdhp2nrrbcs0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim0o75c5h2bs)
---
We're closer than ever to **VICTORY** , but I need your help to finish the race strong and win.

With _**less than 60 days**_ until the first votes are cast, we can't lose sight of what's to come and what we still have left to accomplish.

**[Will you rush an immediate donation to help me FUEL my campaign, keep our momentum going, and WIN the fight for our future?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z67vkhlierml2q3no42nngo4mlp6m7bcs9h5btrg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim0o75c5h2bs "Will you rush an immediate donation to help me FUEL my campaign, keep our momentum going, and WIN the fight for our future?")**
---
| | [DONATE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjuq1006adctnnn13b363a8ho5hfdbj18h3co18g_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim0o75c5h2bs)
---
_We have a country to save, but I need your help to make it happen._

My very best,
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfe1l10vh6hbu3t4iu6pusqu9vqa2ll007q97c9g_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim0o75c5h2bs)
---
Nikki Haley
---
| | | | |
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze9ijb71obl7g23a7lqah1cukl4ojgao06tq0eq0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim0o75c5h2bs "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdmfns37stea1poressdvktmji5u90ptudqjf0m0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim0o75c5h2bs "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm5siaautkv4am68qb5l442lvr1j7p1ateekjqcg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim0o75c5h2bs "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7c5n4bd32rmkpop6c7n2ul9b8mlbvh2k1m5pt20_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim0o75c5h2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

| | [DONATE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2co9bpbres5fmns76klasg5u061l270i0eud738_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim0o75c5h2bs "DONATE")
---

I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. body:
I served at CIA, in Congress, and as President Trump’s Secretary of State I’ve drafted more briefs than you can count.

Hi there,

This is Mike Pompeo. I served at CIA, in Congress, and as President Trump’s Secretary of State I’ve drafted more briefs than you can count.

But this one is much different.

Majority Leader Steve Scalise and I put our heads together and we have a few urgent matters to discuss with you. The importance of this briefing cannot be overstated.

I hope you’ll take a few minutes to review it as soon as possible. https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36891%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=F3QMOIb7WjMX3nwQmeOc2Q&sysid=1

name: Pro Life Update
subject: I want to know your thoughts
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6bb4b7p3m7s465nv3ukgbsc7dmi8jl7af55cbi0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim2ob2cdh2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zt25t0g0hmt43k3ku9gha3gqneor7r1foqi3q92g_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim2ob2cdh2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2za6gvshotdavlu6tar2j154tvgv5c113r6tiahvg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim2ob2cdh2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zo8ic3qi8ocjma6uih7m0rme0069qc590i9532h8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim2ob2cdh2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

name: Nikki Haley
subject: You need to hear this from me
body:
What we have accomplished because of YOU

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znu8mkm3hmoib8tkbblme88ov6m5atdjah4qgqfg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim2ob2cdh2bs)
---

_Friend, I want to reach out to you personally and say thank you._

My team announced that we have booked our **FIRST** campaign ad buy to air on television, radio, and digital platforms across Iowa and New Hampshire in a few short weeks.

**Here 's why this is a MAJOR campaign milestone:**
1.) Placing ads on the airwaves is **NOT** cheap. But thanks to grassroots supporters like you, we had the resources to book our initial ad buy for **$10 MILLION.**

2.) Once our first campaign ad goes **LIVE** , we will have the opportunity to reach **MILLIONS** of Americans with my message and vision for our future so we can win every vote and take one step closer to**VICTORY!**

3.) Although ads are expensive, this is one of the best ways to amplify my message. **[That is why I am beyond grateful for grassroots supporters who stepped up to the plate and provided my team with the resources to make this possible.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zaa3aodmaq6v7irmhpebfl1pmgte99t4nai8jtt8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim2ob2cdh2bs "That is why I am beyond grateful for grassroots supporters who stepped up to the plate and provided my team with the resources to make this possible.")**

---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn6hkf5dnh2vfm9j18khlqtnr3ae5g2ctka5kt3o_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim2ob2cdh2bs)
---

At the end of the day, this is a tried and true grassroots operation. Our staff is lean and mean and you better believe we're working every hour of the day to spend our money wisely and go big when it counts the most.

_But, just because our first initial ad buy has been booked does**NOT** mean we can stop now._

We have to keep working, amplifying our message, placing more ads across the airwaves, traveling and hosting more events, and winning every vote.

Which is why I'm asking for your help today. **[Will you help fuel my campaign with a donation of just $5 or more today?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp20je4si25qknip9uk1u32r14pgva95goulf87g_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim2ob2cdh2bs "Will you help fuel my campaign with a donation of just $5 or more today?")**

With _**less than 60 days**_ until the first votes are cast, we can't lose sight of what's to come and what we still have left to accomplish.

---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2vkn7b1ccd5kqobk027bvj7gedhk6qfdh8n9bpo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim2ob2cdh2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

body:
I served at CIA, in Congress, and as President Trump’s Secretary of State – I’ve drafted more briefs than you can count.

| |

---
| | | Hi there,

This is Mike Pompeo. I served at CIA, in Congress, and as President Trump's Secretary of State - I've drafted more briefs than you can count.

**But this one is much different. **

Majority Leader Steve Scalise and I put our heads together and we have a few urgent matters to discuss with you. The importance of this briefing cannot be overstated.

_**[I hope you'll take a few minutes to review it as soon as possible.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztk37nrq4n3t9rtjspc5ds5mftq7hcm3oigcpsf8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim2ob2cth2bs "I hope you’ll take a few minutes to review it as soon as possible. ")**_

- Mike

Joe Biden and the Democrats **cannot STAND** that I don’t fit into their mold of what a Republican looks like.
They expect all minorities to fall in line and BLINDLY vote Democrat.
**But this Hispanic, Republican woman is going to wipe the FLOOR with them next November.**
My name is Mariela Roca.
I'm a proud Air Force veteran who served in Afghanistan and now I'm running for Congress in the MOST IMPORTANT race in the entire country.

My district will decide if Republicans keep our majority in the House in 2024.
That’s why I’m reaching out to **YOU** because without your help, I might as well wrap up my campaign now and surrender.

It’s been another difficult year for our country, but we still have plenty to be thankful for. I’m so grateful to be an American and a Texan. We’re truly blessed to live in a country that values freedom above all else. Wishing you and your loved ones a safe and happy Thanksgiving! -Troy E. Nehls

name: American Action News
subject: #1 Survival Item of 2023
body:
This Pocket-Sized "Power Plant" Sold Out in Less than 48 Hours – Now It's Finally Back in Stock

# #1 Survival Item of 2023
**This Pocket-Sized "Power Plant" Sold Out in Less
Than 48 Hours - Now It's Finally Back in Stock** [**Tested by former Navy SEAL: See it in action!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1jsuej7kr97of9tmn3pjlp4j71jpuulkjvlvv4g_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim2ob2clh2bs) [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2ala77jg375fdd6gntppg5kvdci0b186kl36vqg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim2ob2clh2bs) [**People are buying these in 4 packs - Learn More**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvq25njjhi6pllopqr0efv09aah7ljp3e4rekl70_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim2ob2clh2bs) Oh no. We slapped our foreheads. We had just released the Patriot Power Cell. And the response was so strong, we couldn't believe it. The launch went WAY better than expected. We sold out completely in a matter of hours. The second time, we doubled our inventory thinking that would be enough to meet demand. And then... poof! GONE! Our inventory manager was asking... _**" Why were customers getting these 2... 4... or even 12 units at a time? Were they holiday gifts? Or just incredibly useful?"**_ Since then, the Patriot Power Cell has become one of our best-selling products of all time. Wow! And after making as many as we can, we think we finally have enough to meet demand... at least for now. That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you: [**Tested by Former Navy SEAL:
A Pocket Power Plant That's
Weather-Resistant, Has An Ultra
Bright LED Flashlight And
Charges 2 Devices At Once!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc0a6reoji3cd1j9et6kvho67muggjh2h3g5k11g_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim2ob2clh2bs) [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9qjb88gsghh038ntl1kgt9eubsv8lsfhlja0r00_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim2ob2clh2bs) | | **Melanie D.** I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. They work so well, I bought eight more to give to my kids and friends for Christmas. I work outdoors a lot, so I take mine along to plug in my cell phone. They also have a flashlight on them, which comes in real handy. This is a good buy, you won't regret it.
---|---
| **Shirley C.** I'm very happy with the 4Patriots products. I've gotten the Power Cell, which is fantastic to charge my cell phone anywhere. It's rechargeable and I'm very happy with all of the 4Patriots products. And I'm very happy with Frank Bates, he's very truthful, honest and helps others in need. I really appreciate his products and his emails that I get. I'm really, really happy. I would recommend his products and him to anyone. Thank you so much.
---|---
| **Wing C.** I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. I know they will come in handy. Because I know people with their cell phone, saying "oh I have no battery left." And you know what? They're getting it for Christmas. That's what I'm doing for them. We live here in New York, things are quite ample here at this time, ya know. But for emergencies like that - to have your cell phone, your contact to the outside world - it's important. Thank you very much, Frank.
---|---
| **Richard G.** It's a great item for me on weekends out in the country, the swimming pool, wherever else I don't have electricity available. Oftentimes people have come out to the pool, for example, and brought their power adapter to keep their cell phones or laptops or whatever charged up. They wound up losing them. With the Power Cell, it works great to recharge in the shade and I highly recommend it. Thank you very much.
---|---
[**Click here to see it in action!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp1u1674cgtnr83tidb2fsaui2u6kfrklcvmp42g_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim2ob2clh2bs)
Featured reviews are from real customers. Sometimes customers are given a free product to test, or received a free product as a thank you for submitting honest feedback. Cade Courtley is a former Navy SEAL who served 9 years of active duty and has been compensated by 4Patriots for his hard work in helping test and endorse products. The United States Military & U.S. Navy SEAL Team are not affiliated with 4Patriots. They have not endorsed, sponsored or recommended this product; no affiliation or endorsement is claimed.

American Action News

name: American Action News
subject: Your thoughts on American Education
body:
You are an informed citizen—I believe that wholeheartedly.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn60pjqnanj1nvddksunj5v5fq63ik5tla2p1o3o_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim1o32cph2bs)
---
| | Good day, fellow American. You are an informed citizen—I believe that wholeheartedly. You love this country. You make an effort to understand what the U.S. Constitution says and what it means, and you aren’t afraid to stand up for America’s founding and the principles of liberty that define our nation. _**[Your leadership and knowledge are needed today...](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrrghfovn3qsnq6g6km5qf7n0i4khikqn381v78g_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim1o32cph2bs)_**

## Do you believe it is important for Americans to have basic knowledge of American history and civics, including knowledge about the Constitution?
[Yes](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6e99di4150n0a94gbl0m9a6fvdkdlkeratc88e0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim1o32cph2bs) [No](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7erkjrcuthhnqeop0sqm76lv0sr1ld0b2j4bn4o_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim1o32cph2bs) [Not Sure / Don't Know](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbeoekipghkukqp8nt85redvnt5865sj8ij66voo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim1o32cph2bs)
We need more citizens like you— _informed citizens_ —because America is at a turning point. Dangerous left-wing ideologies are taking hold thanks to a decades-long campaign by progressives to attack the Constitution and undermine liberty and patriotism. The country you and I love will be lost forever if we fail to restore knowledge about the Constitution among our fellow citizens. We can’t let that happen! That’s why I am writing to you today and asking you to be part of Hillsdale College and our nationwide initiative—the **CAMPAIGN FOR INFORMED CITIZENS**. We are the foremost educational institution committed to reaching and teaching millions about freedom and limited government. The goal of this campaign is to build generations of knowledgeable Americans who understand
* WHAT the Constitution says;
* HOW it relates to current issues and events; and
* WHY the preservation of constitutional principles is essential to liberty.

If this campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people, that our education system failed. These are young people that “educators” deliberately deceived or who just haven’t learned about a proper understanding of American history in school. **You are essential to the success of this effort to make America more knowledgeable.** That’s because we’re seeking _1,000 people_ in each state to help us teach the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to _10,000,000 Americans_ , and this initiative starts with you—YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights. And we must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you who want what’s best for the country. So please, share your opinions by completing the **National Survey on the State of American Education** today at the link below. Thank you for reading my email! [**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/survey-informed-citizen/**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj03h1lf38hpogn8s1i9351jokhdmjv8auqgvf5o_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim1o32cph2bs) For our children, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

American Action News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6dafbup5vlsdam121a4ppdavd7aa9ek6073ij60_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni64o30cpj60oh1k8gn48n24hjm0o33clge0oj6c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z35lnb1see91hf05kbr6o1cavf7k9qm9epeecjjo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdim1o32cph2bs)_

name: Nikki Haley
subject: You need to hear this from me
body:
What we have accomplished because of YOU

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqrro3d4hqsshpbubofg7irtjobatv6opkips598_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdhm8or2cph2bs)
---

_Friend, I want to reach out to you personally and say thank you._

My team announced that we have booked our **FIRST** campaign ad buy to air on television, radio, and digital platforms across Iowa and New Hampshire in a few short weeks.

**Here 's why this is a MAJOR campaign milestone:**
1.) Placing ads on the airwaves is **NOT** cheap. But thanks to grassroots supporters like you, we had the resources to book our initial ad buy for **$10 MILLION.**

2.) Once our first campaign ad goes **LIVE** , we will have the opportunity to reach **MILLIONS** of Americans with my message and vision for our future so we can win every vote and take one step closer to**VICTORY!**

3.) Although ads are expensive, this is one of the best ways to amplify my message. **[That is why I am beyond grateful for grassroots supporters who stepped up to the plate and provided my team with the resources to make this possible.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zv9l03jno4kueq7mmuvdhs9dss6srf7rpgs0662o_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdhm8or2cph2bs "That is why I am beyond grateful for grassroots supporters who stepped up to the plate and provided my team with the resources to make this possible.")**

---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zafccpvbfihatd5ejqmoqe007iuqf6bjo0fro56g_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdhm8or2cph2bs)
---

At the end of the day, this is a tried and true grassroots operation. Our staff is lean and mean and you better believe we're working every hour of the day to spend our money wisely and go big when it counts the most.

_But, just because our first initial ad buy has been booked does**NOT** mean we can stop now._

We have to keep working, amplifying our message, placing more ads across the airwaves, traveling and hosting more events, and winning every vote.

Which is why I'm asking for your help today. **[Will you help fuel my campaign with a donation of just $5 or more today?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2in4aju4b1oltmineoomjttc2e78cu8dtivquc0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdhm8or2cph2bs "Will you help fuel my campaign with a donation of just $5 or more today?")**
---
| | [DONATE](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z76up5rnu7mli3o58ershqrioni1n0ds76ev7uno_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdhm8or2cph2bs)
---
We're closer than ever to **VICTORY** , but I need your help to finish the race strong and win.

With _**less than 60 days**_ until the first votes are cast, we can't lose sight of what's to come and what we still have left to accomplish.

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0ton5a3glrciedur0ejrqv2p5gbbkt43pkgfa9g_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdhm8or2cph2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: This is about Israel
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Republican Jewish Coalition
body:
Israel is our greatest ally in the Middle East, and we cannot abandon them in their darkest hour.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| |
---
| | |
Friend,

Hamas's terrorist attack on Israel was the greatest atrocity since the Holocaust, and it has never been more important that we stand shoulder to shoulder with our greatest ally.

October 7th was Israel's 9/11, but they were not alone in their losses. Amongst the innocents massacred by Hamas were 32 Americans - and these terrorists are still holding Israelis and Americans hostage.

**[Now is the time for bold action, Friend. We must stand with Israel and stop appeasing their enemies.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/x_T2JIV087wY2jokDTVJgQ~~/AARclAA~~~ "Now is the time for bold action, Friend. We must stand with Israel and stop appeasing their enemies.")**

---
| | [STAND WITH ISRAEL](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/x_T2JIV087wY2jokDTVJgQ~~/AARclAA~~~)
---

Hamas could not have gone forward with their attack without the approval of Iran, the largest state sponsor of global terrorism. Since Biden took office, he's perpetuated the Obama era policy of appeasing Iran, which has emboldened our enemies.

As a result, Israelis and Americans have been slaughtered and taken hostage, and antisemitism is skyrocketing at home.

Anti-Israel, pro-Hamas extremism has risen to such a level that it's even gone unchecked in the halls of Congress. Yet Biden has done _nothing_.

As our greatest ally faces an existential threat, it's never been more important that our leaders:
* Rescue every American hostage
* Provide Israel the full support they need
* Stop appeasing Iran
* Put an end to antisemitism in the United States

**[If you agree, please join me in supporting the Republican Jewish Coalition today.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/x_T2JIV087wY2jokDTVJgQ~~/AARclAA~~~ "If you agree, please join me in supporting the Republican Jewish Coalition today.")**

---

The Republican Jewish Coalition is the leading Republican organization devoted to supporting Israel, fighting antisemitism, and electing strong leaders who align with our shared mission.

Israel is our greatest ally in the Middle East, and we cannot abandon them in their darkest hour.

**[So please, take action today.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/x_T2JIV087wY2jokDTVJgQ~~/AARclAA~~~ "So please, take action today.")**

Sincerely,

---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/x_T2JIV087wY2jokDTVJgQ~~/AARclAA~~~)
---
Kevin McCarthy

subject: The Price of Happiness, a Middle East Hostage Swap, and a Tesla in the Kitchen
body:
Negotiations to [free 50 of the hostages](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LuunDAQANCvMd0gP1i4FBRp6G7alGjAYzxZP4jtXbR_Hyl1_uDo_PrevpEDp_MnRlqayxsejd-0KQVagzbb0NnFEWkyHS1qknIc1fglO78M1ipS04zzMFl09mvXajdqUI6kG0fX8aKlNkppreRjfpj-oXDESVqnduMmM4tBkuWWS_87c2qeXPjkN5X-yLELi2_tqsL8EHoVer3vu79y4MZH7ukl9Iql8RFI6DWn8IHIKRfIe214BKqwh3w8OZ3AtSAF8BixgiUM4HNteFKFP9iwwBWheuKnh5g9xkgWdk6Au32Fgj5iAgzQPCah164s9ro5BK7jJAZ5RuTwT9z-H_g3AAD__1bJdfs) held by Hamas in Gaza were down to solving "minor" practical issues, the Qatari prime minister said Sunday. Qatar is brokering the talks between Israel, the U.S. and Hamas.

# WEDNESDAY, NOVEMBER 22, 2023
---|---
**Good morning!** Today is the 60th anniversary of the assassination of President John F. Kennedy in Dallas, one of the most scrutinized days in American history. Here are [60 things about it you may not know](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFugzAQQL_GbCDf2UAYPHRhS9eO6ILtcKnBCF-D8vdVOnd723t6X9fpSpx4u3_SGpzEPNEs_AwTQI1Yo5ls5V0MAYOpgoNe666D7qKrxbUGwbcXCP7Sea9p6MkGO1hj5wFuLVTsUKMBQATdDq1pWqCOeu0j3EzszaCsDp4lH80j8yZLiOmVn-Fo5rxWyS0ie1HmQ-GocDzPsyE69iYfd4XjnhMLz6UueeYgL4XjwkXy8SbeYq7fcoVjpFlKTbf8I_UjftdUCpXCGwnnrVlkTdXh_H5ySly6Xll9X4nTX4P8v-Q3AAD__xl3Y0E). Haven't signed up for _The Flyover_ yet? You can take care of that [with one click](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuszAQAOCnsbcg-87YMHj4pYjpp2tHZPAZrjU4Im6qvn1VdWz2b_pex2kMnPlYX8JOvqYyhaXygyatLwAXwMnI6BMREEry2illrbadkpuPBGlG05OxcSYMizWxh9i1nXEJuiTZgwLUGkCrtm-xaXWwwamY9IzJYS-Mosi1nM1b4aNulPJXedDZLGWX2W-13u4C_wkYBAx_iYBhDCsv__l4_zE4kMBrvH1yzny3Thi17oHzr7UfdRd4NUqe_rmR9fnAdwAAAP__10dbwQ). Want to keep up with us on Facebook? [Visit our page here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FuwyAQQL8GtljHHcbxwNCFLZkqdbSwOWJaHCIbBfXvq7Zr9vee9D4u08WnnO63q9_Y1lgmv9T05EmpE-IJadIy2MiMTJKtGgCMUeYMcrVgoOd50NpgBE2GmQwhsT_rMZDvZbIISEohKujHnrpeeeMHCFHNFAcahQYOqZa9-yzpXleO-bs8ee-Wssls11ofh6A3gU6ga6110S88l_L1Cwh07yu7f-PK7RDo5G7Do6Wc02EGoeG2-ZT_avX13E8AAAD__71CT20). ---
## Israel, Hamas Agree to Hostage Swap
Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu won the support of his war cabinet for a hostage swap with Hamas and a temporary ceasefire, and Israel and Hamas [ have confirmed the deal](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDFvwyAQhX-NvRFxdxiHgaFLtnTtaJ3hiKlwHGEUq_--cueOT-9J79P3dZ_unEt-Pj55Fd_SNnFo-S0TgEJUSJPpo08iKNSLh1Fra8Fedb94R3EkTTyaGMCgzC4GpitHDslGY_vsUSMBIIIe3ECXAdjyqGOCmdJIrjNaYm5bvXxv-dkWSeVne0u9hG3ti19ae-0dfXR46_DGr6cc-1mdobYcinR4y3tlKWrhlXd1cFXnSp34oM57RS4NLHqOsxHCpMU6gIHZkDEWCPvq4-vIpeTdjp3Rj5Vz-SNo_wv5DQAA__--M15k) separately. The agreement allows for a [ group of 50 Israeli hostages](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLuO5CAQAL8GZ1jQ-BkQXOJsLr3QauPG7hPGI2AHzd-vZuPNSqqkVP8e6wM5cDz-4kW2-HtFV_hFq9YSQIJZu2a3ngjINGT1qNQw6GFSzWkVTbPvJug3p8YewQ2bnjoY5wln3YFp2IICozWAVv3cm7bXOOCodq8340czi07RzuVO7f-bYznJh_f9otS6-2qCPUt5ZmH-CFgELLXW1m05Us0fL2D5oICFc0IK8sQLs6yY5Hnnggdl6QgzSc-JJB6J6KJYZKSC8Y3nl3S4caQiL6LC8RCwNMnuz8ohcB5G0anjQg4_NeX3Od8BAAD__zCsZ2k) to be released, along with 150 Hamas prisoners, during the first phase of the deal. Israel will also allow 300 aid trucks to enter Gaza per day. Netanyahu told the full cabinet that Israel [will continue the war](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDFvwyAQhX-NvRFxdxiHgaFLtnTtaJ3hiKlwHGEUq_--cueOT-9J79P3dZ_unEt-Pj55Fd_SNnFo-S0TgEJUSJPpo08iKNSLh1Fra8Fedb94R3EkTTyaGMCgzC4GpitHDslGY_vsUSMBIIIe3ECXAdjyqGOCmdJIrjNaYm5bvXxv-dkWSeVne0u9hG3ti19ae-0dfXR46_DGr6cc-1mdobYcinR4y3tlKWrhlXd1cFXnSp34oM57RS4NLHqOsxHCpMU6gIHZkDEWCPvq4-vIpeTdjp3Rj5Vz-SNo_wv5DQAA__--M15k) after any pauses even if the hostage deal is agreed to. The hostage swap isn't expected to begin until Thursday at the earliest.

Rep. Ben Cline said on X that those who got the letter should be [entitled to back pay](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskrGS3CwMgJ-G7bgBYeB34eLPXdxdijQpd7Qgdslg8AC7zr19xutLdxUafULSN_Dr_fyOMcV8_YELTT2UM7oeH3SWkgNwUOfh5KdABKRONEkrhDHS_CdOt8nroEh60gEG4eQY0IZRCjRBXzw5PMUJBCgpAaTQo1YvWqJBK3yQFxWsGtkgyMde6svvEnO_UUgf5UH1xZXllKZb72tj6n8GM4O5b7H3gzGYf9L6jfJripkYzK1jvzcGs7Sg9ShHBcKAkKORkqm5Uji36ph669t-gtbfe9gYaPvaN4fLeqQ2ok7Lhfwn6VSXJ_mq7VFyrc8Ce7FWgxNohtHAIKyxxtKgKHiNIzkdBFobzL-RJT-vNXlmYPb17jUx9XYYg96d9W6tYQ7lj5Ql76aHu4Y509aOAHssmW-lJv9MtJJ8pNq4j83dsF7J81AqrxTuLeYrd-URPX-gczETd5j5DR_EK7lSfeOu1Equk-e4rumD98Ir9XvNe9SoPqIjjnX54MdoTPx6x-p5pZ3SZ-djrRWzpyW6U538usWUYjOWDeK6YEzPR-5f_7m_AQAA__9q89SC) and restoration of their rank, and others asked if it was an admission of wrongdoing about the vaccine mandates in the first place.
## Putting a Number on Economic Happiness
Can money buy happiness? Six in 10 Americans say it can, and they even think they know the number. On average, it's a salary of $248,000 a year and $1.2 million in the bank, according to a new survey ([See Charts](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD2PtCAYAH8Ndhh4QFwLirex27e90oA8rlz4MIJL_PeXvfq6SaaYZL6ey9P44NPrv4mo65YXs1b_xoVzCkBBLLJzekMEFB1qPjKmFFcP1u2a28Eq66xCtwn1eEg2KCmVnDgfzGTHzmtgIDgH4GyYBtEP3CgzMrdxK7ZRTEQydL7ms__OPtUdt3DnN579mmMX9F7rUYj4R2AmMLfW-tWWhK18PIH5gwTmmBPe1Kc1R6S7OQ6fsBS650bjte7UZXrniyZER0u93E0xHrnhSWDuTu2O5kPwRY1Eslc0Pvzm6983fgIAAP__fjZiGg)) by financial services company Empower. That number varies sharply depending on the age of the respondent. For millennials, it's a salary of $525,000 and $1.7 million in the bank. The median household income in the U.S. is about $74,000 annually. Overall, Empower says "happiness" in this case primarily means freedom from financial stress. Nearly 75% of Americans [feel economic insecurity](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLtu7CAURb8Gd1hw8OBxQXEbd3PblBaP4_GJMFhAxvLfR3mUqbf20tJ6eywPS5HS87_d0bQ1L9Y3euEiJQfgoJahC2ZFBFQdGjkKobXUd9FtxgUd7kE45RxObtBehcmF0asJJndXriMDApSUAFLcppvqb9JqO4qwSqfWUU1sEBio5dK_Z0ptwzVe-YWl93nvotlaOypT_xjMDObzPHvcj3z-7Azmo2Ct3GNqWBjMmkvB7Y6FvE2VO4yEL-R7TnhxbxN3Hxff7HFQ-vr9snjBirb4rSsmHCfFSFWPbBDP3VL8Nml_h_kMAAD__8LTZz0) about inflation, credit cards, bills, and being able to retire.

The agreement allows for a to be released, along with 150 Hamas prisoners, during the first phase of the deal. Israel will also allow 300 aid trucks to enter Gaza per day. Netanyahu told the full cabinet that Israel after any pauses even if the hostage deal is agreed to. The hostage swap isn't expected to begin until Thursday at the earliest. Army Wants Vets Back Who Refused Vaccine The U.S. Army has to former service members discharged for refusing mandatory COVID shots, telling them they can now remove their dismissals from their records, allowing them to rejoin the Army. The military is struggling to meet recruitment numbers, one of the factors driving the outreach who were separated because they would not get vaccinated for COVID. Rep. Ben Cline said on X that those who got the letter should be and restoration of their rank, and others asked if it was an admission of wrongdoing about the vaccine mandates in the first place. Putting a Number on Economic Happiness Can money buy happiness? Six in 10 Americans say it can, and they even think they know the number. On average, it's a salary of $248,000 a year and $1.2 million in the bank, according to a new survey () by financial services company Empower. That number varies sharply depending on the age of the respondent. For millennials, it's a salary of $525,000 and $1.7 million in the bank. The median household income in the U.S. is about $74,000 annually. Overall, Empower says "happiness" in this case primarily means freedom from financial stress. Nearly 75% of Americans about inflation, credit cards, bills, and being able to retire. (). ➤Thanksgiving is dedicated to being grateful** and giving thanks. It's given rise to dozens of thoughts and quotes over the years expressing that sense of being thankful for what you have. name: Defend the Constitution
subject: #1 Solar Gadget Can Save Your Life In A Crisis
body:
It's Finally Back in Stock

# #1 Solar Gadget Can Save
Your Life In A Crisis
**This Pocket-Sized "Power Plant" Sold Out in Less
Than 48 Hours - Now It's Finally Back in Stock** [**Tested by former Navy SEAL: See it in action!**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e69eb67c583f498eb13c9af50f1b1dd0&_e=UURmu6slV7bFF7xU9ih497yxH7xy9GRJ6zNsaogJkm2XZjaLOw37S9E6CtYj2jCHUsUUr58dT8l0PKtiWvCpYMhszO_4iH332U8W71M4AF3-WG9OfRFHhYxyfc5xchKz1JWzWoD_V25liQCf9wnvAevaYnilLu9hHbF59BjjSgrQoY1JwRG-LIsopyawm9oLYheuyHA8QCFqYKrEsbSLuenbR6hDdHKjy1TpzZ1pfobmYFbUOnbdxf_O8duOoNdVh2_ke9T7qdeJwcK_BK_EEkXmw3tuz6HAz8nugcFxta45-auNfVQk4ztHnvBYouoc) [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e69eb67c583f498eb13c9af50f1b1dd0&_e=UURmu6slV7bFF7xU9ih497yxH7xy9GRJ6zNsaogJkm2XZjaLOw37S9E6CtYj2jCHUsUUr58dT8l0PKtiWvCpYMhszO_4iH332U8W71M4AF3-WG9OfRFHhYxyfc5xchKz1JWzWoD_V25liQCf9wnvAXsKbrI0BDw6kp26N_L486UC4oX7l3LBGqsEZZq_V0ec1EdquyOoUKURNaebg3T5625A0MO3Vlguc8tbxUacg3hdsCydPGOPcH6rIh_DF7IeuBlhwDpoxLbuEgkVU3cWktiTORwqBUzyuoybshXHXyQcQLYj9bNTBQhEp5wOSpSL) [**People are buying these in 4 packs - Learn More**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e69eb67c583f498eb13c9af50f1b1dd0&_e=UURmu6slV7bFF7xU9ih497yxH7xy9GRJ6zNsaogJkm2XZjaLOw37S9E6CtYj2jCHUsUUr58dT8l0PKtiWvCpYMhszO_4iH332U8W71M4AF3-WG9OfRFHhYxyfc5xchKz1JWzWoD_V25liQCf9wnvAZJMwEKAeugmc76g2LoLtEKgKkRZDs-FjNq0t_LKaf45yB-qbzBr2pUTlIz8nsHggsuvyWabm7qxu1lNeXZ_Vbv0PeI3GIYhRNKkMIrnK9fz4dDQHsS94BJa5EvL49hf6_5oJL3Io668LQ18ymhBQQHUz0YjvltBdhAhcRRf0i-c) Oh no. We slapped our foreheads. We had just released the Patriot Power Cell. And the response was so strong, we couldn't believe it. The launch went WAY better than expected. We sold out completely in a matter of hours. The second time, we doubled our inventory thinking that would be enough to meet demand. And then... poof! GONE! Our inventory manager was asking... _**"Why were customers getting these 2... 4... or even 12 units at a time? Were they holiday gifts? Or just incredibly useful?"**_ Since then, the Patriot Power Cell has become one of our best-selling products of all time. Wow! And after making as many as we can, we think we finally have enough to meet demand... at least for now. That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you: [**Tested by Former Navy SEAL:
A Pocket Power Plant That's
Weather-Resistant, Has An Ultra
Bright LED Flashlight And
Charges 2 Devices At Once!**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e69eb67c583f498eb13c9af50f1b1dd0&_e=UURmu6slV7bFF7xU9ih497yxH7xy9GRJ6zNsaogJkm2XZjaLOw37S9E6CtYj2jCHUsUUr58dT8l0PKtiWvCpYMhszO_4iH332U8W71M4AF3-WG9OfRFHhYxyfc5xchKz1JWzWoD_V25liQCf9wnvAddeyihpxN9MSt49QYDMTq6nH0KL6pk4_pkB72UCLlNDsH2U2LDd2-w1WjIuhagpEYqu1JSQ8JdcATIYLnUtVlSTJH2kQtL7WCUhL_iC5Terts7EGjIRU7gEosOpJ-HDIwZU2nc9SO6dFDwllASrmQVaJVxtUg7QoRYvS9srbpdT) [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e69eb67c583f498eb13c9af50f1b1dd0&_e=UURmu6slV7bFF7xU9ih497yxH7xy9GRJ6zNsaogJkm2XZjaLOw37S9E6CtYj2jCHUsUUr58dT8l0PKtiWvCpYMhszO_4iH332U8W71M4AF3-WG9OfRFHhYxyfc5xchKz1JWzWoD_V25liQCf9wnvAZdTaZNpyNRylbslErH1gmBvBbwWsRhVO9uBLK6kRB5mUEKFQj2kuQCl-jUNwORQxFxVtcZWfrHC8B92Ut-_uW9a874EfzMUPcamAjQaK-Fei6nduDPkR9V544q09B8KLJADo4fr-Yz1iyYVYKFsoJ4-hZo0_i72eecvBpDzOo1F) | | **Melanie D.** I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. They work so well, I bought eight more to give to my kids and friends for Christmas. I work outdoors a lot, so I take mine along to plug in my cell phone. They also have a flashlight on them, which comes in real handy. This is a good buy, you won't regret it.
---|---
| **Shirley C.** I'm very happy with the 4Patriots products. I've gotten the Power Cell, which is fantastic to charge my cell phone anywhere. It's rechargeable and I'm very happy with all of the 4Patriots products. And I'm very happy with Frank Bates, he's very truthful, honest and helps others in need. I really appreciate his products and his emails that I get. I'm really, really happy. I would recommend his products and him to anyone. Thank you so much.
---|---
| **Wing C.** I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. I know they will come in handy. Because I know people with their cell phone, saying "oh I have no battery left." And you know what? They're getting it for Christmas. That's what I'm doing for them. We live here in New York, things are quite ample here at this time, ya know. But for emergencies like that - to have your cell phone, your contact to the outside world - it's important. Thank you very much, Frank.
---|---
| **Richard G.** It's a great item for me on weekends out in the country, the swimming pool, wherever else I don't have electricity available. Oftentimes people have come out to the pool, for example, and brought their power adapter to keep their cell phones or laptops or whatever charged up. They wound up losing them. With the Power Cell, it works great to recharge in the shade and I highly recommend it. Thank you very much.
---|---
[**Click here to see it in action!**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e69eb67c583f498eb13c9af50f1b1dd0&_e=UURmu6slV7bFF7xU9ih497yxH7xy9GRJ6zNsaogJkm2XZjaLOw37S9E6CtYj2jCHUsUUr58dT8l0PKtiWvCpYMhszO_4iH332U8W71M4AF3-WG9OfRFHhYxyfc5xchKz1JWzWoD_V25liQCf9wnvAYO-Cip7vd4LOgY5xYliF3HfAyyRu1aGp5irtCtoqkss2NGfyzX_QMXLcdtxBD_uBua7yWZ1pMUl_7eMfhhxVFvVnfGEg2BgcC7vJw7o357NhCRh9UwXa0UrlnCZxX67-K3ftfaoywN-t0egdJxFxwk_A7Sn0jnU6Y18AHAlqC0w)

name: Sam Brown
subject: I thought I was a goner
body:
When my armored vehicle ran over a roadside bomb, I was doused in flames and diesel fuel.

| |
---
| | |
When my armored vehicle ran over a roadside bomb, I was doused in flames and diesel fuel. I thought to myself that "this is it."

---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e46c46f6f9494a8e9cb5779aac0fce56&_e=7tHdjNqFX5dmoi-lT1wjG0zHR90uav2eAI7Bz2JHyEvP10G4dKqgRiq3t4Bs4b5rSElwaP_eJrPvCysB0M3zEJHR1MhK2YFKtpOVc3g2OkwFP76c5B3aQe9jgRjs68WDJ0daar5uold9AFw461NXBpcZcj4cGljwFtbscbBrEZln9k3mgGsCuMyPVrtxGKZtzEq6eQMbxnpSSpT9oT8kQja2vXmniivlZHm7qst8xdKFC1nYqrhLHmuuQ6dyCE93s5XkQF3245IJwdj-OgOF11_0dv141JJWiPZH5zVzEwduzjsxCxmxcGxk_bA7B4XN6ij-Nn3lLp--OYGWI4ba8R0FhWxrF_LicOdYhn-Vb-A2cDSnfNtezh5GiJDa83BaP6I8u4yMOKLxRTRTyc7iew%3D%3D)
---

I'd never tell my mom I loved her again.

I'd never have a family dinner with my siblings again.

I'd never get drinks with my buddies again.

No, in just a matter of minutes, I was going to meet Jesus.

But God had other plans.

My name is Sam Brown, **[and I'm running for the U.S. Senate because God has called me to serve.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e46c46f6f9494a8e9cb5779aac0fce56&_e=7tHdjNqFX5dmoi-lT1wjG0zHR90uav2eAI7Bz2JHyEvP10G4dKqgRiq3t4Bs4b5rSElwaP_eJrPvCysB0M3zEJHR1MhK2YFKtpOVc3g2OkwFP76c5B3aQe9jgRjs68WDJ0daar5uold9AFw461NXBpcZcj4cGljwFtbscbBrEZln9k3mgGsCuMyPVrtxGKZtzEq6eQMbxnpSSpT9oT8kQja2vXmniivlZHm7qst8xdKFC1nYqrhLHmuuQ6dyCE93tcgD0OMxM_3oNqnpAhBFL5kBkC9-hz5k5BE67gyf58O5ws3_uy7gevfVYBQHpCe5M3kFwpXc-tDT-hmoG8wyh5gxASLArXp9OnB_vTXOxbTdcmDpBMU5j9qrs6SxePzLKtI2K6st8WY2XyKoBqaV4w%3D%3D "and I’m running for the U.S. Senate because God has called me to serve.")**

In the Army, in my family, in my church, and in Washington, the setting changes, but the mission stays the same: to serve God and country.

These days, D.C. politicians seem more interested in lining their pockets and protecting their corrupt cronies than serving America,

The Coastal Elites running Washington are as corrupt as they come.

Friend, I'm new to politics. And it's an ugly game.

And unlike the self-serving D.C. elite -- my life, my family, and my campaign are centered on service to YOU.

I'm not running for the Senate for a fancy title or an office in D.C. I'm running for Senate because for far too long, the Washington establishment has left ordinary Americans behind.

Police officers and border patrol agents, veterans, and farmers, and everyday working men and women deserve a champion in the Senate who will fight for them-and I'm not sitting on the sidelines any longer.

Unlike my opponents who rely on leftist billionaires and liberal Hollywood celebrities, my campaign relies on people like you.

I know that you may have just heard my name for the first time just a few moments ago- but Fname, I truly hope that you'd consider lending me your support.

**[A donation of $5, $10, $15, or $25 goes a long way toward helping this campaign.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e46c46f6f9494a8e9cb5779aac0fce56&_e=7tHdjNqFX5dmoi-lT1wjG0zHR90uav2eAI7Bz2JHyEvP10G4dKqgRiq3t4Bs4b5rSElwaP_eJrPvCysB0M3zEJHR1MhK2YFKtpOVc3g2OkwFP76c5B3aQe9jgRjs68WDJ0daar5uold9AFw461NXBpcZcj4cGljwFtbscbBrEZln9k3mgGsCuMyPVrtxGKZtzEq6eQMbxnpSSpT9oT8kQja2vXmniivlZHm7qst8xdKFC1nYqrhLHmuuQ6dyCE93lbi8Lkag3Q5xVj7hdnxr2yLXT0iHnhNlDZRWVeUDFAYqZhb_l-z-Y7dmXE1b7DYp2b45gokiR3hWGJtaDAG7ucr_QB2p2PcJVuIT6ZsHTMrRsmGlet-H1Lyupx2hutGAIifOjLcLcTu7oENpPuGCdQ%3D%3D "A donation of $5, $10, $15, or $25 goes a long way toward helping this campaign.")**

And if you can't chip in today- I'd appreciate your prayers.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Duty First,

CPT Sam Brown

---
|
---
| Paid for Sam Brown for Nevada
---

Las Vegas, NV 89136

name: Wish President Trump a Happy Thanksgiving [via NRSC]
subject: Tell President Trump how thankful you are for his presidency
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Write him a short note to read >>

Friend,

President Trump ALWAYS fought for the American people when he was in office. _The least we can do is tell him, "THANK YOU!"_

subject: This is about Israel

body:
Israel is our greatest ally in the Middle East, and we cannot abandon them in their darkest hour.

| |
---
| | |
Friend,

Hamas's terrorist attack on Israel was the greatest atrocity since the Holocaust, and it has never been more important that we stand shoulder to shoulder with our greatest ally.

October 7th was Israel's 9/11, but they were not alone in their losses. Amongst the innocents massacred by Hamas were 32 Americans - and these terrorists are still holding Israelis and Americans hostage.

**[Now is the time for bold action, Friend. We must stand with Israel and stop appeasing their enemies.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=46c4597432964d1d8439863ae38e3628&_e=hH20TLhfE8Kng6U6nrLPL703PV3hT0OSyDGsrLb02B-D7Kp0nof6O3cyanasxvC5K6ElyywVWkDIXXqSjwOTHejE44zRdXNIUARnyoIwRoQ9FkYiNBMCk69CTA2oFa--Kf53VczambZwo7AU-g3P5YrjA5aPMCWJTAV40AMAGoR0oixK0HghqQrKlKeA8rYZMsgN2sYKjd1DfqLUSKw1e_FhSgGSo7OCd9DsQXYrWE8Ba8AQIL9bI93qNNGuKAaWqxZUJod-i0Uk6sdOJwyHymUmaxalGqwOd7MDOzxDtWra-S5Ax_mRB18z_vhlMkt0GiXHoZcnImMZ75tPi-5Z3qwJnAOaxz1phg2vbKfkfwqRFvvw151qdgxwKvuR1XnoDKWfHKMOrYjuiv2-RyGv1cNLKZlJ7-ms6KHMS0GbFcI1EmpFkromY2M0SU_hH3uNugbNeKJkppLpHf43w-cU5cmpSkydbsJ4rGZsAG3Am-AnQwZ81SoQW30IPGKYDBiOKh8BSI0sQA9pWNquLgOd5gvy2RX7dW1EGtoM5fB1Pss%3D "Now is the time for bold action, Friend. We must stand with Israel and stop appeasing their enemies.")**

---

Hamas could not have gone forward with their attack without the approval of Iran, the largest state sponsor of global terrorism. Since Biden took office, he's perpetuated the Obama era policy of appeasing Iran, which has emboldened our enemies.

As a result, Israelis and Americans have been slaughtered and taken hostage, and antisemitism is skyrocketing at home.

Anti-Israel, pro-Hamas extremism has risen to such a level that it's even gone unchecked in the halls of Congress. Yet Biden has done _nothing_.

As our greatest ally faces an existential threat, it's never been more important that our leaders:
* Rescue every American hostage
* Provide Israel the full support they need
* Stop appeasing Iran
* Put an end to antisemitism in the United States

**[If you agree, please join me in supporting the Republican Jewish Coalition today.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=46c4597432964d1d8439863ae38e3628&_e=hH20TLhfE8Kng6U6nrLPL703PV3hT0OSyDGsrLb02B-D7Kp0nof6O3cyanasxvC5K6ElyywVWkDIXXqSjwOTHejE44zRdXNIUARnyoIwRoQ9FkYiNBMCk69CTA2oFa--Kf53VczambZwo7AU-g3P5YrjA5aPMCWJTAV40AMAGoR0oixK0HghqQrKlKeA8rYZMsgN2sYKjd1DfqLUSKw1e_FhSgGSo7OCd9DsQXYrWE8Ba8AQIL9bI93qNNGuKAaWqxZUJod-i0Uk6sdOJwyHymUmaxalGqwOd7MDOzxDtWra-S5Ax_mRB18z_vhlMkt0GiXHoZcnImMZ75tPi-5Z3qwJnAOaxz1phg2vbKfkfwqRFvvw151qdgxwKvuR1Xno08ARLfLXBOco--fPMPzz4_vx_pm68Y7hVFsYRsj9vPfjAWkPV80KyiLxBbdKPp-wRjfp3MPwT56wB2_C7sDdqH96_L6fD2RjQQRMZ_i45X82bHt-docULNlMdaZhCbTFWvTi_L4cin1Pee5tfb_yBREYKnAFC42znYB3fEysCok%3D "If you agree, please join me in supporting the Republican Jewish Coalition today.")**

The Republican Jewish Coalition is the leading Republican organization devoted to supporting Israel, fighting antisemitism, and electing strong leaders who align with our shared mission.

Israel is our greatest ally in the Middle East, and we cannot abandon them in their darkest hour.

**[So please, take action today.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=46c4597432964d1d8439863ae38e3628&_e=hH20TLhfE8Kng6U6nrLPL703PV3hT0OSyDGsrLb02B-D7Kp0nof6O3cyanasxvC5K6ElyywVWkDIXXqSjwOTHejE44zRdXNIUARnyoIwRoQ9FkYiNBMCk69CTA2oFa--Kf53VczambZwo7AU-g3P5YrjA5aPMCWJTAV40AMAGoR0oixK0HghqQrKlKeA8rYZMsgN2sYKjd1DfqLUSKw1e_FhSgGSo7OCd9DsQXYrWE8Ba8AQIL9bI93qNNGuKAaWqxZUJod-i0Uk6sdOJwyHymUmaxalGqwOd7MDOzxDtWra-S5Ax_mRB18z_vhlMkt0GiXHoZcnImMZ75tPi-5Z3qwJnAOaxz1phg2vbKfkfwqRFvvw151qdgxwKvuR1Xno5kQrPnsYGY-HgELabfjYlOdGmFLGKrQLPSwJ5vZDH4DB5at7ZlWlzjCJEsFZILeNSMXaTXEdj4uFoltkt6zfSaEW1YOg5tjxIP1Gu5okk6Fkap1zhReBJSoozUc_aU1M0SSc9V6oCvxCvAJ0S_xL5RxRnhNym5mwyT06tjAP-iQ%3D "So please, take action today.")**

name: Team DeSantis
subject: Let's turn back the clock

body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=f43568cfb279923b709c6232d8648ba712d1986fb4bff45fb8caca126859dabc35ac730b4c87be30c9fd84119d5a13779862eb57445a92b6207a89eeb8c62074dd0389920631b65d834025e99752b190

Friend,

Do you remember when Republicans used to win elections? We used to see it up and down the ballot, but we didn't in 2023. And we haven't in years. Our party is desperate for a change. We need leadership.

If we can't win at the ballot how do we expect to win for our children, our rights, or our freedom?

But the good news is this: we HAVE a Republican who WINS historic victories.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=82cabfbee1d74655882135bfbdcccbf477269987daddbc16ec72f54bd486b567aca0507a5e462332fd7f806945c18f34af9d9d4299fa98e4

HELP REPUBLICANS WIN IN 2024

In the last few years, Ron DeSantis turned the state of Florida from a deep purple to a bright red. In 2024, with your support, this country will be waking up, coming to their senses about the failure we're facing under Joe Biden and VOTING RED.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=82cabfbee1d7465546b5990e5d5615dc96fd18485d029a2252ca249c1847a957b3b80d03879d3fe86bc26e97f6f985f9df4a2860de88cc4d
SUPPORT THE PARTY: CHIP IN $20.24

Ron DeSantis has the playbook to defeat Joe Biden and the woke mob. He has a proven game plan to convert voters. He has the winning record this party is in desperate need of.

We're ready for Republicans to be a winning party in this country again. We will get this done nationwide, but we need you to support us today.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=82cabfbee1d746557882144c92972eb3d27515cbe9d0e1afdae139b806aee8e1adfdab8d4b3da5d29076bdd53b1753eb62ed2abda8d2f355
SEND IN $47

In Freedom,

Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=82cabfbee1d746556275adf3544cdbc1e9f238b8a944721119da57b1874c4ef4043fe6d5623280a8a233736ba8c49f71814dbd148582bc6d

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=82cabfbee1d746552aeef41ab40cc7199064da025a260fb6ac4d7b195a8d6847dca55d05def4c995f111e2b80d68c6915a8c03472ef1c145
here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=82cabfbee1d74655506c8c157e15b01eb5a32865a2131fe863acb6e2063639839ae16b8545d4ba17890f6c667f780b9cfc49a29c69be4b99
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=82cabfbee1d74655882135bfbdcccbf477269987daddbc16ec72f54bd486b567aca0507a5e462332fd7f806945c18f34af9d9d4299fa98e4

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=82cabfbee1d74655882135bfbdcccbf477269987daddbc16ec72f54bd486b567aca0507a5e462332fd7f806945c18f34af9d9d4299fa98e4

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.

name: Shift WA
subject: Thanksgiving Survival Guide
body:
Thanksgiving is coming up - and, for many of us, it means dealing with Lefty family and friends who struggling with reality. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62491303:sclx0AiaN:m:1:2610672541:BCC5C863A26AAC04B4EFBDFC4EF06149:r "Shift Washington")
---
| Friends,

Thanksgiving is coming up - and, for many of us, it means dealing with Lefty family and friends who struggling with reality. That's why we're bringing back a blast from Shift's past and reviving our "Crazy Liberal Uncle Survival Guide."

Without further ado, a few tips for holiday gatherings:

**When your crazy uncle starts singing the praises of Jay Inslee, drop these undeniable facts:**
* Remind him that Inslee's stellar management at Western State Hospital cost us $53 million in federal money. Cha-ching!
* Mention the democratic paradise Inslee created during his 975-day one-man "emergency powers" rule - who needs checks and balances anyway?
* And let's not forget his stellar oversight at the Department of Corrections, where a mere "13-year-long error" led to the early release of 3,700 inmates. Whoopsie daisy!

**And, should your crazy uncle begin congratulating Washington Democrats for their many "green" achievements, hit back with these hard truths: **
* The Democrats' carbon tax is adding 50-cents-plus per gallon to gas prices today, with no relief in sight. Happy pumping for working families across Washington!
* The Department of Ecology scraped its own website of any mention of progress on Gov. Inslee's environmental goals - and after KING 5 caught Gov. Inslee in a web of deceit about that website, the governor's office now refuses to talk with the station about the state's own goals.

**When your crazy uncle denies the surge in crime, or says Republicans are just fearmongering, deal out these realities:**
* Pierce County alone saw a 110% spike in stolen vehicles. All thanks to Democrat laws preventing police pursuit of car thieves, of course.
* Tacoma and Seattle are both breaking homicide records - nothing like a nostalgic tie to the good ol' days of the gang-banging '80's.
* And who could forget the failed law banning law enforcement pursuits? Democrats sure did when they refused to amend it after it clearly backfired.

Now that you're armed with the truth, we'd like to ask for your support. [**Help us keep the truth alive and kicking by contributing to Shift WA. We're right there on the front lines, battling misinformation to keep you informed.**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62491304:sclx0AiaN:m:1:2610672541:BCC5C863A26AAC04B4EFBDFC4EF06149:r)

[**Donate now, and let's make Thanksgiving dinner debates a little more interesting for years to come!**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62491304:sclx0AiaN:m:1:2610672541:BCC5C863A26AAC04B4EFBDFC4EF06149:r)

Happy Thanksgiving!

The Shift WA Team | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62491305:sclx0AiaN:m:1:2610672541:BCC5C863A26AAC04B4EFBDFC4EF06149:r)
