clean_body: Thanksgiving is coming up - and, for many of us, it means dealing with Lefty family and friends who struggling with reality. | | "Shift Washington" | Friends, Thanksgiving is coming up - and, for many of us, it means dealing with Lefty family and friends who struggling with reality. That's why we're bringing back a blast from Shift's past and reviving our "Crazy Liberal Uncle Survival Guide." Without further ado, a few tips for holiday gatherings: When your crazy uncle starts singing the praises of Jay Inslee, drop these undeniable facts: Remind him that Inslee's stellar management at Western State Hospital cost us $53 million in federal money. Cha-ching! Mention the democratic paradise Inslee created during his 975-day one-man "emergency powers" rule - who needs checks and balances anyway? And let's not forget his stellar oversight at the Department of Corrections, where a mere "13-year-long error" led to the early release of 3,700 inmates. Whoopsie daisy! And, should your crazy uncle begin congratulating Washington Democrats for their many "green" achievements, hit back with these hard truths: The Democrats' carbon tax is adding 50-cents-plus per gallon to gas prices today, with no relief in sight. Happy pumping for working families across Washington! The Department of Ecology scraped its own website of any mention of progress on Gov. Inslee's environmental goals - and after KING 5 caught Gov. Inslee in a web of deceit about that website, the governor's office now refuses to talk with the station about the state's own goals. When your crazy uncle denies the surge in crime, or says Republicans are just fearmongering, deal out these realities: Pierce County alone saw a 110% spike in stolen vehicles. All thanks to Democrat laws preventing police pursuit of car thieves, of course. Tacoma and Seattle are both breaking homicide records - nothing like a nostalgic tie to the good ol' days of the gang-banging '80's. And who could forget the failed law banning law enforcement pursuits? Democrats sure did when they refused to amend it after it clearly backfired. Now that you're armed with the truth, we'd like to ask for your support. Happy Thanksgiving! name: David Hogg
subject: Why I asked for your old furniture...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
Leaders We Deserve is all-in on our mission to elect young leaders across America, so we’re going to spend as much of our budget on that mission as possible.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6b62a346-727f-4b82-87fa-3984f91dbb05/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | Hey, Peter, you may have seen me asking for your old furniture a few weeks ago: Well, I’m happy to announce that the Leaders We Deserve office is 100% volunteer-furnished thanks to the help of some incredibly kind supporters in the DC area! 🎉 What does this have to do with you? Keep reading ⬇️ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td9a69f51-c944-4e47-b1ed-3570565c2553/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I asked for donations of old furniture because, to be honest, I didn’t want to spend your hard-earned dollars on fancy chairs or whatever. That’s not what we’re about. Leaders We Deserve is all-in on our mission to elect young leaders across America, so we’re going to spend as much of our budget on that mission as possible. And we’re proud to have Blue Amp Action's support in this mission. [Now that we’re all set on furniture, we’re focusing on growing our grassroots movement to elect more young people across the country. We’re still counting on your support, so will you split a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Blue Amp Action to help?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3a801363-a9af-4d91-9264-2359eca684e9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [CHIP IN NOW!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7dfd52aa-57f0-4843-be0c-b86d1f910a2b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | This fight isn’t just about this election cycle. It’s about changing the face of our government forever by electing young leaders who are capable of bringing sorely needed change that will last for generations. By splitting a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Blue Amp Action today, you’re investing in this movement for the long haul. But in order for us to move the needle, this work depends on grassroots supporters like you. Whether it’s $5 or $50, every contribution counts. [Please consider splitting a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Blue Amp Action today to fund the hard work ahead of us (not to buy fancy office chairs).](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4cc2f113-cbbf-41e1-a390-840ae7c9696c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T59a8a4d5-926f-4140-ad2a-c8983e46e19b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| More soon, David Hogg Co-Founder, Leaders We Deserve P.S. You might be wondering why I was wearing a suit moving furniture in 95F. The day we got to move in I had a meeting at the White House, so in the middle of my U-Hauling around D.C., I had to go to that meeting, and then continue moving our stuff up several stories. (I need to find a good dry cleaner in D.C.)
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---

---|---

5 Questions to Ask When Choosing a Financial Advisor

*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|*
| | | | [ ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=08eaf504ca2f4dfaaeb308af230fb762&_e=zKNoG3fAI_idLiwQM5wtHp1RIuCBE7QtWm1QP7p-5inSimysYM9ohQphSiCBkav0TgRfW_Wj1E3er2eQ1KM1x0r1_TflI_3tuLbaOysuI8lRYqLnwYumMrdVCgDn2sgBFOjoCVWdcbqYyE4pqGe6SULwJDCdx0j8rEBOgYfl3maLqxkNZNku1xcEJ5piISYknsIwci4RGlmfUgsI39FkAzYqL-PCxuflSv6aFtj9ls-delhkmHr_JLPWurX-U388FJ2Gv1wjQEnnGBvS1Dl7qD2HLLDTZF9Adq3JI6kYfvaMgI4SF0NwZJWOu-oz7g5TeX9mwyWEaeyovXkwxlRezojO6Ng8_3dIbXlmPALyJ8PQzfm-6AI2YncCMFMNf-LG2B3hJe6Ost_o3974L5JB8h8sXAeDIVs7plFaNLMSEIydpLS86IbuBhv9HEXbgS2jckzgezre0ghqSP17yXH6Tw%3D%3D)

## 5 Questions to Ask When Choosing a Financial Advisor
---
| The questions you ask can help ensure you find the financial advice to help you plan to achieve your goals.
---
| [Take Retirement Quiz](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=08eaf504ca2f4dfaaeb308af230fb762&_e=zKNoG3fAI_idLiwQM5wtHp1RIuCBE7QtWm1QP7p-5inSimysYM9ohQphSiCBkav0TgRfW_Wj1E3er2eQ1KM1x0r1_TflI_3tuLbaOysuI8lRYqLnwYumMrdVCgDn2sgBFOjoCVWdcbqYyE4pqGe6SULwJDCdx0j8rEBOgYfl3maLqxkNZNku1xcEJ5piISYknsIwci4RGlmfUgsI39FkAzYqL-PCxuflSv6aFtj9ls-delhkmHr_JLPWurX-U388FJ2Gv1wjQEnnGBvS1Dl7qD2HLLDTZF9Adq3JI6kYfvYHrttClk8oDzuYQ1olygyperN2HAcp2Lb_-ddL_SuApRvZZbxYdd8HAREdkeFUWVNx0A31O1rGQUNh5y7BinnBV4nNBgCzIRKBD3tNgiWtcJNTcOivyJo0yP33tW10Z0QmtNaKUZRPAd3tdss4prq1gJnj4Yv1cPSPWqY0juXV_Q%3D%3D "Take Retirement Quiz")
---
| _Find up to three advisors that serve your area, free!_
---
| | | SPONSORED BY SMARTASSET
---
| [ ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=08eaf504ca2f4dfaaeb308af230fb762&_e=zKNoG3fAI_idLiwQM5wtHp1RIuCBE7QtWm1QP7p-5inSimysYM9ohQphSiCBkav0TgRfW_Wj1E3er2eQ1KM1x0r1_TflI_3tuLbaOysuI8lRYqLnwYumMrdVCgDn2sgBFOjoCVWdcbqYyE4pqGe6SULwJDCdx0j8rEBOgYfl3maLqxkNZNku1xcEJ5piISYknsIwci4RGlmfUgsI39FkAzYqL-PCxuflSv6aFtj9ls-delhkmHr_JLPWurX-U388FJ2Gv1wjQEnnGBvS1Dl7qD2HLLDTZF9Adq3JI6kYfvZecfuldEqTXeQ7t5KhjMOyrGVyuuwdJCw5-0-5wGkUX2G-tkLV6bu-3Um7wVAGFC5jOFHz6W9MXFMdT1wYLIowc_SnklRKAGAwywsnAMO9zOkDp5q2whrA6eJa4FXRDM8WxQz41anMUA9nwX1VimBVMkvW8m743uGWRDBZ4j64wg%3D%3D)
---
|
---
| Whether you're saving for retirement, considering major purchases, planning your estate, or just want a second set of eyes on your investments, hiring a financial advisor who you feel best suits your needs could be key. A 2022 Northwestern Mutual study found that 62% of U.S. adults admit their financial planning needs improvement. However, only 35% of Americans work with a financial advisor.1 The value of working with a financial advisor varies by person. While advisors are legally prohibited from promising returns, research suggests that people who [work with a financial advisor](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=08eaf504ca2f4dfaaeb308af230fb762&_e=zKNoG3fAI_idLiwQM5wtHp1RIuCBE7QtWm1QP7p-5inSimysYM9ohQphSiCBkav0TgRfW_Wj1E3er2eQ1KM1x0r1_TflI_3tuLbaOysuI8lRYqLnwYumMrdVCgDn2sgBFOjoCVWdcbqYyE4pqGe6SULwJDCdx0j8rEBOgYfl3maLqxkNZNku1xcEJ5piISYknsIwci4RGlmfUgsI39FkAzYqL-PCxuflSv6aFtj9ls-delhkmHr_JLPWurX-U388FJ2Gv1wjQEnnGBvS1Dl7qD2HLLDTZF9Adq3JI6kYfvb46KJDROstb_ELolyo-o2nDBEsek_jzofNo-KSPFssrvLAPNlCeCZUxmuKjxiTY3k6eE1n3LLMKUwvVai43dCYMhkwlNc6DVZLEP0Pq8KKW4RMFYcniE4YiUweFJlxYq7PsBSwn3LzV1kLxwKQC9g6wS5ES-ZlUD9BsHI9HUuaaA%3D%3D) feel more at ease about their finances and could potentially end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.2 Whatever your reasons for seeking financial advice, it's important to have a list of questions planned to ensure you're hiring a financial advisor who can help you plan to reach your goals.
### **5 Questions to Ask When Choosing a Financial Advisor**
**1\. Are You a Fiduciary?** Fiduciaries are financial advisors with a legal obligation to prioritize your interests as they manage your assets or money. Unlike a broker who may push you into insurance policies or investments to rack up fees and commissions, fiduciaries are bound to recommend options that benefit you, the customer. While conflicts of interest can still exist, any potential conflicts of interest must be disclosed. Another thing I love about the holidays and this time of year is how many opportunities there are to give back to my community! name: Caroline Colarusso
subject: Happy Thanksgiving
body:
Give Thanks to God
| | | | |
---
---
| Give thanks in all circumstances; for this is God's will for you in Christ Jesus. 1 Thessalonians 5:18
---
|
---
Friends,
This Thanksgiving we take the time to remember the very first Thanksgiving that took place right here in Plymouth, Massachusetts. We think about the Puritans, their dedication to the God of the Bible and how He provided for them that very first autumn harvest.
We remember that God is our provider, our sustenance, and our source of all things. This long-standing American Chistian belief is embedded throughout our very own American culture, but especially during Thanksgiving. The imagery of that very first Thanksgiving feast with the local Native Americans immediately comes to mind.
This November as we gather for turkey, pumpkin pie, and all the fixings, as we gather with our loved ones let us offer deep gratitude thanking God for what He has so graciously provided to each of us, our wonderful families and friends and our beloved nation known as America.
May you and your families have a Blessed Thanksgiving.
The Colarusso Family
---
---
| | | | | | | Caroline Colarusso | 4 Patrick Circle, Stoneham, MA 02180
---

_**In 2020, Alaska voted for President Trump at a higher margin than Texas, yet our state 's lone representative is a radical Democrat.**_

clean_body: What if I told you a handful of votes in Alaska will be the difference between freedom & communism in America? | | What if I told you a handful of votes in Alaska will be the difference between freedom & communism in America? What if I told you a neighborhood in Anchorage would have more influence than the millions of people in New York & LA? Well in 2024, the future of our country will be decided in Alaska. My name is Nick Begich. You've probably never heard of me, but I'm a conservative pro-Trump Republican running for Congress in Alaska's only House seat. In 2020, Alaska voted for President Trump at a higher margin than Texas, yet our state 's lone representative is a radical Democrat. This will be the closest race in the country, and to be honest, it's already an uphill battle. Democrats have raised $38 million to destroy me. If we're going to flip the single most important seat in the nation, I'm going to need your help right now. | This race might be thousands of miles away in Alaska, but if we lose, our House majority will be doomed for every American for generations. Thank you, | Nick Begich | | PAID FOR BY ALASKANS FOR NICK BEGICH PO BOX 671710 CHUGIAK, AK 99567 Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

Republican candidate Celeste Maloy has won a special election to the
U.S. House of Representatives for Utah’s 2nd District, according to
multiple reports. The district had previously been represented for 10
years by former Republican Rep. Chris Stewart, who resigned from
Congress on Sept. 15 due to his wife’s unspecified health concerns.

Longtime Dem Rep Announces Retirement Ahead Of 2024

Longtime Democratic California Rep. Anna Eshoo announced in a video
Tuesday that she would not seek another term in the lower chamber in
2024. Eshoo had been serving in the House since 1993 where she
represented three different constituencies — California’s 14th, 18th
and 16th Congressional Districts.

‘Compelling’: Legal Experts Say Elon Musk’s X Has A Good Case Against
Media Matters

Billionaire Elon Musk’s social media platform X’s — formerly Twitter —
lawsuit against Media Matters could lead to damages for the left-wing
group, legal experts told the Daily Caller News Foundation. Media
Matters alleged that advertisements from major advertisers show up on
antisemitic content on X on Thursday, according to a report.

JAMES CARTER And JIM ELLIS: Mitt Romney And Joe Manchin Are Wrong
About Ranked-Choice Voting
http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo2l6a7dqedbg7dnp402ie5t5uc5msi0itia7q70_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cdjm6o36chh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kui3bd9ieir38ctk6oon9dtjmeqjetjjkorrbdt36kq32tbiekojf8j0c9j6f934cuh64pt2mgqradjlkoq34sbl69qq8cth6mhb9ddlkkor3d5memir9cbhemh7fddjmkqfb91jm4qq5dtl6mir8ctm62qb7dd469qjb9rieupredd468rrasblk9q37dll64qqcc5nmir3add3euon9ctn6uh2bs

U.S. Sens. Joe Manchin and Mitt Romney recently praised Ranked-Choice
Voting (RCV), lauding it respectively as “mesmerizing...we should do it”
and “a superior way to proceed.” But the two lawmakers are wrong.
Their statements might ring true if they understood they are endorsing

name: Rep. Joe Sweeney
subject: We're all paying more thanks to the Federal Government
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Granite Solutions, Joe Sweeney Chairman
body:
Both Parties Are to Blame - Join the Fight for Fiscal Responsibility!
| | |
---
| | Derek, As we prepare to celebrate Thanksgiving with our families and loved ones, the holiday spirit fills our hearts, but so does the concern about the rising costs of this cherished tradition. **Thanksgiving in 2023 is now 30.43% more expensive than it was just three years ago** , hitting hardworking Americans and our senior citizens the hardest.
---
| [ ](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.)
---
The culprit behind this alarming trend is none other than the unchecked federal spending policies led by both parties at the Federal level, and further escalated by President Biden's administration. The consequences of this reckless spending are clear - **runaway inflation, higher prices on essential goods, and a growing burden on our seniors and those living on fixed incomes.** But it's not just about pointing fingers; it's about taking action. We need to champion fiscal responsibility and reevaluate our spending priorities at the federal level. Our government must control spending and make prudent choices about where our hard-earned taxpayer dollars are allocated. We can't continue down this path of fiscal irresponsibility, jeopardizing the economic stability of our nation. Additionally, we must prioritize tax relief for Granite Staters. Lowering the tax burden on our citizens, especially our seniors and those with fixed incomes, is both a moral imperative and an economic necessity. When individuals and families have more control over their money, it stimulates economic growth, fosters entrepreneurship, and empowers people to make choices that improve their financial well-being. As Granite Staters, we've always understood the value of limited government and fiscal responsibility, embodied in our state motto, "Live Free or Die." It's time we demand the same principles from our federal government and ensure that our country's exceptional economic freedom and prosperity are preserved.
| [You can join our fight for fiscal responsibility with a generous donation of $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today.](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.) _If you've already donated to Granite Solutions, please share this message with your network and ask them to chip in too._ We can only be successful next November by organizing and getting ready this November.
---
| | | [ **Donate $5** ](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.)
---
| [ **Donate $10** ](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.)
---
| | | [ **Donate $25** ](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.)
---
| [ **Donate $50** ](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.)
---
| | | [ **Donate $100** ](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.)
---
| [ **Donate $250** ](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.)
---
| | | [ **Donate Any Amount** ](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.)
---
This upcoming legislative session in 2024 is our opportunity to make a difference. Let's prioritize fiscal sanity in our nation's capital and work together to mitigate the impact of unchecked spending and soaring inflation. **The consequences of inaction are simply too great to ignore.** This Thanksgiving, as we give thanks for our blessings, let's also renew our commitment to safeguarding our economic freedom and prosperity. By advocating for fiscal responsibility, controlling government spending, and fighting for tax relief, we can secure a brighter and more secure future for Granite Staters and all Americans. Thank you for standing with us on this important issue. Together, we can make a difference and build a better future for all. Best, Rep. Joe Sweeney Chairman, Granite Solutions
| | Paid for by Granite Solutions, Joe Sweeney Chairman. P.O. Box 266, Salem, NH 03079. www.GraniteSolutions.org
---

This upcoming legislative session in 2024 is our opportunity to make a difference. Let's prioritize fiscal sanity in our nation's capital and work together to mitigate the impact of unchecked spending and soaring inflation. **The consequences of inaction are simply too great to ignore.** This Thanksgiving, as we give thanks for our blessings, let's also renew our commitment to safeguarding our economic freedom and prosperity. By advocating for fiscal responsibility, controlling government spending, and fighting for tax relief, we can secure a brighter and more secure future for Granite Staters and all Americans. clean_body: Both Parties Are to Blame - Join the Fight for Fiscal Responsibility! | | | | | Derek, As we prepare to celebrate Thanksgiving with our families and loved ones, the holiday spirit fills our hearts, but so does the concern about the rising costs of this cherished tradition. Thanksgiving in 2023 is now 30.43% more expensive than it was just three years ago , hitting hardworking Americans and our senior citizens the hardest. | The culprit behind this alarming trend is none other than the unchecked federal spending policies led by both parties at the Federal level, and further escalated by President Biden's administration. The consequences of this reckless spending are clear - runaway inflation, higher prices on essential goods, and a growing burden on our seniors and those living on fixed incomes. But it's not just about pointing fingers; it's about taking action. We need to champion fiscal responsibility and reevaluate our spending priorities at the federal level. Our government must control spending and make prudent choices about where our hard-earned taxpayer dollars are allocated. We can't continue down this path of fiscal irresponsibility, jeopardizing the economic stability of our nation. Additionally, we must prioritize tax relief for Granite Staters. Lowering the tax burden on our citizens, especially our seniors and those with fixed incomes, is both a moral imperative and an economic necessity. When individuals and families have more control over their money, it stimulates economic growth, fosters entrepreneurship, and empowers people to make choices that improve their financial well-being. As Granite Staters, we've always understood the value of limited government and fiscal responsibility, embodied in our state motto, "Live Free or Die." It's time we demand the same principles from our federal government and ensure that our country's exceptional economic freedom and prosperity are preserved. | If you've already donated to Granite Solutions, please share this message with your network and ask them to chip in too. We can only be successful next November by organizing and getting ready this November. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | This upcoming legislative session in 2024 is our opportunity to make a difference. Let's prioritize fiscal sanity in our nation's capital and work together to mitigate the impact of unchecked spending and soaring inflation. The consequences of inaction are simply too great to ignore. This Thanksgiving, as we give thanks for our blessings, let's also renew our commitment to safeguarding our economic freedom and prosperity. By advocating for fiscal responsibility, controlling government spending, and fighting for tax relief, we can secure a brighter and more secure future for Granite Staters and all Americans. Thank you for standing with us on this important issue. Together, we can make a difference and build a better future for all. Best, Rep. Joe Sweeney Chairman, Granite Solutions | | Paid for by Granite Solutions, Joe Sweeney Chairman. P.O. Box 266, Salem, NH 03079. www.GraniteSolutions.org

**From the Editor's Desk:** Ilhan Omar has picked sides in the fight between Israel and Hamas, and she is siding with the Hamas terrorists who invaded Israel and killed countless civilians. Even though Israel is under attack like never before, Omar has called for an end to "unconditional" military aid to Israel. She wants them to be defenseless against the attacks from Hamas. **Should Ilhan Omar be expelled from Congress for her decision to support Hamas?** Ilhan Omar has been a diehard enemy of Israel for years. In 2012, Omar tweeted that "Israel has hypnotized the world" and then in 2019, she tweeted that Israel is all about "the Benjamins baby," implying that they only care about money. Now she doesn't want them to receive international help as Hamas threatens to destroy their country. Many think that Rep. Omar has crossed a red line, and that she should no longer be allowed to serve in Congress anymore after her comments. **You Decide.** Are Omar's critics correct? Should she be removed from Congress for supporting Hamas? Or is it no big deal that she is tacitly siding with one of the most violent terrorist groups on the planet? The media is refusing to hold Omar accountable, so it is up to American citizens like you to make your voice heard. Please help us gather results from everyday Americans by offering this survey to your friends and family. These results will be published for millions of conservative news readers to view without the Mainstream Media's censorship. clean_body: | | | From the Editor's Desk: Ilhan Omar has picked sides in the fight between Israel and Hamas, and she is siding with the Hamas terrorists who invaded Israel and killed countless civilians. Even though Israel is under attack like never before, Omar has called for an end to "unconditional" military aid to Israel. She wants them to be defenseless against the attacks from Hamas. Should Ilhan Omar be expelled from Congress for her decision to support Hamas? Ilhan Omar has been a diehard enemy of Israel for years. In 2012, Omar tweeted that "Israel has hypnotized the world" and then in 2019, she tweeted that Israel is all about "the Benjamins baby," implying that they only care about money. Now she doesn't want them to receive international help as Hamas threatens to destroy their country. Many think that Rep. Omar has crossed a red line, and that she should no longer be allowed to serve in Congress anymore after her comments. You Decide. Are Omar's critics correct? Should she be removed from Congress for supporting Hamas? Or is it no big deal that she is tacitly siding with one of the most violent terrorist groups on the planet? The media is refusing to hold Omar accountable, so it is up to American citizens like you to make your voice heard. Please help us gather results from everyday Americans by offering this survey to your friends and family. These results will be published for millions of conservative news readers to view without the Mainstream Media's censorship. and let me know if you think it's time for Ilhan Omar to be removed from Congress. name: Kate M. (Team Debbie)
subject: a personal thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
I am so incredibly proud of this grassroots campaign and everything that we've accomplished so far
| | |
---
Hi friend,
It's Kate, Debbie's campaign manager. I am so incredibly proud of this campaign and everything that we've accomplished so far. And I want to personally thank you for being a part of this grassroots movement.
**Now, as this race gets underway, the national media is saying that this will be one of the closest races in 2024 — and a poll shows Debbie one point AHEAD of Rick Scott.**
We've made incredible progress, but we can't afford to slow down for even a second. Rick Scott has a personal fortune of nearly a _quarter of a billion dollars_ that he can dip into at ANY MOMENT to destroy our momentum. He's already spent more than $3 MILLION on attack ads.
**This is going to be one of the most expensive races in the country. And now that West Virginia is almost guaranteed to flip red, control of the Senate will come down to Florida.** We'll only be able to compete with Scott's spending if folks like you stand with us every step of the way. But right now, we're falling short of our $75,000 Weekly Goal.
**Please, will you rush $5 or more before 11:59 p.m. tonight to ensure we have the resources to defeat Rick Scott? Our entire Democratic Senate majority is on the line here, and Debbie can only win if we have strong, early investments. name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Increase your understanding of Russia
body:
This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=24e7406176cb4258b1d37e83ac7737be&_e=v_8sfZ5-w_b73KOAvgztyei52Oqtgqs96GkL7kx5iuHJnrkmtfEV-d9G4gVibN6SuLsyF3owlYyZsmkRPi49XINu5UfRw717FQRMfeinWx8kcfIDBBSxjyJL8MG1cQh3r153-JA_i8IAhVio-J1UcgWE3Ey4_6D15ffJPk6N1yh7vYE2WA3PDeS41YrRRmFv9hZH9_P4GPAsBvnB6vDbxxRfUgspXal_z5sx8N_8rfD44CsP5HK4rIW_JJJ_09_-aCQScA6lxSWqYsBOFm7nppidYkuPue2Jj516lHRG1Hs7EKqhsom80CV7mOxWTwR6cSg_xrsZ0LdvUxh9CsT875CJkJGU-Vn3_E3AfHs-Iig%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

Winston Churchill once described Russia as "a riddle, wrapped in a mystery, inside an enigma"--words that still ring true.

But given Russia's current war with Ukraine--and Russia's role in the shifting balance of power in today's world--a better understanding of Russia is critical.

Since Peter the Great, Russia's place among nations has only grown. As it transformed itself from a regional backwater to a great power, its politics and culture influenced significant events in our own history.

At the time of the American Revolution, for instance, Russia was the first nation to recognize the U.S. as a sovereign state. And in the Cold War period between World War Two and the fall of the Soviet Union in 1991, American-Russian relations became the focus of world attention.

**The need for a better understanding of post-Cold War Russia, in light of its current importance and its long history as one of the world 's great powers, is why Hillsdale College has created a [FREE online video series on Russia](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=24e7406176cb4258b1d37e83ac7737be&_e=v_8sfZ5-w_b73KOAvgztyei52Oqtgqs96GkL7kx5iuHJnrkmtfEV-d9G4gVibN6SuLsyF3owlYyZsmkRPi49XINu5UfRw717FQRMfeinWx8kcfIDBBSxjyJL8MG1cQh3r153-JA_i8IAhVio-J1UcgWE3Ey4_6D15ffJPk6N1yh7vYE2WA3PDeS41YrRRmFv9hZH9_P4GPAsBvnB6vDbx4FHBq6ZI7cLUe7tVUT9TSv_FNc9cxApd4majqH4kTOrkD7FckG9FNtXdMfsVfTqI0oDdAwyQlb_ireVUJ3kwI1q8CoiBnG_zraharKDBWZJB1ePxmjaRFQqR7xDITTRFdLfe_bUk1S6C9u8kOcXdzQ%3D). **

In our online video series, based on a recent conference held at Hillsdale College, you'll learn more about Russian history--including the "Greats" such as Peter and Catherine--with special attention to the Russian Revolution through the fall of the Soviet Union.

The video series also explores Russia's significant contributions to literature, through such authors as Dostoyevsky and Tolstoy--and to classical music, through such composers such as Tchaikovsky and Rachmaninoff.

**You 'll also gain a deeper understanding of Russia's enigmatic relationship with the West today, and about the causes and complications of the current Ukraine war. **

You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/russia-cca/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=24e7406176cb4258b1d37e83ac7737be&_e=v_8sfZ5-w_b73KOAvgztyei52Oqtgqs96GkL7kx5iuHJnrkmtfEV-d9G4gVibN6SuLsyF3owlYyZsmkRPi49XINu5UfRw717FQRMfeinWx8kcfIDBBSxjyJL8MG1cQh3r153-JA_i8IAhVio-J1UcgWE3Ey4_6D15ffJPk6N1yh7vYE2WA3PDeS41YrRRmFv9hZH9_P4GPAsBvnB6vDbx1Wp5tWBhIAOhBxB5BNMIoG3VprHnXWUiIyrF30KbKgGlk5ZPBMmuneDR77b9c6GB1cYEWj9OqN6Xy_Y6r3349pUO0kcetw1ey_cJefNOOMRIc4xJ2bh824G7b1RxCZ_qrf6jWC5zwQrg6_YMxcFSPo%3D)

**Please use the secure link above to immediately receive your video series on Russia.**

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 ** **
---
| |
---

Defend the Constitution

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mariela=20Roca?=
subject: Happy Thanksgiving! 🦃
body:
| | | | | |
---
[](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=52e2d52f7e&e=0a12281e0e)
|
---
# 🦃 Let’s Give Thanks for our Blessings 🍁
As Thanksgiving approaches, it's a time for us to pause, reflect, and express our gratitude for the blessings in our lives. This year, amidst the current political landscape, it's more important than ever to find common ground and unity despite our differences.
This Thanksgiving, I would like to extend my heartfelt thanks to you, our incredible Roca for Congress supporters. Your unwavering support, enthusiasm, and dedication have been the driving force behind our journey for Congress. I am profoundly grateful for each interaction, every conversation, and the trust you've placed in me.
No matter how you will be celebrating Thanksgiving this year, take a moment to reflect on the simple joys, the cherished connections, and the experiences that have shaped this year. Whether it's the laughter shared with loved ones, the resilience demonstrated during trying times, or the small victories that brought a smile to your face—these are the moments that truly define the spirit of Thanksgiving.
At Roca for Congress, we're honored to have you as part of our family. Your support inspires us to strive for excellence and fuels our commitment to getting to Congress to support you and your families every single day.
We wish you and your family a Thanksgiving filled with joy, gratitude, and the spirit of togetherness.
Sincerely,
[](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=50c006db20&e=0a12281e0e)
Candidate for Congress, Maryland’s 6th District

name: Senator Katie Britt
subject: The Harsh Reality
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc
body:
Stories from the Border

| | |
---
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1b1c80290d34455081b1c61d01f59262&_e=feK8_xOMnydMR50XZTVKKbFI8Ng-ziOhZPKjWgbbRB1nNkJOIb5zKqb3yQweST8AiCMdywLVKSHg3uGo1pc1EVdrMt29r92quTfSG1X4fr2tFM2lAcB5tSes0ElxKn94unLfnPXkdTDnJ1YQhMnfmk8QRKEpYYNkCvATMn_jtMglWLySskQytVCwNXizLqhrsIr6hV-BPOGWDdaU67KYw8Ol7ZkKPEiCcqM0zjBzyXfKaBG9-XHtD8UEMTkwy6eNEIyKkZbIaun0Q_JkJGq41V4AsGpbdfpXIaIjPUbpPXcJo7syfFV5HJsQrhoZCxbfijLyJMDTxacSqo10b5n8eRuoQ_YRD6ZG7Ij02tZb-9nFJnEiV0pCJ8_O9vT3fnT4xOA7n62mwPGfoTKMfTM_oZ9LaA9oXO1LCqJsxeI-ZNxobTYj2NVjsGRWGR970YU46jSEpkebgF-bKg6jsypESDwRUk48k-_y8VSxGhRadME%3D)
---
Friend, Under the Biden administration, the situation at our border has escalated into nothing short of an American nightmare. The media's complicity and Biden's dismissive lectures have only fueled the fire, neglecting the gravity of the crisis. I feel compelled to share with you some of the horror stories I've heard during my time at the border. These are not just statistics; these are the chilling, harsh realities of the crisis gripping our nation: \- A victim of human trafficking endured repeated assaults, forced to lie on a bed as men came and went. \- A border patrol agent recounted pulling lifeless bodies of children and pregnant women from the river. \- Even in Alabama, now effectively a border state, a constituent warned of drug cartels infiltrating his community to collect from illegal migrants. President Biden, the root cause of this crisis, audaciously lectures us about the "soul" of our nation while turning a blind eye to the suffering. **[Friend, I am both mad and heartbroken. ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1b1c80290d34455081b1c61d01f59262&_e=feK8_xOMnydMR50XZTVKKbFI8Ng-ziOhZPKjWgbbRB1nNkJOIb5zKqb3yQweST8AiCMdywLVKSHg3uGo1pc1EVdrMt29r92quTfSG1X4fr2tFM2lAcB5tSes0ElxKn94unLfnPXkdTDnJ1YQhMnfmk8QRKEpYYNkCvATMn_jtMglWLySskQytVCwNXizLqhrsIr6hV-BPOGWDdaU67KYw8Ol7ZkKPEiCcqM0zjBzyXfKaBG9-XHtD8UEMTkwy6eNEIyKkZbIaun0Q_JkJGq41V4AsGpbdfpXIaIjPUbpPXcJo7syfFV5HJsQrhoZCxbfijLyJMDTxacSqo10b5n8eZSwnl0be7VrZk7Kog0us2T-EyQFkmdMilEEXCs854xr3l3Q9ImPX4tJS5jApYVpMEcKsuyxBK068VFj2Bc2n0e_-eeDgNoeekXpR1k2KVOK1w1DupRrL643XbYABHNHmpvv_OpbPDKOO96sh5XCJLs%3D)** Any objective person witnessing the assaults, murders, and drug trafficking at our southern border would immediately demand an end to this crisis. **[While Biden lacks the courage to act, I am committed to fighting for a secure border.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1b1c80290d34455081b1c61d01f59262&_e=feK8_xOMnydMR50XZTVKKbFI8Ng-ziOhZPKjWgbbRB1nNkJOIb5zKqb3yQweST8AiCMdywLVKSHg3uGo1pc1EVdrMt29r92quTfSG1X4fr2tFM2lAcB5tSes0ElxKn94unLfnPXkdTDnJ1YQhMnfmk8QRKEpYYNkCvATMn_jtMglWLySskQytVCwNXizLqhrsIr6hV-BPOGWDdaU67KYw8Ol7ZkKPEiCcqM0zjBzyXfKaBG9-XHtD8UEMTkwy6eNEIyKkZbIaun0Q_JkJGq41V4AsGpbdfpXIaIjPUbpPXcJo7syfFV5HJsQrhoZCxbfijLyJMDTxacSqo10b5n8eVy8jhpOB2GrN3o1r2Sxys_vBGeTqyUjbrer7qhcdBlywwKglZDaekvmgGqOBMn4DlBkEhTlhh8Xa8yAMe_UB7MCCHhav297uvBT80w7iMfdT1w_b_F4DxPURPWMMfUC8Srz8C1qGe2w2xeYNqxTIj0%3D)** **[Can I count on you to join me in taking a stand to end this crisis?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1b1c80290d34455081b1c61d01f59262&_e=feK8_xOMnydMR50XZTVKKbFI8Ng-ziOhZPKjWgbbRB1nNkJOIb5zKqb3yQweST8AiCMdywLVKSHg3uGo1pc1EVdrMt29r92quTfSG1X4fr2tFM2lAcB5tSes0ElxKn94unLfnPXkdTDnJ1YQhMnfmk8QRKEpYYNkCvATMn_jtMglWLySskQytVCwNXizLqhrsIr6hV-BPOGWDdaU67KYw8Ol7ZkKPEiCcqM0zjBzyXfKaBG9-XHtD8UEMTkwy6eNEIyKkZbIaun0Q_JkJGq41V4AsGpbdfpXIaIjPUbpPXcJo7syfFV5HJsQrhoZCxbfijLyJMDTxacSqo10b5n8eeoMRnTYdr_H8d1ctXzJCBQq9_c4h0IunOJGHYi4indoOaDx3ZJge2_KPupn84QUAKyjsifL84rnPO3yOlEOh77PcqzAybSWby5Zp5uHpQcQNzmWdmafSd2wZoG2DmaYEB0nJZPnmFeVQjyU_PUnXD8%3D)** Sincerely, Senator Katie Britt

clean_body: Stories from the Border | | | Friend, Under the Biden administration, the situation at our border has escalated into nothing short of an American nightmare. The media's complicity and Biden's dismissive lectures have only fueled the fire, neglecting the gravity of the crisis. I feel compelled to share with you some of the horror stories I've heard during my time at the border. These are not just statistics; these are the chilling, harsh realities of the crisis gripping our nation: \- A victim of human trafficking endured repeated assaults, forced to lie on a bed as men came and went. \- A border patrol agent recounted pulling lifeless bodies of children and pregnant women from the river. \- Even in Alabama, now effectively a border state, a constituent warned of drug cartels infiltrating his community to collect from illegal migrants. President Biden, the root cause of this crisis, audaciously lectures us about the "soul" of our nation while turning a blind eye to the suffering. Any objective person witnessing the assaults, murders, and drug trafficking at our southern border would immediately demand an end to this crisis. Sincerely, Senator Katie Britt | | Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc. Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

| | |
**The United States is the only developed country in the world without some form of universal paid family and medical leave.

[Join us and sign the petition to support paid sick leave for workers!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mFQcelRd6B9wFPgSo6gQXFbcwUuBccxfTLpMpo1mmMJyfoLGwyE9JfYd5BAnebGKcnQyvTmBfSYJsS43adeVdEEH1ZsZJNeaU4tSKnsqhvRpHZ56his3Z0fkBziRgTJHWu_qcpQlLso-ij6vq013ljwUOkAt9OePbxNZdCHhjB1c7wmk9At7Y4lH2m7q21E6LTvVTZdEluc_6vnBupsvpp4_D3Am7937x6Ov-JaCTX22ZRufegp77qGvnzSsB1rN_6d9tK1_-7lTXwBybXDf8GHjzY8SDiayiaajhrbVtAZ5NndrvkNaIKEuatuTUrQpN70L8SvtohHXLned_hA49stJSh_6zKKxO0D0vVIUmpDetXpv4hLGc5H3ETbqTqkX-uHf5vPwCMEgf92z-sGUMw4_g_L_m-tvLpv-LTTSUqFAn-HkByD1PZU4UBoTU1RYIrS2IDFlp-1I05HEd2C9mb4rH5l3dhxpw1DGoWsTR8xB6yMyi3mSAKDKxg0DH30PcExqaYxJHXzESCjKbIGdsTB5Ruyw09smdqad8tHWDumA/41i/_CeQvpsfTg2A0sy1_eCJ8A/h0/kF8WgdOsy_MWss8HQf63iw_lxVdwZkn-4807_TIkclY)**
* * *

As a result, they go to work and interact with the public while sick, potentially spreading illnesses or jeopardizing their own health.
[Most](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPoHYe3egxtUelU6bRQ6V701ujMQrNzcRGLa0QK8cSXQSr6nOQUceoiwNasU_Hh_0Nyz6opLUKkpZZtN-49kCz-MYdjipCTFbv-4JqGP3ncN2cm5EQdV6yuk4ihcEJjCCA8lJcwBrdjkASiVFCUyCIK38nfERAMhzBTNcpM8dFRvd7VZU8YkPk4e6Qi8VpRYTNQ4V-vlakkOgY-Zcd4aRDW6Kdn5_6FgG8hGDdV16avx_X7cq1-C0UvijOrnw_wJmpsDikyY2oXbar9P0oiKDf1EWbWU19_Hj9Rqa39gJLE2M4T5eMRyITEB0R7gZ9Yta6K1_Vac1T9lN-Qu3VahYg1Z75q7W9x0muOYDSUtrYR9TD09v6LsKZawPono5ITkFfWR_VdaWqBY10oKbUKmTABN3Qb3d3HvkgSv_TO1zwQmfGWYexHmInB3Ov-NfrWVhpDI0nKD-thceEXyIeJSXFQ/41i/_CeQvpsfTg2A0sy1_eCJ8A/h2/V6KeB02N3x3VwYX7eiLG1Iz0BVh9SJwPM0GE00Czhpo) Americans say all workers should receive paid family and medical leave. Despite that, out of touch [Republicans](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDIsPxCb-5oVxjU8mUQbbYNK9EKyrlU9VRa_Y6Vf2kxDgXnx2SmBQ3ou5efxJVUVQ1fPy7dQSZYtABh4qqhw5j-uLfu0iWVzVDfk1BX4Oc9H1pZZd_z3KRfbDiU3nOp045ftUXZn7bOn0KVDURGdBSvn1uTBGPsCd3djsfkX-p4Lm-ViP0Pn8cbNA5TmxZxomr-9BreawEPwFQNj6slYsoc5-l_epvnbtVJtUByuMH1FHat0y2p7bobOsTfrbNBLHK1iX0NnVUj2GuGEOzDFiKL41U7_VmeCc87BGNkDFcXYdMCOJE7ynBlQzVHNn0F74ukLmcNgDkMhQL5OFsdwgAS5Yab1UV_9bntzxomvappIiQoZ8qgYUyZCIFxvEKvp7nbBMqe0tPhrHPsIgUZ6qeRPYBsn4uPn3tkTFyNAZTfK8kld794xi2FU_1NvdkHdO87gzEkCJ2IKm9Takcj7xyIRCPDzhi7BJlqy2QkJCZfbX/41i/_CeQvpsfTg2A0sy1_eCJ8A/h3/yZburi4WKB7QAPIXIQOHHyGgAURXnlty5_edUWZS1sU) continue to block efforts that would expand paid leave to millions of Americans.
**A federal guaranteed right to paid sick leave is crucial for the well-being of employees and their families, and it would have a positive, significant impact on public health and the economy.**
_Unlike Republican Rep. Jay Obernolte, who has voted against paid sick leave, Derek Marshall would fight to give access to ALL workers!_

Putting profits over people, Republicans have repeatedly rejected national paid sick leave despite [studies](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/1XQbiUZqIgkFRQxQopJGKf3shkwTx7_eIAO0DC_b-sAjkUt62UwxhdlX2Z195d-CtDfu7TbN0LBnyKPGmM88pAtWwLhyIt6UwwIoyTl9Vzzx5Mn3xRAsBtXa7RKzb93EmeATJ7tACom5KGYUFJcbQov8RHscxMkPJZ6-lgO58tm68b_vd5BASLwibJuZo5BRsczjbIany2JzgeEaVXXRl9_skvXibR1Z0c2SOH69CudlZasK2hMG2pCJeBihA7dVs7Icf3k12YIyNtGob71C670qUSOFrE5ASjKH47kSNSOTRvIgbAmHpEtG8l36kTbZqCPVIdDYy1HvyMN3UsNlp7lHJGKysEBGOyhMYJFGeI0/41i/_CeQvpsfTg2A0sy1_eCJ8A/h6/_zpx2Gw2WTX96UvBVOs01lxKetBOW5cww6Z-L6HYT_U) that show a $1.88 billion annual loss for businesses that have employees show up for work while sick.
Paid sick leave leads to improved job satisfaction, employment retention, better employee health and safety, improved labor market performance, and it’s associated with a lower spread of disease for the regions where paid sick leave mandates were passed.
**Sick workers or workers with sick family members should have the option to take a day off without losing their pay or their job.**

clean_body: | | | The United States is the only developed country in the world without some form of universal paid family and medical leave. Over of low wage workers, who are often considered essential, aren’t eligible for paid sick days. As a result, they go to work and interact with the public while sick, potentially spreading illnesses or jeopardizing their own health. Americans say all workers should receive paid family and medical leave. Despite that, out of touch continue to block efforts that would expand paid leave to millions of Americans. A federal guaranteed right to paid sick leave is crucial for the well-being of employees and their families, and it would have a positive, significant impact on public health and the economy. Unlike Republican Rep. Jay Obernolte, who has voted against paid sick leave, Derek Marshall would fight to give access to ALL workers! Putting profits over people, Republicans have repeatedly rejected national paid sick leave despite that show a $1.88 billion annual loss for businesses that have employees show up for work while sick. Paid sick leave leads to improved job satisfaction, employment retention, better employee health and safety, improved labor market performance, and it’s associated with a lower spread of disease for the regions where paid sick leave mandates were passed. Sick workers or workers with sick family members should have the option to take a day off without losing their pay or their job. ** benefits from paid sick leave. -Derek Marshall for Congress is a Democrat running for Congress in California's 23rd District. He's running to bring the folks of the high desert & mountains together for a more livable life. To donate by check, please mail to: Derek Marshall for Congress P.O. Fellow American - when I became Speaker of the House on October 25th, I knew one of the first things we needed to do was build out our team of supporters online.

So, we got to work immediately and [**set a goal of finding 100,000 conservatives to join Team Johnson by the time Thanksgiving rolled around.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5566c5a20d4743ea8eacb3221671ca2f&_e=JsLAwvzPQ0trqfzkOFa3KucKe7R5o6agE0hy7BUQ_HJOv-r5tNiEIlW3wgFpssgwngEHWwtavTHHLWjIzT2DlUKj61CHXrexud_zv04NIrxVZf_5jFOQpWhL5Qhs6hAlDByFoiLCBKYbLGPtLsZqjiscfbxdin1JhqYpdVfOVRERestc1jD7RSp_FxxMOKv0vw9dgNd5dzyH6aJLI6xNkw6pEHFwytjNGnKlc0Rk5ivQH8x2CjpCkbkALBYuoogBGx9jSHBXfA2B7teWxZ6P5J_hlut5_48Q-TFP9K_yvquy7L62lW1r0RoLr4tYnfsd7R1zPB-7BkD227VBgUPsqZVGTU90rFQcDTPFEhaF4AV8ZVu_FDFp8ZZ6pG0AISXVKGzOPFvJAyvrWxGm1rc-cQ%3D%3D)

To date, we have not hit our goal. With Thanksgiving just around the corner, we have a lot of work to do.

If you've already signaled your support for our team as we work to hold onto our thin majority heading into next year's election, _thank you._ If you haven't, [**please consider being one of the thousands of signatures I need to find before the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade begins on Thanksgiving morning.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5566c5a20d4743ea8eacb3221671ca2f&_e=JsLAwvzPQ0trqfzkOFa3KucKe7R5o6agE0hy7BUQ_HJOv-r5tNiEIlW3wgFpssgwngEHWwtavTHHLWjIzT2DlUKj61CHXrexud_zv04NIrxVZf_5jFOQpWhL5Qhs6hAlDByFoiLCBKYbLGPtLsZqjiscfbxdin1JhqYpdVfOVRERestc1jD7RSp_FxxMOKv0vw9dgNd5dzyH6aJLI6xNkw6pEHFwytjNGnKlc0Rk5ivQH8x2CjpCkbkALBYuoogBKaH-sPKjW7rIZGkxoglaz_SDSzmfTXDrFmMi-0_xDVm5WMujCvJYCMbFPF7xtVxuinotlYxHlpTzM-Vj0dLkHjp1uM37QlPLeNlVCVoF7c1bfkMv407R3QNtZLHKc0NiCnWYYkGdR6z2FP5_U3HLTw%3D%3D)

Fellow American, Democrats have spent the last three years under President Biden trying to turn our great nation into a banana republic.

While voters don't seem to have much of an appetite for Joe Biden, Democrats in the House and Senate have done everything they can to prop up his failing presidency while undoing all the critical work President Trump and Congressional Republicans moved forward in recent years.

We're doing our best to continue providing conservative solutions to our nation's most vexing concerns. _Still, I must be honest - doing so would be infinitely easier if we had a more significant majority._ [**We only have a slim cushion right now, meaning there is ZERO room for error.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5566c5a20d4743ea8eacb3221671ca2f&_e=JsLAwvzPQ0trqfzkOFa3KucKe7R5o6agE0hy7BUQ_HJOv-r5tNiEIlW3wgFpssgwngEHWwtavTHHLWjIzT2DlUKj61CHXrexud_zv04NIrxVZf_5jFOQpWhL5Qhs6hAlDByFoiLCBKYbLGPtLsZqjiscfbxdin1JhqYpdVfOVRERestc1jD7RSp_FxxMOKv0vw9dgNd5dzyH6aJLI6xNkw6pEHFwytjNGnKlc0Rk5ivQH8x2CjpCkbkALBYuoogBocbvDUHGvNY3_ezrxtTsvzH3y8cUmPY6Zt5hpPrKX30tHVK85HB69cXTjYKHeNTfblUip_FCzj51UJfOd00OiiZpHeb-pUAtRnGm3T-BYO9a3FNXoazDe-GmmeQrX3ioaeEo6TqH8ZIKY4TOadcMHw%3D%3D)

Our immediate goals for next year are two-fold:

1. Hold onto the House majority
2. Expand our House majority

**We've seen what happens when Democrats are in the majority: they'll add trillions more to the national debt and launch assaults on our Constitutional liberties.**

[ ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5566c5a20d4743ea8eacb3221671ca2f&_e=JsLAwvzPQ0trqfzkOFa3KucKe7R5o6agE0hy7BUQ_HJOv-r5tNiEIlW3wgFpssgwngEHWwtavTHHLWjIzT2DlUKj61CHXrexud_zv04NIrxVZf_5jFOQpWhL5Qhs6hAlDByFoiLCBKYbLGPtLsZqjiscfbxdin1JhqYpdVfOVRERestc1jD7RSp_FxxMOKv0vw9dgNd5dzyH6aJLI6xNkw6pEHFwytjNGnKlc0Rk5ivQH8x2CjpCkbkALBYuoogBLaLXBHAejH4miIWt2GHZ9HdeRF2oS5q6_d-TS1TPNo_aNtD9YtD2AFBZ9jfn6FqxMukLbd--_8Vs0Ik-okZVCoLwSza0Tpp1vYWOkLs0ATIcxb5_6pVgfBMn6x-W_A-QGs_YBUoHD5grQeRmL-dzOA%3D%3D)
[**SIGN HERE ➞**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5566c5a20d4743ea8eacb3221671ca2f&_e=JsLAwvzPQ0trqfzkOFa3KucKe7R5o6agE0hy7BUQ_HJOv-r5tNiEIlW3wgFpssgwngEHWwtavTHHLWjIzT2DlUKj61CHXrexud_zv04NIrxVZf_5jFOQpWhL5Qhs6hAlDByFoiLCBKYbLGPtLsZqjiscfbxdin1JhqYpdVfOVRERestc1jD7RSp_FxxMOKv0vw9dgNd5dzyH6aJLI6xNkw6pEHFwytjNGnKlc0Rk5ivQH8x2CjpCkbkALBYuoogB-gz68kURVgtDwCOLcbdI48R_394-3jjsZS3xFl0jXXIBhRb3VkLlp9JQq-7LOvZuSnMW-tX999Jq5zI9Dy4rY2hrGOGWDlUJuSkV4YvaRiTdnBwsWzvh3FmFSFwcBH_QU5hBnWM4TYQm48azi95PJg%3D%3D)
I'm writing today because if we're going to hold onto our slim majority, we must start now. We need help - [**we need more Republicans in the House. We MUST have reinforcements to help us prevent the Biden administration from doing even more damage to our nation.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5566c5a20d4743ea8eacb3221671ca2f&_e=JsLAwvzPQ0trqfzkOFa3KucKe7R5o6agE0hy7BUQ_HJOv-r5tNiEIlW3wgFpssgwngEHWwtavTHHLWjIzT2DlUKj61CHXrexud_zv04NIrxVZf_5jFOQpWhL5Qhs6hAlDByFoiLCBKYbLGPtLsZqjiscfbxdin1JhqYpdVfOVRERestc1jD7RSp_FxxMOKv0vw9dgNd5dzyH6aJLI6xNkw6pEHFwytjNGnKlc0Rk5ivQH8x2CjpCkbkALBYuoogB7EMfWHJ74go04qcAFdlgis8q5O8I5VpEnwDBulhOSGVhquQQsRLPeEvbMUfad2snZbhVpfFpu6uaT0xAQyYBOnvEUucP3cm4UMgBqcM24tD_zS-nnk-473irBo7lEAw8IvkNwjFW-QalX2N6T1YCHg%3D%3D)

While the election may not be this month, _**we MUST begin our work today**_ if we're going to defend our majority successfully.

To stop radical legislation from making its way through the Capitol, we need a united conservative movement to stop Joe Biden.

We had a great election night last year and flipped the House after four years of DISASTROUS Democrat control. [**We need you to commit to helping our team EXPAND our majority in 2024.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5566c5a20d4743ea8eacb3221671ca2f&_e=JsLAwvzPQ0trqfzkOFa3KucKe7R5o6agE0hy7BUQ_HJOv-r5tNiEIlW3wgFpssgwngEHWwtavTHHLWjIzT2DlUKj61CHXrexud_zv04NIrxVZf_5jFOQpWhL5Qhs6hAlDByFoiLCBKYbLGPtLsZqjiscfbxdin1JhqYpdVfOVRERestc1jD7RSp_FxxMOKv0vw9dgNd5dzyH6aJLI6xNkw6pEHFwytjNGnKlc0Rk5ivQH8x2CjpCkbkALBYuoogBXzQwo2kgTgiEx58geNfayoC6BdNiQ006h54kUi9P9zTQeB9gSsdBZtB_dGlscV8Hbx-zHuyOBy6RUPCRTYfceO-Tp1q8ML8aUNaCuRpJOXo-TJi8dLJwWDTTAxDE5WjXqJaFuGmIO0VwaaF1gJmP_A%3D%3D)

[**_I hope you'll help me meet my signature goal by Thanksgiving morning._**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5566c5a20d4743ea8eacb3221671ca2f&_e=JsLAwvzPQ0trqfzkOFa3KucKe7R5o6agE0hy7BUQ_HJOv-r5tNiEIlW3wgFpssgwngEHWwtavTHHLWjIzT2DlUKj61CHXrexud_zv04NIrxVZf_5jFOQpWhL5Qhs6hAlDByFoiLCBKYbLGPtLsZqjiscfbxdin1JhqYpdVfOVRERestc1jD7RSp_FxxMOKv0vw9dgNd5dzyH6aJLI6xNkw6pEHFwytjNGnKlc0Rk5ivQH8x2CjpCkbkALBYuoogBpLbQ4zmfkwqKnUfLLH8ADwE-sFBG3oMyoL5L9PRgDuqQh-nbUSm5_sK5DjpofBU477hy3AhC4Pb1mLbVciGnnXAiXQasednS9XOaZ3y4tCTBurrbuClLPOzR1h-SrJZ3xCbfpuNpdghB2xyCS_GObA%3D%3D)

For America,

While the election may not be this month, we MUST begin our work today if we’re going to defend our majority successfully. | | Fellow American - when I became Speaker of the House on October 25th, I knew one of the first things we needed to do was build out our team of supporters online. So, we got to work immediately and To date, we have not hit our goal. With Thanksgiving just around the corner, we have a lot of work to do. If you've already signaled your support for our team as we work to hold onto our thin majority heading into next year's election, thank you. If you haven't, Fellow American, Democrats have spent the last three years under President Biden trying to turn our great nation into a banana republic. While voters don't seem to have much of an appetite for Joe Biden, Democrats in the House and Senate have done everything they can to prop up his failing presidency while undoing all the critical work President Trump and Congressional Republicans moved forward in recent years. We're doing our best to continue providing conservative solutions to our nation's most vexing concerns. Still, I must be honest - doing so would be infinitely easier if we had a more significant majority. Our immediate goals for next year are two-fold: 1. Hold onto the House majority 2. Expand our House majority We've seen what happens when Democrats are in the majority: they'll add trillions more to the national debt and launch assaults on our Constitutional liberties. I'm writing today because if we're going to hold onto our slim majority, we must start now. We need help - While the election may not be this month, we MUST begin our work today if we're going to defend our majority successfully. To stop radical legislation from making its way through the Capitol, we need a united conservative movement to stop Joe Biden. We had a great election night last year and flipped the House after four years of DISASTROUS Democrat control. **On Thanksgiving in the McBride house, I’m the chef.** It’s not because I’m a great cook. It’s more that I’m the "least worst" cook in the family. No joke. One year, I gave Sal a hand cooking and we discovered that it’s possible to not overcook a turkey. Whether your tradition is carving the turkey with family, watching Hallmark movies while cozied up on the couch, or pulling together a Friendsgiving, I hope you have a Happy Thanksgiving. I’m so grateful for you. — Sarah

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

| | Peter,

I am honored to reveal today that my campaign has received a _**powerful endorsement**_ from a patriot who has spent 28 years protecting this country, **former Senior Border Patrol Agent,_Joel Maldonado._**
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=9c22f7e5e2&e=c982eb7ad4)
---
| I want to sincerely thank Agent Maldonado for his show of support for my cause, and **his faith in my fight** **_for our security, our people, and our values._** I promise Agent Maldonado and all of those who believe in our fight for this country that **_your faith will not go unrewarded_ , and when I represent TX District-23 in Congress,_I will never stop fighting for the security of our people and our families._** If you agree with Agent Maldonado, and believe we need someone in Congress who is serious about __fighting for this district__ and _securing our country_ , then join him in supporting my campaign. **With his support and yours,_we can fight, and we can win!_**

name: Tammy Murphy
subject: Our first ad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tammy Murphy for Senate**
body:
Watch our first ad of this campaign: |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73796173/439666637/1354111473?refcode=AU_TMNJ_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20231122_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDk1NzMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmM2MTFmZmEtNDI4OS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bwixB91rrhOv32TuCuaye5AlGGrlTUYUH-Gr4jgS6xE=)
---
I just announced that I’m running against Bob Menendez and launched my very first ad of this campaign for the United States Senate. Now, I’m personally asking you to watch that message about who I am and why I’m ready to lead New Jersey forward. [**Please click here to watch our launch ad and hear my story. And if you support our message, chip in so all of New Jersey has a chance to hear from us →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73796174/439666638/-1260851818?refcode=AU_TMNJ_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20231122_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDk1NzMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmM2MTFmZmEtNDI4OS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bwixB91rrhOv32TuCuaye5AlGGrlTUYUH-Gr4jgS6xE=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73796176/439666640/-1260851818?refcode=AU_TMNJ_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20231122_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDk1NzMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmM2MTFmZmEtNDI4OS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bwixB91rrhOv32TuCuaye5AlGGrlTUYUH-Gr4jgS6xE=) | [WATCH & CHIP IN →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73796180/439666642/-1260851818?refcode=AU_TMNJ_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20231122_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDk1NzMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmM2MTFmZmEtNDI4OS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bwixB91rrhOv32TuCuaye5AlGGrlTUYUH-Gr4jgS6xE=)
---
Many of you know me as Mrs. Murphy: the First Lady of New Jersey. Serving in that role has been the honor of my lifetime, but that’s only a part of my story.
**I’m a wife and a mom to four incredible kids.** Like most moms, I know the million things that parents worry about every day — from keeping the kids safe, to ensuring they have a good school, to simply keeping food on the table.
**I’m a leader in the fight to save our environment.** I fought hard to ensure NJ kids were taught about climate change and its causes, and as a result of that work, we’re the first state in the nation to have a climate change curriculum in every public school.
**I'm a leading advocate for New Jersey's moms and babies.** When I learned that more NJ women died in childbirth than in nearly every other state, I rolled up my sleeves and got to work. I’ve led the charge to reduce our state’s maternal mortality rate.
**Now, I’m running to fight for every family.** New Jerseyans deserve a United States Senator they can be proud of — a Senator who’ll fight for them every day. That’s what I intend to do.
[**If you’re with me, please donate to our 2024 Launch Fund today. Your contributions help build our team and spread our message in the fight for a better New Jersey:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73796181/439666648/-1260851818?refcode=AU_TMNJ_FR_LAU_GEN_AC_20231122_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDk1NzMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmM2MTFmZmEtNDI4OS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bwixB91rrhOv32TuCuaye5AlGGrlTUYUH-Gr4jgS6xE=)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: Watch our first ad of this campaign: | = I just announced that I’m running against Bob Menendez and launched my very first ad of this campaign for the United States Senate. Now, I’m personally asking you to watch that message about who I am and why I’m ready to lead New Jersey forward. = = | = Many of you know me as Mrs. Murphy: the First Lady of New Jersey. Serving in that role has been the honor of my lifetime, but that’s only a part of my story. I’m a wife and a mom to four incredible kids. Like most moms, I know the million things that parents worry about every day — from keeping the kids safe, to ensuring they have a good school, to simply keeping food on the table. I’m a leader in the fight to save our environment. I fought hard to ensure NJ kids were taught about climate change and its causes, and as a result of that work, we’re the first state in the nation to have a climate change curriculum in every public school. I'm a leading advocate for New Jersey's moms and babies. When I learned that more NJ women died in childbirth than in nearly every other state, I rolled up my sleeves and got to work. I’ve led the charge to reduce our state’s maternal mortality rate. Now, I’m running to fight for every family. New Jerseyans deserve a United States Senator they can be proud of — a Senator who’ll fight for them every day. That’s what I intend to do. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Your support makes such a difference. Thanks for standing with us. — Tammy = Tammy Murphy for Senate PO Box 378 Maplewood, NJ 07040 United States mailto:info@tammymurphyforsenate.com | Paid for by Tammy Murphy for Senate

| | Peter, There’s no “I” in team.

It’s a lesson you have to pick up quickly when you’re serving alongside special operators in the Navy.

My team was able to perform lifesaving deep dives and take down some of the world’s most dangerous terrorists.

_But none of us could have done it alone._

**Having an A-Team by your side isn’t just the key to success on the battlefield, though - it’s the key to winning in politics.**

**I’m never going to be able to beat Tim Kaine alone. It’s going to take ALL of us, and that’s why I’m reaching out to you today.**

**[Will you pitch in now to join our team and help us TAKE BACK THE SENATE?](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=65c8b1b1f2144f4581351e3e9e881b3f&_e=kR6lI6q6k1a9QpQrsc1ip3_5NMDpJpMJ57jS2Ck3s7rKGir7yQ5xGa71C7j6LJWEbRlWA_T5SuF49reJjQL65vIyu2uZPPUJnyl16gznL1xAOvzGZ8Pl-zdf1-mipLU-zMPVyBdQZIyr_UNmpZswbvakMyvvJxTyqZCvna0ibTYjxaUJuDdf1U0Jg-IKVgcD5c-arfx-yfY17scIicmk6xx9fI09nuyqoru6aieD8NsqEdfUnOOw3KODzWkkOkJSqhjPqVi4H97F4VqIFjDHaDicrVjtwvard6c70BwoeijuDb1l9fD8AyiRDOjmFSrVsdPYzMTJyYvq2apTivlcdJ-3oiZO9PPwGpQQEo4III5eNtSDkUvotfaXRMvs3JXP)**

Tim Kaine has all the connections money can buy, Peter.

He’s the very definition of a career politician, and he’s spent his life building his little black book.

_But while Tim Kaine was out building his political network, I was defending our country._

I’m not a career politician - in fact, I’m pretty new to this thing.

That’s why I’m REALLY leaning on my grassroots team.

**[Together, we can take back the Senate, but I need you to do your part. name: Kari Lake
subject: Hi there
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kari Lake for Senate

subject: A quick note to say thank you

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73797068/439669880/-1758524140?refcode=EM_FL_BAR_20231122_na_thanksgiving_cand_kw_90da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2NmMDA2M2MtNDQ4OS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=U6XwuXKSyPF6eAh3PxB5iCDSIWhKkPH7ax3AkceGMlU=)

Peter, Before you gather around the dinner table to celebrate Thanksgiving, I wanted to send a quick note to say _thank you._ **Thank you for being in my corner and supporting my campaign every step of the way. I couldn't be more grateful.** Together, we’re sending a message that we won’t back down when it comes to fighting for our democracy, the American Dream, and a future for our kids. I’m thankful for you! Our family goes all out for Thanksgiving. We have a tradition of baking 15 to 20 pies because we're gluttons. (If you buy it from the store, it doesn't count!) And Matt and Maloo will be cheering on the Lions tomorrow when they beat the Packers at Ford Field. Happy Thanksgiving from my family to yours! 🦃🍁🍽️ Let's go, Lions! 🏈 Tuebor, Callie | | Callie Barr is a 5th-generation Michigander, advocate for veterans, and lawyer. She’s running to take on extremism and do-nothing politicians in D.C. that are leaving rural America behind. Thank you so much for your donation. name: Jazz Lewis
subject: Spirit of Gratitude and Unity!
body:
Dear Friends,

As Thanksgiving approaches, I find myself reflecting on the countless blessings we share despite the challenges and uncertainties surrounding us. During times like these, gratitude becomes not just a feeling, but a guiding light for all of us. I have the great fortune to serve as your voice in Annapolis as well as the Majority Whip in the Maryland House of Delegates, one of the most historic and most diverse legislative bodies in our country. Fueled by your voices, your stories, and your dreams, the policies we propose and budgets we produce are dedicated to forming a better community and a brighter future for all. For the faith you placed in me, I am deeply thankful.

In a world that often feels clouded with uncertainty, it's important to pause and remember that there is much to be grateful for – the love of family, the strength of our community, and the small yet profound joys that life brings our way. Personally, my heart is full of gratitude for my family. My wife Aurin, a constant source of love and strength; my son Miguel, a beacon of joy and curiosity; and my newborn daughter Aurely, a symbol of new beginnings and hope. They are my rock, my motivation, and my greatest blessing. It’s difficult to put into words how grateful I am to raise my family in this community, in this state, at this time.

As we gather around our Thanksgiving tables, let's embrace the spirit of gratitude and unity. Let's celebrate our shared humanity and the bonds that connect us. Let's continue to walk with the wind, with hope in our hearts, and strive towards a world marked by inclusivity, justice, and enduring love. And let us remember that, in the midst of challenges, we find our greatest strength when we come together.

Wishing you and your loved ones a Thanksgiving filled with warmth, joy, and gratitude.

With heartfelt thanks,

Jazz Lewis

As a proven progressive leader and champion of issues ranging from criminal justice reform to healthcare access and economic equity, Jazz has represented the 24th Legislative District in Maryland’s House of Delegates since 2017. He also serves as Majority Whip of the Maryland House. A lifelong Prince Georgian, Jazz lives in Bowie with his wife, son and daughter.

By AUthority Friends of Jazz Lewis, Treasurer Chris Taitt
Friends of Jazz Lewis - State Account
P.O. Box 341854
Bethesda, MD 20827
United States

Fueled by your voices, your stories, and your dreams, the policies we propose and budgets we produce are dedicated to forming a better community and a brighter future for all. For the faith you placed in me, I am deeply thankful. In a world that often feels clouded with uncertainty, it's important to pause and remember that there is much to be grateful for – the love of family, the strength of our community, and the small yet profound joys that life brings our way. Personally, my heart is full of gratitude for my family. My wife Aurin, a constant source of love and strength; my son Miguel, a beacon of joy and curiosity; and my newborn daughter Aurely, a symbol of new beginnings and hope. They are my rock, my motivation, and my greatest blessing. It’s difficult to put into words how grateful I am to raise my family in this community, in this state, at this time. As we gather around our Thanksgiving tables, let's embrace the spirit of gratitude and unity. Let's celebrate our shared humanity and the bonds that connect us. Let's continue to walk with the wind, with hope in our hearts, and strive towards a world marked by inclusivity, justice, and enduring love. And let us remember that, in the midst of challenges, we find our greatest strength when we come together. Wishing you and your loved ones a Thanksgiving filled with warmth, joy, and gratitude. With heartfelt thanks, Jazz Lewis As a proven progressive leader and champion of issues ranging from criminal justice reform to healthcare access and economic equity, Jazz has represented the 24th Legislative District in Maryland’s House of Delegates since 2017. He also serves as Majority Whip of the Maryland House. A lifelong Prince Georgian, Jazz lives in Bowie with his wife, son and daughter. By AUthority Friends of Jazz Lewis, Treasurer Chris Taitt Friends of Jazz Lewis - State Account P.O. Box 341854 Bethesda, MD 20827 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

Fellow Conservative,

It's Speaker Newt Gingrich with a couple of thoughts for you today.

I recently met with some of my friends over lunch to talk shop, and during this lunch you can probably guess what we talked about: _**politics.**_

We discussed how we're going to hold onto the House, while flipping the Senate in November 2024. _**I think it's safe to say that everyone at the table agrees that though we certainly have our work cut out for us**_ , we're in a good position to successfully execute our goals.

A couple of things came up that I want to talk to you about today, one in particular: **our chances of flipping the long-held Democrat Senate seat in Montana.**

**[I took the liberty of recording a video for you that I hope you'll take a moment to watch right now.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=67e7afcad37845ffa85933204641d42a&_e=8Ecpljqj9ebvSmHF-BVkz_MiJdsY93kmWousLmDUiJAfNE4dnxFd6kXZ1wLBR0FSzBuJ6sFOJCA6odfiu5yDLjJXsj31tcJ5bZzv4SYceb49sg6yYDeTAm5zDB_gODvW7lJiJhrdKAX0_gAK4t52pn1YyIgjLizDwIc076gSxK45Hms1zcH0aR3qcvzKxSGjuOorpDo2_2vQbRtTB0a4l_kMsbOWf93u74hQMS-j5_oAZ_C-S1ZOKQcwNqvmbrnDOFxm7thOhL6KEz-KV9NLkX_Bm6sehIR8E7Xt3CJR3QJUt3tmbXDq1_G2ycq640v3vz3CBhehJAhCBCDko-Y3kCFPPryKesRg7l4KkoLy1-pnlBxA_mQhjRxgdeUBlG-wdS37HPQMFjDduidI_PJ0Rw%3D%3D)

body:
She’s exactly right – this is very important to me

Hi Peter,
I wanted to make sure you saw this email from Natalie, my campaign manager. She’s exactly right — it’s very important to me to give my campaign supporters a break from our usual programming during the holidays. I see this as a sign of respect.
But unfortunately, this means losing three days of fundraising, which means we need to compensate for the lost time. My team set a goal of raising $5,000 starting yesterday through tonight at midnight to make up the difference, and we still have $3,715 remaining to raise.
Peter, can I count on you to chip in now to help close the gap before the holiday?
Here’s your secure link: [_**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/BBVT-ALL-Email-Nov2023-FR-November**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73800369/439682026/1349087437?refcode=E5092-20231122-PreThanksgiving2-SL-Holiday&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjJlZjhmMi00Nzg5LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gh9FLyNLPXkVcPB7T36APCiqe1ZouvRZfhAtq1eIwtM=)
Thanks for reading this — as always, I am endlessly grateful for your support!
— Becca
_Sent from my iPhone_

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Natalie Silver
Date: Tue, Nov 21, 2023 at 3:48 PM
Subject: (no subject)

Hey Peter, Natalie here, Becca’s campaign manager.
Here on Team Becca, we send emails to communicate with our supporters and to raise money. I know that emails that ask for money can be bothersome. But I want you to know that it is because of our grassroots supporters like you that Becca can focus on her work for Vermonters, and not on raising money on the phone.
But I am here to say that we are giving you a break from fundraising emails during the holidays. This means that you won’t hear a peep from us starting Thursday through Saturday, except to wish you a happy Thanksgiving, while you spend time with family and friends.
This is a huge priority for us, but it certainly comes at a cost. Missing three days of fundraising may not sound like a lot, but it can make a _big_ dent in our fundraising for the month. So in order to make sure that we can give our supporters a break from fundraising requests AND stay on track, I’ve set a goal of raising $5,000 via email starting now through tomorrow night.
Hitting this goal is critically important, so I’m asking: Will you donate $27 or whatever you can swing to Becca’s re-election campaign?
Here’s the ActBlue link: [_**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/BBVT-ALL-Email-Nov2023-FR-November**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73800371/439682029/1349087437?refcode=E5092-20231122-PreThanksgiving2-SL-Holiday&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjJlZjhmMi00Nzg5LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gh9FLyNLPXkVcPB7T36APCiqe1ZouvRZfhAtq1eIwtM=)
Thanks for reading this,
Natalie Silver (Becca’s campaign manager)
_Sent from my iPhone_

Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/yduqSyHWDE20n1Ms6JOWpw2?unsubscribedata=8XiDXxssvx%2FiuN7beZMuGMcVstEvKC7adWfMFX5EYrMv73ayJ0sT7xFsvppalue8nAe7TsQ9yoHkKP1AQYWsTeU%2Ba2ypCYijcwk6X5IG6LhQ7UiqMl6Tlj0sgthCVqVl28GXs2ulFWz5dPn4vkf1iALnk5A4EWNoj1ihAgWWsSFd1nnsBJW7Y%2B8y7gKrXcrGKuuwotTfn3HtQ2pr48%2BkUCVsrDqmvyy3U501ZL16dhulEcsK5t8eoiZ%2BMf5jljP8Zq3jXG69tmV8fjlwOqW1cc9hS%2FRdmZEmVBKHtV4iwhFe%2FnnFD9dKe3ApAXGm3bdw5d%2FnwRSyL9AroF22ih93SQnk56Tepvp19n1QUeasFiySwAjrsrPu3Vo464eR4vkGl%2FoIZyDB04zf1p7WaKrb8SaHiN%2FtJsJicng7dC2W8CwBYwI6Wr%2BXIaIM%2Bm6TNZ1O).

Becca for Vermont

Burlington, VT 05302

name: =?utf-8?Q?State=20Representative=20Ryan=20Chamberlin?=
subject: Thanksgiving Message from Rep. Ryan Chamberlin
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/voteryanchamberlin/conservative-businessman-ryan-chamberlin-12663498?e=d1c1b9864f)
---
| |
---
| | | **Happy Thanksgiving, District 24!**
---
| **My fellow Floridians,**

**The holidays are here, folks!** As we celebrate Thanksgiving this week, I hope you travel safely and enjoy spending time with loved ones over the next few days. **I want to express my heartfelt gratitude to the district for electing me to serve in Tallahassee.** It is an honor to represent you in the Florida Legislature! _I am also so thankful for my beautiful wife and supportive kids, who have faithfully stood by me throughout this journey._ I would not be here without them!

This week, I want to encourage the district to remember to give thanks for the freedoms that we have in this country. _We are truly blessed!_ Also, remember that our freedom and safety come with a price, and we have our veterans, active military, and first responders to thank. **We should never take their selflessness and sacrifice for granted.**

**Happy Thanksgiving, District 24!**
---
|
---
| Sincerely,
**Representative Ryan Chamberlin**
---
|
---
| [LEARN MORE ABOUT ME AT MY WEBSITE](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=a67f7f7758&e=d1c1b9864f "LEARN MORE ABOUT ME AT MY WEBSITE")
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2023 Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative, All rights reserved._
Paid by Ryan Chamberlin, Republican, for State Representative

Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative526 E Park AveTallahassee, FL 32301-2568

name: John Fetterman
subject: PA Dems need our help for the battles ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Hi Derek. 👋
On Election Day, across the Commonwealth of Pennsylvania we turned out the vote, and thanks to all of YOU, we were VICTORIOUS! 🎉
The stakes couldn't have been higher + we achieved big results. Like sweeping the statewide judicial seats, flipping County Commissions BLUE 🔵, and even flipping School Board elections!
**But believe it or not, the 2023 Election Cycle isn't over yet.** There are ballots that remain to be counted and may be headed for court challenges.
Just like I've always said, the PA Dems also believe in EVERY COUNTY, EVERY VOTE — that's why they're fighting to make every vote count, even in smaller counties like Greene County. **That's *a lot* of legal battles ahead.**
**[So Derek, can you split a donation of a few dollars and help the PA Democratic Party + our team fight for democracy and your voter protection?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231122-1?refcode=em20231122-1-8676&refcode2=8676_434096_HoLOfh&akid=8676%2E434096%2EHoLOfh)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20231122-1?amount=5&refcode=em20231122-8676&refcode2=8676_434096_HoLOfh&akid=8676%2E434096%2EHoLOfh)**
Thank you!
❤️ John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator, Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20231122-8676-footer&t=1&refcode2=8676_434096_HoLOfh&akid=8676%2E434096%2EHoLOfh)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8676%2E434096%2EHoLOfh)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8676%2E434096%2EHoLOfh)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

There are ballots that remain to be counted and may be headed for court challenges. Just like I've always said, the PA Dems also believe in EVERY COUNTY, EVERY VOTE — that's why they're fighting to make every vote count, even in smaller counties like Greene County. **IF DEMOCRATS** allow Trump to get a second term ➡ our country will be run like Putin’s Russia.

**BUT IF** voters support _local, state, and federal Democrats_ early-on ➡ we can stop Trump from turning our country into an authoritarian hell-hole.

**MAGA Republicans** _are FURIOUS that Raskin laid out their fascist plans so they’re trying to silence him on all fronts!_

_Without brave heroes like Raskin speaking up, Trump and his MAGA allies would be able to ascend to power without a bump in the road!_
[**_That’s why we’re asking 25,000 Democrats to courageously sign our petition to stand with the democratic hero, Jamie Raskin, ASAP! »_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand-with-raskin?source=FFR_20231122_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=20442%2E4449941%2E3OQBbb)

**Less than a year out from Election Day 2024, I’ve never been more thankful for** __**YOU**__**!**
