Fellow American - when I became Speaker of the House on October 25th, I knew one of the first things we needed to do was build out our team of supporters online.

So, we got to work immediately and [**set a goal of finding 100,000 conservatives to join Team Johnson by the time Thanksgiving rolled around.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=4789c55f76b44966988ce85166c5d894&_e=4pHxUG_Xm6-DjZRE1cnASoqtp4rr8fAwxSRi__gyIQzjA3n0LUVYSGPblhSSdiGGcjqgNghUwWA4fMPSe_AvXUY3BGqRYQ9riWMRM2o2H6Ih7CJGfyPnGXaZCykAOJi7n4QyPq9PiFiNEeOVNzxOshB6Bw2WlIuhoYFiROh1hOt04QcDBb8hAvcPYwKUoNYkXU0idb87F_Pg09Vt8oNG-GU-MZckzUIt-90MPabk5rvMStt8fhlAZat8GxmA1W44G7SwnjuYvVWweoJZ0EttwWDcme-QkT0qOyvh4sxEd_K_SQ5d9ZXhP5vpmYE-WNSNw_cVd1W5MYDhKXBBGNNPmiV8SuTd_nxWMfcdzTjFb-OPci0LUcdC7oyKL-w8WpbKMEECNTSjuPK5jt421d3_tQ%3D%3D)

To date, we have not hit our goal. With Thanksgiving just around the corner, we have a lot of work to do.

If you've already signaled your support for our team as we work to hold onto our thin majority heading into next year's election, _thank you._ If you haven't, [**please consider being one of the thousands of signatures I need to find before the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade begins on Thanksgiving morning.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=4789c55f76b44966988ce85166c5d894&_e=4pHxUG_Xm6-DjZRE1cnASoqtp4rr8fAwxSRi__gyIQzjA3n0LUVYSGPblhSSdiGGcjqgNghUwWA4fMPSe_AvXUY3BGqRYQ9riWMRM2o2H6Ih7CJGfyPnGXaZCykAOJi7n4QyPq9PiFiNEeOVNzxOshB6Bw2WlIuhoYFiROh1hOt04QcDBb8hAvcPYwKUoNYkXU0idb87F_Pg09Vt8oNG-GU-MZckzUIt-90MPabk5rvMStt8fhlAZat8GxmA1W44hHE8UKZuCts3_QkXxjMqNph_CXPEgybvHCiOB9Ww4UpnlFk66W3AKeWYCjvM00gVXJCyqZAANMdZew85ffnfd1BEmOqSMtMDrxBnbObmaFbFcScHYVV6f9wRt4mvUZy9CBjbo3EUcVhIprUcKVdHjQ%3D%3D)

Fellow American, Democrats have spent the last three years under President Biden trying to turn our great nation into a banana republic.

While voters don't seem to have much of an appetite for Joe Biden, Democrats in the House and Senate have done everything they can to prop up his failing presidency while undoing all the critical work President Trump and Congressional Republicans moved forward in recent years.

We're doing our best to continue providing conservative solutions to our nation's most vexing concerns. _Still, I must be honest - doing so would be infinitely easier if we had a more significant majority._ [**We only have a slim cushion right now, meaning there is ZERO room for error.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=4789c55f76b44966988ce85166c5d894&_e=4pHxUG_Xm6-DjZRE1cnASoqtp4rr8fAwxSRi__gyIQzjA3n0LUVYSGPblhSSdiGGcjqgNghUwWA4fMPSe_AvXUY3BGqRYQ9riWMRM2o2H6Ih7CJGfyPnGXaZCykAOJi7n4QyPq9PiFiNEeOVNzxOshB6Bw2WlIuhoYFiROh1hOt04QcDBb8hAvcPYwKUoNYkXU0idb87F_Pg09Vt8oNG-GU-MZckzUIt-90MPabk5rvMStt8fhlAZat8GxmA1W44V0AT86gnhdNt3LJD4xFOiBaJ-U6cARf4vlhpE-5kOWLAnc1iOygF7Pw88hsttY4OMMpu6MO0A_Wc_jQYYh61GC0o9XR75Q_mdRRnGyTWxpBmsygjAlOukDRpP615d_hM4A5AwVSvgUGLNNMCRq0LPg%3D%3D)

Our immediate goals for next year are two-fold:

1. Hold onto the House majority
2. Expand our House majority

**We've seen what happens when Democrats are in the majority: they'll add trillions more to the national debt and launch assaults on our Constitutional liberties.**

[ ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=4789c55f76b44966988ce85166c5d894&_e=4pHxUG_Xm6-DjZRE1cnASoqtp4rr8fAwxSRi__gyIQzjA3n0LUVYSGPblhSSdiGGcjqgNghUwWA4fMPSe_AvXUY3BGqRYQ9riWMRM2o2H6Ih7CJGfyPnGXaZCykAOJi7n4QyPq9PiFiNEeOVNzxOshB6Bw2WlIuhoYFiROh1hOt04QcDBb8hAvcPYwKUoNYkXU0idb87F_Pg09Vt8oNG-GU-MZckzUIt-90MPabk5rvMStt8fhlAZat8GxmA1W441XlPTsUCKmyN76Eo_QOzOQjyIjFx-IywuBwd2Uxd2BD7f-RBBlyaHK4eyFpG9RUs_O4s0MBswnVv9E9s6fZGLP6rsEMBAWvfTsrEnN6FQFcjtWNRjYkNEQuhyaYpWN2nEOXv4Dc-mZVObJq_q9Y5CQ%3D%3D)
[**SIGN HERE ➞**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=4789c55f76b44966988ce85166c5d894&_e=4pHxUG_Xm6-DjZRE1cnASoqtp4rr8fAwxSRi__gyIQzjA3n0LUVYSGPblhSSdiGGcjqgNghUwWA4fMPSe_AvXUY3BGqRYQ9riWMRM2o2H6Ih7CJGfyPnGXaZCykAOJi7n4QyPq9PiFiNEeOVNzxOshB6Bw2WlIuhoYFiROh1hOt04QcDBb8hAvcPYwKUoNYkXU0idb87F_Pg09Vt8oNG-GU-MZckzUIt-90MPabk5rvMStt8fhlAZat8GxmA1W44_eZH_3Wo42uiUiqpfMeDYpU6VX4WssCi0HDpusmPQb9Rgi-O6NE0Ub3LwN5Q7PZMj1lJrB24LElXCNDHdaCRLgTzWZLWZ92n9nJncLFbFeHe-jkpLxN7DWa-gwZJBqjmEstJM8fdo7fuJVLmx9QbPQ%3D%3D)
I'm writing today because if we're going to hold onto our slim majority, we must start now. We need help - [**we need more Republicans in the House. We MUST have reinforcements to help us prevent the Biden administration from doing even more damage to our nation.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=4789c55f76b44966988ce85166c5d894&_e=4pHxUG_Xm6-DjZRE1cnASoqtp4rr8fAwxSRi__gyIQzjA3n0LUVYSGPblhSSdiGGcjqgNghUwWA4fMPSe_AvXUY3BGqRYQ9riWMRM2o2H6Ih7CJGfyPnGXaZCykAOJi7n4QyPq9PiFiNEeOVNzxOshB6Bw2WlIuhoYFiROh1hOt04QcDBb8hAvcPYwKUoNYkXU0idb87F_Pg09Vt8oNG-GU-MZckzUIt-90MPabk5rvMStt8fhlAZat8GxmA1W44tTNRMRprP8UsbisCc7Y16CEvhDyzvXX_b-hjxV5KWf1ePQ0bfd0Z368S2rOnmdJ0gs95czrspIA-iZRiKUjDP2EJ-pH8BO0FDRnl3oujGZCUMohQwiDKuqxsCRL3KgQdGp44t-c9jJDh5tOmjew7Hg%3D%3D)

While the election may not be this month, _**we MUST begin our work today**_ if we're going to defend our majority successfully.

To stop radical legislation from making its way through the Capitol, we need a united conservative movement to stop Joe Biden.

We had a great election night last year and flipped the House after four years of DISASTROUS Democrat control. [**We need you to commit to helping our team EXPAND our majority in 2024.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=4789c55f76b44966988ce85166c5d894&_e=4pHxUG_Xm6-DjZRE1cnASoqtp4rr8fAwxSRi__gyIQzjA3n0LUVYSGPblhSSdiGGcjqgNghUwWA4fMPSe_AvXUY3BGqRYQ9riWMRM2o2H6Ih7CJGfyPnGXaZCykAOJi7n4QyPq9PiFiNEeOVNzxOshB6Bw2WlIuhoYFiROh1hOt04QcDBb8hAvcPYwKUoNYkXU0idb87F_Pg09Vt8oNG-GU-MZckzUIt-90MPabk5rvMStt8fhlAZat8GxmA1W44mHh1uMK3TmT3-guQq3EXX5WJ7_fAYWJiqsebVsBOF0iIBmwRHQRBOmenoPWqVvB3-HUouVPBnQrs3qOMUbAbZlVaPGV2r-eQXDks-3MGJn0jK_WSpvWd6SmU0yfn9i2H8dWYpytMdi3QsPHYVoFFwA%3D%3D)

[**_I hope you'll help me meet my signature goal by Thanksgiving morning._**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=4789c55f76b44966988ce85166c5d894&_e=4pHxUG_Xm6-DjZRE1cnASoqtp4rr8fAwxSRi__gyIQzjA3n0LUVYSGPblhSSdiGGcjqgNghUwWA4fMPSe_AvXUY3BGqRYQ9riWMRM2o2H6Ih7CJGfyPnGXaZCykAOJi7n4QyPq9PiFiNEeOVNzxOshB6Bw2WlIuhoYFiROh1hOt04QcDBb8hAvcPYwKUoNYkXU0idb87F_Pg09Vt8oNG-GU-MZckzUIt-90MPabk5rvMStt8fhlAZat8GxmA1W44y5xTpxVOvrJOmQyaaLZDPzp-izhyfTtYkL2SrVPWfkR-jw9o3Q-lhtccktDRYsK-feyRUDzfgC7BCr66JCcKpkMMZGPgDB_6rhiTYnARzzjMRRL0NWQLdGxSpyJv5zz85Xi8_sSHVgfyMDHevUJ1-A%3D%3D)

For America,

[ ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=4789c55f76b44966988ce85166c5d894&_e=4pHxUG_Xm6-DjZRE1cnASoqtp4rr8fAwxSRi__gyIQzjA3n0LUVYSGPblhSSdiGGcjqgNghUwWA4fMPSe_AvXUY3BGqRYQ9riWMRM2o2H6Ih7CJGfyPnGXaZCykAOJi7n4QyPq9PiFiNEeOVNzxOshB6Bw2WlIuhoYFiROh1hOt04QcDBb8hAvcPYwKUoNYkXU0idb87F_Pg09Vt8oNG-GU-MZckzUIt-90MPabk5rvMStt8fhlAZat8GxmA1W44Kwn2ZW2QBvJkCtAKBrKn9Upa0clPaIQxnE2eEQAeCOXKJbdT0Wwkhm_Idea54or7MFizIsyuqt6L39AGwLl02o2EDIed_IQzJmHDFoElUy4tD75PJtxgvawRHaEpAA79KYN3ZfuOCaZr4R7ZRGhVMQ%3D%3D)

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

* * *

[ ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=4789c55f76b44966988ce85166c5d894&_e=4pHxUG_Xm6-DjZRE1cnASmc_qEI7w2OCdCJj66AlEJbFUMEW7ELkP5ctV7xOp7gIcqr_3cjqwHwWOUvuHbMwF-wRZYv_C1YKumlbi9RzchZb9jsqwwbii5qAgyVeQ46iezLEf36U0kG5CuebAd5LLSBeCjn8m7fRon3e4SiiElXDJioSHYSPOVGcZJZAgqdSNsOXfPq77QxJskYnBp-o6upgf5hvXHJ-8LrialSwo4FNEWhKqmEBS8zwOJWNbTK6XL_5gxMVLpOK7sYnvVX9VEHRcvRQosiSM82jTfIsiEVNq0wS5psMxRUSQqBZg_nQcu3gb2XB-_7gnYYXmqywIBGRak1X_a0ugkrejUqAK1rGNCfYoCOcqeq2Xz8xKD2-jnFrwo1vfML3Mk8Yg6xnN7P4kkVF2ErswLob1_JctD2pCJMouheQaQyhHbNiABhGjtoX0RDHsotIgC_wx9qjciXWcQeGoZYLa9sdv3sJ9kaG6lO5DldlzLwUBRzGlE-VxrxzBM-ITkkir4S2xzvb6qQc9W-9xGUK_IvAqLZAYRhvGEOF8joy59q0gwTAjtUJewFpwT0Bf0hg3hThKhPs7w%3D%3D)
As Speaker, I want to hear from you on the top issues of the day. It's important for us to deliver results for the American people.

Would you take a moment to complete my [**_Official Speaker Survey_**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=4789c55f76b44966988ce85166c5d894&_e=4pHxUG_Xm6-DjZRE1cnASmc_qEI7w2OCdCJj66AlEJbFUMEW7ELkP5ctV7xOp7gIcqr_3cjqwHwWOUvuHbMwF-wRZYv_C1YKumlbi9RzchZb9jsqwwbii5qAgyVeQ46iezLEf36U0kG5CuebAd5LLSBeCjn8m7fRon3e4SiiElXDJioSHYSPOVGcZJZAgqdSNsOXfPq77QxJskYnBp-o6upgf5hvXHJ-8LrialSwo4FNEWhKqmEBS8zwOJWNbTK6XL_5gxMVLpOK7sYnvVX9VEHRcvRQosiSM82jTfIsiEVNq0wS5psMxRUSQqBZg_nQcu3gb2XB-_7gnYYXmqywIBGRak1X_a0ugkrejUqAK1rGNCfYoCOcqeq2Xz8xKD2-jnFrwo1vfML3Mk8Yg6xnN7P4kkVF2ErswLob1_JctD2pCJMouheQaQyhHbNiABhGR_-4VWeWGcWmGwkhJ2vtc4GmilCJu9smnE_L7kRIC6eIhwzVWw7M2K6n-Hz1FZlExbe4MJXiatKWUKV6ZuPdFQ8kgcqUgYFbZHFZW_LdZi9iZWL4FGxE9cn3IKkTaFjsT2FaJ43_GymSV76iwtugbA%3D%3D) today?

Your input is important to making sure we move America forward. I appreciate you taking the time to send me your input.

| **_SPEAKER MIKE JOHNSON_**

clean_body: I desperately need you to open this email. While the election may not be this month, we MUST begin our work today if we’re going to defend our majority successfully. | | Fellow American - when I became Speaker of the House on October 25th, I knew one of the first things we needed to do was build out our team of supporters online. So, we got to work immediately and To date, we have not hit our goal. With Thanksgiving just around the corner, we have a lot of work to do. If you've already signaled your support for our team as we work to hold onto our thin majority heading into next year's election, thank you. If you haven't, Fellow American, Democrats have spent the last three years under President Biden trying to turn our great nation into a banana republic. While voters don't seem to have much of an appetite for Joe Biden, Democrats in the House and Senate have done everything they can to prop up his failing presidency while undoing all the critical work President Trump and Congressional Republicans moved forward in recent years. We're doing our best to continue providing conservative solutions to our nation's most vexing concerns. Still, I must be honest - doing so would be infinitely easier if we had a more significant majority. Our immediate goals for next year are two-fold: 1. Hold onto the House majority 2. Expand our House majority We've seen what happens when Democrats are in the majority: they'll add trillions more to the national debt and launch assaults on our Constitutional liberties. I'm writing today because if we're going to hold onto our slim majority, we must start now. We need help - While the election may not be this month, we MUST begin our work today if we're going to defend our majority successfully. To stop radical legislation from making its way through the Capitol, we need a united conservative movement to stop Joe Biden. We had a great election night last year and flipped the House after four years of DISASTROUS Democrat control. For America, Mike Johnson Speaker of the House As Speaker, I want to hear from you on the top issues of the day. It's important for us to deliver results for the American people. Would you take a moment to complete my today? Your input is important to making sure we move America forward. I appreciate you taking the time to send me your input. | SPEAKER MIKE JOHNSON Speaker Johnson is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana. | PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA Don't want to receive any more of our emails? name: TN House Democrats
subject: We are thankful for YOU
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tennessee House Democratic Caucus; Ronnie Glynn, Treasurer
body:
https://tnhousedems.com/ [https://tnhousedems.com/]
Peter,
On this day of Thanksgiving, our Caucus extends a huge, heartfelt thank you to the force behind all of our efforts - you.
We have a long road ahead to Election Day 2024, but with dedicated supporters like you encouraging, supporting and investing in our efforts, a brighter future is possible.
Together, we can create a brighter future for Tennessee families - a future in which our state sufficiently invests in our students and teachers and our public schools thrive...women enjoy equal rights and decision-making authority over their own bodies...children and neighborhoods are safe from gun violence...our neighbors have access to quality healthcare...simply, a future in which improving the quality of life for all Tennessee families is the legislature’s priority.
Progress is possible on these issues and many more, but only if we continue working together to make it happen. We could not be more grateful to have you standing beside us in this fight. Thank you for all you do to build a brighter future for our beloved state. She’s worth fighting for.
With sincere appreciation,
Your Tennessee House Democrats
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tnhousedems2023]
Paid for by Tennessee House Democratic Caucus; Ronnie Glynn, Treasurer
Tennessee House Democratic Caucus
P. O. Box 198082
Nashville, TN 37219
United States

name: Team Cori
subject: The Pentagon failed its SIXTH Audit in a row
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Cori has and will continue to fight to strengthen our community’s social safety net while refusing to accept an ever-ballooning defense budget | |
---
Peter, **** **Imagine a future where we end homelessness, guarantee free healthcare, and fully fund our public schools.** We can do that and so much more. But instead, we spend more and more on our military budget every year instead of putting that money towards our communities. The Pentagon budget in 2023 alone was over $800 billion. And it gets worse: **The Pentagon just failed its SIXTH audit in a row.** This is unacceptable. **Cori has and will continue to fight to strengthen our community’s social safety net while refusing to accept an ever-ballooning defense budget** that already exceeds the defense spending of the next nine countries combined. It’s what the people of St. Louis elected her to do. **[Can you donate $5 now to re-elect Cori so that she can continue advocating for our tax dollars going towards improving working people’s lives, not towards endless wars?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zrl7hAwtfC3RQ56zUloyYjVkvMZXeX3639Cml3VAo5D6AIpWrZgkeNBZheb6UmIEH4cq5hgb8zwUbLP3KmPvP_1ZDXcRYmafOmwjg6PioeKsH9p1EiHx8oQswZ48oLMzeCY_6nBMpb-p9uwHbF3H8-EvbFtEXkZwYsYF4wtAl-D_LI4z8Ij6tv-U816JRq-mCgj2N_DwaDjvC7ZE3fNXbiwdbV3TA1QAVTJTnDTHVurIcP9mJhKKPPZeKx3s4j8ZBhsLk9dxfvYqgvKOA9XcbsskTRTNwqYn8Po1G2-nQDntzc4x1kwNxABgMzoLcCLiZAisfpJVzcaXrx94wPROGD/41i/ldgoazy7QluWxmttLutSNg/h0/u626E7Z4ALwKFS5dPuDkIgbjBsme4S5Ar6WlNBMOfbo)** **[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zrl7hAwtfC3RQ56zUloyYjVkvMZXeX3639Cml3VAo5D0iR_QlgU4kYDULuTlbRN_kJU5U7QO-5Ehw5M2gh0rQiQQhy8eGrgrxk2TjRzzQXUcZXSch0q4-cTomuZ1V8QXSqeVaQqdxurQe1ycaTLNGXHSoC4wNh2UWGhRrKslvM8LTapZuDx9ROe6jhn7s3LVt-KAP3zi07R3JA9zK6w46UOGpkOZ7-PHFdG4363cpZ2Mus33myIENHxliH-jJ8TaTP27chriNYGDUjAWm3kXj_NfRzSaOJ4NjZ2OqQngYUCwtOdTlo6Jnmg-kOxBVq6viLwXxut4-aspTSdomd_An1/41i/ldgoazy7QluWxmttLutSNg/h1/P3b6fsgMs5p4Ax37VLAhDtMbYREEDAvQNqBKVSZK7zs)** **[DONATE TODAY >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zrl7hAwtfC3RQ56zUloyYjVkvMZXeX3639Cml3VAo5D6lDzlKL23jKxrqy4iQC7VYjhGJtzQQtJg0uGt0E09y3cG9FF768yhViaLPU2zTqxXqrDyWSQXZ1XHceE0gVqlQ3fML7MSN0rpxm_KuOp2gxq2tlq4zKWXDHkIbVxhMqRxJ1AJuC7UIwPvMsZKGsUR4kbPQ2cCOgsQ0WvBWfoFmcMgM5ILRjde7Px0_TntlDR-YHOnPeCXsqb-88NfZWObX6_kA8rMxF923-mW8PoUrWRfaAOFo8tulSm2pQIGyTMFMfalivLoTOMYG9-rPh1FMcrqmicmkXNy0evtlJFkjw/41i/ldgoazy7QluWxmttLutSNg/h2/RI05B-fPOW0onYddQYX-njwM05LPWOwca6GE48JM7zI) **
We cannot accept the continued outrageous spending on inhumane and harmful anti-Black and anti-immigrant policies that increase policing, incarceration, and abuse. The main people who benefit from this spending are war-mongers and weapons manufacturers, leaving the majority of people in this country behind. **Cori will continue to lead with the mandate that St. Louis sent her to Congress with: to advance legislation that meets every person’s needs–starting with those whose need is greatest.** Cori has vocally opposed spending on war and weapons over vital domestic priorities like removing restrictions on and expanding reproductive health care, ending the unhoused crisis, acting urgently to address climate change, adopting widespread health-based approaches to gun violence and public safety, and so much more. These are the priorities that she has long pushed to be fully funded and prioritized so that we can meaningfully make a difference in the lives of every person in St. Louis and across the country. **A future where every child is fed and house is possible.** **A future where people have access to free healthcare is possible.** **A future where every person doesn’t just survive, but thrives is possible.** That future is possible if we invest in it; not if we continue to invest in weapons and death abroad. Cori’s been advocating for this future since day 1 and she will continue to lead on it because that’s what the people want. **[Can you chip in $5 today so that we have the resources to re-elect Cori in 2024. clean_body: Cori has and will continue to fight to strengthen our community’s social safety net while refusing to accept an ever-ballooning defense budget | | Peter, ** Imagine a future where we end homelessness, guarantee free healthcare, and fully fund our public schools. We can do that and so much more. But instead, we spend more and more on our military budget every year instead of putting that money towards our communities. The Pentagon budget in 2023 alone was over $800 billion. And it gets worse: The Pentagon just failed its SIXTH audit in a row. This is unacceptable. Cori has and will continue to fight to strengthen our community’s social safety net while refusing to accept an ever-ballooning defense budget that already exceeds the defense spending of the next nine countries combined. It’s what the people of St. Louis elected her to do. We cannot accept the continued outrageous spending on inhumane and harmful anti-Black and anti-immigrant policies that increase policing, incarceration, and abuse. The main people who benefit from this spending are war-mongers and weapons manufacturers, leaving the majority of people in this country behind. Cori will continue to lead with the mandate that St. Louis sent her to Congress with: to advance legislation that meets every person’s needs–starting with those whose need is greatest. Cori has vocally opposed spending on war and weapons over vital domestic priorities like removing restrictions on and expanding reproductive health care, ending the unhoused crisis, acting urgently to address climate change, adopting widespread health-based approaches to gun violence and public safety, and so much more. These are the priorities that she has long pushed to be fully funded and prioritized so that we can meaningfully make a difference in the lives of every person in St. Louis and across the country. A future where every child is fed and house is possible. A future where people have access to free healthcare is possible. A future where every person doesn’t just survive, but thrives is possible. That future is possible if we invest in it; not if we continue to invest in weapons and death abroad. Cori’s been advocating for this future since day 1 and she will continue to lead on it because that’s what the people want. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | We can achieve this future of our communities thriving as long as we continue to work together. -Team Cori ** Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress | | Sent via . | | |

Hi there, it's Emily. Did you see Stefanie's message from the other day?
We've made up a lot of ground since she reached out. But as of now, we're still pacing way behind our goal. With folks logging off for the holidays tomorrow, we have to make up the difference today — or we could completely miss our end-of-month goal next week.
**So please, will you chip in to defend Kirsten's must-win seat and save our Senate majority before closing your laptop and enjoying the holidays? Here's a personal donation link I made for you:[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_fr_defend-senate-2023](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73804529/439696829/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4587-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2FkYzNiZi00Yzg5LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dGkaJO0jdOUWJhrW-FBRmVTbEq5q8f_XD_ki139MG2I=)**

Thanks so much,

Emily

What if I told you that Kirsten's seat is one of 23 Democratic seats up for grabs in 2024 — and Republicans could retake power if they win just one?

body:
This is time-sensitive.
| | | Hey there -- It’s Diana, the Research Director here at the DSCC. I’ve got some BIG news: **We’ve selected YOU to represent Pennsylvania in a Democratic Strategy Interview for today, 11/22/23.**

Only a select few of our most committed grassroots Democrats were chosen for this _incredible_ opportunity, so you have a _rare_ chance to help shape our vital 2024 Senate strategy and defeat Republicans next year!

Today’s survey closes at 11:59 PM, and **we won’t have a complete dataset without your response! So please, click this personal link to enter your Democratic Strategy Interview by taking the survey now:

body:

# [Sign your name: Condemn Elon Musk for pushing an antisemitic conspiracy theory >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfc703e14-db5f-48ca-8253-d7180526f976/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | Elon Musk endorsed an antisemitic conspiracy theory on his website X (formerly Twitter) by agreeing with a post that claimed Jewish communities push "hatred against Whites." In reply to this disgusting post, Musk said, "You have said the actual truth." Elon Musk has over 160 million followers on X and owns the company. Spreading misinformation and conspiracy theories is incredibly dangerous and incites violence. The White House has condemned Musk's despicable language, and several major companies have pulled their advertising dollars from the website. But it's not enough – we need to send a strong message that this is NOT okay. [**Join us in condemning Elon Musk for spreading hateful, antisemitic conspiracy theories >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfd6d0848-a9f7-4e2f-9612-349abd888db9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

body:
It's Finally Back in Stock
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
# #1 Solar Gadget Can Save
Your Life In A Crisis
**This Pocket-Sized "Power Plant" Sold Out in Less
Than 48 Hours - Now It's Finally Back in Stock** [**Tested by former Navy SEAL: See it in action!**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/LgBkChb-jFjWEpLLqTgQ0g~~/AARclAA~/RgRnQLRYP0RnaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xODUmYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QUFBDMzFUMTEwMTIzX1JNLUFGUi0yMDIzMTEyMlcDc3BjQgplVSAiXmWdIu2lUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/LgBkChb-jFjWEpLLqTgQ0g~~/AARclAA~/RgRnQLRYP0RnaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xODUmYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QUFBDMzFUMTEwMTIzX1JNLUFGUi0yMDIzMTEyMlcDc3BjQgplVSAiXmWdIu2lUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) [**People are buying these in 4 packs - Learn More**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/LgBkChb-jFjWEpLLqTgQ0g~~/AARclAA~/RgRnQLRYP0RnaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xODUmYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QUFBDMzFUMTEwMTIzX1JNLUFGUi0yMDIzMTEyMlcDc3BjQgplVSAiXmWdIu2lUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) Oh no. We slapped our foreheads. We had just released the Patriot Power Cell. And the response was so strong, we couldn't believe it. The launch went WAY better than expected. We sold out completely in a matter of hours. The second time, we doubled our inventory thinking that would be enough to meet demand. And then... poof! GONE! Our inventory manager was asking... _**" Why were customers getting these 2... 4... or even 12 units at a time? Were they holiday gifts? Or just incredibly useful?"**_ Since then, the Patriot Power Cell has become one of our best-selling products of all time. Wow! And after making as many as we can, we think we finally have enough to meet demand... at least for now. That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you: [**Tested by Former Navy SEAL:
A Pocket Power Plant That's
Weather-Resistant, Has An Ultra
Bright LED Flashlight And
Charges 2 Devices At Once!**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/LgBkChb-jFjWEpLLqTgQ0g~~/AARclAA~/RgRnQLRYP0RnaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xODUmYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QUFBDMzFUMTEwMTIzX1JNLUFGUi0yMDIzMTEyMlcDc3BjQgplVSAiXmWdIu2lUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/LgBkChb-jFjWEpLLqTgQ0g~~/AARclAA~/RgRnQLRYP0RnaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xODUmYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QUFBDMzFUMTEwMTIzX1JNLUFGUi0yMDIzMTEyMlcDc3BjQgplVSAiXmWdIu2lUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) | | **Melanie D.** I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. They work so well, I bought eight more to give to my kids and friends for Christmas. I work outdoors a lot, so I take mine along to plug in my cell phone. They also have a flashlight on them, which comes in real handy. This is a good buy, you won't regret it.
---|---
| **Shirley C.** I'm very happy with the 4Patriots products. I've gotten the Power Cell, which is fantastic to charge my cell phone anywhere. It's rechargeable and I'm very happy with all of the 4Patriots products. And I'm very happy with Frank Bates, he's very truthful, honest and helps others in need. I really appreciate his products and his emails that I get. I'm really, really happy. I would recommend his products and him to anyone. Thank you so much.
---|---
| **Wing C.** I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. I know they will come in handy. Because I know people with their cell phone, saying "oh I have no battery left." And you know what? They're getting it for Christmas. That's what I'm doing for them. We live here in New York, things are quite ample here at this time, ya know. But for emergencies like that - to have your cell phone, your contact to the outside world - it's important. Thank you very much, Frank.
---|---
| **Richard G.** It's a great item for me on weekends out in the country, the swimming pool, wherever else I don't have electricity available. Oftentimes people have come out to the pool, for example, and brought their power adapter to keep their cell phones or laptops or whatever charged up. They wound up losing them. With the Power Cell, it works great to recharge in the shade and I highly recommend it. Thank you very much.
---|---
[**Click here to see it in action!**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/LgBkChb-jFjWEpLLqTgQ0g~~/AARclAA~/RgRnQLRYP0RnaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xODUmYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QUFBDMzFUMTEwMTIzX1JNLUFGUi0yMDIzMTEyMlcDc3BjQgplVSAiXmWdIu2lUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
Featured reviews are from real customers. Sometimes customers are given a free product to test, or received a free product as a thank you for submitting honest feedback. Cade Courtley is a former Navy SEAL who served 9 years of active duty and has been compensated by 4Patriots for his hard work in helping test and endorse products. The United States Military & U.S. Navy SEAL Team are not affiliated with 4Patriots. They have not endorsed, sponsored or recommended this product; no affiliation or endorsement is claimed.

American Freedom Report
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Fil560zMOElybygVnMfT5w~~/AARclAA~/RgRnQLRYP0RfaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQuYW1lcmljYW5mcmVlZG9tcmVwb3J0LmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1EYWlseS1BbGVydHMmZT1kcHdpbGxpczY3JTI1NDBnbWFpbC5jb21XA3NwY0IKZVUgIl5lnSLtpVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/salQOH_ken2WyRWn7YiGXQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnQLRYP0QuaHR0cHM6Ly9hbWVyaWNhbmZyZWVkb21yZXBvcnQuY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgplVSAiXmWdIu2lUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

name: Carolina at United We Dream Action
subject: DACA is likely headed to the SupremeCourt… again 🥴
body:
We’ve been here before. | | | Peter, DACA is likely headed back to the Supreme Court... for the second time. 🥴 Two months ago, Judge Hanen doubled down on his decision against DACA. New applications will still not be accepted, and now the case will likely go all the way to the Supreme Court. We’ve won at the Supreme Court before, but with new Justices and the Court moving further right every year, we can’t predict the outcome or rely on the courts to save us. The only thing we can rely on is our community’s ability to fight for the future we deserve. No matter what the Court says, we know that DACA is right and legal. And we’ll continue fighting for permanent protections for ALL 11 million undocumented people, including the folks DACA left behind, because DACA was never more than a band-aid solution. **We can’t be certain what happens next, but it’s important to be prepared for every possibility. clean_body: We’ve been here before. | | | Peter, DACA is likely headed back to the Supreme Court... for the second time. 🥴 Two months ago, Judge Hanen doubled down on his decision against DACA. New applications will still not be accepted, and now the case will likely go all the way to the Supreme Court. We’ve won at the Supreme Court before, but with new Justices and the Court moving further right every year, we can’t predict the outcome or rely on the courts to save us. The only thing we can rely on is our community’s ability to fight for the future we deserve. No matter what the Court says, we know that DACA is right and legal. And we’ll continue fighting for permanent protections for ALL 11 million undocumented people, including the folks DACA left behind, because DACA was never more than a band-aid solution. We can’t be certain what happens next, but it’s important to be prepared for every possibility. Can we count on you to support this next phase of protecting undocumented immigrants with a contribution of $10? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Your contribution will help us spring into action when necessary to protect our communities. Thanks for being a part of the team! Carolina, United We Dream Action | Our most dedicated supporters are chipping in monthly to sustain our fight to secure a pathway to citizenship. Join them and help us win permanent protections in Congress by starting a recurring donation today: | |

name: The New Pennsylvania Project
subject: Take our 2024 issues poll!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project
body:
https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?refcode=newsletter [https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?refcode=newsletter]
Hello friends!
We hope this edition of the New Pennsylvania Project eBlast finds you well.
Please take a few moments to check out all the important news you can use, upcoming events and career opportunities, and other resources as we get ready to turn our attention to 2024.
What Issues Matter To You?
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/poll%202024.png]
As the New Pennsylvania Project gears up for the 2024 election cycle, we want to hear from voters across the Commonwealth about issues that impact you and if you will vote in both April's primary and November's general election. Your responses will help us focus on the issues that matter to you and allow us to reach new voters ahead of these crucially important elections! Click the button below to take this quick two minute survey.
Click Here To Take Survey [https://www.newpaproject.org/poll-2024/]
NPP in the News
WATCH: A free panel on Pa.’s 2023 election results [https://www.spotlightpa.org/news/2023/10/pennsylvania-election-2023-results-event/]
(Spotlight PA)
Pennsylvania voters went to the polls on Nov. 7 to elect new judges to sit on multiple statewide courts. These judges will make decisions that influence major issues such as election administration, abortion law, and redistricting, as well as weigh in on smaller-scale cases involving child custody, probation, and business disputes. To understand how these elected officials will impact the state, Spotlight PA held a free panel on the results, which include New Pennsylvania Project CEO Kadida Kenner.
Democrats’ Strong Election Night Will Likely Shield Ballot Access in Pennsylvania [https://boltsmag.org/democrats-pennsylvania-election-2023/]
(Bolts)
The next presidential election may still be a year away, but voters in the nation’s biggest swing state just selected the public officials who will be in charge of running it. And much like in other parts of the country, Pennsylvania Democrats enjoyed a blessed night on Tuesday, keeping control of the populous suburbs where they’ve eased access to mail voting in recent years and beating some Republicans who had amplified former President Donald Trump’s false claims of fraud.
Expensive judicial races might be here to stay in Pennsylvania after record high court campaign [https://apnews.com/article/pennsylvania-election-state-supreme-court-record-spending-7ed804dd4a7871698f651843b16daccd]
(AP News)
The race for an open seat on Pennsylvania’s highest court initially resembled the sleepy contests that had played out for decades: low turnout, little media coverage and just enough spending to afford some biographical TV ads on cable. Then attack fliers began hitting mail boxes.
YouTube of the Week
https://youtu.be/XvCP1wgUGCU?feature=shared [https://youtu.be/XvCP1wgUGCU?feature=shared]
We couldn't be prouder of the work done by our entire team during the past few weeks as we knocked doors to get out the vote for the November judicial and municipal election. Click here [https://youtu.be/XvCP1wgUGCU?feature=shared] to check out a photo montage of those we met along the way and the team that brought home some big wins to Pennsylvania!
News You Can Use
Failure to move Pennsylvania primary from Passover may disenfranchise some Jewish voters, lawmaker says [https://www.cbsnews.com/pittsburgh/news/failure-to-move-pennsylvania-primary-passover-disenfranchise-jewish-voters/]
(KDKA)
There is growing unhappiness with the failure of the Legislature to move next year's primary from Passover. Next year's primary is scheduled for Tuesday, April 23, the first full day of Passover.
Pennsylvania lawmakers OK millions for universities, but feud over private and public school aid [https://www.wesa.fm/politics-government/2023-11-15/pennsylvania-senate-university-school-funding]
(WESA)
Pennsylvania's Legislature on Wednesday approved hundreds of millions of dollars for universities after a fight that has dragged on five months into the fiscal year, although the politically divided body continued to feud over elements of school funding.
Pennsylvania ranks near the bottom in national study of charter school performance [https://www.penncapital-star.com/blog/pennsylvania-ranks-near-the-bottom-in-national-study-of-charter-school-performance/?oref=cspa_firstread_nl]
(Penn Capital-Star)
Pennsylvania ranked 31st, followed by Oregon, Michigan, Tennessee and Hawaii. The commonwealth was also among the states with the largest gap between white and Black charter students’ scores, with the seventh-largest gap.
Pa. Latinos don't vote as a single bloc, but could have singular effect in 2024 elections [https://www.goerie.com/story/news/politics/elections/2023/11/20/latino-voter-organizing-pa-democrat-republican-2024-elections/70146999007/]
(GoErie)
While 63% of America's 255 million voting-age residents were registered to vote, just 18 million of the 44 million voting-age residents identified as Hispanic by the census were registered to vote. That represents just 41%, lower than any other racial demographic in the country.
Voters are backing abortion rights, but some foes won’t relent. Is the commitment to democracy in question? [https://www.inquirer.com/politics/nation/abortion-rights-elections-defiance-20231119.html]
(Philadelphia Inquirer)
Certain Republican elected officials and antiabortion activists around the country have responded to losses at the ballot box by challenging election results, refusing to bring state laws into line with voter-backed changes, moving to strip state courts of their power to consider abortion-related laws and challenging the citizen-led ballot initiative process itself.
Galloway Announces Plans To Resign House Seat [https://www.politicspa.com/hd-140-galloway-announces-plans-to-resign-house-seat/127964/]
(PoliticsPA)
State Rep. John Galloway (D-Bucks) has announced that he plans to resign from his seat in Harrisburg on December 15. Galloway recently was elected magisterial district judge for Falls Township and his departure will create (another) 101-101 deadlock in the chamber.
Appeals court strikes down key tool used to enforce Voting Rights Act [https://www.cnn.com/2023/11/20/politics/appeals-court-voting-rights-act-ruling/index.html]
(CNN)
A federal appeals court on Monday ruled against a key tool used to enforce the Voting Rights Act – likely setting up another Supreme Court showdown over one of the nation’s landmark civil rights laws.
Federal Court Orders Pennsylvania To Count Mail-in Ballots With Missing or Incorrect Date [https://www.democracydocket.com/news-alerts/federal-court-orders-pennsylvania-to-count-mail-in-ballots-with-missing-or-incorrect-date/]
(Democracy Docket)
Today, in a major victory for Pennsylvania voters, a federal court ruled that Pennsylvania counties must count mail-in ballots that are missing or have an incorrect date on the outer envelope.
Instagram of the Week
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/IMG_0221.jpg]
Upcoming Event in Pittsburgh
Instagram screenshot celebrating Indigenous Peoples' Day [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/90920/images/unnamed_2.png]
The New Pennsylvania Project, in partnership with The Leadership Conference on Civil and Human Rights, as well as 1Hood Power, will be hosting a community conversation on the current state of our federal judiciary on Tuesday, November 28th from 6:00PM-8:00PM in Pittsburgh.
Topics will include an overview of our federal courts, the historic number of highly qualified, diverse, and fair-minded judges recently confirmed by our senators, the remaining judicial vacancies in Pennsylvania and on the Third Circuit, and the ongoing need for a binding ethical code of conduct for Supreme Court justices.
Event Details
When : Tuesday, November 28th from 6:00PM-8:00PM
Where : Hosanna House, 807 Wallace Avenue, Wilkinsburg, PA 15221
Light refreshments will be served
The event is FREE and open to the public but we ask that you click the button below to RSVP!
Click Here to RSVP [https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd0uCHxBFmxQ1D_1LCZHFSkXN9juvJm7L2FTPy0TcPxuVz0ww/viewform?usp=sf_link]
We're Hiring!
The New Pennsylvania Project is a voting rights organization with a primary focus of registering communities of color and the youth to vote. We are looking for passionate individuals to join our team and help defend democracy by expanding the electorate.
*
Community
Engagement
Associate
(Lehigh
Valley
and
Delaware/Chester
Counties)
*
Part-Time:
Education
&
Engagement
Associate
in
Lehigh
Valley
and
Delaware/Chester
Counties
(
via
c3
organization
New
PA
Project
Education
Fund
)
[https://newpaprojecteducationfund.org/index.php/eea/]
To learn more about how to apply and review job descriptions with requirements and disclosed salary ranges, please click here [https://www.newpaproject.org/careers/] .
Thank you for taking the time to stay informed. We'll be back in two weeks with the latest edition. And we wish you a Happy Thanksgiving -- make sure you talk to all your loved ones about getting registered to vote, especially any young folks, as only 1 in 4 eligible high school students are registered to vote!
In solidarity,
#TeamNPP
2024 PA ELECTION DATES:
Primary Election: April 23, 2024
Last day to register to vote: April 8, 2024
General Election: November 5, 2024
We're on a mission to register new voters in the Commonwealth and expand the electorate.
Help us prepare for the upcoming municipal, judicial, and local elections in 2023!
Invest in our democracy [https://secure.everyaction.com/DQ7Hxcpq3Eabel6LA-9V0Q2?emci=94765bbc-8d5e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=1068162]
The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4), contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax-deductible.
https://www.facebook.com/NewPennsylvaniaProject [https://www.facebook.com/NewPennsylvaniaProject] https://twitter.com/NewPennsylvania [https://twitter.com/NewPennsylvania] https://www.linkedin.com/company/the-new-pennsylvania-project [https://www.linkedin.com/company/the-new-pennsylvania-project] https://instagram.com/newpennsylvania [https://instagram.com/newpennsylvania]
Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project
New Pennsylvania Project
PO Box 443
West Chester, PA 19381
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please
unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/hv49NkLeaEqRKBF0Enr9lA2?unsubscribedata=RgI49CR2RbtZERgO6osL6qGtpFvdvG0l9%2FVLzo6L31if4sydfVxJv8VThdq2KPOKS5rhj38I1Scv4WPdpx%2BM1yzICu0TqZpunCZ5m6y7mMAMUHs4ALK%2FR%2BxBjqriO5Rd6j3PeDARXqFAoGocfcBz8ofEZBBQYJULVrq0bXfHyPpHspGFK1Qgo9DGMGw7nYq2MtYq4InFwrkoUGCq8Ogl2b3t8JuPTWTruaA%2BWTm61PwNwgj0M4CoPh40P98iIpg1ve%2BjDuGTfM2ZJ6NMFsPOG61u05fIh8%2BrW2Pgbn28S5oP%2B6%2FxVXd5NpF7h3DoHoBuyn68kyQP2DL0E72x7lq538OeiOm%2BjLzhLAUa2Opt%2FtST1M9oL5G9A%2BrldR9rpNz0u3JwyoKPzKzQRk5cGXujy%2B0OPOBYrD3PdvdRMv4reGs%3D .

Appeals court strikes down key tool used to enforce Voting Rights Act [] (CNN) A federal appeals court on Monday ruled against a key tool used to enforce the Voting Rights Act – likely setting up another Supreme Court showdown over one of the nation’s landmark civil rights laws. Federal Court Orders Pennsylvania To Count Mail-in Ballots With Missing or Incorrect Date [] (Democracy Docket) Today, in a major victory for Pennsylvania voters, a federal court ruled that Pennsylvania counties must count mail-in ballots that are missing or have an incorrect date on the outer envelope. Instagram of the Week [] Upcoming Event in Pittsburgh Instagram screenshot celebrating Indigenous Peoples' Day [] The New Pennsylvania Project, in partnership with The Leadership Conference on Civil and Human Rights, as well as 1Hood Power, will be hosting a community conversation on the current state of our federal judiciary on Tuesday, November 28th from 6:00PM-8:00PM in Pittsburgh. Topics will include an overview of our federal courts, the historic number of highly qualified, diverse, and fair-minded judges recently confirmed by our senators, the remaining judicial vacancies in Pennsylvania and on the Third Circuit, and the ongoing need for a binding ethical code of conduct for Supreme Court justices. Event Details When : Tuesday, November 28th from 6:00PM-8:00PM Where : Hosanna House, 807 Wallace Avenue, Wilkinsburg, PA 15221 Light refreshments will be served The event is FREE and open to the public but we ask that you click the button below to RSVP! Click Here to RSVP [] We're Hiring! The New Pennsylvania Project is a voting rights organization with a primary focus of registering communities of color and the youth to vote. We are looking for passionate individuals to join our team and help defend democracy by expanding the electorate. Community Engagement Associate (Lehigh Valley and Delaware/Chester Counties) Part-Time: Education & Engagement Associate in Lehigh Valley and Delaware/Chester Counties ( via c3 organization New PA Project Education Fund ) [] To learn more about how to apply and review job descriptions with requirements and disclosed salary ranges, please click here [] . Thank you for taking the time to stay informed. We'll be back in two weeks with the latest edition. And we wish you a Happy Thanksgiving -- make sure you talk to all your loved ones about getting registered to vote, especially any young folks, as only 1 in 4 eligible high school students are registered to vote! In solidarity, #TeamNPP 2024 PA ELECTION DATES: Primary Election: April 23, 2024 Last day to register to vote: April 8, 2024 General Election: November 5, 2024 We're on a mission to register new voters in the Commonwealth and expand the electorate. Help us prepare for the upcoming municipal, judicial, and local elections in 2023! Invest in our democracy [] The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4), contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax-deductible. name: Alexandria Taylor for Michigan
subject: Family and Gratitude: Wishing You a Happy Thanksgiving
body:
As the warmth of Thanksgiving envelops us, I find myself reflecting on the enduring values that define our lives and shape our nation's future.
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/0bOltiZ4t/c?w=KwGeJQen69kx9hqG8MjHht7PRyjBT0b-C5Z-zToIe_0.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zaG91dG91dC53aXguY29tL3NvLzBiT2x0aVo0dD9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjY0YzMxOGU2LTM1M2EtNDYyOC1hNzUxLThkZmQ5NTc2M2JmNiJ9)_**

| | |
---
|
---
| |
---
| | As the warmth of Thanksgiving envelops us, I find myself reflecting on the enduring values that define our lives and shape our nation's future. Gathered around the table with loved ones, we share not only a meal but stories, laughter, and a profound sense of gratitude. Our cherished traditions echo the essence of our conservative principles—strengthening the bonds of family, community, and faith. These values, rooted in the fabric of our society, remind us of the importance of preserving the foundations that make America exceptional. As we express thanks for the abundance in our lives, let us also revel in the richness of family ties, creating memories that resonate with the core values we hold dear. This Thanksgiving, we extend our gratitude to you, our community, for your unwavering support in our campaign journey. Your commitment to these enduring principles is the driving force behind our efforts to bring them to the forefront of our nation's discourse. Together, let us continue working towards a future that honors the values we hold dear. Wishing you and your loved ones a Thanksgiving filled with joy, gratitude, and the warmth of shared values. Alexandria Taylor

I'm hopeful it was just an oversight, or that the last message didn't reach you. Either way, this is perhaps the last chance I'll have to secure 1500X impact. - Arizona Election Alerts | PAID FOR BY ABE FOR ARIZONA Abe for Arizona, P.O. name: Kurt Kroemer
subject: A Thanksgiving message
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kroemer for Congress
body:
The good in us...

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73806986/439706168/-117512614?refcode=09262023&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0MDEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDYwZjFhNDMtNTA4OS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8oTqKKpPQrk0L19To_xtOLlBIuopaMnxW3F9Qs_HsuQ=)
---
| Peter, Since I launched this campaign against MAGA Republican David Schweikert I've spoken with thousands of people and, almost universally, all everyone wants is **the chaos to stop, the hatred and vitriol to end and a government that works to make our lives better and more joyful.** So, why do I remain so optimistic? I believe more of us are hopeful. I believe more of us are kind. I believe more of us care about the less fortunate. I believe more of us believe in the humanity of others. These are just some of the things I believe. And because I know I'm right, **WE will overcome, WE will persevere and WE will triumph **over those who want to tear down our country and our democracy. If you believe as I do then **I'm asking for your help.** I'm working to go to Washington to represent the best in us and **this is, literally, my life's work.**
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73806987/439706170/-117512614?refcode=09282023&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0MDEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDYwZjFhNDMtNTA4OS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8oTqKKpPQrk0L19To_xtOLlBIuopaMnxW3F9Qs_HsuQ=)
---
I've been a senior executive at the American Red Cross, Make-A-Wish Foundation of America and Humanity United as well as serving as a Congressional investigator. **I've responded to terrorist attacks, natural disasters and humanitarian crises.** **In all of that darkness I've seen so much more good and so much more humanity. **I'm humbly asking you to help me continue that work.
With gratitude,
Kurt

name: Sen. Heidi Campbell
subject: Wishing you a happy Thanksgiving!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Campbell for State Senate, Lee Jones, treasurer
body:
https://www.voteheidicampbell.com/ [https://www.voteheidicampbell.com/]
Hi Peter,
Thanksgiving is tomorrow, and I want you to know that I am thankful for YOU!
I am deeply grateful to have such a strong community of supporters who are willing to give their time, dollars, and encouragement as I continue my service in the legislature. It could be easy to feel disheartened doing this work, but I am fortified by the Tennesseans who share my commitment to fighting for the promise of a better future for our state.
I know the holiday season can be a busy time for many, so I am thankful to everyone who has found time on their calendar to join us for our holiday fundraiser on December 11th. If you haven’t yet had the chance, please RSVP or join our host committee here! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbelldec2023]
RSVP [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbelldec2023]
I hope everyone has a wonderful Thanksgiving filled with family, friends, and great food! Thank you again for your continued support and commitment to bettering our district, city, and state.
Sen. Heidi Campbell

name: Letitia James
subject: Do I have your support, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
With just over a month to go until the year ends, I had to reach out ASAP with this update:
| | |
---
Peter, with just over a month to go until the end of the year, I had to reach out ASAP:
**_FIRST_** , the Republican-nominated, conservative Supreme Court dismantled Roe v. Wade, stripping away reproductive rights from millions of Americans

_**THEN**_ , 14 states made abortion _illegal. _

_**NOW**_ , I'm asking for your help to make sure I can continue to protect our rights in New York and across the country.
Peter, I refuse to let New York fall into the hands of dangerous MAGA Republicans. I need to raise $10,000 before MIDNIGHT to stay on track this year.

**[Can I count on you to donate $5 now to help me stand tall against extremist Republicans and continue to defend New York?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73807214/439706657/-2022127741?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk887-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzBmMWE0My01MDg5LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=35N1Nh9HBV2wQ_MdS8NuVhKE6KqOcA04kd1g_UB_ynE=)**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73807216/439706659/-2022127741?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk887-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzBmMWE0My01MDg5LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=35N1Nh9HBV2wQ_MdS8NuVhKE6KqOcA04kd1g_UB_ynE=)
---
When I first made history in 2018 by becoming the first Black woman _ever_ to serve as New York’s attorney general, I knew that I had my work cut out for me. Growing up in a working family in Brooklyn meant that I experienced all the ways in which New York’s corrupt and elite took advantage of families like my own – and I vowed to do everything I could to protect my fellow New Yorkers.

**And, Peter, I’m proud to say that I’ve done just that.** Throughout my time in office, I’ve fought relentlessly for LGBTQ+, voting, and workers’ rights, advocated for the creation of an abortion fund, successfully held gun and opioid manufacturers and sellers accountable for their role in two deadly epidemics, and _so much more_.

But my work is nowhere near complete. Because right now, GOP extremists across the nation are launching an all out war against some of our most fundamental rights – and I refuse to let New Yorkers be the next target.

**That’s why my team set a goal to raise $10,000 before midnight tonight to ensure that I have the resources I need to fight back, so please:

[Will you donate $5 or more now to help me hit my midnight fundraising goal and continue my work for the voiceless and vulnerable?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73807220/439706661/-2022127741?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk887-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzBmMWE0My01MDg5LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=35N1Nh9HBV2wQ_MdS8NuVhKE6KqOcA04kd1g_UB_ynE=)**

name: Ohio Democrats
subject: Happy Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
from all of us here at the Ohio Democratic Party!
| Team, This Thanksgiving, we’re extending gratitude to all of you, who did so much work this year to protect our rights and make us all proud to be Ohioans. **When looking back at this year, there’s quite a lot to be thankful for:** 1\. Together, we just protected reproductive rights and freedoms for Ohioans and stopped a dangerous six-week abortion ban from taking effect. 2\. We re-elected EIGHT rural mayors who will continue the progress we’ve seen across the state and make our communities stronger and safer. 3\. Our Congressional delegation in DC continues fighting every day to keep making progress for the American people. 4\. And of course our favorite U.S. Senator Sherrod Brown shows us that there’s no challenge too difficult if it’s a worthwhile cause to working Ohioans. All that to say, we’re enormously thankful to supporters like you. **Without your willingness to step up when Ohio Democrats need a hand, we wouldn’t have so many reasons to enjoy the season.** We hope you take the time with family and loved ones to reflect on all your hard work in our critical fight to ensure progress for Ohio. And rest up for the fights we have ahead of us – next year and beyond. Happy Thanksgiving from all of us here at the Ohio Democratic Party! Ohio Democrats ** ** | ****Control of the House and Senate in 2024 runs right through Ohio. clean_body: from all of us here at the Ohio Democratic Party! | Team, This Thanksgiving, we’re extending gratitude to all of you, who did so much work this year to protect our rights and make us all proud to be Ohioans. When looking back at this year, there’s quite a lot to be thankful for: 1\. Together, we just protected reproductive rights and freedoms for Ohioans and stopped a dangerous six-week abortion ban from taking effect. 2\. We re-elected EIGHT rural mayors who will continue the progress we’ve seen across the state and make our communities stronger and safer. 3\. Our Congressional delegation in DC continues fighting every day to keep making progress for the American people. 4\. And of course our favorite U.S. Senator Sherrod Brown shows us that there’s no challenge too difficult if it’s a worthwhile cause to working Ohioans. All that to say, we’re enormously thankful to supporters like you. Without your willingness to step up when Ohio Democrats need a hand, we wouldn’t have so many reasons to enjoy the season. We hope you take the time with family and loved ones to reflect on all your hard work in our critical fight to ensure progress for Ohio. And rest up for the fights we have ahead of us – next year and beyond. Happy Thanksgiving from all of us here at the Ohio Democratic Party! I'm reaching out with urgent concerns about the escalating rhetoric from former President Donald Trump as he intensifies his political activities.
_**In a recent speech in New Hampshire, Trump used the term "vermin" to describe political opponents - whom he claimed “lie and steal and cheat on elections.”**_
This choice of language is alarming, irresponsible, and dangerous. It’s a historically charged term, used in the past by authoritarian leaders who encouraged the view that their opponents were rodents worthy of extermination.
_We can’t take this lightly. It isn’t just playful trash-talking. It’s a potential incitement to violence, and it not only risks the safety of real people, but it undermines the principles of democracy._
As Secretary of State, I feel a responsibility to address this issue directly.

name: John James
subject: The Situation is Dire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for Michigan
body:
| | | Fellow Patriot, I need your help right now, because my situation is dire.

My name is John James. I'm a Christian, conservative combat veteran who's running a grassroots campaign to bring strong leadership back to Washington, DC.

I volunteered to fly Apache helicopters in Iraq because I wanted to defend our freedom. Now, I'm serving AGAIN to save our country from the radical socialists.

I know you're just like me. You want to see the best for our nation. That's why it's critical that we prevent the Democrats from buying our election.

**Radical Leftists in the Beltway are planning to spend MILLIONS to silence me. They don 't want another black conservative voice speaking out against their hypocrisy.** **[_If I 'm going to defeat their Marxist agenda, I'm going to need a lot of help. That's why I'm humbly asking for your support._](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=37c13825093a4804b1e734d8b27c02c8&_e=YY_u6Y6RvVOdIhQFdSimXYDSn16On7UkjppCVmJLa_YoCd8ldmT53LWqvRyg_8Gq-uP5RKZaFC17dqaA13dO_zVRhoVRoGEhSlwHTTqUkRhUn-pq1sfqHNbqweGT9c7ki7OS-MB6MEZ_lZaBQoOBoDg4iqyPsz_lrZcIX45VRZka45LoAZ1zxb1R50W-kqZ8AHUNZVOpWpj5r4y2fgyXvn2K1-G-B8-I6H9l4cNot7SdTx7Il4ovvVxGlI0XW-5-1Ha3wPDMcU3nFN_l0ROpLNEtBCPLf4pe2pIinr2uUwNE1rFL294esuYKAQziq7n2IuXvxe9L4YXQ1if4blJCZcU3ggXji_q-IPhOkDjIXUkrfMWkOjgduEqydQ7Ecw106CoX8OVswvmRrkjxvS5PqpXfwdF-5UCYUAPoIIhPYIYgEVu3cZMhF11OaiIf4BtV)**

[**PITCH IN NOW TO HELP A FORMER APACHE PILOT**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=37c13825093a4804b1e734d8b27c02c8&_e=YY_u6Y6RvVOdIhQFdSimXYDSn16On7UkjppCVmJLa_YoCd8ldmT53LWqvRyg_8Gq-uP5RKZaFC17dqaA13dO_zVRhoVRoGEhSlwHTTqUkRhUn-pq1sfqHNbqweGT9c7ki7OS-MB6MEZ_lZaBQoOBoDg4iqyPsz_lrZcIX45VRZka45LoAZ1zxb1R50W-kqZ8AHUNZVOpWpj5r4y2fgyXvn2K1-G-B8-I6H9l4cNot7SdTx7Il4ovvVxGlI0XW-5-1Ha3wPDMcU3nFN_l0ROpLPGFI-XLPiPxT5TYhNhX2bADB41gel0or65B0vsPyY5BJ2R5-06zY6CrXBG1B4hkoF33oZiy73STy8LrxuITQQz2J0rik6P-_fsq7gwQ3gYS7-W5bbmsvFDA_C7uA3o-2L0divZdy-FcvHwaFndMQ55Ldf2DiMnkGts3QvlJV9_w)
---
My last election was decided by **1,600 votes**. The Democrat Establishment almost took me down, but with the support of patriots like you, **_I was victorious_**. We might not be so lucky next time. clean_body: | | | Fellow Patriot, I need your help right now, because my situation is dire. My name is John James. I'm a Christian, conservative combat veteran who's running a grassroots campaign to bring strong leadership back to Washington, DC. I volunteered to fly Apache helicopters in Iraq because I wanted to defend our freedom. Now, I'm serving AGAIN to save our country from the radical socialists. I know you're just like me. You want to see the best for our nation. That's why it's critical that we prevent the Democrats from buying our election. Radical Leftists in the Beltway are planning to spend MILLIONS to silence me. They don 't want another black conservative voice speaking out against their hypocrisy. My last election was decided by 1,600 votes. The Democrat Establishment almost took me down, but with the support of patriots like you, I was victorious. We might not be so lucky next time. The Democrats have already confirmed that they're doubling down. I need to level with you, if we don't get support soon, we may have to throw in the towel. All I'm asking is this: could you pitch in just a few bucks today so we can have the support needed to carry us through the finish line? Peter, we wanted to drop a quick note before the Thanksgiving holiday.
The truth is, our grassroots fundraising slows down significantly during the holiday season. Supporters like you are spending time with your loved ones, not your inboxes, and that’s how it should be!
But national Republicans are not pausing their efforts to attack Bob, flip Pennsylvania’s seat, and take back the Senate. So we’ll respectfully ask you this:
**[Will you make your first donation to Bob Casey today before the holiday so we can keep our campaign on track?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231122-1?refcode=em20231122-1&refcode2=1201_552475_Wu11DJ&akid=1201%2E552475%2EWu11DJ)**

Team Casey

name: HER Time
subject: A real shot at codifying the Equal Rights Amendment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73807736/439708054/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20231122_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGJmMmY5YTktNTA4OS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZzMIvw34bxrO4NOqBc1BDdEn_D9ATllbfCC2LYloeVg=)
---
Peter, this year, we’re grateful for FINALLY seeing movement on passing the Equal Rights Amendment! A group of Congressional women have introduced a joint resolution to codify the Equal Rights Amendment into the Constitution after 100 years. The Equal Rights Amendment would guarantee equal rights under the law regardless of sex. The vast majority of Americans support this amendment, and it’s been ratified by the required 38 states needed to amend the Constitution. Now, this resolution recently introduced in Congress would circumvent the arbitrary deadline set many years ago so we could FINALLY see equal rights under the law — a game changer for reproductive rights and gender equality. [_**We’ll need a flood of support to see this passed through Congress. The Equal Rights Amendment would guarantee equal rights under the law regardless of sex. The vast majority of Americans support this amendment, and it’s been ratified by the required 38 states needed to amend the Constitution. Now, this resolution recently introduced in Congress would circumvent the arbitrary deadline set many years ago so we could FINALLY see equal rights under the law — a game changer for reproductive rights and gender equality. | This is a huge moment, team. # [Idaho's Medicaid Beast: Who Fed the Monster That's Eating Our State?](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1577141&post_id=136270646&utm_source=cross-post&utm_campaign=2114823&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM2MjcwNjQ2LCJpYXQiOjE3MDA2NjkyNDQsImV4cCI6MTcwMzI2MTI0NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE1NzcxNDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.dliAbv36UNbJ1JhXtwemFytEE_P3pb_4lLjTd_BqDek)

---
| | [](https://substack..-hxLDVXr610Tbi1_3F1_6f1bzuz4JyUuW_HgkLQgOmM?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/idahofreedomcaucus/p/idahos-medicaid-beast-who-fed-the?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store)
---
Idaho's got a beast on its hands, and it's growing out of control.
This beast is Medicaid, and it's feasting on our budget, ready to gobble up everything in its path. The alarming part? The Idaho Main Street Caucus not only ignored the problem but also fed this monster by voting for [HOUSE BILL 369](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/761a2859-82e1-40e8-8dbf-599bccf6edd7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
While the Governor may be bragging about the Idaho economy... _the situation is dire._
Alex Adams, the governor's right-hand man, even admitted that our students are paying the price for this out-of-control spending.
The evidence is clear, and here are the slides to prove it:
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/df572303-7d81-4dd5-9aef-a424f3163ddf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/6d8df241-42b4-45ca-9571-05f4b1fe0d1a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/20b6aa46-2df6-4085-a047-8066a2d96307?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Other states like Nebraska and Utah, which have managed care Medicaid, are also seeing their costs go through the roof. The real problem here isn't how we manage it;_it's how much we're spending._
The Cato Institute made this point explicitly in [a submitted comment](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/fe156f1e-77da-4d43-acc6-13aca180fa4b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to the 2023 Medicaid Managed Care Task Force:
_" Managed care providers often control costs by imposing copayments and deductibles on plan members. These forms of patient responsibility make members think twice before seeing a provider or visiting a hospital emergency room. But, per federal law, copayments and deductibles are generally not permitted under Medicaid."_
And while The Idaho Freedom Caucus tried to stop this train wreck, _all but ONE_ member of the Main Street Caucus voted to push it through.
Now, what can we do to tame this Medicaid beast before it devours Idaho completely?
Here are some simple ways to do it:
1. **Kick Out the Folks Who Don't Belong:** If they're not eligible for Medicaid, they shouldn't be on it. Let's clean up the list.
2. **Check What We're Paying For:** We need a full look at what healthcare providers are charging. No more shady billing.
3. **Control What Gets Prescribed:** Let's decide for ourselves what drugs are covered, not let someone else tell us what we have to pay for.

We're facing a crisis, and we can't just sit back and watch the Medicaid beast continue to grow.
Town halls and taskforces are window-dressing.
_What we need to do is slay the beast._
It's time to stand up, call out those who led us into this mess, and bring some common-sense solutions to the table.
We need to act now, or this beast will eat all of Idaho.
_______________________________

Follow us on **[Twitter](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/90654c69-77f3-419c-a955-b571c8a0ba4f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and **[Facebook](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/c5dcecb5-82fc-49a3-9ca1-978643c5dfae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).**

Senate Pro Tempore Chuck Winder doubled down on his authoritarian stance by abruptly removing Senator Brian Lenney from his Vice Chair position on the Commerce and Human Resources Committee. The decision, delivered via email, lacked clear justification or prior dialogue, casting doubt on the fairness and openness of the process. (See letter below.)
[Pledge your support](https://substack..RzfoOTpdcSQqxIL3WqFN2cViJvGgZSWePlukUOEVt18?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=138902770)
This is the third instance where Senator Winder has targeted the speech of Idaho Freedom Caucus members with little reason or evidence. It appears that Winder's continued harassment is based on our members' more conservative political perspectives. He seems to be attacking any legislator who resists his intimidation and bullying tactics.
Winder's latest actions reveal a troubling pattern--unilaterally disciplining Senators critical of Idaho's spending increases and reliance on federal debt. Timed at the onset of an election season with numerous contested races, his behavior raises concerns about his attempts to influence the electoral process.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/3d56cd8f-de7d-49ed-a2f6-2633ecc38ba0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Senator Lenney stated emphatically, "I haven't had a conversation with Senator Winder in over seven months, and without warning or detailed reasoning, this news lands in my inbox. Let's be clear: Senator Winder is neither my boss nor my dad. I serve the people, not Senator Winder. I remain committed to standing up for conservative principles and opposing any power play that seeks to silence and control me or my votes in the Senate."
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1577141&post_id=138902770&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM4OTAyNzcwLCJpYXQiOjE3MDA2NjkyNTYsImV4cCI6MTcwMzI2MTI1NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE1NzcxNDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.2vzv87e-kV8t016ymwYwpZXmAELfTMVyyCgG6-Zhhl4)
The Idaho Freedom Caucus opposes Winder's authoritarian tactics, aiming to enforce a single narrative and stifle debate. Using his leadership position to penalize opposition raises concerns. Even though we disagree with Senator Winder's tactics, we expect these disagreements will not hinder our proposed legislation.
The Idaho Freedom Caucus remains undeterred. Our dedication to Idaho's people and principles of transparency and accountability remains unshaken.
**Your support is instrumental in our fight to safeguard the principles that make Idaho great.** As we face challenges from these authoritarian tactics, your contribution becomes a powerful statement for conservative values. A donation of $50, $100, or any amount you can give will help us continue standing up for the people of Idaho. Join us in securing a future where conservative principles thrive.
**Please[donate today](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/7cdac73d-8087-47ce-89fa-878b70371115?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to support the Idaho Freedom Caucus and the values we hold dear.**

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/idahofreedomcaucus/p/debunking-the-disagree-better-delusion?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store)
---
Governors Jared Polis (CO) and Spencer Cox (UT), backed by a cheering squad from the National Governors Association, are out peddling their shiny new toy, the "Disagree Better" initiative.
Sounds nice, right? Like a sitcom full of handshakes and hugs. But let's get real - it's about as believable as finding a unicorn munching on your front lawn. They're basically telling us freedom fighters to holster our weapons in the middle of a firefight. But they're forgetting what being free truly means. We're Americans - we don't hold back, we say it straight, no chaser, and we thrive in the rough and tumble of passionate debates.
Thanks for reading! Please subscribe to receive new posts.
[Pledge your support](https://substack..N8gBooVFBNJKJ40s0SjHjSK1lQInOGw-aNut-DVcORE?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=135630672)
Now, our leaders - they're not there to win the popularity contest. They're supposed to be like the captains of our ship, guiding us through a sea of clashing views. They stick to their guns, fight for their values, and don't exchange their principles for a few moments of peace.
So when Polis starts preaching about "civil conversations," it's like suggesting a tea break during a boxing match. Sure, we all love a bit of politeness, but when it becomes a roadblock to doing what's right, that's where we draw the line.
Check this out - a recent CNN poll shows a Grand Canyon-sized divide among Americans politically. And some are treating it like the end of the world. But honestly? It just proves how resilient and independent we are. It's a testament to our disagreeable spirit. And it shows that we're in the heat of the action and holding our leaders accountable (not just idly standing on the sidelines waving flags).
Elections should be a ruthless clash of beliefs and ideologies, not a lazy river ride toward an open goal. But here's the kicker - even as they're singing "Kumbaya," both governors are stirring the pot on some sensitive topics.
Take Cox's pro-life stance in Utah or Polis's endorsement of abortion and gender surgeries. They're throwing punches in the political ring while pretending they'd rather have a peaceful picnic. Talk about hypocrisy!
So instead of urging people to "disagree better," how about we inspire them to stand up for their beliefs with guts, guile, and a dash of grit?
Because freedom isn't about organizing a tea party for identical ideas; it's an arena where the strongest beliefs reign supreme. It's the tug-of-war that drives a free society.
So let's not call for a time-out. Let's crank up the volume and charge forward. Because that's what real, vibrant, free societies are made of.
_______________________________

Follow us on **[Twitter](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/5561e536-605a-4997-9233-fbcad45f6f5a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and **[Facebook](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/51bcf386-e537-489f-b297-c70bfc18c17e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).**

clean_body: | | ---|---|--- | | | | | cross-posted a post from ---|---|--- | | | Brian LenneyNov 22 Nampa's No-nonsense Senator Brian Lenney ---|---|--- Agree to disagree, or, fight for what's right? by Senator Brian Lenney | | | Nov 22 | | | | | | | | | | | | Governors Jared Polis (CO) and Spencer Cox (UT), backed by a cheering squad from the National Governors Association, are out peddling their shiny new toy, the "Disagree Better" initiative. Sounds nice, right? Like a sitcom full of handshakes and hugs. But let's get real - it's about as believable as finding a unicorn munching on your front lawn. They're basically telling us freedom fighters to holster our weapons in the middle of a firefight. But they're forgetting what being free truly means. We're Americans - we don't hold back, we say it straight, no chaser, and we thrive in the rough and tumble of passionate debates. Thanks for reading! Please subscribe to receive new posts. Now, our leaders - they're not there to win the popularity contest. They're supposed to be like the captains of our ship, guiding us through a sea of clashing views. They stick to their guns, fight for their values, and don't exchange their principles for a few moments of peace. So when Polis starts preaching about "civil conversations," it's like suggesting a tea break during a boxing match. Sure, we all love a bit of politeness, but when it becomes a roadblock to doing what's right, that's where we draw the line. Check this out - a recent CNN poll shows a Grand Canyon-sized divide among Americans politically. And some are treating it like the end of the world. But honestly? It just proves how resilient and independent we are. It's a testament to our disagreeable spirit. And it shows that we're in the heat of the action and holding our leaders accountable (not just idly standing on the sidelines waving flags). Elections should be a ruthless clash of beliefs and ideologies, not a lazy river ride toward an open goal. But here's the kicker - even as they're singing "Kumbaya," both governors are stirring the pot on some sensitive topics. Take Cox's pro-life stance in Utah or Polis's endorsement of abortion and gender surgeries. They're throwing punches in the political ring while pretending they'd rather have a peaceful picnic. Talk about hypocrisy! So instead of urging people to "disagree better," how about we inspire them to stand up for their beliefs with guts, guile, and a dash of grit? Because freedom isn't about organizing a tea party for identical ideas; it's an arena where the strongest beliefs reign supreme. It's the tug-of-war that drives a free society. So let's not call for a time-out. Let's crank up the volume and charge forward. Because that's what real, vibrant, free societies are made of. Here are some ways you can help the Idaho Freedom Caucus: Share this substack to help others stay informed on what's happening. Follow us on and . Get to know our members and support them. Donate to our . Thanks for joining us in the fight to keep Idaho free!** | | | | | | | | Originally posted on | | | | Freedom Caucus ---|---|--- | ? The Idaho Freedom Caucus is a dedicated group of principled, proven state legislators who consistently uphold their conservative values and beliefs. Stay informed on key issues they're working on through this Substack. (C) 2023 Brian Lenney ? ?

For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors.
