clean_body: forward | Hey — The other day, my team sent around asking what you think of Marsha Blackburn... and, y’all, folks were fired up. It’s clear that Tennesseans (and people across the country) believe that Marsha is the WRONG choice to represent us in the Senate. For two decades in Washington, she’s served her special-interest donors while abandoning the rest of us. I’m a retired teacher, and I’d give Marsha a failing grade for the work she’s shown. I want to make sure that you have the chance to rate her performance, too. | Thanks, Gloria Johnson \----Original Message---- From: Marsha Blackburn Accountability Project [via Gloria Johnson] Date: Nov 8, 2023 Subject: RATE MARSHA BLACKBURN Senator Marsha Blackburn has spent 21 years in Washington “serving” Tennessee. In that time, she’s FAILED to make any substantive progress on the issues our state faces. She’s leading the assault against women’s reproductive freedoms in the Senate. She voted for Donald Trump’s tax cuts for corporations and the wealthy — at the expense of the middle class. And she helped block the Expanded Child Tax Credit, legislation that kept kids from going hungry. She’s clearly not working for us. So, who does she serve? Corporations and special interests like the gun lobby. We think Marsha’s just plain wrong for our state, but we want to hear from you. Can you take two seconds to grade Marsha’s job performance in Washington? | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thanks for your input, Team Gloria | Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. Gloria for Tennessee 73 White Bridge Rd #103-353 Nashville, TN 37205

subject: The West is the Best — Idaho at War

The battle lines are drawn...
# [The West is the Best -- Idaho at War](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1577141&post_id=123768886&utm_source=cross-post&utm_campaign=2114823&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTIzNzY4ODg2LCJpYXQiOjE3MDA2NjkyNzUsImV4cCI6MTcwMzI2MTI3NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE1NzcxNDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.mQ3-38XsatORryN9Onrohz6RYy1wEX-tR6pvLCoMHwg)
### If we let go of the rope by embracing ranked-choice voting and open primaries, Idaho will inevitably become San Francisco. The Idaho Freedom Caucus will hold the line.
| | [Idaho Freedom Caucus](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/01fdddcc-1f1f-4a6e-bdd2-baffe35c6f74?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

| Nov 22
---
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/01fdddcc-1f1f-4a6e-bdd2-baffe35c6f74?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1577141&post_id=123768886&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTIzNzY4ODg2LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTcwMDY2OTI3NSwiZXhwIjoxNzAzMjYxMjc1LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTU3NzE0MSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.-9w9XvQkMlFAq44_f5mGB5T37Fzuce23_xDt2caxTaA&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1577141&post_id=123768886&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTIzNzY4ODg2LCJpYXQiOjE3MDA2NjkyNzUsImV4cCI6MTcwMzI2MTI3NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE1NzcxNDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.mQ3-38XsatORryN9Onrohz6RYy1wEX-tR6pvLCoMHwg)

---
**Liberals in Idaho are determined to seize control and are aggressively advocating for a drastic change in the primary election process**. They are pushing a ballot initiative to implement a complex "jungle primary" system, where the four candidates with the highest votes from any party advance to the general election. This intricate and confusing voting scheme is designed to manipulate our elections and keep voters from making informed choices.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/1f612299-5d9c-4c46-ace8-69ff1139a22c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Conservatives are fighting back and the media elites don 't like it.** Recently the uber-liberal Lewison Tribune published the opinion piece, [What scares Labrador, Moon and Lenney?](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/89fbe1e1-f0c2-43a1-9bc0-738027d1b04b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Marty Trillhaase asked the question, "What are you afraid of?"
Thanks for reading Idaho Freedom Caucus Substack! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work.
[Pledge your support](https://substack..CURTiKTSH6dTpEOmzrMXduc_i0SCMRjMuC_L-kZd8u4?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=123768886)
### Freedom Caucus member Senator Brian Lenney answers.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/93917b2a-1d98-4002-ba1c-5f119f7d9985?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Regarding the piece published Sunday, titled "What scares Labrador, Moon, and Lenney?" I'd like to answer.
But I'd like to answer it with another, more appropriate question, as the only thing I'm truly "scared" of is the Lord God Almighty (e.g. Luke 12:4).
So in the vein of the late Francis Schaeffer, I ask: How should we then live? Or, even better: What type of society is best? Ask the question that way. Now we're talking.
To be clear, this is about the culture. **We 're in a culture war** and there are four types of people involved:
Those who know it's happening.
Those watching it happen.
Those who want to stop it from happening.
And those who at the end will be wondering -- what happened?
As the venerable Pat Buchanan said to the Republican National Convention in 1992, **this is a "war ... for the soul of America**." And Idaho is on the front lines.
Buchanan went on to say this "is about who we are. It is about what we believe, and what we stand for as Americans. **There is a religious war going on in this country. It is a cultural war, as critical to the kind of nation we shall be as was the Cold War itself.** "
Fast forward 31 years and we see**the battle lines etched in flames like never before.**
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/3ac6a26e-883c-4bc3-82b8-d6e947f96d60?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Those seeking to turn Idaho into the next blue hell hole are working diligently to destroy what we 've worked so hard to preserve -- the Idaho way of life.**
When faced with the question "what society is best?" -- the answer is simple. Idahoans want to live in a state where their children are educated, not indoctrinated; where elections are free and fair; where traditional family values still exist; where law and order actually mean something; where sacrificing babies on the altar of Molech is unthinkable; where the legalization of drugs that hurt our society and our kids while tearing at our very foundation is not tolerated and where normal, hard-working people come to escape the ravages of liberalism run amok on the West Coast.
**This is why the Idaho State Freedom Caucus is so vital, because the fight is no longer between "left and right." It's between normal people who want to live their lives in freedom and peace, and psychopaths who seek to annihilate every cherished conviction.**
This is why the conservatives, led by the Freedom Caucus, are making this state a place where normal people come for normalcy. Why do you think Idaho is one of the fastest-growing states?
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/8a262746-925d-403d-a29e-9c1fc84650df?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
It's because we're not absolutely irrationally crazy like California. We value traditional families and the innocence of children. We defend the sanctity of life. We embrace the principles of the Idaho GOP platform, and we want our kids to be kids, not slaves, to the transgender woke culture of death.
**Without the Freedom Caucus leading the way, we 're just another purple state on our way to becoming the next Colorado, California or Oregon.**
Bottom line: **Someone has to hold the line** because if we let go of the rope by embracing ranked-choice voting and open primaries (which always favor the more moderate/liberal candidates), Idaho will inevitably become San Francisco.
Can you imagine? Idaho as a place where mentally ill people defecate in the streets, shoot up in front of Walgreens (with their state-supplied drug paraphernalia), and commit violent crimes with impunity?
That is not the Idaho I want to live in.
**So we fight because war is upon us.** And the only question we need to answer before it's answered for us through the left's favorite tool for taking over a state (aka the ballot initiative process) is: Do we want Idaho to become the next California? Because that's where we're headed if we allow ranked-choice voting, amnesty for illegal immigrants, the unfettered slaughter of Idahoan babies through abortion, and the legalization of drugs in our state.
Now I ask you: How should we then live? What type of society is best? Will you stand with us?
**Will you join the Idaho State Freedom Caucus as we hold the line? The time is now.** Let us march forward, with unwavering determination and unyielding hope, toward a future where Idaho's spirit shines ever brighter.
**For Idaho, for liberty and for generations to come, let us answer the call and make our mark upon history.**
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/1457e3f7-1c53-4577-9654-233a4e46bf9b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

This is why the conservatives, led by the Freedom Caucus, are making this state a place where normal people come for normalcy. Why do you think Idaho is one of the fastest-growing states? | | ---|---|--- It's because we're not absolutely irrationally crazy like California. We value traditional families and the innocence of children. We defend the sanctity of life. We embrace the principles of the Idaho GOP platform, and we want our kids to be kids, not slaves, to the transgender woke culture of death. Without the Freedom Caucus leading the way, we 're just another purple state on our way to becoming the next Colorado, California or Oregon. Bottom line: Someone has to hold the line because if we let go of the rope by embracing ranked-choice voting and open primaries (which always favor the more moderate/liberal candidates), Idaho will inevitably become San Francisco. Can you imagine? Idaho as a place where mentally ill people defecate in the streets, shoot up in front of Walgreens (with their state-supplied drug paraphernalia), and commit violent crimes with impunity? That is not the Idaho I want to live in. So we fight because war is upon us. And the only question we need to answer before it's answered for us through the left's favorite tool for taking over a state (aka the ballot initiative process) is: Do we want Idaho to become the next California? Because that's where we're headed if we allow ranked-choice voting, amnesty for illegal immigrants, the unfettered slaughter of Idahoan babies through abortion, and the legalization of drugs in our state. Now I ask you: How should we then live? What type of society is best? Will you stand with us? Will you join the Idaho State Freedom Caucus as we hold the line? The time is now. Let us march forward, with unwavering determination and unyielding hope, toward a future where Idaho's spirit shines ever brighter. For Idaho, for liberty and for generations to come, let us answer the call and make our mark upon history.** | | ---|---|--- Thanks for reading the Idaho Freedom Caucus Substack! Subscribe to receive new posts and support the cause. | | | | | | | | Originally posted on | | | | Freedom Caucus ---|---|--- | ? The Idaho Freedom Caucus is a dedicated group of principled, proven state legislators who consistently uphold their conservative values and beliefs. Stay informed on key issues they're working on through this Substack. (C) 2023 Brian Lenney ? ?

name: Jon Tester
subject: re: radio ads
disclaimer_text: paid for by a super PAC supporting Mitch McConnell’s handpicked candidate
body:
My finance team let me know we set a fundraising goal to raise $250,000 to respond to radio ads paid for by a super PAC supporting Mitch McConnell’s handpicked candidate.

| Hey Peter,

My finance team let me know we set a fundraising goal to raise $250,000 to respond to radio ads paid for by a super PAC supporting Mitch McConnell’s handpicked candidate.

I’ll cut to the chase: **We’re not on track to meet this goal.**

I’m not here to beg for a donation, but falling short right now has real consequences for our grassroots campaign—especially now that a super PAC is dropping some serious cash on my potential opponent’s behalf.

**I hate asking for money (if I could go without it, I would!), but we can’t afford to be drowned out over the airwaves.**

[_**I’m counting on this grassroots team to help us get in front of this before it’s too late. Click this link or hit one of these buttons below to split a donation between my campaign and Fight for Progress.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73808477/439710852/665036970?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2023-11-22_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQzZWRlMTcyLTUxODktZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VGT9QEDITfClVKu_9SOIUTtyc2GJhYaezvmbflxuo08=)

[](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxEj7FuhDAMhp_GbCDikOQYGNoiOnW8W6tAHIiOHCiEVvTpq6BTu_7f59-29uvs7NGAegXEyZkNEIG_AOIe-U1frx_hyM1Plb-LG44J4hsgxmOlP_NZUpDXbk6pajPTVKiZHTJqmCpLKWuhZDY1pUWlhaqYsAJJ1DXToifZC8MvZSVU5hoskTOGyCRDwQpe60uFhEoNxsqeoCrPRYUNRHFyjzsFo918FMPis7mZYly387AOsNto2AMV-kFmickA7JY7kSVPxukxLPsK2M26z01wX5T7Pl888G6P_nNb9jAQ8PYfM0CZUJrePfA2NZ7JoP2q3fgA3vr-mUUKybHRsCw0Zv128-w2qaAqx_OHYfG_AQAA___fwHkY)

Our undercover journalists have exposed something terrifying that could impact the health of everyone in America . . . **if not the world.**

Before we release this one, we have mounting costs from coast-to-coast travel to covering our bases with legal reviews of our content.

Before midnight tonight, I have to raise $46,300 to break even and cover our operational costs.

**[Will you pitch in and help us today?](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxEj7FuhDAMhp_GbCDikOQYGNoiOnW8W6tAHIiOHCiEVvTpq6BTu_7f59-29uvs7NGAegXEyZkNEIG_AOIe-U1frx_hyM1Plb-LG44J4hsgxmOlP_NZUpDXbk6pajPTVKiZHTJqmCpLKWuhZDY1pUWlhaqYsAJJ1DXToifZC8MvZSVU5hoskTOGyCRDwQpe60uFhEoNxsqeoCrPRYUNRHFyjzsFo918FMPis7mZYly387AOsNto2AMV-kFmickA7JY7kSVPxukxLPsK2M26z01wX5T7Pl888G6P_nNb9jAQ8PYfM0CZUJrePfA2NZ7JoP2q3fgA3vr-mUUKybHRsCw0Zv128-w2qaAqx_OHYfG_AQAA___fwHkY)**

There are a few reasons why newsrooms around the country have stopped doing investigative journalism. The first is the massive cost.

Most journalists today always stay in the comfort of their office. They gather reports from the Internet, make a few calls, and regurgitate news already cycling around the web.

It's lazy and serves no purpose other than clickbait for ad dollars for these big corporations who control the news.

At OMG, we're not doing that. Not even close.

We have teams of journalists deployed at nearly any given moment. The planning of our investigations is extraordinary. We will contact hundreds, if not thousands, of potential sources to find THE right one.

And then the filming starts!

The phone bill for our "swiping" campaign alone is thousands of dollars each month to maintain connections on arrays of phones we use to locate and communicate with sources.

The bills keep coming in, and we must be a team to keep going. **[You support OMG](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxEj7FuhDAMhp_GbCDikOQYGNoiOnW8W6tAHIiOHCiEVvTpq6BTu_7f59-29uvs7NGAegXEyZkNEIG_AOIe-U1frx_hyM1Plb-LG44J4hsgxmOlP_NZUpDXbk6pajPTVKiZHTJqmCpLKWuhZDY1pUWlhaqYsAJJ1DXToifZC8MvZSVU5hoskTOGyCRDwQpe60uFhEoNxsqeoCrPRYUNRHFyjzsFo918FMPis7mZYly387AOsNto2AMV-kFmickA7JY7kSVPxukxLPsK2M26z01wX5T7Pl888G6P_nNb9jAQ8PYfM0CZUJrePfA2NZ7JoP2q3fgA3vr-mUUKybHRsCw0Zv128-w2qaAqx_OHYfG_AQAA___fwHkY), and we produce for you to get the truth to the public.**

We're not beholden to advertisers or ANY interests that will silence or dilute our reporting.

Friend, I have an unspoken agreement between you and a small group of other Americans who support my work. It's simple: **you support our reporting and truth in our integrity, and we work tirelessly to expose the truth.**

**[Will you chip in today to help me reach my goal by midnight tonight?](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxEj7FuhDAMhp_GbCDikOQYGNoiOnW8W6tAHIiOHCiEVvTpq6BTu_7f59-29uvs7NGAegXEyZkNEIG_AOIe-U1frx_hyM1Plb-LG44J4hsgxmOlP_NZUpDXbk6pajPTVKiZHTJqmCpLKWuhZDY1pUWlhaqYsAJJ1DXToifZC8MvZSVU5hoskTOGyCRDwQpe60uFhEoNxsqeoCrPRYUNRHFyjzsFo918FMPis7mZYly387AOsNto2AMV-kFmickA7JY7kSVPxukxLPsK2M26z01wX5T7Pl888G6P_nNb9jAQ8PYfM0CZUJrePfA2NZ7JoP2q3fgA3vr-mUUKybHRsCw0Zv128-w2qaAqx_OHYfG_AQAA___fwHkY)**

After watching the undercover footage, OMG's latest report has sent shivers up my spine.

It's horrendous stuff going on behind the back of the public, outside of the law, and outside of human decency.

And I'm rushing to package it for the public perfectly so Americans are aware of what's going on behind closed doors.

And this has been an expensive report because of the massive impact.

So please donate as much as you can today so we can cover the costs of this investigation and keep going.

Thank you for your continued support.

In Truth,

James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

name: Katie Porter
subject: re: democratizing the process
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
I know that if you only call on the loudest, highest hands—you will only be hearing the voices of a select few.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=33555%2E3422442%2E9-D4Tf)
Derek,
When my congressional office hosts town halls, nearly everyone there has a question. And as a former teacher, **I know that if you only call on the loudest, highest hands—you will only be hearing the voices of a select few**. Oftentimes those voices skew privileged and powerful.
To make sure everyone’s voices are heard during congressional town halls, my office uses a bingo wheel to call on people at random–we literally democratized the process!
Too often elected officials only hear from the people with the highest, loudest hands–-lobbyists or those with wealth and power and connections. That’s not how our campaign operates.
I want to hear from everyone. That means reaching people in every part of California, from our cities to rural areas, talking with people of all backgrounds and races and ages. While I know I can’t personally talk to every single voter, that doesn’t mean I won’t try. Whether it’s a mom from the opposing water polo team, the cashier at Albertsons, or one of our grassroots supporters who I get to surprise with a thank you call—I love hearing from Californians.
Knocking doors and talking directly with voters is a part of how I won three competitive races in Orange County. clean_body: I know that if you only call on the loudest, highest hands—you will only be hearing the voices of a select few. Derek, When my congressional office hosts town halls, nearly everyone there has a question. And as a former teacher, I know that if you only call on the loudest, highest hands—you will only be hearing the voices of a select few. Oftentimes those voices skew privileged and powerful. To make sure everyone’s voices are heard during congressional town halls, my office uses a bingo wheel to call on people at random–we literally democratized the process! Too often elected officials only hear from the people with the highest, loudest hands–-lobbyists or those with wealth and power and connections. That’s not how our campaign operates. I want to hear from everyone. That means reaching people in every part of California, from our cities to rural areas, talking with people of all backgrounds and races and ages. While I know I can’t personally talk to every single voter, that doesn’t mean I won’t try. Whether it’s a mom from the opposing water polo team, the cashier at Albertsons, or one of our grassroots supporters who I get to surprise with a thank you call—I love hearing from Californians. Knocking doors and talking directly with voters is a part of how I won three competitive races in Orange County. Now, your contributions are helping us run our campaign to reach and hear from all Californians. Thanks for being a part of Team Porter! Katie Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma.

body:
We’re so proud of this, Peter.
#
Peter — this is our average donation so far in November:
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39353?refcode=em20231122-4234&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4234%2E614464%2EkoqOKP)
Thanks to grassroots supporters like you in Missouri + all across the country, we’ve built a record-breaking people-powered movement to defeat Josh Hawley, elect Lucas Kunce, and take back this U.S. Senate seat for working Missourians.
Whether you responded to an email like this one, saw one of our Facebook ads, got one of our texts, or even just visited our website, small-dollar support from real people like you plays a critical role in setting our entire campaign up for success — especially considering Lucas’ commitment to rejecting donations from corporate PACs and Big Oil + Big Pharma execs.
Lucas + our whole team are so thankful that you’ve always had our back, Peter. **But here’s why we still need your help:**
National Republicans and corporate mega-donors are doing everything they can to keep Missouri’s Senate seat under their thumb. They’ve already spent millions to prop up Hawley’s campaign and keep up their desperate attacks about Lucas.
So if we’re going to be able to continue fighting back and getting Lucas’ message in front of every Missouri voter between now and Election Day, we have no choice but to keep up this grassroots momentum. **That’s why we’re asking:**

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Another vile Trump attack
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=4534%2E5257348%2ExGzDWP ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, Donald
Trump leveled yet another vile personal attack against me this weekend at
an Iowa campaign rally, riling up his crowd and online MAGA supporters,
and here’s why it matters:

California’s Republican presidential primary and our Senate primary
elections both fall on Super Tuesday, March 5. Trump’s legions of MAGA
supporters are all eligible to vote in our Senate primary election. We
will have to respond to Trump’s lies and attacks by then.

So before I share the ugly details, [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2023_abs_em.uaqk5d&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20231122_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=1004&akid=4534%2E5257348%2ExGzDWP ]will you rush a contribution of
$3 or
anything you can afford to help my campaign fight back and respond?

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2023_abs_em.uaqk5d&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20231122_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=4534%2E5257348%2ExGzDWP ]Trump at a rally yelling into a microphone, calling Adam 'Adam Shifty
Schiff'

“Adam Shifty Schiff, with a neck like a pencil. I said, how does he hold
up that fat, ugly face, with a neck — Pencil Neck. We call him Pencil
Neck. What a dishonest guy.”

Derek, I
have to tell you — being accused of dishonesty (let alone a fat ugly face)
by none other than Donald Trump is a badge of honor that I will always
wear proudly. Because it shows he is afraid of me. And he should be. I
hold him accountable and don’t let him run over me like he does so many
others.

But this is bigger than just me. Trump loathes being held accountable to
the Constitution and our democracy, and he lashes out against anyone who
will defend them.

His attacks on me, on judges and prosecutors, on the press, are an attack
on our entire constitutional order of government, and with California’s 22
million registered voters preparing to vote on Super Tuesday, we cannot
let Trump’s attack go unanswered.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2023_abs_em.uaqk5d&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20231122_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=4534%2E5257348%2ExGzDWP ]So
Derek,
rush a contribution of any amount to my Senate campaign to help me respond
to Trump’s latest vile personal attack. I need you with me today.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=nov2023_abs_em.5RW9ow&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20231122_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=1007&akid=4534%2E5257348%2ExGzDWP ]EXPRESS DONATE

$10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=nov2023_abs_em.5RW9ow&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20231122_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=25&t=1009&akid=4534%2E5257348%2ExGzDWP ]EXPRESS DONATE
$25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=nov2023_abs_em.5RW9ow&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20231122_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=50&t=1010&akid=4534%2E5257348%2ExGzDWP ]EXPRESS DONATE
$50

Trump would not attack me so often if he wasn’t terrified of seeing me
elected as California’s next U.S. Senator.

With your support today, we’ll make his worst fears come true — and ensure
that neither he nor any other demagogue can damage our democracy the way

— Adam

name: Team Warren
subject: A few Thanksgiving conversation starters for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=1830%2E4032634%2EjNVQom)
---
Happy Thanksgiving-eve. We hope that wherever you are for the holiday, the food is good, the company is warm, and you're enjoying cherished traditions. Thanksgiving can mean time with people you don't see very often — and sometimes that makes for a tough political conversation. With the critical 2024 elections coming up, we wanted to share a few festive ways to navigate those conversations:
* 1% of the family shouldn't get 99% of the pie. We're done with an economy that only works for a thinner and thinner slice at the top.
* Everyone should do their fair share — bring a dish, set the table, clean up, or for any billionaires at your table, pay their fair share in taxes.
* While watching some football, talk about the importance of a level playing field for everyone playing the game. It wouldn’t be fair if one team was paying off the refs, and corporate interests shouldn’t pay off politicians, either.
* While the kids convene at the kids table this year, take the chance to remind everyone how great universal child care would be! It’s like having an affordable and accessible designated kids table all the time.
* If your family game of charades, Scrabble, or backyard football has consequences for people who break the rules, you’re more ethical than the Supreme Court.
* Taking a much-needed nap after a Thanksgiving meal is sort of like taking paid family leave. Everyone deserves it!
* All those Thanksgiving meal ingredients could have cost less at the grocery store if greedy corporations weren't taking advantage of inflation and shutting down competition so they can jack up their prices even higher.
* Whether or not you’re running a traditional Turkey Trot this year, we can all be grateful that the government is running — despite MAGA House Republicans attempting to shut it down these past few months.
* And, it's the perfect time to talk about rooting out Washington corruption over some root vegetables.

We're thankful to have you on this team today and every day. If you find yourself wishing on your wishbone for policies like universal child care, taxing the rich, and ending Washington corruption, you can do more than wish! [**If you’re hungry for big, structural change, donate today to help make these wishes come true.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/986?t=8&akid=1830%2E4032634%2EjNVQom) Wishing you and your family a happy Thanksgiving, Team Warren

With the critical 2024 elections coming up, we wanted to share a few festive ways to navigate those conversations: 1% of the family shouldn't get 99% of the pie. We're done with an economy that only works for a thinner and thinner slice at the top. Everyone should do their fair share — bring a dish, set the table, clean up, or for any billionaires at your table, pay their fair share in taxes. name: Courier Newsroom
subject: Tucker Carlson, Jesse Watters, and Elon Musk
body:
For far too long, right-wing media has used hate and rage to drive profits and ratings.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73809897/439716502/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2RmMTI4NzQtNTQ4OS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8B_Ix0RStHClAK5ffXQ-beRfMXgOZ73nB433jKN8CbA=&emci=a225f5a1-7b88-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=cdf12874-5489-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
Bad actors in right-wing media are using the tragic war in the Middle East as an opportunity to spread hate and division.
First, it was **Jesse Watters** saying he's "had it" with Muslims and Arab-Americans.
Then, it was **Tucker Carlson** accusing Jewish donors of funding calls for "white genocide" on college campuses, doubling down on his longtime obsession with the white nationalist “great replacement” theory.
Now, **Elon Musk** is amplifying anti-Semitic white nationalist posts on his "X" account, prompting advertisers to leave the platform in droves.
**[How did we get here, Peter? We'll get into that in a moment, but if you want to help Courier Newsroom fight back against right-wing hate and provide reliable, fact-based reporting in battleground states, click here to pitch in $5 now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73809898/439716503/-924895372?refcode=em20231122&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2RmMTI4NzQtNTQ4OS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8B_Ix0RStHClAK5ffXQ-beRfMXgOZ73nB433jKN8CbA=)**
**For far too long, right-wing media has used hate and rage to drive profits and ratings.** The more sensationalist, outrageous, and vitriolic their content is, the higher the ratings, clicks, and views. For too long, there has been a **perverse profit incentive** to continue spreading this hate.
**We founded Courier Newsroom to create a meaningful alternative to this hate.** Our journalists report on real issues that impact people's lives. We are committed to the truth and refuse to use our platform to spread hate and division.
Our mission is to strengthen our democracy and communities, not tear them apart. Profits don’t define us because we count on supporters like you to help us continue doing this vital work.
**We’re working to build a revolutionary alternative built on principles, ethics, and, above all else,_the truth._** So far, we have newsrooms in nine states, and we need your help to keep growing.
**[So if you're ready to help us continue to provide reliable, intentional reporting in key battleground states across the country, chip in $5 or any amount you can today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73809900/439716504/-924895372?refcode=em20231122&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2RmMTI4NzQtNTQ4OS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8B_Ix0RStHClAK5ffXQ-beRfMXgOZ73nB433jKN8CbA=)**
[Contribute ➡️](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73809901/439716507/-924895372?refcode=em20231122&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2RmMTI4NzQtNTQ4OS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8B_Ix0RStHClAK5ffXQ-beRfMXgOZ73nB433jKN8CbA=)
Thanks for your support,
The Courier Newsroom Team

Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Thierry=20Tchenko?=
subject: I’m thankful for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tchenko for Texas
body:
This grassroots campaign continues to amaze, delight and overwhelm me | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/812a88dbb48b/a-new-way-forward-for-texas-12663557?e=b8ba94fd9b)
---
Peter,
Just wanted to send a quick note before Thanksgiving hits to let you know how thankful Gloria and I are to have you in our life.
[](https://tchenkofortexas.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93f02de4b9a588e8269491419&id=444f470f7a&e=b8ba94fd9b)
I hope you have a wonderful Thanksgiving filled with great food and surrounded by people you love.
Our campaign is completely grassroots-driven. It is based on the simple notion that the people, when they come together, can defeat the big-money special interests that want to keep us down in the name of corporate profits.
[**If you’re in a position to kick into this grassroots campaign, please do so today.**](https://tchenkofortexas.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=93f02de4b9a588e8269491419&id=624228cd96&e=b8ba94fd9b)
Regardless, have a great Thanksgiving and we’ll see you on the trail soon!
Much love,Thierry

|

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: School choice has momentum in Mississippi
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-11571402?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

**Political change unfolds in three stages. First, when a new idea comes along, they will say that reform is unthinkable. **

Then as the idea starts to take hold, opponents admit that it might be a good idea after all, but it is unfortunately impractical. **Finally, at the third stage they will tell you it was their idea all along.**

**School choice, the idea that we give families control over their child’s education tax dollars, is no longer unthinkable.** Several states, including our neighbor, Arkansas give each child an Education Freedom Account, into which the state pays about $8,000 – 10,000 each year.

Mom and dad are then able to allocate that money to either a public, private or church school of their choice. They are even allowed to use the funds to home school their kids. School choice is now a reality in half a dozen states across America.

**Listen to Corey DeAngelis explain how such a system would work in Mississippi.**
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=330fe16234&e=5703353baa)
---
| One practical objection we are starting to hear is that school choice will not work in rural areas that only have one available local school.

**Surely a lack of options is a reason to extend choice, not to limit it?** If there is only a single school available, all the more important that we allow families to use some of their children’s tax dollars to pay for additional tutoring, or some alternative lessons, on top.

Others object to school choice on the grounds that it would defund public education. **Allowing families to choose their grocery store does not ‘defund’ Walmart. Allowing families to choose their school does not ‘defund’ public schools. **

Since when did those tax dollars belong to the school board bureaucracy? Our tax dollars are there to educate our children. School choice would give every family the opportunity to choose what is best for their children.

**When opponents of parent power claim that giving families control over the money would mean less money for school board bureaucrats, they are making an important admission. They are acknowledging that if they were able to, some families would chose something different. **

Over the coming months, we will hear all kinds of practical excuses advanced against parent power. Do not be discouraged. **Those citing practical objections against parent power are doing so because they have had to abandon any principled opposition. **
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2a3611787f&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _

Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jim=20Walsh?=
subject: Did you hear the great news?
disclaimer_text: paid for by working families - and it** **doesn't actually reduce emissions**
body:
Yesterday, I went from Kent to Tumwater to join the group Let's Go Washington to submit and qualify the first initiative, to repeal the gas tax. | | |
---
| | [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=869e726d3c&e=6a281f566d)
---
| |
---
| Washington Republicans,

Yesterday was a great day for citizens and common-sense voters everywhere in Washington State. Initiative 2117 - **to** **repeal the cap and trade gas tax scheme** \- was filed with the Secretary of State's office.

[_You can click on the video link below to hear from me directly as I went live yesterday from the Sec. of State's office with the_](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=2723ab724f&e=6a281f566d) _[r](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=c777fa9aae&e=6a281f566d)_[ eceipt of filing.](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=77e3737671&e=6a281f566d)

With 90,000 more signatures submitted than what is legally needed, the initiative is well on its way for full qualification and will first head to the legislature in 2024.... **and will most likely not be acted on by the Democrat majority.** This tax scheme was one of their prized accomplishments from the 2021 legislative session.

When the Democrat majority refuses to pass this initiative into law in Olympia, the**initiative will head to a statewide vote on the November ballot.**

A few quick notes before you watch the video below **(the media is already in full-spin mode to defend the Democrat scheme)** :

\- This cap and trade gas tax scheme is what is making Washington's price of living the highest in the nation alongside California.

\- This cap and trade gas tax scheme has created over $1.5 BILLION for Olympia Bureaucrats in this year alone - **paid for by working families - and it** **doesn't actually reduce emissions**. If Democrats were actually successful with their climate programs, Jay Inslee wouldn't have to scrub his website of failures.

\- **It punishes working families and** **doesn't actually reduce emissions** in our state. People still need to drive to work, and go to the grocery store, and drop kids off at school, and heat their homes.

\- **It doesn't just stop at our cars.** It's directly driving up the price of our groceries and other goods in the supply chain. And it is driving up your home utility costs - which is something**Bob Ferguson** wanted to hide from you on your utility bills.
---
| [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=01c0a86540&e=6a281f566d)
---
| [Click to watch the video >>>](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=39fe2a0872&e=6a281f566d "Click to watch the video >>>")
---
| As it is stated in the video, this is just the beginning, not the end.

We have a lot of work to do from now until November to make sure voters understand this scheme and vote to pass this initiative.**This is a common-sense measure** that can restore affordability and help create transparency around the way Democrats build these tax schemes.

[_W_](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=5bf3dfa27d&e=6a281f566d)[ _atch my video and consider contributing to WAGOP efforts today to help us in this fight._](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=bb42737ed8&e=6a281f566d) 2024 is shaping up to be a great year for common-sense.

Sincerely,

Jim Walsh
Chairman
Washington State Republican Party
---
| | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/wsrp/heart-of-the-party-1341704?e=6a281f566d)
---

Hello!
I have some important and exciting news. I am moving the full versions of my exclusive written content over to a pro-free speech platform called Locals, which is partnered with Rumble. First things first, I want to make it very clear that you do not have to cancel your subscription on Substack. Your support will be recognized and honored on Locals, and you'll be able to access all my new content there. All you need to do is complete your Locals profile. If you aren't supporting me on Substack, you can sign up for Locals for free.
Locals is a part of Rumble, and as many of you know, I recently became an Exclusive video content creator on Rumble, where my new show "Loomer Unleashed" is hosted. I hope you have been watching my new show on Rumble, which is LIVE every Tuesday and Thursday at 8 pm EST!
This last Tuesday, November 14th, I interviewed Presidential candidate Vivek Ramaswamy on my show. Two weeks ago, I covered President Trump's rally in Miami, Florida, where he gave me a shout out from the stage. Loomer Unleashed has quickly become the go to show for conservative political commentary and news about many issues, including the 2024 Presidential election, the dysfunction in Congress, and the growing threats of anti-Semitism and Islamic terrorism both in America and around the world. Locals is where you will be able to gain access to my behind the scenes and written content as it relates to Loomer Unleashed.
You do not need to cancel your Substack subscription. Sign in with the same email you use on Substack and your Substack subscription will be recognized in Loomer.Locals.com if you are a paid Substack subscriber.
For paid subscribers, finish creating your account here: [loomer.locals.com/password ](https://substack.com/redirect/d390d51d-c3c3-4a3d-b5f8-b497d42b3c63?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
If you are not a paid subscriber on Substack and want to create an account on Locals, you can do so here at[ loomer.locals.com](https://substack.com/redirect/a6b590b3-eb12-4666-b42b-1fb6802b792c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
You can become a member and create a free account, or a paid account.
If you have any feedback, questions, or need help in setting up your account, please go to
[https://loomer.locals.com/feedback](https://substack.com/redirect/3c46fa55-8bc3-4290-b4ce-ec03336873ef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Thank you for all your support! I am truly thankful for your support.
Happy Thanksgiving!
In Truth,
Laura Loomer

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: I want to catch up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=b5d00f2e0a33d74280c0dc80bd8b6087f9feb9177cf2a02fab6f91b591ca254ed8bea29255da4969722d4debf31d49a314fd5aa07d22f48b77a663110af7c1252963f2324ffdb434cd1fe8f2dfde54ad

🔔 We need to hear from you, Friend.

Ron DeSantis is looking for your response to our 1-question survey:

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=9ac77ec401424050170fcfe58b654c225d79d778205fab1bc1883905ab23cd72738b088bd0e6586d0bd1caa4fb96b69d96f34afc5a0ebd0177e44e9ae4ba86ed

We want to collect at least 500 responses for him.Do you mind taking a moment to be one of them?

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=9ac77ec401424050170fcfe58b654c225d79d778205fab1bc1883905ab23cd72738b088bd0e6586d0bd1caa4fb96b69d96f34afc5a0ebd0177e44e9ae4ba86ed
Respond

Thanks,

Team DeSantis

Team-

Over this holiday season, I know families around the country will be struggling to afford to take time off or put food on the table for their kids. Each day, we're getting closer to the referendum the American people will DEMAND on Joe Biden.

I need you to reach out to the rest of our team today to see the number one problem they need me to address when I get into office. With enough responses, and enough support, we will be approaching an era of our country's history that works for ALL Americans this time next year.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=9ac77ec401424050170fcfe58b654c225d79d778205fab1bc1883905ab23cd72738b088bd0e6586d0bd1caa4fb96b69d96f34afc5a0ebd0177e44e9ae4ba86ed

- Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=9ac77ec40142405088475da46c985a582ab275c773182296f85ec574b02057c1526c094dbef1ce5df679e81dd76f693af77f515f050f7b3c130bd354ee3f5158

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=9ac77ec4014240501046823e39f9c8690ded3e16311370f33d94e215b785634a6f2a98a9cc0a176e7937842ffd6f43dbb686f486ec4344a933d02780b115ed82
here.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=9ac77ec4014240503ebb976a0fa49ff55291905dce0f547f63527978923893834c5e9df55b1b579ee8b3edf4effecdf7d7100b4ac32d166a82fd09a797313891
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=9ac77ec401424050170fcfe58b654c225d79d778205fab1bc1883905ab23cd72738b088bd0e6586d0bd1caa4fb96b69d96f34afc5a0ebd0177e44e9ae4ba86ed

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=9ac77ec401424050170fcfe58b654c225d79d778205fab1bc1883905ab23cd72738b088bd0e6586d0bd1caa4fb96b69d96f34afc5a0ebd0177e44e9ae4ba86ed

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Maria Elvira Salazar
subject: Say no to socialism
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salazar for Congress
body:
| | | Fellow American,

Socialism has failed everywhere it’s been. _But today’s radical Left politicians want to give it one more go at the expense of the American people._ If we let them succeed, our country as we know it will go the way of Cuba and Communist China. **We can’t let that happen.** As the daughter of Cubans who fled Castro’s regime to come to freedom in America, I won’t let the country that gave us our lives go down the same path as the one my parents escaped. _But if we’re going to stop socialism, we need to build a war chest capable of defeating the radical Left._ **[Will you pitch in now and help us defeat socialist Democrats in 2024?](http://links.electsalazar.com/u/click?_t=efb87ae1dcc34914b1524d5a4e324c41&_m=69626cd15176413790de23b32b141467&_e=QwdHkiizjfkxSMa6mPlQPqRJaFP9Tgn3gbw06GJYSjELlXI5HUXfbx66l4MwKCjah-fpTKVDHnRTxnyL6RqC1gUHGISdASVEwMZJ6h6V2G2mquiEHcx8KGA7r1tdzQf1bX-Tt5Z0ska8rXvgcDhk6IMIAxUuCjpWntVsAzejHITIKbedjtne5ZSu12vmwCBDOJqo6HRul7FuujYHOqFPUk23q0-9aPgpa6eCZVH8JqHP2ivVJcxDPweSZTvGBFs8LWmzaiAsWSSol63DfEP7cBFhPdjI_rGLT_wtaUnX1ehtWs3THJXBwwBa_wcGU82Y53nPo7FCSvYst1xgrNP_AlZ-ZPBxdo3_yY-imq-K3_g%3D)**

clean_body: | | | Fellow American, Socialism has failed everywhere it’s been. But today’s radical Left politicians want to give it one more go at the expense of the American people. If we let them succeed, our country as we know it will go the way of Cuba and Communist China. We can’t let that happen. As the daughter of Cubans who fled Castro’s regime to come to freedom in America, I won’t let the country that gave us our lives go down the same path as the one my parents escaped. But if we’re going to stop socialism, we need to build a war chest capable of defeating the radical Left. | | | | | | Thank you, Maria Elvira Salazar | | | | Paid for by Salazar for Congress | | Unsubscribe from future emails

body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Email%20Logo.png] [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Sam%20Headshot.png]
ACROSS THE COMMONWEALTH
VOTE TODAY! [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Make%20A%20Plan%20To%20Vote.png]
You can vote for November's elections NOW! Vote at your Registrar's office during business hours. Saturday early voting is available October 28th and November 4th. Learn More [https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup]
Find your local Registrar's office here: https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup [https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/VWCC.jpeg] 15 years of the Community College Access Program at VWCC
Learn More [https://www.wdbj7.com/2023/09/26/virginia-western-celebrates-15th-anniversary-ccap-program/] CCAP is a successful public/private partnership that pays the cost of tuition for three years at Virginia Western Community College if a qualified student does not have sufficient financial aid to pay tuition costs.
This program has helped over 4,200 students achieve higher education!
CANDIDATE SPOTLIGHT
https://karenforvirginia.com/ [https://karenforvirginia.com/] Karen Jenkins for HB-89
Donate Here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/karenforvirginia] Karen Jenkins is a life-long resident of the City of Suffolk. Throughout her lifetime she has passionately advocated for others and currently serves on the Suffolk School Board with a proven track record and history of accomplishments. She is running for the House of Delegates for the 89th District to continue delivering results for the people of Virginia.
She is a champion for education, public safety and mental health. As your next Delegate for the 89th District, she will continue to fight and vote for meaningful policies and legislation to support the needs of the district. At the state level, she will be positioned to write and sponsor bills and laws to benefit the schools and communities in the 89th District and throughout the commonwealth.
LOCAL CANDIDATE EVENTS
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/lily%20canvass.png]
Canvass for Lily Franklin!
On Sundays, join Team Lily at the South County Library Parking Lot from 12 - 12:30 pm for a Roanoke canvassing event!
Bring your walking shoes, a charged cell phone, and water. When you arrive to their launch location you will receive a brief training and literature before being sent out to turf. Questions? Email Beth at egunter3@gmail.com [egunter3@gmail.com] or call 540-353-3645.
South County Library Parking Lot, 6303 Merriman Rd, Roanoke, VA 24018
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/sam%20and%20trish.jpg]
Canvass for Sam and Trish!
*this is a place holder until the new facebook event is created*
Join us Sunday to canvass for Sam and Trish! Meet our Field Coordinator, Dom, on September 3rd at the Williamson Road Library, 12:00pm.
Located at 3837 Williamson Rd, Roanoke, VA 24012.
IN THE COMMUNITY
https://roanoke.com/news/local/source-of-forever-chemical-in-roanoke-river-to-pay-1-billion-settlement/article_da6f7bca-598f-11ee-881b-8bac139e59c4.html?fbclid=IwAR1qjW8zAjGrPndXAdQUujaypWNYnxc5JZCyD7FVTO7RJLbp9BBceVPyfq4#tracking-source=home-top-story [https://roanoke.com/news/local/source-of-forever-chemical-in-roanoke-river-to-pay-1-billion-settlement/article_da6f7bca-598f-11ee-881b-8bac139e59c4.html?fbclid=IwAR1qjW8zAjGrPndXAdQUujaypWNYnxc5JZCyD7FVTO7RJLbp9BBceVPyfq4#tracking-source=home-top-story] https://www.facebook.com/events/275519338709424 [https://www.facebook.com/events/275519338709424]
Roanoke River Contamination Settlement Reached Roanoke Young Democrats Canvass Tailgate
Without current regulations, the water contamination caused by these companies could have been so much worse. Come out to support Roanoke Valley Democratic candidates!
Read More [https://roanoke.com/news/local/source-of-forever-chemical-in-roanoke-river-to-pay-1-billion-settlement/article_da6f7bca-598f-11ee-881b-8bac139e59c4.html?fbclid=IwAR1qjW8zAjGrPndXAdQUujaypWNYnxc5JZCyD7FVTO7RJLbp9BBceVPyfq4#tracking-source=home-top-story] The Roanoke Young Democrats will be enjoying pizza, coffee, donuts and more before canvassing to knock for Trish White-Boyd, Sam Rasoul, Lily Franklin, Samantha Newell, Jade Harris, & Nancy Horn. Door knocking will begin about 12:30 pm!
Read More [https://www.facebook.com/events/275519338709424]
Roanoke EnVision Center Kids Movie Night - Sept. 28 Fall Harvest Festival
The movie is free and there will be snacks and much more! Fall into wellness at the Harvest Festival!
Read More Celebrate the end of farm season with fun experiences for the whole family. Try new activities to support your well-being. Connect with others in a beautiful outdoor space. Free meals available with registration. This event is free and open to everyone!
Read More [https://web.cvent.com/event/19422342-be4f-417d-9fc3-6a6bf883e794/summary]
https://www.facebook.com/events/3583390115210992 [https://www.facebook.com/events/3583390115210992] https://roanokehiddenhistories.org/ [https://roanokehiddenhistories.org/]
Carilion Clinic vs. Lewis Gale Charity Softball Game - Oct. 1 Henrietta Lacks Statue Unveiling - Oct. 4
Join us for the 6th Annual Carilion Clinic vs. Lewis Gale Charity Softball Game, being held at the Home of the Salem Red Sox - Carilion Clinic Field. A dignified sculpture will commemorate the ongoing and long unrecognized contributions of Roanoke native Henrietta Lacks, who unknowingly provided the world with the HeLa cell, fueling decades of life-saving and life changing research.
Physicians, nurses and administrators will suit up for each hospital during the nine-inning contest. Proceeds will benefit the American Heart Association. Unveiling is October 4th at 11 am at Henrietta Lacks Plaza.
Admission is $5 at the gate, kids under 10 free. Gates open at 1pm and the game starts at 2pm. 410 3rd St SW, Roanoke, VA 24011
Read More [https://www.facebook.com/events/3583390115210992] Read More [https://roanokehiddenhistories.org/]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/RCDC.jpeg] Join the Roanoke City Democrats!
Roanoke City Democratic Committee meetings are now in-person and open to non-members. We meet the 3rd Thursday of each month. This month we are meeting at 6 pm at the Main Library (706 S Jefferson St, Roanoke, VA 24016). Sign up for meeting reminders and other information here [https://www.roanokedemocrats.com/subscribe] .
Join us for a social hour every first Thursday of the month at Leonore Restaurant, 128 Campbell St. SW, 5-7 pm.
Join Roanoke Young Dems! [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/RYD.png]
Meetings occur on the first Monday and third Sunday of every month in person and virtually. The goal of RYD is to help improve our community and to promote the names of Democratic candidates and policies.
Contact: YoungDemocratsRoanoke@gmail.com [YoungDemocratsRoanoke@gmail.com] to get involved!
Donate Today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/samrasoul]
Thank you for your support! If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to reach out to me anytime.
My very best,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Screen%20Shot%202022-07-29%20at%203.44.06%20PM%20%281%29.png]
Del. Sam Rasoul
https://www.facebook.com/SamRasoulVA [https://www.facebook.com/SamRasoulVA] https://twitter.com/Sam_Rasoul [https://twitter.com/Sam_Rasoul] https://www.instagram.com/sam_rasoul/?hl=en [https://www.instagram.com/sam_rasoul/?hl=en]

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dan=20Cox?=
subject: Snitch Lines & WHO Pandemic Treaty
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Cox for Congress, Inc
body:
Nov 22nd - we must never forget. | | | |
---
| | |
# They Want You to Forget.
Thanksgiving Snitch Lines, WHO treaty and Nov 22.
But we will not forget - we will fight tyranny in the halls of Congress with your urgent contribution.
---
|
---
| [I Will Not Forget - Please Help With Your Contribution Today]( "I Will Not Forget - Please Help With Your Contribution Today")
---
| Friend, You remember. I remember. We must never forget. In Nov. 2020 our former Governor announced his police enforcement against Thanksgiving gatherings with his taxpayer-funded [THANKSGIVING SNITCH LINE](https://coxforfreedom.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=62c86aa83d&e=5bb5efcda7).

As your State Delegate, I was one of the few state elected officials to publicly oppose this tyranny, and I was the only Delegate, and the first in Maryland's history, to file the Constitutional mechanism of impeachment articles to enforce the highest law of the land in your protection from such outrageous government threats and action.

But if you think the struggle is over, think again. The Biden Administration is planning to sign the new [WHO (World Health Organization) Pandemic Treaty](https://coxforfreedom.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=d76c8e3366&e=5bb5efcda7) next year and only Congressional representatives with a backbone will be able to stop the federal enactment.

**That's why I am asking for and need your urgent contribution today. So that we never forget. So that we establish constitutional law in our highest offices and hold those accountable who seek to destroy your constitution**. Make no mistake, there are constitutional protections against all forms of tyranny - especially those that seek to take control of our bodies via our breath and mandated experimental injections.

Today, another memory of the struggle against tyrants occurred. On November 22, 1963 President John F. Kennedy was assassinated and his eternal flame, alongside family members, burns brightly where he is buried nearby our district at Arlington National Cemetery.

Let's keep the flame of liberty burning for us and our children. Please help me generously today with your urgently helpful campaign contribution.

Thank you,
---
|
---
| [RUSH CONTRIBUTION](https://coxforfreedom.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=e70a60d04d&e=5bb5efcda7 "RUSH CONTRIBUTION")
---
|
---
| |
---
### November 22, 1995 - Dan & Valerie began their journey together.
This date is special to Valerie and me. We were engaged to be married exactly 28 years ago today!
---
|
---
| [RUSH CONTRIBUTION](https://coxforfreedom.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=bc534d0f70&e=5bb5efcda7 "RUSH CONTRIBUTION")

clean_body: Nov 22nd - we must never forget. | | | | | | | They Want You to Forget. Thanksgiving Snitch Lines, WHO treaty and Nov 22. But we will not forget - we will fight tyranny in the halls of Congress with your urgent contribution. | | "I Will Not Forget - Please Help With Your Contribution Today" | Friend, You remember. I remember. We must never forget. In Nov. 2020 our former Governor announced his police enforcement against Thanksgiving gatherings with his taxpayer-funded . As your State Delegate, I was one of the few state elected officials to publicly oppose this tyranny, and I was the only Delegate, and the first in Maryland's history, to file the Constitutional mechanism of impeachment articles to enforce the highest law of the land in your protection from such outrageous government threats and action. But if you think the struggle is over, think again. The Biden Administration is planning to sign the new next year and only Congressional representatives with a backbone will be able to stop the federal enactment. That's why I am asking for and need your urgent contribution today. So that we never forget. So that we establish constitutional law in our highest offices and hold those accountable who seek to destroy your constitution. Make no mistake, there are constitutional protections against all forms of tyranny - especially those that seek to take control of our bodies via our breath and mandated experimental injections. Today, another memory of the struggle against tyrants occurred. On November 22, 1963 President John F. Kennedy was assassinated and his eternal flame, alongside family members, burns brightly where he is buried nearby our district at Arlington National Cemetery. Let's keep the flame of liberty burning for us and our children. Please help me generously today with your urgently helpful campaign contribution. Thank you, | | "RUSH CONTRIBUTION" | | | November 22, 1995 - Dan & Valerie began their journey together. This date is special to Valerie and me. We were engaged to be married exactly 28 years ago today! | | "RUSH CONTRIBUTION" | | | | Paid for by Dan Cox for Congress, Inc. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2023 Dan Cox for Congress, Inc., All rights reserved.

name: Roy Cooper
subject: My commitment to our democracy means speaking out when it’s attacked.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
I’ll always stand up for North Carolinians’ rights.
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73812124/439723969/823540626?refcode=ea.e51579a4-5889-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ms=ea.e51579a4-5889-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTE1NzlhNC01ODg5LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xnu4XkwEaWApTQ3axcHqcSK_XMJGddZhI54MccKQ-D0=&emci=fe24a91b-aa88-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=e51579a4-5889-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=1049176)
Peter, As Governor, there is nothing more important to me than defending the rights and freedoms of North Carolinians. I’ve used every power at my disposal to stand up for those fundamental rights, but it’s not always enough. The GOP’s recent one-seat supermajority has allowed them to pass restrictions on abortion access and voting rights that are simply anti-democratic. They don’t reflect the will of North Carolinians. They are not in the best interests of our state. **They’re only in the interests of GOP legislators intent on holding onto power.** My commitment to our democracy means speaking out and fighting back when it’s attacked. I always will. And I’ll do everything possible to BREAK the GOP supermajorities in 2024 so that far-right politicians can’t cause further harm to our state. **[Peter, I need your help. Please chip in $25 or an amount that is right for you to support my work electing Democratic candidates across North Carolina.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73812126/439723971/435245919?amount=25&refcode=ea.e51579a4-5889-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ms=ea.e51579a4-5889-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTE1NzlhNC01ODg5LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xnu4XkwEaWApTQ3axcHqcSK_XMJGddZhI54MccKQ-D0=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73812129/439723973/435245919?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.e51579a4-5889-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ms=ea.e51579a4-5889-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTE1NzlhNC01ODg5LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xnu4XkwEaWApTQ3axcHqcSK_XMJGddZhI54MccKQ-D0=)

name: Team Ruth's List Florida
subject: The best Black Friday deal is investing in our future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ruth's List Florida Incorporated
body:
What comes next
https://secure.everyaction.com/icBUu2K87ke0GJ5xqoaqSQ2 [https://secure.everyaction.com/icBUu2K87ke0GJ5xqoaqSQ2]
Dear Peter,
However you spent the day yesterday, we hope you had a wonderful time celebrating with family and friends -- or just enjoying your time off!
We know how tempting Black Friday deals can be, but as you're shopping online or in stores, we hope you'll consider making a contribution to Ruth's List.
As we head into the 2023 Election season, we need to build up our resources to recruit, train, and elect Democratic pro-choice candidates across Florida.
While we were able to achieve some key victories earlier this month, the Florida GOP now holds a supermajority in the state legislature, and it's going to take everything we've got to fight back against their extremist agenda.
If you’re ready to join us in the fight to reclaim our reproductive freedom, will you make a contribution to Ruth’s List today?
Contribute [https://secure.everyaction.com/icBUu2K87ke0GJ5xqoaqSQ2]
There's nothing more important than investing in our future [https://secure.everyaction.com/icBUu2K87ke0GJ5xqoaqSQ2] .
Thank you!
Team Ruth's List

| Peter -
---
| _**Happy Thanksgiving!**_** ** 🦃 As you prepare to spend time with loved ones and give thanks for the great gifts in your life, I wanted you to know that _**I am thankful for you**_.

Running for office can be daunting. The baseless attacks from opponents, the 20-hour days, and the time away from friends and family can become overwhelming. But I know **we’re in the fight for liberty and limited government together, and your support is one of the greatest blessings in my life**.

_One blessing all Americans share is living in a country rooted in the principles of private property, free enterprise, and individual liberty_. As I work to protect those values on Capitol Hill, I want to share a column I wrote years ago about how those principles became the basis for the American Experiment.

It’s a story that happened in Jamestown, Virginia, more than a decade before the Pilgrims landed at Plymouth Rock. And unlike the tale of the first Thanksgiving, it actually happened!

If you enjoy reading it as much as I loved researching it, I hope you’ll share it with others who will appreciate learning how one man spread the tenets of hard work and property rights across our continent.
---

As always, thank you for your [continued support of our campaign](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=a6ffcffe96&e=fc26432468)! No matter the amount -- whether it's $5, $55, or $500 -- every dollar makes a difference!
---
|

|
# _**A Real Reason To Give Thanks**_
Most of us remember **the story of the first Thanksgiving**. According to lore, in 1621, the Plymouth colonists and the Wampanoag Indians gathered in modern-day Massachusetts to share an autumn harvest feast in the first Thanksgiving celebrations in the colonies.

In reality, history scholars generally have concluded that this tale — and the idyllic images of Pilgrims and Indians sharing turkey and a hearty laugh — **is total baloney**.

There is, however, a much more important story of hard work and bountiful harvests in colonial America that should give us all a reason to give thanks. And it’s completely true!

**The lessons taught in this story laid the foundation for the private property rights and economic freedom that allowed America to grow into the greatest country the world has ever known. **

In May 1607, King James of England sent three ships filled with 104 people to the Tidewater region of Virginia to establish the Virginia Company.

When they arrived, the settlers found themselves surrounded by a bountiful environment. Despite the abundance of food waiting for them when they arrived, all but 38 of the original 104 settlers died within six months of establishing Jamestown, mostly of starvation.

Two years later, in the summer of 1609, King James gave the Virginia Company another try. This time, 500 colonists were sent from England to Virginia to attempt to establish a permanent settlement on the coast of North America. The second time proved an even bigger disaster. **Even in this land of plenty, 440 people — all but 60 — starved to death**.

In a dire, last-ditch attempt to save the Virginia Company, the business’ leaders in England sent a British military officer named Sir Thomas Dale to assess the situation in Virginia and determine why the settlers were having such a hard time making it.

**Upon his arrival, Dale was shocked and confused to find these starving settlers spent their time bowling in their yards rather than farming or hunting.**

Dale realized **the reason the settlers were so lazy, even in the face of their hunger, was because they were being asked to work for the common good**. For the first seven years after arriving, _the settlers had no ownership of the fruits of their labor_.

Everything the settlers produced went into a shared storage area, and they were all allocated equal amounts to feed their families. **There was simply no incentive to work hard**. The laziest person got as much to eat as the hardest-working person.

**Thomas Dale changed all of this by introducing private property to the settlers of the Virginia Company.**

Dale allotted each man three acres of land, and anything grown on that land was his to keep, trade, or sell as he wished. It was also declared that no man would be forced to work on communal efforts, such as building churches or clearing roads, for more than one month per year, and never during planting or harvest season.

**After Dale implemented this system of private property** to replace communal farming and equal distribution, **the colony flourished**. By the time he left Virginia three years later, the settlement had grown by hundreds of people, and the settlers were well-fed and in good spirits.

By introducing private property rights and a sense of personal responsibility to the Virginia Company, Thomas Dale didn’t just save the lives of a few hundred settlers four centuries ago.

**He managed to inject the colonies with the principles of private property, free enterprise, and individual liberty, ideals which have served as the foundation for, and the guiding force of, the United States.**

Because of Thomas Dale and the advancements and innovations that resulted from his simple idea 400 years ago, we all live in a **richer, safer, healthier, more peaceful, and better world**.

_**For that, we should all be truly thankful.**_
---
|
---
|
# _**On The Campaign Trail**_
Drew is a regular fixture at the **Spring Mountain Republican Women's monthly luncheon** at Suncoast Hotel and Casino. At the club's most recent meeting, Drew spoke about ways to volunteer for campaigns beyond door-knocking and phone banking.

If you, or someone you know, would like to learn more about the organization, please email [republicans@unlv.edu](mailto:republicans@unlv.edu).

---
|
---
| Our team attended the grand opening of the **Vietnamese-American Community of Las Vegas' **new office on November 9th. It was great to see so many other community leaders and political officials supporting an amazing organization here in Las Vegas. I'm already looking forward to the VACLV's Tet Lunar New Year Festival in January — it's always one of my favorite events every year!
---

| This month, the **Republican Women of Las Vegas **dedicated their monthly meeting to Veterans. Our team heard from 98-year-old **Lorraine Demerest** , an Army Nurse who served in WWII, as well as Air Force veteran **David Flippo** , a candidate for Nevada's 4th congressional district. They shared stories about serving our country and highlighted the importance of Military spouses. It was an honor to celebrate our veterans with RWLV!

Want to help Drew? This race is going to be tight, and having the help of supporters like you is the only way we can win!

Here are the **_TOP 3_ ways _YOU_ can get involved:**

1. **Donate: **Simply chipping in a few dollars to support our efforts is incredibly helpful. Whether it's $3 or $3,000, every donation makes a _huge_ difference! Email [linnea@drewfornevada.com](mailto:linnea@drewfornevada.com?subject=I'd%20like%20to%20host%20a%20Meet%20%26%20Greet%20for%20Drew!).

name: Brandon Herrera
subject: Win a trip to come target shooting with me!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brandon Herrera for Congress
body:
Dear Patriot,
I'm running against Tony Gonzales to represent Texas' 23rd Congressional District.
I'm a Second Amendment activist and a Constitutionalist. I'll never vote to infringe on your right to keep and bear arms. Tony, however, has voted repeatedly for gun control measures that hurt law abiding citizens.
To defeat Tony Gonzales, I need to inform Texans about his voting record. I'm having a contest to fly one of my supporters down to San Antonio to go target shooting with me. All you need to do to enter is donate before Midnight on November 30th!
Please donate to win a free trip to go target shooting with me: [https://secure.anedot.com/brandon-herrera-for-congress/donate](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/GHbxLUJHhGugn7635ZCyW3rg/GHbxLUJHhGugn7635ZCyW3rg).
I have a lifelong passion for firearms, and I would be honored to go shooting with one of you. As a business owner, I experienced the consequences of the COVID lockdowns firsthand. I understand the federal government has too much power, and I'm running to return that power back to the people.
Please donate to be entered into winning a trip to San Antonio at [https://secure.anedot.com/brandon-herrera-for-congress/donate](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/GHbxLUJHhGugn7635ZCyW3rg/GHbxLUJHhGugn7635ZCyW3rg). You can also opt to make it a recurring contribution by clicking the "Make this Monthly" button.
Tony Gonzales is an incumbent Republican with the support of special interests, but I rely on grassroots supporters like you.
You can help get a Second Amendment absolutist into Congress by donating today at [https://secure.anedot.com/brandon-herrera-for-congress/donate](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/GHbxLUJHhGugn7635ZCyW3rg/GHbxLUJHhGugn7635ZCyW3rg).
Will you please help me meet our goal so we can send a staunch Constitutionalist to Congress?
Respectfully,
Brandon Herrera
PS - Be entered to WIN a free trip to go shooting with me by donating before November 30th at [https://secure.anedot.com/brandon-herrera-for-congress/donate](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/GHbxLUJHhGugn7635ZCyW3rg/GHbxLUJHhGugn7635ZCyW3rg).

Paid for by Brandon Herrera for Congress
