name: Tina Smith
subject: Insults, elbows, and brawls
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Team — The United States Congress is meant to be a deliberative legislative body, which is a fancy way of saying a group of people who do the important work of passing laws that help the American people. But last week, Republicans in Congress turned Capitol Hill into a high school cafeteria. **[Before I get into the specifics, will you chip in to my work to elect Democrats up and down the ballot so we can restore some decency and order to Congress once more?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73814100/439730113/-1565639837?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC60_20231122_AM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTk3YWZlNC01YTg5LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hcYjiU6_fTGN9ea2uarC2_hUnUOQUL4IJw0KwNDJp6I=)** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73814101/439730114/-1565639837?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC60_20231122_AM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTk3YWZlNC01YTg5LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hcYjiU6_fTGN9ea2uarC2_hUnUOQUL4IJw0KwNDJp6I=)
---
Last Tuesday, former Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy elbowed one of his Republican colleagues who voted to remove him as speaker. The two got into a spat, chasing each other down the halls of Congress. **Yikes.**
Meanwhile, the Chairman of the House Oversight Committee, Republican James Comer, unleashed childish insults against a Democratic member of the committee. **Yikes.**
And in the Senate, Republican Markwayne Mullin nearly got into a brawl with a witness at a committee hearing! **Major yikes.**
Truly, what a week it was in Congress. My takeaway from this? **We need to elect more women and more Democrats. Seriously!**

clean_body: | Team — The United States Congress is meant to be a deliberative legislative body, which is a fancy way of saying a group of people who do the important work of passing laws that help the American people. But last week, Republicans in Congress turned Capitol Hill into a high school cafeteria. = | = Last Tuesday, former Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy elbowed one of his Republican colleagues who voted to remove him as speaker. The two got into a spat, chasing each other down the halls of Congress. Yikes. Meanwhile, the Chairman of the House Oversight Committee, Republican James Comer, unleashed childish insults against a Democratic member of the committee. Yikes. And in the Senate, Republican Markwayne Mullin nearly got into a brawl with a witness at a committee hearing! Major yikes. Truly, what a week it was in Congress. My takeaway from this? We need to elect more women and more Democrats. Seriously! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thank you — hopefully, Republicans settle down after the Thanksgiving recess (though I’m not holding my breath)! — Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States | | Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

name: Allred HQ
subject: The odds are stacked against us.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
Friend - when Colin ran for Congress in 2018, the odds were stacked against him.
His opponent was a Republican Congressman who had held his seat for 11 terms. Colin and our team put everything we had into the campaign – but just 48 days from the election, **the polls gave Colin a 10% chance of winning, and the district was leaning Republican.**
In the last days of the campaign, Colin worked day and night to connect with Texans and earn their votes. He slowly chipped away at his opponent's lead as voters got to know him.
**By Election Day, he had a 37% chance of victory. And when the numbers finally came in, he won with 52% of the vote.**
[Split a donation between The Long Run and Colin Allred to defeat Ted Cruz →](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-allred-split.fIsyEE&refcode=em231122-1-t1&t=1&akid=5019%2E196590%2Ey-gWuF)
This time around we're facing an even bigger opponent: Ted Cruz. But we're starting this race with much better odds. Polls show Colin just 5 points down with 14% of voters undecided.
**What's more, Ted Cruz only won reelection by 2.6% last time.**
**We have a clear path to victory, and all it's going to take is connecting with enough undecided voters. That's why Colin is on the road traveling to every corner of Texas, shaking every hand he can and listening to what voters have to say.**
**[But voter outreach on this massive scale is expensive. That's why Colin's counting on grassroots supporters like you to help him do it, so please: Can you split a donation of $5 between Colin and The Long Run before our midnight fundraising deadline to help us reach the undecided voters we need to fire Ted Cruz? →**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-allred-split.fIsyEE&refcode=em231122-1-t1&t=2&akid=5019%2E196590%2Ey-gWuF)

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: They want you to forget this
body:
They want you to forget how wrong they were about COVID.

| |
---
| | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a2c44dd77640490f9c42806f907fae44&_e=DqhgZ53anK4LXigD3xZPP_5Iv0I6RVoDms0AUHHDWWmNk7DYmvAcNZyrxWMe55gxi254nX89bFVq9uUBZlCHOjt87ylrJunyNu0RBjDNnydyfLD3uHSx9IGjs9XoOXzrvkdOTzpqgdl1sufD9FGYc5WEFqN8TYr9i-dycJ-JZfNeVGdaEjznd2lLaRFfNCCM7q0g3qTMQTa-LSfgDa_3NBP4B8HdRv9H_ERMGYEaLIdFBw8Ve_yaeZe-OsI2Fm1nZqYNcqDhEGC7kTGjobXd4S6JWspUhFCEbYPjc9YU83tBQAq8yGh2NbU8oyGk28kWLOxdVvArOQLDyrMmyJ1tAqiTuW2YJUuX7kr3eEpZimdrvEHogj7qgDEhNBslhSIU)
---
Fellow American, The radical Left wants you to forget. They want you to forget how wrong they were about COVID. They want you to forget that they lied to your face for over a year. They want you to forget that they let extremists riot in the streets while they told you to skip holidays with your loved ones and to "social distance." They want you to forget how they closed our schools, our businesses, and our houses of worship. (Gavin Newsom even closed Orange County beaches). **And maybe most of all, they want you to forget that thousands of hardworking, competent people either lost their jobs or were forced to take a vaccine they didn 't want. ** **They want you to forget that ...** _... And I hope you never do._ Because if you forget what they did, it's only a matter of time before they do it again. It's only a matter of time before they find a new reason to trample your rights and your freedoms for the so-called "greater good." We can't forget what the radical Left and its draconian policies did to us and to our families - and we can't let them forget it either. **That 's why the Center for American Liberty is still putting their feet to the fire and holding them accountable.** But nothing we do is possible without the generosity of patriots like you. **[**Will you give us the funds we need to win this landmark case and make the Left pay for what it did?**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a2c44dd77640490f9c42806f907fae44&_e=DqhgZ53anK4LXigD3xZPP_5Iv0I6RVoDms0AUHHDWWmNk7DYmvAcNZyrxWMe55gxi254nX89bFVq9uUBZlCHOjt87ylrJunyNu0RBjDNnydyfLD3uHSx9IGjs9XoOXzrvkdOTzpqgdl1sufD9FGYc5WEFqN8TYr9i-dycJ-JZfNeVGdaEjznd2lLaRFfNCCM7q0g3qTMQTa-LSfgDa_3NFgcLQbc-XP_unYGV7wnPfR44jyUkZZnO9fpPx4WSgaUPaJrLQEls1m4_2yB1EnHxpnAGDF933Fn53R-1J1APYxbTo3PcYHisfMk4FAT9DFxsLajJhLLnddTrZMBHc4t0A0gli2Dw7JxaKohUiHzWU2Cqgd5swjd3XtjV7SPEY_u)** We filed a lawsuit against the North Carolina Symphony on behalf of three musicians fired for refusing to get the COVID-19 vaccine. And if we can win this critical lawsuit, we can put employers across the country on notice ahead of what some are calling a COVID resurgence. Dovid was the assistant concertmaster and first violinist, while Chris and Rachel both played the French Horn. They are some of the most talented musicians in the country in highly coveted and competitive positions. _Each of them had been in the Symphony for over a decade._ When the Symphony introduced its vaccine mandate, it offered both religious and medical exemptions. Dovid, Chris and Rachel each hold sincere religious beliefs that prohibit them from taking the COVID vaccine. They all filed for religious exemptions and were willing to take other measures, like regularly testing, to prove they didn't have COVID. But shortly after submitting their requestions for religious exemptions, the Symphony rejected their requests and put them on UNPAID LEAVE. These three musicians were Buddhist, Christian and Jewish. **It doesn 't matter who you are or what you believe - the radical Left doesn't respect your right to practice your faith as you see fit.** In their eyes, your body doesn't belong to you - it belongs to them. I'm deciding to take a stand - and I hope you will too. **[**Please make a generous, tax-deductible donation to the Center for American Liberty to fund this lawsuit for religious freedom and set a precedent nationwide that puts these radicals on notice.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a2c44dd77640490f9c42806f907fae44&_e=DqhgZ53anK4LXigD3xZPP_5Iv0I6RVoDms0AUHHDWWmNk7DYmvAcNZyrxWMe55gxi254nX89bFVq9uUBZlCHOjt87ylrJunyNu0RBjDNnydyfLD3uHSx9IGjs9XoOXzrvkdOTzpqgdl1sufD9FGYc5WEFqN8TYr9i-dycJ-JZfNeVGdaEjznd2lLaRFfNCCM7q0g3qTMQTa-LSfgDa_3NG7oPxqayq86n5SGVOSMzPmi3LBmlVEN0Ybfns46IeZgij5Ps2mBTFkIX2Tn3L3e922Ip3azwkcx2C1cIhKQ__S4lwrgHMCalMPA7r0OtQpeQjSrFgb9NHoni5McsJ73iPFq3B1fdXJUY9KFRHnXKUVVLG2u91_E-k6hdLjpFnRP)** Even after lifting its vaccine mandate, the Symphony refused to give these musicians their jobs back. Because it was never about "science" or "health" - it was always about control. I hope I can count on your support.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
Harmeet K. Dhillon Founder & CEO

clean_body: They want you to forget how wrong they were about COVID. | | | | Fellow American, The radical Left wants you to forget. They want you to forget how wrong they were about COVID. They want you to forget that they lied to your face for over a year. They want you to forget that they let extremists riot in the streets while they told you to skip holidays with your loved ones and to "social distance." They want you to forget how they closed our schools, our businesses, and our houses of worship. (Gavin Newsom even closed Orange County beaches). And maybe most of all, they want you to forget that thousands of hardworking, competent people either lost their jobs or were forced to take a vaccine they didn 't want. They want you to forget that ... ... And I hope you never do. Because if you forget what they did, it's only a matter of time before they do it again. It's only a matter of time before they find a new reason to trample your rights and your freedoms for the so-called "greater good." We can't forget what the radical Left and its draconian policies did to us and to our families - and we can't let them forget it either. That 's why the Center for American Liberty is still putting their feet to the fire and holding them accountable. But nothing we do is possible without the generosity of patriots like you. We filed a lawsuit against the North Carolina Symphony on behalf of three musicians fired for refusing to get the COVID-19 vaccine. And if we can win this critical lawsuit, we can put employers across the country on notice ahead of what some are calling a COVID resurgence. Dovid was the assistant concertmaster and first violinist, while Chris and Rachel both played the French Horn. They are some of the most talented musicians in the country in highly coveted and competitive positions. Each of them had been in the Symphony for over a decade. When the Symphony introduced its vaccine mandate, it offered both religious and medical exemptions. Dovid, Chris and Rachel each hold sincere religious beliefs that prohibit them from taking the COVID vaccine. They all filed for religious exemptions and were willing to take other measures, like regularly testing, to prove they didn't have COVID. But shortly after submitting their requestions for religious exemptions, the Symphony rejected their requests and put them on UNPAID LEAVE. These three musicians were Buddhist, Christian and Jewish. It doesn 't matter who you are or what you believe - the radical Left doesn't respect your right to practice your faith as you see fit. In their eyes, your body doesn't belong to you - it belongs to them. I'm deciding to take a stand - and I hope you will too. Even after lifting its vaccine mandate, the Symphony refused to give these musicians their jobs back. Because it was never about "science" or "health" - it was always about control. I hope I can count on your support. | | Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon Founder & CEO | | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. [](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxEj7turDAQhp9m6ED22Fy2oDgniBSRUqRLFfky7Dph1qyBoH37CLRK2v_75p8Zw9MYhnsL9X9AvAQ_AyKof4B4e984rZ_88pyrtzG_Va9c7hCfAHG5T_RrPkoKYhPGPa27zLdq8EJn1MpaiKrWWpXZpTWlsQPWQppKW2qscahP9tQgNRJdhVloUaCSElHWClEU3nrTDFU5KFmSUxq0OPYUhikFZ-S8bCalGLlwkbOxvSzLNB-H9YD9TG5NVJgr-bjsBmAfv4gGYvLBnFNcJ8B-NDb3KXxTzjaPDKpfF_6Y45ocger-sASsdrRPrwyq2xuPxBmeTDhfQXVsH9lCaXe2JLPU-mkL4xjmqgYtzscPLvJPAAAA__-QPXnK)

[](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxEj7turDAQhp9m6ED22Fy2oDgniBSRUqRLFfky7Dph1qyBoH37CLRK2v_75p8Zw9MYhnsL9X9AvAQ_AyKof4B4e984rZ_88pyrtzG_Va9c7hCfAHG5T_RrPkoKYhPGPa27zLdq8EJn1MpaiKrWWpXZpTWlsQPWQppKW2qscahP9tQgNRJdhVloUaCSElHWClEU3nrTDFU5KFmSUxq0OPYUhikFZ-S8bCalGLlwkbOxvSzLNB-H9YD9TG5NVJgr-bjsBmAfv4gGYvLBnFNcJ8B-NDb3KXxTzjaPDKpfF_6Y45ocger-sASsdrRPrwyq2xuPxBmeTDhfQXVsH9lCaXe2JLPU-mkL4xjmqgYtzscPLvJPAAAA__-QPXnK) Friend,

Our undercover journalists have exposed something terrifying that could impact the health of everyone in America . . . **if not the world.**

Before we release this one, we have mounting costs from coast-to-coast travel to covering our bases with legal reviews of our content.

Before midnight tonight, I have to raise $46,300 to break even and cover our operational costs.

**[Will you pitch in and help us today?](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxEj7turDAQhp9m6ED22Fy2oDgniBSRUqRLFfky7Dph1qyBoH37CLRK2v_75p8Zw9MYhnsL9X9AvAQ_AyKof4B4e984rZ_88pyrtzG_Va9c7hCfAHG5T_RrPkoKYhPGPa27zLdq8EJn1MpaiKrWWpXZpTWlsQPWQppKW2qscahP9tQgNRJdhVloUaCSElHWClEU3nrTDFU5KFmSUxq0OPYUhikFZ-S8bCalGLlwkbOxvSzLNB-H9YD9TG5NVJgr-bjsBmAfv4gGYvLBnFNcJ8B-NDb3KXxTzjaPDKpfF_6Y45ocger-sASsdrRPrwyq2xuPxBmeTDhfQXVsH9lCaXe2JLPU-mkL4xjmqgYtzscPLvJPAAAA__-QPXnK)**

There are a few reasons why newsrooms around the country have stopped doing investigative journalism. The first is the massive cost.

Most journalists today always stay in the comfort of their office. They gather reports from the Internet, make a few calls, and regurgitate news already cycling around the web.

It's lazy and serves no purpose other than clickbait for ad dollars for these big corporations who control the news.

At OMG, we're not doing that. Not even close.

We have teams of journalists deployed at nearly any given moment. The planning of our investigations is extraordinary. We will contact hundreds, if not thousands, of potential sources to find THE right one.

And then the filming starts!

The phone bill for our "swiping" campaign alone is thousands of dollars each month to maintain connections on arrays of phones we use to locate and communicate with sources.

The bills keep coming in, and we must be a team to keep going. **[You support OMG](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxEj7turDAQhp9m6ED22Fy2oDgniBSRUqRLFfky7Dph1qyBoH37CLRK2v_75p8Zw9MYhnsL9X9AvAQ_AyKof4B4e984rZ_88pyrtzG_Va9c7hCfAHG5T_RrPkoKYhPGPa27zLdq8EJn1MpaiKrWWpXZpTWlsQPWQppKW2qscahP9tQgNRJdhVloUaCSElHWClEU3nrTDFU5KFmSUxq0OPYUhikFZ-S8bCalGLlwkbOxvSzLNB-H9YD9TG5NVJgr-bjsBmAfv4gGYvLBnFNcJ8B-NDb3KXxTzjaPDKpfF_6Y45ocger-sASsdrRPrwyq2xuPxBmeTDhfQXVsH9lCaXe2JLPU-mkL4xjmqgYtzscPLvJPAAAA__-QPXnK), and we produce for you to get the truth to the public.**

We're not beholden to advertisers or ANY interests that will silence or dilute our reporting.

Friend, I have an unspoken agreement between you and a small group of other Americans who support my work. It's simple: **you support our reporting and truth in our integrity, and we work tirelessly to expose the truth.**

**[Will you chip in today to help me reach my goal by midnight tonight?](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJxEj7turDAQhp9m6ED22Fy2oDgniBSRUqRLFfky7Dph1qyBoH37CLRK2v_75p8Zw9MYhnsL9X9AvAQ_AyKof4B4e984rZ_88pyrtzG_Va9c7hCfAHG5T_RrPkoKYhPGPa27zLdq8EJn1MpaiKrWWpXZpTWlsQPWQppKW2qscahP9tQgNRJdhVloUaCSElHWClEU3nrTDFU5KFmSUxq0OPYUhikFZ-S8bCalGLlwkbOxvSzLNB-H9YD9TG5NVJgr-bjsBmAfv4gGYvLBnFNcJ8B-NDb3KXxTzjaPDKpfF_6Y45ocger-sASsdrRPrwyq2xuPxBmeTDhfQXVsH9lCaXe2JLPU-mkL4xjmqgYtzscPLvJPAAAA__-QPXnK)**

After watching the undercover footage, OMG's latest report has sent shivers up my spine.

It's horrendous stuff going on behind the back of the public, outside of the law, and outside of human decency.

And I'm rushing to package it for the public perfectly so Americans are aware of what's going on behind closed doors.

And this has been an expensive report because of the massive impact.

So please donate as much as you can today so we can cover the costs of this investigation and keep going.

Thank you for your continued support.

In Truth,

James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 300
Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Tammy
subject: Quick
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Could you pitch in a few bucks before you log off?
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1579%2E35263%2Eoa5rQQ)
Hi Peter — I wanted to catch you before the holiday weekend. As my campaign team prepares to shut down the office for a few days to celebrate Thanksgiving and spend time with loved ones, they let me know that we’ll be facing a sizable gap to our fundraising goal by the time we get back. The absolute last thing I want to be doing is pestering you while you’re sitting down to eat or watching the Packers game. So I thought I’d reach out to you today: **Could you pitch in a few bucks before you log off today? Every dollar we raise will help mount a defense against my potential megamillionaire right-wing opponents.** Here’s a link you can use to donate, if you’re able: **[secure.actblue.com/donate/tbe-em-nov23](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-nov23.TOAtRC&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231122_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1579%2E35263%2Eoa5rQQ)** Thanks for pitching in, if you can. On behalf of everyone here on the campaign, I’m so grateful to have your support. I hope you have a happy and healthy Thanksgiving holiday! — Tammy
---

How would you like to meet the next President of the United States (ME)?
---
**_Because_**** _I’d certainly love to meet YOU!_**_
_
---
That’s why I decided to open _**ANOTHER**_ CONTEST for a VIP (and a guest of your choice) to join me for my very special reception in Florida on December 6 to close out the 2023 year.

---
I have far too many supporters to just have _1_ winner. _What can I say – I have a big heart!_
---

With 2024 just around the corner, we’re right where we want to be.

---
We’re DOMINATING the primary like no one’s ever seen before (a 60-point frontrunner!), we’re leading Crooked Joe nationally by double digits, and we’re even beating him in all the biggest battleground states that will no doubt decide the 2024 election.

---
But such an important event to close out the year and set our sights on 2024 wouldn’t feel complete without the most critical part of _our_ movement in attendance – grassroots supporters like you, Patriot.

---
Which is why I’m going to fly one lucky winner plus a guest of your choice out to Florida for __FREE__ _!_

---
I’ll cover your hotel, you’ll get to enjoy hors d'oeuvres and refreshments on me, and we’ll even take a photo together so that you can always remember this special moment.

---
_But right now, all you have to do is enter to win!_

---
**[Please make a contribution of any amount to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN and you’ll be automatically entered to WIN – and hopefully, I’ll be seeing YOU very soon!](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=6fc7d14e864c4febaf5f5c67015cb268&_e=5ioyzZznQS43eTNqBQ5WB2iVj0FHtj441JkZSOSBqF9rrYM339Wulzfs0CoPRtJzML8MiyxvH7ixMX0NGuyyYgCHcLjy9qxsuOV1edRrpVmm_IqX0b3xmnCiie78c9t761M-rCeR-K45BrJ8Ee7xZrmHi2fpAawLVkryDYcUjANESW6yd0pMdyZCu2xtRM1Qwcs4jVeBvv808abpr7UB1ZFjEBx9OLzqPWZmDcELG-FVfRlGruo3qxuresdD1R62pkVleVqFlcEFWXk8ZdfMqJGH94FIFExsbsL5Uo7WAlGspN4hBpFdRb2-rakneEvMtjSx2LDypzcJkuWyd9-xwtlbvJfYejyNSLCQl4pfS58xTtViGcTa4IpEiS-trGSCNYVjfazjXnroHPflNrzCmpUf45us8Xv85KGskVf7thxnSBfDg7Hq-egxP6cRuk_uOKQF-JPaPhB7fg0skU988IRZwCJKJbCiZn1kK9l8pQSF9v4JyG283PPxoL4lI-zz)**

clean_body: That’s why I just had to hold another... | | | | | Patriot, How would you like to meet the next President of the United States (ME)? Because I’d certainly love to meet YOU! That’s why I decided to open ANOTHER CONTEST for a VIP (and a guest of your choice) to join me for my very special reception in Florida on December 6 to close out the 2023 year. I have far too many supporters to just have 1 winner. What can I say – I have a big heart! - | | With 2024 just around the corner, we’re right where we want to be. We’re DOMINATING the primary like no one’s ever seen before (a 60-point frontrunner!), we’re leading Crooked Joe nationally by double digits, and we’re even beating him in all the biggest battleground states that will no doubt decide the 2024 election. But such an important event to close out the year and set our sights on 2024 wouldn’t feel complete without the most critical part of our movement in attendance – grassroots supporters like you, Patriot. Which is why I’m going to fly one lucky winner plus a guest of your choice out to Florida for FREE ! I’ll cover your hotel, you’ll get to enjoy hors d'oeuvres and refreshments on me, and we’ll even take a photo together so that you can always remember this special moment. But right now, all you have to do is enter to win! Thank you, Donald J. Trump45th President of the United States | | | | NO PURCHASE, PAYMENT, CONTRIBUTION, OR TEXT MESSAGE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN. Trump; (iii) two (2) day one (1) night first class hotel accommodations (1 room, double occupancy); (iv) one (1) photograph of the Prize Winner and guest with President Trump; approximate retail value (“ARV”) of the Prize: $24,000. The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Fellow American - I know God is not done with America yet.

It’s no secret that I am a steadfast Christian and man of God.

Our nation began with the bold declaration that all men are created equal by God and that our rights derive from Him and not the government.

The founders insisted that faith must remain central to our national identity because, as George Washington summarized, "religion and morality are indispensable supports" of our republic.

Like so many American households through the generations, in our house, we instill faith in the hearts of our children, serve God, and serve people.

I know our country is in desperate need of prayer.

[**Today I am asking if you share my faith in God and for the future of our nations, you'll join us.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8e12741ecd83469784e05b3714f5b665&_e=IJvswT-buqZEIUpxuu_gCyCiigQnczurxQt6d293UiXx5FgPakA2tMJYSeJOgXuuYlRDcrnoit5AQeUi0N1gT7I7RxgyeUvUWkPK1i5NxFQ5wM4GUr7Tl2bJlnfGLl6arfoJC5GXzEQSq3LN7jToRwrwEVHSsMTiwyPBTumpnyCvAycCYK2E522S7CG6zECsfPluhusfwKY74_zzgAv5MqcJDAwejuFVLPotkd8awsHaqY7VFCuvnm4oq9AVDif0k4xQMx4e5TObWymRSlMZWnCRiBCL1XeXox2VUAqgaR1NZf4bLfsOpQVc1dj_EQJ6FGagyF3u0KNTDncy-Y--WLDU439iplXDWx_UR5jrX3CM26iT-1pF8VdaWawpQXNy)

[**We cannot allow the radical Left to destroy the ideals our country was founded on. Please join me if you agree that we need to stand up for our Republic.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8e12741ecd83469784e05b3714f5b665&_e=IJvswT-buqZEIUpxuu_gCyCiigQnczurxQt6d293UiXx5FgPakA2tMJYSeJOgXuuYlRDcrnoit5AQeUi0N1gT7I7RxgyeUvUWkPK1i5NxFQ5wM4GUr7Tl2bJlnfGLl6arfoJC5GXzEQSq3LN7jToRwrwEVHSsMTiwyPBTumpnyCvAycCYK2E522S7CG6zECsfPluhusfwKY74_zzgAv5MqcJDAwejuFVLPotkd8awsFPm3FAD83MUbUs6Y30Ae_v0P1KJRfohIW-c1amgRN50wiNifwmMvPLLzKlNd76WoBKQ0evMmqGO1zM7S8HscslYGqAHQIrB9CVYEgqkV32oBKuNfZ_QnqPVyf-tp9qj2j7MuJhWAS5AACOcau31Fns)

[** STAND WITH SPEAKER JOHNSON **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8e12741ecd83469784e05b3714f5b665&_e=IJvswT-buqZEIUpxuu_gCyCiigQnczurxQt6d293UiXx5FgPakA2tMJYSeJOgXuuYlRDcrnoit5AQeUi0N1gT7I7RxgyeUvUWkPK1i5NxFQ5wM4GUr7Tl2bJlnfGLl6arfoJC5GXzEQSq3LN7jToRwrwEVHSsMTiwyPBTumpnyCvAycCYK2E522S7CG6zECsfPluhusfwKY74_zzgAv5MqcJDAwejuFVLPotkd8awsG1rl_kOrQiB6AdSg0-R6Ihm_QH9SmkuNVZzFMtsdXmArYJn6p6AreYfV8DZKxxXcc35NxgZsW3Tjx1VEX6k5otPdsOcnhDa-FdZ6fDJCkROZmmqIM8W9Ti5QGoKuzsq4VDuIkTu9jQWfzVPzWNKSos)

God bless,

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

| Happy Thanksgiving!
---
|
---
| Dear Friends,
Tracy and I wish you and your family a Happy Thanksgiving.
We have much to be thankful for. Remember, God is in control. Despite tough times, I believe we have better days ahead. Keep praying for our Republic, our men and women who keep us safe, and Israel.
---

clean_body: | | | | | | == | == | Happy Thanksgiving! | | Dear Friends, Tracy and I wish you and your family a Happy Thanksgiving. We have much to be thankful for. Remember, God is in control. Despite tough times, I believe we have better days ahead. Keep praying for our Republic, our men and women who keep us safe, and Israel. | Interview, Why Congress? | == | Why I am running for Congress interview == | Update: | There really is nothing like teamwork to bring out the best in people. Keep up the teamwork and keep working hard. We have much to do to save America. I have been submitting legislation this week to make life better for fellow Virginians. If you have ideas for legislation, please send them to our team. Here is some of what has been on my mind and some of what I have been up to: | Senate Retreat | | Congratulations to Senator Ryan McDougle and the rest of the Senate Republican leadership team! | | | | | | | I attended the Virginia State Senate Retreat and the Republican Senate Caucus Retreat in Tysons Corner where we covered the upcoming legislative session, the budget, education and more. We have seventeen freshman Senators. Unfortunately the Democrats still have a two vote majority in the Senate. | Virginia Tech Game! | | Our friend David Andrews. | My friends Delegates Tony Wilt and Chris Runion. | Senator Mark Obenshain and fellow Special Forces veteran Nelson Smith. | A friend and former Delegate Nick Rush! | Tracy, my favorite Hokie, and I had a wonderful time seeing friends and colleagues from all over Virginia at the Virginia Tech game. It was great catching up! | Town of Victoria | | Lunenburg County | | Charlotte County | | Nottoway County | | Amherst County | | Buckingham County | | Amelia County | | Pittsylvania County | | Virginia Farm Bureau Legislative Meeting | | | | | | | | We attended the Virginia Farm Bureau Legislative dinner with District 56 Delegate Elect Tom Garrett in Buckingham County. Thank you, members of the Farm Bureau for sharing and discussing your legislative priorities with us. Thank you to our farmers for keeping us fed! | | | | | | == Our best days are still ahead of us. I'm running for Congress to help Trump Save America from radical Marxist policies that put America last. Congressman Bob Good abandoned our President Trump and endorsed a different candidate. I've been all over the district and I can tell you the fifth Congressional and the America First Agenda! I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause. Take care, please spread the word and I look forward to seeing you around the district! VA 5 Counties: Albemarle County (partial) Lynchburg City Pittsylvania County Campbell County Charlottesville City Louisa County Danville City Halifax County Powhatan County Bedford County (partial) Mecklenburg County Amherst County Goochland County Fluvanna County Hanover County (partial) Prince Edward County Appomattox County Nelson County Buckingham County Amelia County Nottoway County Charlotte County Lunenburg County Cumberland County | == | | | | == | | | | For God and Country, Delegate John McGuire Soli Deo Gloria Republican Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL == Pro-Life == Pro-Gun == The Spirit of Virginia Highest Award for Conservatism (ACU/ CPAC) Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 (Life Member) == == == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA New Email: john@mcguireva.com New Website: www.mcguireva.com | | == | == | == == == | Paid for and Authorized by McGuire for Virginia | | McGuire for Virginia | McGuire for Virginia, PO Box 242, Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireva.com powered by

body:
|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73825852/439742954/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTc2NTkwMS02Mjg5LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c9jWzyQaL1Bfx1VnGjI6m9fFt3uKxyfRCgZ3TWSwees=&emci=e9aa633f-5989-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=51765901-6289-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=43566853)

| | Peter, Donald Trump reminds us every day why we need to stop him next November, but we wanted to make sure you saw what he said last week: _**“We pledge to you that we will root out the communists, Marxists, fascists and the radical left thugs that live like vermin within the confines of our country that lie and steal and cheat on elections.”**_ That’s the rhetoric of fascists, dictators, and Hitler.

And Team Trump wouldn’t apologize – in fact, they doubled down. Trump’s spokesman said that if people don’t like Trump’s language, **_“their entire existence will be crushed when President Trump returns to the White House.”_**

**Peter, democracy is at stake in the 2020 election. Trump has made it clear that he wants to “crush” his political opponents, that he will treat his enemies as “vermin,” that he’s willing to cozy up to dictators like Putin and Kim Jong Un, and parrot the language of Hitler and Mussolini.**

**[_Will you pitch in $10, $25, or whatever you can to help us take on Donald Trump right here in Georgia and protect democracy?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73825853/439742955/710125701?refcode=20231122.1_DPG_11AE&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTc2NTkwMS02Mjg5LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c9jWzyQaL1Bfx1VnGjI6m9fFt3uKxyfRCgZ3TWSwees=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Carmen Goers
subject: This Thanksgiving, We're Grateful for You
body:
Join the Team

| | | | | | | |
---
| | | |
---
| | | **This Thanksgiving, ****We 're Grateful for YOU****
**
---

Dear Peter,
As Thanksgiving approaches, it's a time for reflection and gratitude. In the heart of Washington's 8th legislative district, our campaign has been a journey of resilience, purpose, and community. This season, we have so much to be thankful for – especially our incredible supporters and [esteemed endorsements](https://vgq.soundestlink.com/link/655e4417d48dfd5101d18b8f/655e43feb8078d6326d0819c/652845d9aa222127cf458b43?signature=08f7ef687ff4fe41b44995b859ed8f649e1da3e0f92db1d2978c20bfdbb09ee7).
Your unwavering belief in our mission has fueled us with hope and strength. Thanks to your support, we've received powerful endorsements from respected Republican leaders and organizations. These endorsements are not just symbols of trust; they're testaments to the shared vision we all hold dear for a better, brighter district.

---
| | | |
---
|
As we gather with our loved ones this Thanksgiving, let's remember the power of unity and the impact of collective action.

name: Our Revolution
subject: Bernie is under attack for calling out Netanyahu
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12499?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231122_PT_berniept_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_berniept&t=1011&akid=4925%2E5885482%2E5IfPI2

Peter Willis,

Our Jewish founder, Bernie Sanders, recently said: “While Israel has the right to go after Hamas, Netanyahu’s right-wing extremist government does not have the right to wage almost total warfare against the Palestinian people.”

This reasonable push to spare the lives of innocent civilians, which polling indicates is squarely in the center of American public opinion, has been met with ferocious opposition from AIPAC-friendly politicians, and AIPAC itself is now threatening to primary progressive Congressmembers calling for peace.

AIPAC is one of the most powerful special interest groups in American politics and it’s pledging to spend $100 million against progressive candidates in 2024.

We must have the back of Bernie, Barbara Lee, AOC, Summer Lee, and other progressives calling to end the needless slaughter of civilians. Can we count on you to click here and stand with Bernie? (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12499?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231122_PT_berniept_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_berniept&t=1012&akid=4925%2E5885482%2E5IfPI2)

STAND WITH BERNIE (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12499?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231122_PT_berniept_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_berniept&t=1013&akid=4925%2E5885482%2E5IfPI2)

AIPAC has, for far too long, disgracefully used its power to marginalize Jewish and other voices who dare to question the corrupt and hard right wing leadership of Bibi Netanyahu.

Here’s the truth: 66% of Americans (and 80% of Democrats!) support a ceasefire in Gaza.

With innocent lives at stake, we must not allow AIPAC to use its power and money to silence those who are speaking out to save families who have nothing to do with Hamas’ terrorist attacks on October 7th.

Sign here to stand with Bernie Sanders and other reasonable voices calling for peace and facing powerful opposition from extremist special interests like AIPAC. (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12499?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231122_PT_berniept_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_berniept&t=1014&akid=4925%2E5885482%2E5IfPI2)

When we organize, we win!

Our Revolution

Our nation’s gun violence crisis doesn’t stop—even on holidays

name: Hill Harper
subject: I received a strange phone call
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN
body:
There’s an article that just came out in POLITICO and I wanted you to hear the truth from me directly.
# [](https://act.hillharper.com/go/130?refcode=em20231122&t=1&akid=610%2E62735%2EszFowJ)
Peter,
There’s an article that just came out, and I wanted you to hear the truth from me directly. I didn’t intend for this to go public. But now that it is, I owe it to you all to tell the whole story.
Several weeks ago, I received a call from a major donor worth more than $100 million. This is a guy who gives lots of money to groups like AIPAC, Republicans like Rick Snyder, and super PACs trying to unseat progressives in Congress.
**I pick up the phone, and here’s what he basically says to me:**
> _‘Hill, we want you to drop out of the U.S. Senate race. We want you to primary Rashida Tlaib. And if you do, we’ll line up $10 million in super PAC money supporting you. Plus we’ll get you $10 million more in bundled campaign contributions.’_
**They were dangling money and power in front of me. I said no.** You watch movies and shows and imagine this is how politics works. But you never expect to _actually_ receive a call like this.
**Peter, I will not be bossed, bought, or bullied.**
They want to use their money to get me to drop out of a historic Senate race against one of their candidates. A race we can win. They want to fund me running against Rashida Talib. They believe their money can control the outcome of not just one, but two incredibly important elections in Michigan. I am one of the only U.S. Senate candidates who has called for a ceasefire which, by the way, the vast majority of Michigan Dems also support.
**By refusing their money, I know I’ve made myself a target, too.** But I did so because I believe we can only win this race by building an unprecedented grassroots movement. And by holding true to the principles we believe in.
[**I can’t do it without YOU****, Peter****. Will you donate $5 right now to help us win this race the right way?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231122?amount=5&refcode=em20231122-610&refcode2=610_62735_szFowJ&akid=610%2E62735%2EszFowJ) **The big money guys, the AIPAC folks — they’re going to come after us. But if enough of you donate, volunteer, and vote, we can go toe to toe and WIN.**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231122?amount=5&refcode=em20231122-610&refcode2=610_62735_szFowJ&akid=610%2E62735%2EszFowJ)**
Special interests and big-money donors believe they can buy anyone. Think about all the calls they’ve made where the person on the other end took that money.
We all feel like government isn’t working for everyday people — we ask ourselves why the rich get richer and the poor get poorer, why government can’t do anything to address the problems in our lives. Whether it’s guns in schools or spiraling health care costs or inflation. Calls like this are part of why, because big-money donors and special interests too often dictate the agenda.
**I’m running to uncorrupt our campaign finance system.** But that makes me no friend to the establishment, which was put in power by the wealthy donor class.
The last thing they expect is for us to build a grassroots movement strong enough to fight back against their millions of dollars. And that’s exactly what we can do with your help. [**So, please, make a $5 donation today if you’re with me.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231122?amount=5&refcode=em20231122-610&refcode2=610_62735_szFowJ&akid=610%2E62735%2EszFowJ)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20231122?amount=5&refcode=em20231122-610&refcode2=610_62735_szFowJ&akid=610%2E62735%2EszFowJ)**
Before I go, I just want to say thank you from the bottom of my heart. Thank you for all the love and support. We couldn’t do it without you.
— Hill Harper
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-footer?refcode=em20231122&t=2&refcode2=610_62735_szFowJ&akid=610%2E62735%2EszFowJ)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.hillharper.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=610%2E62735%2EszFowJ)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.hillharper.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.hillharper.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=610%2E62735%2EszFowJ)

To give by check:
Hill Harper for Michigan
PO Box 13195
Lansing, MI 48901
Email us: [info@hillharper.com](mailto:info@hillharper.com)
PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN

name: Madeleine Dean
subject: This Thanksgiving: I’m thankful for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mad4PA PAC
body:
**** Dear Peter,

Thanksgiving has always been my favorite holiday, and every year at this time I’m reminded of Connecticut Governor Wilbur Cross’ 1936 Thanksgiving Proclamation. Indeed, we’ve come “by a way that we did not know to the end of another year” – a challenging, surprising year – and yet I’m glad to have come this way with you, Peter.

This Thanksgiving and every day, I’m most thankful for the people in my life, from my husband, sons and daughters-in-law, and our grandchildren – to our broader family, friends, and community.

To my constituents and supporters – I count you among my many blessings. Thank you for both your support and confidence in me.

It is one of the greatest privileges of my life to serve in Congress – even when we are challenged by difficult times and out-of-touch leadership. There is much work yet to be done, and heading into what’s sure to be a contentious 2024, I’m so thankful to have you on this team.

From my family and me, I wish you a happy and safe Thanksgiving.

Warmly and sincerely,

_Madeleine_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73826947/439747084/-398328110?refcode=11222023_md_thanksgiving_en_1&refcode2=5ceef236-6589-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2VlZjIzNi02NTg5LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CJQw8mW1-c7AK7wolb8bCHUMeuZvJgcXy3BqBfwJUa0=&emci=382032fa-9e88-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=5ceef236-6589-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=36373569)
* * *
_Madeleine is an attorney, professor, mother, grandmother, and Member of Congress, representing Pennsylvania’s 4th Congressional District of Berks and Montgomery Counties. She is an outspoken leader who champions progressive priorities such as education, universal access to healthcare, gun safety, and ethical government.**Madeleine Dean has built a reputation for getting things done, and we need her to continue to be our voice to serve us in Congress.**_ _We are excited to have you on Team Dean! Our campaign is funded by people who care about our democracy and want to see continued progress in our community and in our country. name: Breaking News (via Team Gutierrez)
subject: The NRA is done for, Peter. Ted Cruz is next.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Roland Gutierrez For Texas

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: Thank you 🍁
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Thanks to your support, we've been able to spend the last week distributing hundreds of Thanksgiving turkeys to families across The Bronx and Queens.
Thanks to you all, hundreds of families and thousands of people will be able to eat a Thanksgiving meal this year that perhaps otherwise would have not.
Whether you chipped in via email, shared the message, or helped set up tables and distribute turkeys in person, the act of coming together to give one another a helping hand is something that leaves us all transformed.
Wishing you all a very Happy Thanksgiving 🍁 and sending all our home cooks out there good luck in their food prep for tomorrow!
Yours in service,
Alexandria

[ **[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20231122.U52ir1&refcode=em20231122-5362-P_FND_EGR_CTR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=5362%2E2526796%2EhIr9av)**

To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

subject: Ted Cruz Attacked Us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friend, Ted Cruz is attacking Colin Allred's campaign for U.S. Senate and spreading bold-faced lies. He's terrified of our movement. Colin needs your help to fight back. Can you help us raise $50,000 today by splitting a donation with Serve America? Donate now → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
Experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying Texas may be Democrats’ BEST pick-up opportunity in 2024, and Ted Cruz is going on the offensive because he’s terrified that Colin has a real chance of winning this thing.
We know Republicans are hell-bent on flipping the Senate next year – but if we win in Texas, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to defend the Senate!
Look, Colin is running a grassroots campaign. He's not taking a dime from corporations or special interests because he believes lawmakers should only be beholden to the people they serve – not wealthy donors.
That's why your support is so important, friend.
We're building a people-powered movement from the ground up, and it's going to take a historic outpouring of grassroots support to compete with Cruz and his mega donors. So please, will you rush $20, or whatever you can spare today, split with Serve America, to help Colin stand up to the GOP's attacks, defeat Ted Cruz and protect our Senate majority? → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
Every single dollar counts in our fight to flip Texas blue. Thanks for giving what you can.
Team Allred

name: Laura Friedman
subject: Giving Thanks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73827806/439750147/-1415976427?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2YyYTRkYmEtNjc4OS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=v03vlviPiZNqDdhijd5IwL-DDkfR55yoNew8TsmycTs=) Friend,

It’s that time of year when we give thanks, when we look back and reflect. But this year, like most recent years in this decade, feels precarious. Israel and Palestine, Russia and Ukraine, Azerbaijan, Artsakh and Armenia: all of these conflicts are far away. **They’re also affecting us right here at home.** I represent the largest Armenian population outside of Armenia and Los Angeles’ Jewish community is home to the second largest federated Jewish community in the United States. Our Ukrainian and Russian populations are also sizable. Like so many of our neighbors and community members, I have friends and family directly impacted by these foreign wars. And we are hurting because of it, even while we are safe. It is truly a gift to wake up in the morning to the peace this country affords its citizens. This country was built by immigrants and it is still the country that the world’s war-torn children look to for refuge. There is never a day that I am not grateful to call the United States home. It is a gift to represent a country and district I love every day in the California State Assembly, which leads me to the next thing the last few years have really hammered home. I am so grateful for our democracy that has proven both fragile and resilient in recent years. They are, at their heart, a social contract between the people and the government. I believe in that democracy, in the protections this country provides. It is one of the core reasons that I have dedicated myself to public service and what galvanized me to run for higher office. I’m grateful that I get to represent this community and that my constituents put their trust in me to fight to make our state a better place for us all to call home. Thank you for letting me share what I’m thankful for this year. Laura

clean_body: | = Friend, It’s that time of year when we give thanks, when we look back and reflect. But this year, like most recent years in this decade, feels precarious. Israel and Palestine, Russia and Ukraine, Azerbaijan, Artsakh and Armenia: all of these conflicts are far away. They’re also affecting us right here at home. I represent the largest Armenian population outside of Armenia and Los Angeles’ Jewish community is home to the second largest federated Jewish community in the United States. Our Ukrainian and Russian populations are also sizable. Like so many of our neighbors and community members, I have friends and family directly impacted by these foreign wars. And we are hurting because of it, even while we are safe. It is truly a gift to wake up in the morning to the peace this country affords its citizens. This country was built by immigrants and it is still the country that the world’s war-torn children look to for refuge. There is never a day that I am not grateful to call the United States home. It is a gift to represent a country and district I love every day in the California State Assembly, which leads me to the next thing the last few years have really hammered home. I am so grateful for our democracy that has proven both fragile and resilient in recent years. They are, at their heart, a social contract between the people and the government. I believe in that democracy, in the protections this country provides. It is one of the core reasons that I have dedicated myself to public service and what galvanized me to run for higher office. I’m grateful that I get to represent this community and that my constituents put their trust in me to fight to make our state a better place for us all to call home. Thank you for letting me share what I’m thankful for this year. Laura | **=** | | Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress Laura's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! November 22, 2023 Bringing _you_ the latest news, updates and what you _need to know_ about the race for U.S. Senate in Ohio
---
|
---
# Three Things to Know This Week:
---
1. East Palestine Leaders Endorse Matt Dolan for US Senate.

2. Matt Dolan Continues Strong Defense of Israel, Calls Out Big Tech’s Censorship of Conservative Voices.

3. Happy Thanksgiving from the Dolan Family!

---
# Get up to speed...
---
|
---
**East Palestine Leaders Endorse Matt Dolan for US Senate.**
* Matt Dolan recently earned the endorsement of East Palestine Mayor Trent Conaway, East Palestine Fire Chief Keith Drabick and Columbiana County Commissioner Tim Weigle.

* These notable endorsements were featured in Ohio news outlets and national publications
as well:
* Fox News: 2024 showdown: [East Palestine leaders take sides in Ohio's Republicanprimary race](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=960e4b069b7442e39489c9d8e94e591d&_e=MbU3yD-kcycFWZlzqKafdj0QZEMXq5bRUsaewojR7J8q1SxQRxT-WseYE__yrisVJI-1KvU7lguyiIOTsxHgmlRHwj6-vdh7A1jVtZJnuyeVQZ-NgosCuU5_sQ0lQcP-FivWxVQEkVdJzZLA6d-_m-zPWGqt02m4tCHsXzL7_JlycaBKju2gwOBbVYssnNTTkDbJLivhrw1e5X2oh7EJBOzT-Mj953nx357xyuL9YPiKbjNWz0SuaGbOIokBIiK9CvO_OcvyEBvEPA3M6R-r_hFMjPnf2LgnGasoN9m3YG0SInX6QOOFSBrm9W9eDTEl)
* Townhall: [Matt Dolan Receives Key Endorsement for U.S. Senate Race](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=960e4b069b7442e39489c9d8e94e591d&_e=MbU3yD-kcycFWZlzqKafdue_k9axZipNV3r8rZRptNyddqyRl-bK-8raAMN1SYLx4TjimexVURs1pe10i5ydTvIU-J1Q8zURPscd2RMpUG8zy_oY2qrviPpu0xq6ptXFfvS9YQKSarCkerAU_12-nv8Th6-Cq0Mi6x7XGpno_oZTB2tTuwXIfOfiZWlaY7y_qtuQW-mcqnjLZrqMgnO_AZPwjye6hxlIAl-AiOZ3SCzLmjSH3MDrA4SOOvjYv4OeZF8V7wLkEpcTO0euUUiqHROi9YSmfWhP-A1EIJitWEe2Feo2i43fEqgua-0sLoZA)

* Matt noted the significance of these endorsements: “This year our entire nation has seen that Columbiana County personifies resilience, hard work, and grit,” Dolan said. “When the derailment occurred, local leaders and first responders stepped up. They didn’t take ‘no’ for an answer. They worked together to hold intergovernmental leaders, agencies, and private companies alike accountable, and they demanded results. It’s the kind of leadership that makes Ohio and America great, and I’m honored to have their support. In the U.S. Senate I will never stop working to build upon their progress and deliver results for East Palestine, Columbiana County, and our entire state.”

**
Matt Dolan Continues Strong Defense of Israel, Calls Out Big Tech’s Censorship of Conservative Voices.
**
* This morning, The Washington Times featured an op-ed authored by Matt Dolan in opposition to conservative censorship by Big Tech.

* FLASHBACK: In October, Dolan stood in defense of Israel, proclaiming their right to self-defense and that Hamas should be destroyed. Dolan’s op-ed and social media advocacy was suppressed by X as “violent speech.”

* Matt Dolan will continue to fearlessly stand tall for the people of Israel and for every American’s fundamental rights.

**Happy Thanksgiving from the Dolan Family!**
* Matt Dolan, and members of the Dolan family, wish all of our supporters and every Ohioan, everyone a very healthy and happy Thanksgiving holiday.

* Today, and always, we especially thank the brave men and women serving our country in uniform, both at home and abroad. Your courage, sacrifice and service are what keep us safe and preserve our rights and liberties.

clean_body: | | | November 22, 2023 Bringing you the latest news, updates and what you need to know about the race for U.S. Senate in Ohio | Three Things to Know This Week: 1. East Palestine Leaders Endorse Matt Dolan for US Senate. 2. Matt Dolan Continues Strong Defense of Israel, Calls Out Big Tech’s Censorship of Conservative Voices. 3. Happy Thanksgiving from the Dolan Family! Get up to speed... | East Palestine Leaders Endorse Matt Dolan for US Senate. Matt Dolan recently earned the endorsement of East Palestine Mayor Trent Conaway, East Palestine Fire Chief Keith Drabick and Columbiana County Commissioner Tim Weigle. These notable endorsements were featured in Ohio news outlets and national publications as well: Fox News: 2024 showdown: Townhall: Matt noted the significance of these endorsements: “This year our entire nation has seen that Columbiana County personifies resilience, hard work, and grit,” Dolan said. “When the derailment occurred, local leaders and first responders stepped up. They didn’t take ‘no’ for an answer. They worked together to hold intergovernmental leaders, agencies, and private companies alike accountable, and they demanded results. It’s the kind of leadership that makes Ohio and America great, and I’m honored to have their support. In the U.S. Senate I will never stop working to build upon their progress and deliver results for East Palestine, Columbiana County, and our entire state.” | | - | | | | | | | | Matt Dolan Continues Strong Defense of Israel, Calls Out Big Tech’s Censorship of Conservative Voices. This morning, The Washington Times featured an op-ed authored by Matt Dolan in opposition to conservative censorship by Big Tech. FLASHBACK: In October, Dolan stood in defense of Israel, proclaiming their right to self-defense and that Hamas should be destroyed. Dolan’s op-ed and social media advocacy was suppressed by X as “violent speech.” Matt Dolan will continue to fearlessly stand tall for the people of Israel and for every American’s fundamental rights. | | | | | Happy Thanksgiving from the Dolan Family! Matt Dolan, and members of the Dolan family, wish all of our supporters and every Ohioan, everyone a very healthy and happy Thanksgiving holiday. Today, and always, we especially thank the brave men and women serving our country in uniform, both at home and abroad. Your courage, sacrifice and service are what keep us safe and preserve our rights and liberties. | | | | | From the Trail | | | Over the past week, Matt Dolan and the Ohio First Team were busy knocking on doors and talking to voters across the state. This included meeting with the Meigs County Chamber of Commerce, partnering with the Cuyahoga County Republican Party in a fellowship drive, and a visit to Ohio Stadium for a dominant OSU victory a week before the Buckeyes take it to That Team Up North! #GoBucks | | | Interested in joining Team Dolan? Matt Dolan needs your help to bring our conservative voices to the U.S. Senate, consider contributing below to help us WIN in Ohio! | | | Forward this email to a friend! Visit DolanforOhio.com for more information on Matt Dolan’s campaign. | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Don't want to receive our emails anymore?

Friends - ahead of tomorrow’s holiday, I want to wish you a very happy Thanksgiving.
During this time of reflection and gratitude, I am more thankful than ever to be surrounded by such a warm and supportive community.
I hope you’re able to take time with loved ones this week, get a chance to relax, and of course, enjoy some delicious food.
I’ll be back with plenty of updates from the House after the holiday, but for now - happy Thanksgiving! I’m so grateful for you.
-Sara

body:
Here’s to family, freedom, and the American dream.

| | | [](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=190f6edaa63f4653948e75973d3de95e&_e=JMMdK04H6shQnbDMVxOcNz5S3Rk05ltQaXTbyMCeK28vxhP9nKke1TQQ3al2xZx_0ORSQ7L0LHyLXN4ieonLb6AlwEuLS_sUpEY0DykMDLMJt3ktJKSGLCdAETgNB-CxrtBjnPzrrqQ6w8UjWTtJBt-ZbNsEd_PCF-mieYMKjZCNRK3yTh3yrAZamwJvpRWL9vvm65eFuYdYYbQbSyvyEu3ITxOcaT60gs7Mn_eacfAiwcyiwxUPhhigL3KwNHGB5a632zr9Oe46zebS0Vrj4dUddI5JfNZUC1vqpM42a0rEZIY44o43-_ot1QPMRcUF-a-M8g2oCpnpozdFJ5PDBtNcDmhUzeD1L1ss7G4rz94%3D)
---
| | |
---
| | **Thanksgiving Greetings 🦃**
---
---
| | First and foremost, happy Thanksgiving! I hope you find a moment to pause the holiday chaos and spend cherished time with the people you love. That’s what this season is about, right? There’s no doubt that our country needs some fixing. You hear me talk an awful lot about soaring [inflation](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=190f6edaa63f4653948e75973d3de95e&_e=JMMdK04H6shQnbDMVxOcN6QdjlIUTab2AYG58Ym9B9eaDVUMeAf0A0-53TNcaazGGPcm-2yZajKo101L_Pzc1jFxxsIsBOggNeJmt0ZZOuDEvQ0NzA5T782GvuXIqw2UQeELU-WAh4ivGUqmg3mrNWZ8z8s77pmKvOgBt7HIl0LxH-y3vsqKDynF2Pc9QA4oWnuvxskE8I5u4PUN7A2HQqbTZts9u7icUXblKqEOVGT8u1Vb5_inVdGDJCGD2BkdRiSfWI6LkbtHJ7xMzA5zEfUPqdRSN_tP-xw2vY2o-rfFF6AgJzhtwzYtJ8KAZSdN) and [woke](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=190f6edaa63f4653948e75973d3de95e&_e=JMMdK04H6shQnbDMVxOcN4UY09emEG80uhaow9Id5mttqEIAOO9z9xuH3sBdqGBTLrpcmO33N8jjxMFoGkLPAsEcb2hrW15UjEVugAMPPuRkg4UWB3GonTaAEWufgTz22zpd-W_V1oY15G19C-cOtbdAYfA4QSVNPlmmahlEJMy69Bdr1mE5IGIvivFzlzUtSv7dsbcxUm8ICzxCdmX57utRFIJWXKcSyBrClGyHByqlDq7_UWnpibhXEW0kuHTo36SNza45nm2WNmv66Iuc0_0_UfYwO-BHSihATgT7qlI%3D) nonsense—and it can be troubling to see the Biden administration steering us in the wrong direction. But I never want to lose sight of how blessed we are to live in the greatest nation in the world. Brave men and women have fought and died to create a Republic that is free, just, and welcoming. It doesn’t matter where you came from or what you want to be, we see time and again that the American Dream is alive and well—and for that, we should all be grateful. Beyond that, I am thankful for my wife, Kelly, who is my rock. It’s no secret that this year has been full of ups and downs—and she has been there for me through it all. Our daughter, Isabel, makes us proud every day and we can’t wait to see what she accomplishes in the year ahead. To the people of Tennessee—thank you for having my back, especially over the last few months. It is truly the honor of a lifetime to serve you and fight for the conservative values we hold dear. Every word of encouragement keeps me fighting, and there’s nowhere else I’d rather be. As you gather around the table tomorrow, I hope you are surrounded by love that sparks a sincere feeling of gratitude. Happy Thanksgiving, and as I always say, thank you for sending me here!
---
| | |
---

| | If you’re looking for ways to give back to the East Tennessee community, our [local food pantries](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=190f6edaa63f4653948e75973d3de95e&_e=JMMdK04H6shQnbDMVxOcN6QdjlIUTab2AYG58Ym9B9d69P9UAvqNn1XD5FoTSmcVUEHqEMrv8VnnXLeqYVPV3kX9DlgSJxO4g0ay9Fkx5hiC04H05_UVQ1M0BLLL0mlWDM9wfteW6seUH9NgFP74kVfFDUDDKqwmzeUY92BBSEABQYU6U76n-9NyBViorcTNAiqYDJb8XHJ7VxuJcjlnnT4JOGZN9T-YGjhcjXmhoi1APaiZTXpfx-pLg2xtXcHH79fOv-tpz20Y_qp6jlx7C5wFIqvtmWCEwAvnhmFmt6duO94HPT_KHcxiQltXmhGm) could use a helping hand. Second Harvest Food Bank provides roughly 150,000 meals every month, and with the current price of groceries, it’s driven their operating costs up by about 20 percent. Meanwhile, the Knoxville Dream Center’s mobile food pantry feeds around 400 people each week. Both organizations say they can’t do it without financial and physical donations, as well as volunteers. That means there are plenty of ways to give or get involved, and we all know the Volunteer State is known for that type of thing. For more details about how you can help, visit the websites for[ Knoxville Dream Center](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=190f6edaa63f4653948e75973d3de95e&_e=JMMdK04H6shQnbDMVxOcN3--mbI8IzPzO3tVHKSlVjPtFhMKtM_yzhtay67rUKORFiHJC3btTmns8zO5LTjTqJ4yNfglfYzNafFMhffoKhhU6Qov7dY9hqUXClru4c7zM8VbPgOrR5NsnsNtxfDP83ALM8sR4tPgO9wrJVp6y8-h284CGsdB2zYOIKJf7xnIJv8es-jZDgpk3nffCTUBrA%3D%3D) and [Second Harvest Food Bank.](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=190f6edaa63f4653948e75973d3de95e&_e=JMMdK04H6shQnbDMVxOcN2k-tPq1ummZE1BzlChPMtKr8x77w-c6SPccHlKqFOclfO4UiUdCtOM5GHsWTzareKdukU0KXzuFmfxNohrj85bYhD4ArhnMhqOIpNlh3tgS-1ejRCZmHRzAUWwDfHh45eeqGjJJiQzODdxBpiB5sIae6DF4DfK7uqf_jIYcLS1lM_Moxtk50uX_c3FRxRY7pA%3D%3D)

clean_body: Here’s to family, freedom, and the American dream. | | | | | | | | Thanksgiving Greetings 🦃 | | First and foremost, happy Thanksgiving! I hope you find a moment to pause the holiday chaos and spend cherished time with the people you love. That’s what this season is about, right? There’s no doubt that our country needs some fixing. You hear me talk an awful lot about soaring and nonsense—and it can be troubling to see the Biden administration steering us in the wrong direction. But I never want to lose sight of how blessed we are to live in the greatest nation in the world. Brave men and women have fought and died to create a Republic that is free, just, and welcoming. It doesn’t matter where you came from or what you want to be, we see time and again that the American Dream is alive and well—and for that, we should all be grateful. Beyond that, I am thankful for my wife, Kelly, who is my rock. It’s no secret that this year has been full of ups and downs—and she has been there for me through it all. Our daughter, Isabel, makes us proud every day and we can’t wait to see what she accomplishes in the year ahead. To the people of Tennessee—thank you for having my back, especially over the last few months. It is truly the honor of a lifetime to serve you and fight for the conservative values we hold dear. Every word of encouragement keeps me fighting, and there’s nowhere else I’d rather be. As you gather around the table tomorrow, I hope you are surrounded by love that sparks a sincere feeling of gratitude. Happy Thanksgiving, and as I always say, thank you for sending me here! | | | | | Season Of Giving 🥫 | | If you’re looking for ways to give back to the East Tennessee community, our could use a helping hand. Second Harvest Food Bank provides roughly 150,000 meals every month, and with the current price of groceries, it’s driven their operating costs up by about 20 percent. Meanwhile, the Knoxville Dream Center’s mobile food pantry feeds around 400 people each week. Both organizations say they can’t do it without financial and physical donations, as well as volunteers. That means there are plenty of ways to give or get involved, and we all know the Volunteer State is known for that type of thing. For more details about how you can help, visit the websites for and | | | | | Just For Fun 🎉 | | → It’s beginning to look a lot like Christmas 🎄 ()→ Pardon his faux-paw 😅 ()→ A heart for service 🧡 () | | | | | Product Of The Month 🛍 | | | | | | | Please chip in today to help us oust radical Democrats and put a check on the Biden-Harris agenda. | | Stay in Touch 👇 | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Burchett for Congress

Peter,

I hope you and your family have a wonderful Thanksgiving holiday tomorrow. I am looking forward to spending time with my loved ones, sharing our favorite meal, and making memories.

This year, I am especially grateful for you. **Your continued support of our grassroots campaign to keep CA-47 blue is the driving force behind all that we accomplish.**

I am thankful for your support every step of the way -- from launching our campaign earlier this year, to now less than a year away from Election Day, every moment matters. And it is your support that motivates me to lace up my sneakers every day and hit the ground running on the campaign trail.

I am confident that together, we can win this seat and keep our fundamental rights. But for now, I want to take this moment to recognize your incredible support.

Thank you, Peter, and I hope you, your friends and loved ones have a great Thanksgiving.

With gratitude,

Joanna

This changes everything, friend. Without a Democratic incumbent running, we have _almost no chance_ of holding West Virginia. **Donald Trump won the state by almost 40 points. ** **Florida is a different story.** Experts are already calling this one of the most competitive races in the nation — and last time, Rick Scott only won his seat by 0.12%!
**The path to the Senate runs DIRECTLY through Florida. I know it, you know it, Rick Scott knows it, and Mitch McConnell knows it.** That means Rick Scott won’t be alone with his millions in this — the GOP will be spending _ more than ever _to keep this seat red and defeat my campaign.
This race is a statistical tie right now. But, if we're outspent over these next few weeks, Rick Scott _will_ retake the lead — _and we may never catch back up._
**[This race in Florida is Democrats' BEST chance to save our Senate majority — and I'm counting on your help to win. Will you rush $5 right now to flip Florida blue and save our Senate majority? name: Mazie Hirono
subject: Building a world we can be grateful for
body:
|
#
Aloha Peter, I know you are getting ready to step away for Thanksgiving, as am I, so I will keep this brief. I am looking forward to celebrating all I am grateful for tomorrow, yet I can’t help but think ahead and wonder what this day will look like next year. We will be just weeks removed from the 2024 election, when our democracy and so many of our most cherished freedoms will be on the line. Over the coming months, we must work together for the sake of our communities and our loved ones to protect our Democratic Senate majority, flip the House, and re-elect President Biden to a second term. If we do that, we can sit down at the Thanksgiving table next year knowing that our fight for our working families, our planet, and our future can live on another day. With gratitude for the opportunities that we’ll have to build a better world. I’m ready to get to work, and I am so glad that this team will be fighting alongside me. Mahalo and Happy Thanksgiving, Mazie | | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73829209/439755161/-2048798125?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20221122_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzY1ZmQxYS02YTg5LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xsSrgUrDb2vmNBOcG9qVHYykQGtSNBsZT0t2XaggNuQ=)

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: Before you start prepping for tomorrow…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Nov2023-FR-November?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Nov2023-FR-November?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25]
Friend, if you’re anything like my family, you’re probably getting ready to throw down in the kitchen tomorrow, so I’ll keep this quick.

This year, I was booted from the House Intelligence Committee, we’ve had two House speakers, and I’ve almost lost track of the number of times Donald Trump has been indicted (for those of you keeping score at home, it’s a whopping four times ).

But no matter what Republicans have thrown our way, you’ve been by my side every step of the way — and I’m incredibly grateful to know I can always count on you to have my back.

The holiday season is always tough on fundraising, and I know the last thing you probably want to read today is another campaign email. But if you’d be able to chip in even a couple bucks so we can avoid an end-of-month fundraising scramble when we’re back online next Monday, I’d really appreciate your help. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Nov2023-FR-November?refcode=E5079-20231122-PreThanksgiving-SL-Holiday&amount=25]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

If anyone deserves some serious R&R this week, it’s this team. Friend, I hope your Thanksgiving is full of good food and quality time with the people you love!

Take care,

Eric

Friends, I think of myself as an educator and problem solver... although some people might call me a bit of a troublemaker. Let me explain.
I got my start teaching middle school English in Watts. But, after I saw bureaucratic failings within the school district, I joined up with the ACLU and took on the LAUSD bureaucracy and their seniority policy—because my bottom line is kids come first.
**There's the trouble (for some): I'm not content to simply ride things out when concerned people recognize big changes are needed.**
Inspired to take further action, I put my teaching career on pause to go to law school and then join the Obama Administration, where I worked on issues around civil rights. After that, I came home and was elected to the L.A. School Board, where I've continued to fight to make things better.
Although this has been the experience of my life so far, **I'm running for Congress because I'm not okay with the way a lot of politicians in Washington D.C. are doing things, and I don't think you are, either.**
Endless attacks on reproductive freedom. Climate change denial. Unraveling Social Security and Medicare. All while everyday families are stretching dollars and barely making things work.
[**Donate today and help us build a grassroots movement to change direction in Congress.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73829458/439756328/1183499175?refcode=2023-11-22-eom&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=64fa397e-6b89-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjRmYTM5N2UtNmI4OS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=O4LQ4WRQEK9EVqS19Wlo-Lw45xcXyCwamhASIck6zcU=)
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73829459/439756329/1183499175?refcode=2023-11-22-eom&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=64fa397e-6b89-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjRmYTM5N2UtNmI4OS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=O4LQ4WRQEK9EVqS19Wlo-Lw45xcXyCwamhASIck6zcU=)
I will be a forceful voice for real change in Congress. Because if the so-called leaders out there are proud of their extreme track record and inaction on the basics, then it's time for new leaders, don't you think?
More soon, because we _can_ be so much more. And because we have a lot of work ahead of us.
_Nick_

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73829553/439756491/-898110066?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2MwYWEwYTQtNmI4OS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=yMty_RI_x3rrykma3T-61wXS9BcXbgVMPgYpig9pIHE=)
Hi there, it is officially the holiday season!

In my household, this means it is time to start baking our favorite desserts. My family is Cuban, and I am in charge of making flan -- so today, before you sign off to spend Thanksgiving with your loved ones, I thought I would share my family recipe with you.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73829554/439756492/-381882994?refcode=em-11.22.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2MwYWEwYTQtNmI4OS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=yMty_RI_x3rrykma3T-61wXS9BcXbgVMPgYpig9pIHE=)
**_Here are the ingredients you will need:_**
* Vanilla extract
* Six eggs
* Two cans each of evaporated and condensed milk
* Sugar
* A large mixing bowl
* A large roasting pan
* A measuring cup

**_Here is how to make this wonderful dessert:_**
1. Measure one cup of sugar and melt inside the thick mixing bowl. Do this on the stove on a low heat until it bubbles up and melts -- this will take 6-7 minutes until it turns into a caramel. Coat the inside of the bowl with the caramel. As it gets thicker it will be easier to coat the sides. Put the bowl with caramel in the refrigerator for at least one hour or until firm.
2. Crack your six eggs into a separate mixing bowl and add your cans of evaporated and condensed milk. Add a splash of pure vanilla extract to taste, then mix.
3. Pour the custard mixture into your chilled caramel. Fill your large roasting pan 2⁄3 with water and place your bowl with the mixture inside. Cover the bowl with two layers of aluminum foil. Bake at 350o for about 90 minutes or longer until a knife placed in the center comes out clean.
4. Once removed from the oven and fully cooked, cool to room temperature, and refrigerate overnight to cool. To serve, place a plate over the bowl and carefully tip it over until your flan pops out – hopefully in one piece. 🤣 Godspeed!

I hope you have a wonderful Thanksgiving holiday with your friends and family.

Happy baking!
Marlene

clean_body: | = Hi there, it is officially the holiday season! In my household, this means it is time to start baking our favorite desserts. My family is Cuban, and I am in charge of making flan -- so today, before you sign off to spend Thanksgiving with your loved ones, I thought I would share my family recipe with you. = Here are the ingredients you will need: Vanilla extract Six eggs Two cans each of evaporated and condensed milk Sugar A large mixing bowl A large roasting pan A measuring cup Here is how to make this wonderful dessert: 1. Measure one cup of sugar and melt inside the thick mixing bowl. Do this on the stove on a low heat until it bubbles up and melts -- this will take 6-7 minutes until it turns into a caramel. Coat the inside of the bowl with the caramel. As it gets thicker it will be easier to coat the sides. Put the bowl with caramel in the refrigerator for at least one hour or until firm. 2. Crack your six eggs into a separate mixing bowl and add your cans of evaporated and condensed milk. Add a splash of pure vanilla extract to taste, then mix. 3. Pour the custard mixture into your chilled caramel. Fill your large roasting pan 2⁄3 with water and place your bowl with the mixture inside. Cover the bowl with two layers of aluminum foil. Bake at 350o for about 90 minutes or longer until a knife placed in the center comes out clean. 4. Once removed from the oven and fully cooked, cool to room temperature, and refrigerate overnight to cool. To serve, place a plate over the bowl and carefully tip it over until your flan pops out – hopefully in one piece. 🤣 Godspeed! I hope you have a wonderful Thanksgiving holiday with your friends and family. Happy baking! Marlene | =** | Marlene's campaign to flip AZ-01 is being built from the ground up with grassroots support! = To learn more about Marlene and how she's fighting for Arizona families, please visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . PAID FOR BY MARLENE FOR CONGRESS Marlene for Congress 7904 E. Chaparral Road, Suite A110-472 Scottsdale, AZ 85250 United States

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
We are building a world that values all life—no matter people’s faith or ethnicity. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvutVpvqJSu3Ur1OxH8O5zHW9WeWvbFy2CkrMUqU1Y8-m5TR6FtXR5-ghAgaFnBQUE_YuyoH0CmBWFy04t2YPXEKPRuaEF6vWDZ4ikm4t1t-ou9Zvw__LRhpqPIDbDwiDYZlzuAoGb35M1FpuSNVrD5giVkh2aNZsau3gulkMjy-MTud6Ph1Bd3szWpKyv6gJQP2GhmOUJ-Y6WoBfM_aGEYmJUeUdVwDGnCsKdaBJN7CJ0gfB131a0bKvFx56eP9ti8FzZV8XSaDrlz6oCLVX8-w/41i/FXfJgItZTvKcRtTFd4MWVg/h0/QTbgAnq3QH49MI8CO_uZS87OiHidnnUeYVOeAQd6hhk)

Friend, Our movement for a ceasefire is gaining momentum. At least 43 members of Congress have now called for a ceasefire, and we welcome the news of a first step: a temporary pause in violence in Gaza. But I want to be clear: A temporary pause is not an end to the violence that has already killed 14,000 Palestinians. This negotiation is thankfully leading to release of some hostages and those arbitrarily detained, mostly children and women. For a real end to the violence and release of all hostages and those detained, we must facilitate a permanent ceasefire that can lead to a real end to the war crimes, the siege on Gaza, the occupation, and the apartheid system. **If this short-term agreement expires, the bombing of innocent civilians will continue. We need a permanent ceasefire that saves lives, brings all the hostages and those arbitrarily detained home, and puts an end to this horrific violence.** **As Jewish Voice for Peace wrote:**
> _“This is the moment to be loud and clear: we need a full and lasting ceasefire now. We will double our organizing. We will keep protesting, keep calling, keep pushing.”_
[**Can you chip in now to help continue the urgent push for a permanent ceasefire agreement?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wvMrcKvsSpr_QNqVelaeCKZn6_iy7tDS5NVCpMJzFtaKorcQJkFUWj-xrRgLLs_bkICoxRrujocEOuwoDVvEc1YPCq7OgEp2USr2pdI4GaB0g9mmauxUTw808x7tkRgigSrckzUngG-0QxMj3SikeK0dlcW4iaFAAB44n69BGff4LFX_gAUxzGLGiI8reexiwv4FpWKyiMy8MFgeGxjEKzZxAyAH8sLFc865qmysGozuHeBUK1zsV-SQinfTt2TP1NN8MfBc-MSaKt78rJNaRpxCJj3i1OfBgRP3QtfqjNhV6szmh5jHPJx9C6LR8fxyIry2smFyqfLv-f3t9cVYW9MhNGPCGM3KPZq9PuaNIcIp6Dp-m7jzIkYUOoK7Kff6dvSIlbispFpOo7FQwf3Z0NaXf3DBJ7WdWeg4MAhNObz2DbWbubNnbzJzl1wQu_C5Q/41i/FXfJgItZTvKcRtTFd4MWVg/h1/SCAhQN6WEZPySkLJsX6MFGeqEU2MAaeebhTpkQ5hbmU) | [CHIP IN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wvMrcKvsSpr_QNqVelaeCKZn6_iy7tDS5NVCpMJzFtaIQA0u2H16-M1dg0xMPHJ0GhHLs0qFNhIRdrivcCJ_gdedipB51K-267EeXIYkx62_kBKzCFDwEkWINW4WRcJpxGK6m3M34xYsus-RmKFStZVQ5YkiZklzKgV0q4qx316mq2rcFgRlw7s_fd0IXkdQ-oqo12udF4HfNVGUtkS6yvsW-bEiqNsZUYdMJzB6Ku1CO9kLdWUK2WFx0Y98Oy4pnBJrcgBMXEZjB86F7C0uten7eRsgh2MDTvDPjvyOuB-BvAKlTny_xQxDE481ZwlHm6Bm_PigCf6CNOqTc2iNA5eereP1Vxg7knaPQz-gFBZUg3TFjsx_VQLlyukGyt8UjTR3JL6o6BfWbAPQjmPBlN2aKxHy4tna8ZWlSkaatJlOnwklU_2kt1bGE7nrvVp4s/41i/FXfJgItZTvKcRtTFd4MWVg/h2/9O9hvmZmLGuJVbc-2Oykrxonvwlg5CvHoaEXUW5pu-U)
