We must move with urgency to save as many lives as possible and achieve a permanent ceasefire agreement. We know that more bombs won’t make any of us safe.
**We must also stay firm against any further displacement of Palestinians and forced annexation of their land, which will only perpetuate this conflict. Expanding the illegal occupation will never lead to a just and lasting peace.**
Israeli settlers and soldiers have also escalated violence against Palestinians in the occupied West Bank, where my grandmother lives. I pray that one day, my grandmother will be able to pick her olives and figs on her farm while she is truly free and lives with no fear.
Together, we must address the root causes of this conflict. We must raise our voices and demand that our federal government stop funding war crimes, and stop supporting human rights violations.
We know that Palestinians are not disposable.
[**Please donate today to support my unwavering advocacy not only for a ceasefire, but to ensure the human rights of all people.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wvMrcKvsSpr_QNqVelaeCKZn6_iy7tDS5NVCpMJzFtaFNKlbRjdWy9ShYNIqYZ_Wmso3ZZFpKExu1K3ruQUX4dTwTGG2UPuWHyCjyR1qknW3GvdWD-xSftyZWge64K9hWTH5zva888z2GQzS3QpzpC7vh57E12YHT7xQpWtU2hWpeyo-uvq2wF5WFkE4096Jmf9qATvO0BdiL_HoeEzQ3YFAj__lS20pVkLqgGSGeiFqfXiy066Ogs2ICzB_A3ef11CLZhRVWXSt1gPUe-YWS--bOLoCjSiN5qturR4U-3t936zo7AyaYpNwiex2kraT6xcMXaK6r3lHETuWnGjSXPjTySxxx_ZylcfRKFxt0WfkTaRpbBqDdmL2Ze5PF-NfVYObp95QqsFm1c8Iyymts9ebSKjS39Q84UZoXcdzSSfKj3rE4JGfXjzF6FqXnsqSk/41i/FXfJgItZTvKcRtTFd4MWVg/h3/Xje4Q5INR9djhICOL5gMnQcFpNfoUdoCQwLgQGBcs4M)

clean_body: We are building a world that values all life—no matter people’s faith or ethnicity. | | | Friend, Our movement for a ceasefire is gaining momentum. At least 43 members of Congress have now called for a ceasefire, and we welcome the news of a first step: a temporary pause in violence in Gaza. But I want to be clear: A temporary pause is not an end to the violence that has already killed 14,000 Palestinians. This negotiation is thankfully leading to release of some hostages and those arbitrarily detained, mostly children and women. For a real end to the violence and release of all hostages and those detained, we must facilitate a permanent ceasefire that can lead to a real end to the war crimes, the siege on Gaza, the occupation, and the apartheid system. If this short-term agreement expires, the bombing of innocent civilians will continue. We need a permanent ceasefire that saves lives, brings all the hostages and those arbitrarily detained home, and puts an end to this horrific violence. As Jewish Voice for Peace wrote: “This is the moment to be loud and clear: we need a full and lasting ceasefire now. We will double our organizing. We will keep protesting, keep calling, keep pushing.” | We must move with urgency to save as many lives as possible and achieve a permanent ceasefire agreement. We know that more bombs won’t make any of us safe. We must also stay firm against any further displacement of Palestinians and forced annexation of their land, which will only perpetuate this conflict. Expanding the illegal occupation will never lead to a just and lasting peace. Israeli settlers and soldiers have also escalated violence against Palestinians in the occupied West Bank, where my grandmother lives. I pray that one day, my grandmother will be able to pick her olives and figs on her farm while she is truly free and lives with no fear. Together, we must address the root causes of this conflict. We must raise our voices and demand that our federal government stop funding war crimes, and stop supporting human rights violations. We know that Palestinians are not disposable. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | I will keep pushing for peace, humanity, to stop the displacement of Palestinians, and for an end to the occupation. Together, we are building a world that values all life—no matter people’s faith or ethnicity. In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . subject: The most effective way to reduce abortions
body:
The single-most-effective best way to reduce the number of abortions performed in the United States is to decrease the number of abortions requested. | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/carolynrushforcongress/reproductive-rights-1120?e=420896fe25)
---
,
The single-most-effective best way to reduce the number of abortions performed in the United States is to decrease the number of abortions requested – and the single-most-effective way to achieve that goal is to provide women with reliable access to birth control and women’s health services.
[Chip in to support a candidate for Congress committed to reproductive and women's healthcare access for ALL. ](https://carolynrushforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866b1e87ca5aa4116782b6220&id=087f7e14f1&e=420896fe25)

| [DONATE](https://carolynrushforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866b1e87ca5aa4116782b6220&id=fa795e8b90&e=420896fe25)
---
Being forced to carry a pregnancy to term can never be acceptable. The decision to have a child is among the most profound and personal choices imaginable; if a woman chooses to terminate a pregnancy, it is and must always remain her choice – not the government’s!
[Your support helps keep up the fight for reproductive rights and care.](https://carolynrushforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866b1e87ca5aa4116782b6220&id=006045a3cd&e=420896fe25)
With hope for America,
Carolyn Rush

Here are the five most important things I think you should know before donating to reelect Joe and Kamala. | | |
---
Peter -- I know you probably get a ton of emails (and texts) just like this one asking for you to give to a political campaign or cause. I do, too! I even give to some of them. But the ones I typically donate to give me _good reason_ to. That is why I wanted to share five reasons why you should give to the Biden-Harris campaign today. **OK – here are the five most important things I think you should know before donating to reelect Joe and Kamala:**
1\. _President Biden and Vice President Harris have delivered historic results for the American people in their first term._ They helped create 14 million jobs, made the largest investment in climate and clean energy ever, lowered health care and prescription drug costs, passed the first major gun legislation in 30 years, and more. To protect all of the progress we’ve made, we must reelect the President and VP.
2\. _We have a pathway to victory in 2024, but it won’t be easy!_ Just like in 2020, we are going to have to fight for every single state on the map. The President and VP won Nevada, Arizona, and Georgia in 2020. We need to win those again in 2024. We also need to shore up support in Democratic strongholds like Wisconsin, Michigan, and Pennsylvania. And, we’re planning to fight tooth and nail to expand the map by winning states like North Carolina. We won’t be able to do it without your support.
3\. _We are getting our message out early!_ The campaign has invested millions of dollars to reach key voters where they are -- on TV or on digital platforms -- to share our winning message. Staying on air requires constant investment in this campaign.
4\. _We are hiring staff in key battleground states!_ The campaign is already hiring coordinated staff in key states, to make sure that we’re organizing folks on the ground and online to help reelect the President and VP.
5\. _We’re powered by grassroots donors ._ The majority of our campaign’s support comes from donors giving $5, $10, or $25 at a time. W**e’re counting on you to make a contribution today →**

[**So, now that I gave you five reasons, will you chip in $5 to help reelect the President and Vice President today? Whatever you give will be put straight to work to make sure we win four more years in the White House come November 2024.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZSwk4Ng1Q54wLQx9hPz1w92KaLsWQ6-0_eJ8N2-PXVXxDx6ZZHqYYjJ5wJeuXivhaSzxUPxPaGeLv2Y4T2eHqxIdxTXbe_1J_xQ4nWuKyr1u0Qq7p2X7G9tLgN-XQ_jThmiVLw1zd5JKLdet7lPW4wXlhAgcfLg9iZNb7IfKv8pjLw8OOeRqXVFQmfaVCN_Djy8WQSS0AXoSv50jV3gb7hZHE8xOY3N2AMYRKRew-YGR_QZBrXWHE1e2OZfggnrDz8rjD3nfsl8oTrbi2N9nmefdpQ4UJUBn-AFU6w_BzIWnt2Hbqx2W2wh1vdk_hyu7JcELpNQ3njE5A_4eKGW80ye71-SDmyiN51k2XWZUvqWNJWMkGN2Y-_BmsXYPZdxL_/41i/WTijI0DvQhqDPDNquqGTmg/h3/YZVOrOlLzzezVGcgX1ujaXi4s55Txcplvdwzkljp8Ao)

clean_body: Here are the five most important things I think you should know before donating to reelect Joe and Kamala. | | | Peter -- I know you probably get a ton of emails (and texts) just like this one asking for you to give to a political campaign or cause. I do, too! I even give to some of them. But the ones I typically donate to give me good reason to. That is why I wanted to share five reasons why you should give to the Biden-Harris campaign today. If not, keep reading below! | | | | | OK – here are the five most important things I think you should know before donating to reelect Joe and Kamala: 1\. President Biden and Vice President Harris have delivered historic results for the American people in their first term. They helped create 14 million jobs, made the largest investment in climate and clean energy ever, lowered health care and prescription drug costs, passed the first major gun legislation in 30 years, and more. To protect all of the progress we’ve made, we must reelect the President and VP. 2\. We have a pathway to victory in 2024, but it won’t be easy! Just like in 2020, we are going to have to fight for every single state on the map. The President and VP won Nevada, Arizona, and Georgia in 2020. We need to win those again in 2024. We also need to shore up support in Democratic strongholds like Wisconsin, Michigan, and Pennsylvania. And, we’re planning to fight tooth and nail to expand the map by winning states like North Carolina. We won’t be able to do it without your support. 3\. We are getting our message out early! The campaign has invested millions of dollars to reach key voters where they are -- on TV or on digital platforms -- to share our winning message. Staying on air requires constant investment in this campaign. 4\. We are hiring staff in key battleground states! The campaign is already hiring coordinated staff in key states, to make sure that we’re organizing folks on the ground and online to help reelect the President and VP. 5\. We’re powered by grassroots donors . The majority of our campaign’s support comes from donors giving $5, $10, or $25 at a time. We’re counting on you to make a contribution today → If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thanks for being on this team, Peter! It means the world. Jess Jessica Porter Grassroots Fundraising Director Biden-Harris 2024

The far right’s extreme and dangerous plans have no place in our country -- not in 2025 and not ever. | | |
---
Peter, we’ll get straight to the point: We know that MAGA Republicans hold some of the most extreme views in American history. We know that all of their so-called “plans” are just egregious schemes meant to drag our country backward. **We know their playbook front to back.** In their latest attempt to erase the progress that the Biden-Harris Administration has made, MAGA extremists alongside the Heritage Foundation released their “to-do list” for the next Republican president: **Project 2025.** You may have heard of it already, but in case you haven’t, here’s the gist: **Project 2025 is a laundry list of deeply unconstitutional and authoritarian “tasks” for the next Republican president that aim to move our country toward authoritarianism.** Among its top goals? Dismantling the civil service, erasing progress on racial equality and LGBTQ+ rights, imposing extreme restrictions on reproductive freedom and immigration, eliminating climate action, and a complete overhaul of public education -- and that’s just the beginning. If all of this sounds familiar, it’s because it is: **Many of Project 2025’s policies are based heavily on those of former President Donald Trump.** Democrats and progressives have been discussing it all over the news and social media, and for good reason: it represents the very real threat that the next extreme MAGA Republican -- Donald Trump or not -- poses to our country. Peter, this is the real deal. If we don’t come together and fight for progress now, we may never be able to again. Project 2025 doesn’t just dismantle the American values that we hold dear -- **it dismantles American democracy as we know it altogether.** [**That’s why we need supporters like you, Peter. It’s more important than ever before that we win by just as big and decisive of a margin as we did in 2020. That starts with you: Joe and Kamala are the last line of defense against a full MAGA takeover. Thank you for staying in this fight with us -- we’re so grateful to have you on our team. Thank you, \-- Team Biden-Harris

name: House Democratic HEROES (VPP)
subject: Your signature requested
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
don’t miss your chance to say thank you >>
| Amid the total MAGA mess in Congress, House Democrats are unified and SAVED the country from another catastrophic government shutdown!

We’re reaching out to 200 TOP Democrats across the country with the exclusive opportunity to thank House Democrats for their amazing work! **Hurry, your signature spot isn’t open long:[ Sign the thank you card now! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57380?t=6&akid=11848%2E878179%2EBrLY_5)** | [Donate $3 to sign the card now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57380?t=7&akid=11848%2E878179%2EBrLY_5)
---
TO: House Democratic Caucus
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you. **Dear House Democrats,

_Thank you for your incredible work for the American people!_**

The far-right Republican majority is a total DISASTER. It’s just a matter of time before their Speaker is ousted AGAIN!

Meanwhile, under Leader Hakeem Jeffries’ leadership, you stopped the MAGA GOP’s government shutdown plot in its tracks. _Thank goodness!_

Your strength makes me proud to be a Democrat — **and gives me hope that we can take down the GOP’s razor-thin majority next November!**

[**Slowing down as we approach the election of a lifetime is NOT an option, so I’m chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my appreciation and to help flip the 5 seats we need to turn the House BIDEN-BLUE! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57380?t=8&akid=11848%2E878179%2EBrLY_5) | [Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57380?t=9&akid=11848%2E878179%2EBrLY_5)
---
**_X A GRATEFUL DEMOCRAT_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=11848%2E878179%2EBrLY_5). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=11848%2E878179%2EBrLY_5).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=11848%2E878179%2EBrLY_5) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=11848%2E878179%2EBrLY_5). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=11848%2E878179%2EBrLY_5)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=11848%2E878179%2EBrLY_5)

subject: A mega-donor offered someone $20 million to run against Rashida Tlaib.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, we’ll cut
to the chase:

A mega-donor offered someone $20 million to run against Rashida Tlaib.

AIPAC and wealthy donors are coming for Rashida. They hate that she stands
up for the human rights of all people — Palestinians included.

We can’t let them knock Rashida out of office with tens of millions of
dollars spent against her. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231122.3JiXPV&refcode=em20231122-31985&amount=3&t=1001&akid=31985%2E1203867%2EEDYcGW ]Will you rush a $3
contribution right now to help ensure we have the resources to protect
Rashida’s re-election campaign?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231122.3JiXPV&refcode=em20231122-31985&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=31985%2E1203867%2EEDYcGW ]Contribute $3

As the only Palestinian member of Congress, Rashida is going to continue
to face xenophobic attacks from the establishment and right-wing.

The Squad needs us now more than ever, and we need them if we’re going to
keep up the fight for a ceasefire, Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, and
so much more.

Thank you for taking action,

Team JD

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231122.3JiXPV&refcode=em20231122-31985&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1039&akid=31985%2E1203867%2EEDYcGW ]Contribute $3

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time.

There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in
Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a

using [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139874?t=1041&akid=31985%2E1203867%2EEDYcGW ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this
critical moment.

name: Michael Bennet
subject: A quick note before I start cooking
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_112223_Thanksgiving_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_112223_Thanksgiving_act]
Friend,
I wanted to reach out before the holiday tomorrow to say thank you.
I believe deeply in the power of grassroots action. It’s part of why I’m so committed to saving our democracy from corruption and far-right extremists.
It was your grassroots support that ensured my campaign won in one of the toughest Senate races in the country last year.
It is your grassroots support that fuels me as I go to work every day for the people of Colorado.
And it will be your grassroots support that helps elect a pro-democracy, pro-choice majority to Congress in 2024.
Our government should be by the people, for the people. For too long, National Republicans have fought for the wealthiest Americans, rather than delivering for everyone. Together, we are changing the status quo.
I’m always grateful for your support, team. I hope you have a beautiful Thanksgiving with friends, family, and plenty of food.
As a thank you, I asked my team to put together a discount code for you to get 15% off anything from our merch store. [https://shop.michaelbennet.com/?utm_source=campaign2020&utm_medium=website] As you know, we have some really cool merch that I helped design. Really, I did! Hope you’ll take a look. Use code ‘THANKS.’
Now, I’m off to prep Madhur Jaffrey’s take on Murgh Musallam (updated with turkey!) for tomorrow.
With gratitude,
Michael

body:
On behalf of my family and my team, Happy Thanksgiving!

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73830840/439761655/-329851188?refcode=BLU_EM_VFC_2023-11-22_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOGRkYmVmMC03MTg5LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6zN0fH6clguhWVcMHfR5FqOzUUoGOr964qvlO9cB64o=)

| Hey Peter,

As we get ready to log off for the Thanksgiving holiday, I wanted to send a quick message to thank you for your support this past year.

Your support has been instrumental in my work to protect voting rights, expand access to reproductive care, and make progress toward life-saving gun violence prevention legislation. Thanks to you, we’re making headway.

As Republicans get more aggressive in their attempts to disenfranchise voters, I don’t plan on slowing down my efforts to protect democracy. Keeping up our fundraising momentum is key to those efforts.

On behalf of my family and my team, Happy Thanksgiving!

Valerie
---
| | Valerie Foushee is running for re-election in North Carolina’s 4th Congressional District. As Republicans in the state work to roll back voting rights, Valerie’s working tirelessly to preserve them and continue making headway in preventing gun violence, protecting reproductive freedom, and ensuring working families get their fair share. clean_body: On behalf of my family and my team, Happy Thanksgiving! | = | Hey Peter, As we get ready to log off for the Thanksgiving holiday, I wanted to send a quick message to thank you for your support this past year. Your support has been instrumental in my work to protect voting rights, expand access to reproductive care, and make progress toward life-saving gun violence prevention legislation. Thanks to you, we’re making headway. As Republicans get more aggressive in their attempts to disenfranchise voters, I don’t plan on slowing down my efforts to protect democracy. Keeping up our fundraising momentum is key to those efforts. On behalf of my family and my team, Happy Thanksgiving! Valerie | | Valerie Foushee is running for re-election in North Carolina’s 4th Congressional District. As Republicans in the state work to roll back voting rights, Valerie’s working tirelessly to preserve them and continue making headway in preventing gun violence, protecting reproductive freedom, and ensuring working families get their fair share. = | = * | | = Paid for by Foushee for Congress Valerie Foushee for Congress PO Box 16446 Chapel Hill, NC 27516 United States | | ---|--- Email is a critical way for the Foushee campaign to stay in touch with you. name: Matt Cartwright
subject: Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cartwright for Congress
body:
As we approach Thanksgiving, I wanted to take a moment to express my heartfelt gratitude to each and every one of you.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73831244/439763334/1790176412?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODVlMDJjMS03Mjg5LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ea9grSt28ByXdAHxKurL4lnqjZNHTZ8OcexzZVXnZRI=&emci=9c7be2e1-e887-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=d85e02c1-7289-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=23311593) | Peter,

As we approach Thanksgiving, I have a lot to be thankful for, most importantly my wife, Marion, my sons, Jack and Matthew, and the opportunity to spend time together as a family. I am eternally grateful to have such a supportive community of friends and family by my side.

I also wanted to take a moment to express my heartfelt gratitude to each and every one of you. Your unwavering support has been the bedrock of our journey, and I am deeply thankful for it.

The spirit of Thanksgiving reminds us to pause and reflect on the blessings in our lives. I am grateful for the opportunity to serve our community and work towards a better future for all of us. Your trust and encouragement inspire me every day to keep pushing for progress and positive change.

As we gather with our loved ones to celebrate this special day, let's take a moment to cherish the moments we share, the bonds that unite us, and the blessings that enrich our lives.

>From my family to yours, I wish you a Happy Thanksgiving filled with joy, warmth, and the company of those you hold dear.

With gratitude,

Matt Cartwright | Last year, Matt Cartwright was one of only 5 Democrats to win a House race in a district that Donald Trump carried in 2020. He's gearing up for another tough re-election, and he needs your support to keep PA-08 blue. Rush a donation right away to help Matt protect his seat. | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73831245/439763335/-235334601?refcode=em23_231122_thanks_enask_gq_act_gvn_mc_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231122_thanks_enask_gq_act_gvn_mc_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&zip=18326&refcode2=d85e02c1-7289-ee11-8925-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODVlMDJjMS03Mjg5LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ea9grSt28ByXdAHxKurL4lnqjZNHTZ8OcexzZVXnZRI=)

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: I’m thankful for these democracy defenders
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
Friend, I wanted to make sure you saw our first endorsements of the 2024 cycle - three Michigan State Representatives who not only are true advocates for democracy, but they’re also in very close races next year.

I’m all-in to support candidates like these in crucial races statewide next fall – will you pitch in today and help? Your support will be split to help us continue electing pro-democracy candidates. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mlp-endorsements?refcode=112223]
Our work to build a pro-democracy coalition never stops, but I hope you take some time over the next few days to reflect on the successes we’ve had in Michigan with your help. That’s what I’m really thankful for this Thanksgiving – and why I’m excited about the work to come.
Gratefully,

Jocelyn

---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Jocelyn Benson
Date: Monday November, 20 2023 at 2:26 PM
Subject: Supporting democracy defenders in Michigan
To: Our friend
Friend, when we launched the Michigan Legacy PAC, we made a commitment to expand the pro-democracy network you helped us build.
That’s why I’m proud to announce our first endorsements of the 2024 cycle. We’re proudly standing with three Michigan State Representatives – and they’re democracy defenders who are in critical races next fall.
Betsy Coffia, Jenn Hill, and Reggie Miller led the passage to enable pre-registration of 16 and 17-year-olds, fought for government transparency, and supported funding for early voting. They are crucial allies in the necessary work of building democracy, and with a razor-thin majority in the State House, we need every seat.
Today, I’m asking you to join me and pitch in to support Representatives Coffia, Hill, and Miller with a split contribution, as well as continue supporting our work to defend democracy statewide. Will you please pitch in to help us hold a pro-democracy majority in the Michigan House of Representatives?
Donate >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mlp-endorsements?refcode=112223H]
As we head into the Thanksgiving season, I’m thankful for their leadership, and I’m grateful for the work they and other leaders around the state are doing to fortify our democracy.

Our goal is to build on the momentum we saw in 2022 and create a true grassroots network of democracy advocates around the state and nationwide. Your support is critical to that work.

I’ll be in touch soon with more pro-democracy leaders you can help and additional ways to actively uphold these values each day.

Thank you for all that you do for democracy.

Onward,
Jocelyn

name: Mayor Sepi Shyne
subject: A little bit about what Thanksgiving means to me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SEPI SHYNE FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=wrpr_hdr [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=wrpr_hdr]
Friend,

As a first-generation Iranian American immigrant who fled from violent extremism in childhood, I distinctly remember my family's first Thanksgiving in America.

We set the table in our safe new home, surrounded by the smells of our delicious homecooked meal, the sound of laughter, and the feeling of warmth. A world of difference from the sounds of gunfire, the smell of gunpowder, and the sense of fear that we had been used to.

We were so grateful to be here in this land of sunshine, delicious food and kind neighbors. We embraced California living and the new American holidays that brought us together. Thanksgiving was filled with joy, singing, dancing and the memories fill my heart each November.

This year, as I am surrounded once again by my family, friends, and cuddly fur babies, I wanted to thank you and share my appreciation for your continued support as our people-powered movement grows and gains momentum by the day. While I am grateful for my blessings, I am conscious that this is a difficult time for far too many Angelenos who don’t have food or housing security. I will continue to create and support policies that ensure all of us have the safety and security that we all are entitled to throughout our district and our country.

Friend, the goal of our movement is to ensure everyone can experience safety, comfort, and security — a roof over their heads and enough to eat not just during Thanksgiving but every single day. That's why we're in this race.

As we stand together with perseverance and unity, we will make it to Congress, where we will fight for the rights and dignity of the underrepresented and ignored — and pave a brighter future for all.

Wishing you and your loved ones a Happy Thanksgiving.

With gratitude,

Mayor Sepi Shyne
#WomanLifeFreedom
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/103922/images/Copy%20of%20Sepi%20high%20res%20headshot-min.jpg]
Mayor Sepi Shyne has taken on WeHo's biggest issues and delivered results. From raising the minimum wage to the highest in the nation to significantly reducing homelessness – she's running for Congress to fight for all of us. As the first out Iranian LGBTQ+ woman elected anywhere in the world, Sepi is committed to making the American dream a reality for everyone: For immigrants, the LGBTQ+ community, women, and anyone trying to make ends meet. It's our time to Shyne, make a donation today.
Will you join Sepi's team and support her for Congress?
Contribute Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=53265f2f-7389-ee11-8925-00224832e811]
GIVE Monthly [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?recurring=true&refcode=footermonthly&refcode2=53265f2f-7389-ee11-8925-00224832e811]

name: Kathleen Riebe
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Riebe for Congress
body:
While we came up short, we proved a lot in this campaign.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73831497/439764388/-1487052648?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDcxNTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTBmZmI3ZGYtNzM4OS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PDuj0KD15dAdDNYDZDkm55_CHFhbhn70KdiagZumdug=&emci=3601d47d-6989-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=e0ffb7df-7389-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=8062649)
---

| | Peter – Last night, I conceded the election for Utah's 2nd District and congratulated Celeste Maloy on a hard-fought and well-earned victory. The voters have made their decision, and I wish Representative-elect Maloy the best. I look forward to her advocacy on behalf of our state at the national level, and the pressing issues of water, affordable housing, and sustainable growth that face all Utahns. While we came up short, it's clear that our campaign will outperform the Democratic performance in CD 2 from last year — a result which demonstrates that we spoke to folks across the political spectrum. I'm also incredibly proud of the fact that we raised more money from Utah donors than any other campaign in this election. I am a teacher, a mom, a legislator, and for these last few months, a Congressional candidate. At times the challenge of all these roles was great, but I want to emphasize the importance of everyday, working people running for office. The deck can feel stacked against folks who don't have deep pockets or powerful connections, but it is vital for our democracy and our communities that people take the time and care to participate at every level. None of this would have been possible without the incredible and tireless work of my campaign team or without the love, patience, and understanding of my family. And it definitively would not have been possible without people like you. People like you lifted us up from the start. When political pundits thought no Democrat had a chance of competing in Utah, you proved otherwise. Whether you chipped in a few dollars, told your friends, colleagues, family, or neighbors about this campaign, volunteered to make calls, or shared our messages on social media, **supporters like you built this movement.** Tomorrow, families across Utah will celebrate Thanksgiving. And when I sit down with mine, I will be thinking in deep gratitude of all of you. This campaign has been the honor of my political career, and I will look back fondly on all my travel and interactions with voters and supporters. I am confident that the Second District's new representative understands the need for a functional government that works for the people, and will advocate tirelessly to keep our country, state, and democracy strong. I know I will continue my work towards building my party, and restoring balance to our state. At the end of the day, this was about public service and reminding the political establishment that service means listening to the people. I conclude this campaign fully confident that our movement will inspire new voices to pursue advocacy or even run for office themselves. Once again, Peter, thank you — for everything. _Kathleen_ |
---|---|---

| | | Paid for and authorized by Riebe for Congress.
---

I also want to say how thankful I am to my biggest supporters: my husband Jesse and our sons, James and Wesley. I could not be here without them by my side. I hope your day, like mine, is filled with loved ones, good food, and endless gratitude. With so much appreciation,
Hillary

name: Kirsten Engel
subject: What I want to say before Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Peter,
I wanted to take a moment to say happy (early) Thanksgiving, and thank you.
Thanksgiving is a time for gratitude, and I am always grateful for the incredible grassroots supporters who make this campaign possible.
Last cycle, we were underestimated by so many people. We were left without any significant national support — while up against the entire Republican establishment. By Election Day, we were outspent 6:1.
But we had amazing people behind our campaign: small-dollar donors, volunteers, campaign staff, and folks who showed up at the ballot box.
We outperformed all expectations and lost by just a percentage point.
And I know that together, in 2024, we will win. Our campaign is already getting more support now than it did at any point in 2022. But our strength is still the people on the ground.
So it bears repeating: thank you, Peter. I’m wishing you, your family, and your friends a joyful Thanksgiving.
Onwards,
Kirsten

Best wishes for a Happy Thanksgiving and thank you again for all you do to make our community a better place.

Congressman Salud Carbajal

name: Jared Moskowitz
subject: I took my congressional colleagues on another tour of Parkland:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress P
body:
| Team, earlier this week, I took some of my Congressional colleagues on a tour of Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School for the second time. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73832264/439767044/-349209756?amount=5&refcode=JMFC_20231122_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGM4MWFmOS03NTg5LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YEmcWbmD_MiMzPBvx-p8XHTkKHO5mOQfDwLvpFRb1IE=) **I think every member of Congress should see what a high school looks like after a mass shooting — we might actually be able to pass meaningful bills to prevent this.**

I know this change will be incremental, but we must take the first step to put that in motion.

When I served in the Florida Legislature — under a GOP majority and Republican Governor — I passed a bill with bi-partisan support after the Parkland massacre that raised the age to purchase a firearm from 18 to 21 and instituted red flag laws, which has been used more than 9,000 times since 2018.

[**The NRA knows I won’t stop until Congress moves on gun violence prevention legislation — that’s why they’re sending their fringe-group lackeys after me. They're scared of the progress that we're making by calling them out. But I need your continued support to withstand these attacks. clean_body: | Team, earlier this week, I took some of my Congressional colleagues on a tour of Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School for the second time. = I think every member of Congress should see what a high school looks like after a mass shooting — we might actually be able to pass meaningful bills to prevent this. I know this change will be incremental, but we must take the first step to put that in motion. When I served in the Florida Legislature — under a GOP majority and Republican Governor — I passed a bill with bi-partisan support after the Parkland massacre that raised the age to purchase a firearm from 18 to 21 and instituted red flag laws, which has been used more than 9,000 times since 2018. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Thank you, Jared | | Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress P.O. subject: Their child died of a fentanyl overdose
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rogers for Senate
body:
The drug epidemic is ruining families | | |
---
[](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=6f9fc3cb13ef4c17919e3158343644b3&_e=mUWahXpHhqhvfW9LxiiXb72aOyLv2lpBGDxxdGyJXBhNl2iuZYvrcBDQJukYwYH_vmF7XahRULxepJxorUOL-fCdnvGVn67y1AGuhTJ7CgS9p1fgjByx_cx8e8kG7neDUANmpgKLWHEc8xy_pnm-V9cck2W85YvslWPemwLnUkIXrvQHZvAZCOEWGpjZS2phmonagqJftXYxOKkdjTNFc6eovXNqi3BvcsoJ_b6vKpH7rmu08n6hLsbl75iDDSiVaZfKBg1pDorntwVxWCUj6tCahuEdcEMc42ibrax-H7-tpt3-iTchrxtRwb3UkyNfEBptYttCLJ-_H1kyFeT4lA4z24Ty9D_FpxbG7SuiFZuP7EFoxavSrxPzVmNnt76Q9EeupTcbd2Z0AQxT8LJb4Q%3D%3D)

Friend, “My child died of a fentanyl overdose.” That’s the tragic reality for thousands of parents all across the United States. This Thanksgiving, almost 75,000 spots at the dinner table will be empty due to overdoses from deadly drugs like fentanyl. These people are mothers and fathers, sons and daughters, brothers and sisters. **[Fentanyl doesn’t care what your race is. It doesn’t care whether you live in the city or the country. It doesn’t care what religion you practice or how you vote, it’s a threat to everyone.](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=6f9fc3cb13ef4c17919e3158343644b3&_e=mUWahXpHhqhvfW9LxiiXb72aOyLv2lpBGDxxdGyJXBhNl2iuZYvrcBDQJukYwYH_vmF7XahRULxepJxorUOL-fCdnvGVn67y1AGuhTJ7CgS9p1fgjByx_cx8e8kG7neDUANmpgKLWHEc8xy_pnm-V9cck2W85YvslWPemwLnUkIXrvQHZvAZCOEWGpjZS2phmonagqJftXYxOKkdjTNFc6eovXNqi3BvcsoJ_b6vKpH7rmu08n6hLsbl75iDDSiVUb1HVAk3VhLn6oCsExK5rgLFKWmll-dtjH1aqkWVyObu79AgoBDUIgP6yP_lzUUfYS1iwHoC98h6F5OCMb-mKrU8wRBA86gXlZKwIibUD_rrMUkWgf85K-XF9hbj3hzG_QoRPhDie1bhMXlYkovZyA%3D%3D)** And thanks to our wide open border, it’s **ABSOLUTELY EVERYWHERE.** Friend, I have a plan to close our border and get fentanyl and other deadly drugs out of our communities for good. But far left politicians and their allies are doing everything they can to stop me. **[Friend, will you help me fight back against the fentanyl epidemic?](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=6f9fc3cb13ef4c17919e3158343644b3&_e=mUWahXpHhqhvfW9LxiiXb72aOyLv2lpBGDxxdGyJXBhNl2iuZYvrcBDQJukYwYH_vmF7XahRULxepJxorUOL-fCdnvGVn67y1AGuhTJ7CgS9p1fgjByx_cx8e8kG7neDUANmpgKLWHEc8xy_pnm-V9cck2W85YvslWPemwLnUkIXrvQHZvAZCOEWGpjZS2phmonagqJftXYxOKkdjTNFc6eovXNqi3BvcsoJ_b6vKpH7rmu08n6hLsbl75iDDSiV05qdUn5pF8afCGlhVfTekFfKServE3rtrtERcSqeAUd-1UUR6IQxb0pV2LOcyS2GrOk4yNL4S5W33PIIPmwFDWIGS8BMpz35MGYh_JLRvxW-_E9sYRRYSugFyzu2aLXL9oKeCsiHxcQX8Kx3s58_ew%3D%3D)** Sincerely, Mike Rogers

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Thankful for you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
I have so much to be thankful for this year, and your support has been on my mind ahead of Thanksgiving tomorrow.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73832591/439768272/-1898250603?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2023-11-22_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjM4NzExNDItNzc4OS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6FNTKNIW3E-Jxh6aoOdbxV8JMLCZx9D2Xs71TzcHU7Y=)

| Peter,

I have so much to be thankful for this year, and your support has been on my mind ahead of Thanksgiving tomorrow.

Since we launched our campaign last week, I’ve been blown away by the graciousness of people like you – people who supported me in my tough races in VA-07 and who are now supporting my latest campaign for Governor of Virginia.

Your unwavering support has allowed me to take this latest step in service to our Commonwealth.

Tomorrow, I’ll be celebrating with my family and reflecting on everything I am thankful for.

With you in my corner, Peter, we’ve accomplished so much for the Commonwealth. Looking ahead, I’ll continue doing what I’ve always done – working tirelessly for the needs of our communities.

From my family to yours, Happy Thanksgiving.

Grateful, as always,
Abigail

clean_body: I have so much to be thankful for this year, and your support has been on my mind ahead of Thanksgiving tomorrow. | = | Peter, I have so much to be thankful for this year, and your support has been on my mind ahead of Thanksgiving tomorrow. Since we launched our campaign last week, I’ve been blown away by the graciousness of people like you – people who supported me in my tough races in VA-07 and who are now supporting my latest campaign for Governor of Virginia. Your unwavering support has allowed me to take this latest step in service to our Commonwealth. Tomorrow, I’ll be celebrating with my family and reflecting on everything I am thankful for. With you in my corner, Peter, we’ve accomplished so much for the Commonwealth. Looking ahead, I’ll continue doing what I’ve always done – working tirelessly for the needs of our communities. From my family to yours, Happy Thanksgiving. Grateful, as always, Abigail = * | | = Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. name: David Horowitz
subject: Barack Obama’s revolution
body:
America is on the brink of destruction.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/5QwOjGuQUloaXxye6mLWwA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnQROeP0SsaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9kYXZpZC1ob3Jvd2l0ei1mcmVlZG9tLWNlbnRlci9kZDMwZDdhMS0yOTI1LTRmZGEtOWY1Zi1hNWExZjA0OTg1NTA_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMxMTIyX0JER19ESEZDX09CRTJfUkVOX1BBLUFWUlcDc3BjQgplVTJrXmWcipxJUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/5QwOjGuQUloaXxye6mLWwA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnQROeP0SsaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9kYXZpZC1ob3Jvd2l0ei1mcmVlZG9tLWNlbnRlci9kZDMwZDdhMS0yOTI1LTRmZGEtOWY1Zi1hNWExZjA0OTg1NTA_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMxMTIyX0JER19ESEZDX09CRTJfUkVOX1BBLUFWUlcDc3BjQgplVTJrXmWcipxJUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.

| Hello ,

As we approach Thanksgiving, I wanted to take a moment to express my sincere gratitude for you. Thank you for your continued support, and commitment to creating a better California.

May your Thanksgiving holiday be filled with warmth, laughter, and peace as you gather around the table with friends & loved ones.
---
|
---
| **Happy Thanksgiving! **

With sincere gratitude,
Brian P.S. If you're needing a break from the pumpkin pie or turkey, you can always take a moment and check out my [Instagram](https://briandahle.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11c7ad6aa59a7d39fc5819cc1&id=7a039644eb&e=f9133ea432), [Facebook](https://briandahle.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11c7ad6aa59a7d39fc5819cc1&id=e6c912377b&e=f9133ea432), and [Twitter](https://briandahle.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11c7ad6aa59a7d39fc5819cc1&id=a7df49ad2f&e=f9133ea432) accounts.

name: Susan Wild
subject: Thankful for people like you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
Above all, I am incredibly grateful to have your support. Together, I know our incredible grassroots team can rise to any challenge.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73833669/439772280/-1389333689?refcode=BLU_EM_SWC_2023-11-22_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2NhODA5YS03Yjg5LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gi3rsuQaCqW6Ffv74Nox1bWiiv2rjzl-fG4-NS926QM=)
---
| Peter,

Like many of you, I’ll be spending tomorrow thinking about what I’m grateful for – and this year especially, my list is long!

I am thankful for my family, who give me so much joy and who sustain me through the tough times.

I am thankful for the community here in Pennsylvania’s 7th district, from Lehighton to Easton and everywhere in between.

**Above all, I am incredibly grateful to have your support. Together, I know our incredible grassroots team can rise to any challenge.**

I hope your day is filled with loved ones, good food, and spreading gratitude.

Endlessly thankful,
Susan
---

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=71edd1ac0984435793a47f64baa6b7be&_e=r1reSKEUe5wa91bvQrDiAgaBKojdwsTTaeVlhVRHu8JPrZSklqc-yiMXBuAY9aL7bL7C7NC17zztvkV5OF7pI4ywpv2A1oePbkAh5UiJ9Kwj-qQi1oN2Bu5DjrIJ8WBEpW7BvohH0ci5ENKA2PVNKTY0ARQFR6j0XGkGpE51I8TLg2iDnK5RElv5pEBAA-PYLcmqisGqVZcwa8vivuDRFW2upffNPYcI1_slLpzsPBrklFkt50_P6ullRKqKxWsa6mGglAxVKKyGakcjvfTrVsukLPfQ1b7c4GD42PidDxoX2nL7EDuGpxylPzvqhNtmI6bgCEuZj0QGXC0UrM16B37I0-tt4xKjKg4Oxt3yMurdXMXv0v6wgSwI58L-xlBBr_kRfclxNN7n0JJ7C4Bd9TKuV_FrRCmFCgxTL6ef8vSJHzHHJK87_LRKIEtJ9EZivztob8hfRa9Fdf0caymloHcQo-FAItdUHT505bH0AMVdlHmT_jrMpF8fMMsr9_CoACeeHVi0n2QDiAxGClhUvHG2cA1txSqjwubviOZI1-M%3D "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

name: Lexi Reese
subject: Thank you!!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lexi Reese for Senate
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lr4sem [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lr4sem]
Friend,
As I was reflecting on all that I have to be thankful for this year, I wanted to make sure that you know how much I appreciate your support. After so many conversations about how badly California needs new representation, I kept coming to the same conclusion. All there’s left to do is run for Senate.
Your donations, your input, and your enthusiasm for this campaign is what keeps us going. You all are amazing. Thank you all, and I hope you have an incredible Thanksgiving!
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lr4sem]
With gratitude,
Lexi Reese

name: Sharice Davids
subject: Giving thanks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Friends,

As many of us are braving holiday traffic to go home to our loved ones for the holiday, I wanted to take a moment to share my gratitude.

I’m so grateful for my grassroots supporters who have stood with me so I can keep fighting for our values everyday I’m in Congress.

I promise to keep working hard every day to deliver for Kansans and all Americans from coast to coast.

So before you sit down with friends and family tomorrow, I wanted to share my gratitude with you. Thank you for everything — this year and every year. Happy Thanksgiving!

— Sharice

name: Tony Evers
subject: it’ll be a close race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
| Derek,

Before the holiday weekend, can you make a contribution to support our team? We’re working hard to make sure Donald Trump, or whoever the Republicans nominate for president, doesn’t win Wisconsin and the White House in 2024.

But it’ll be a close race, and every dollar, especially this early, will make a huge difference.

[Please click here to contribute — and thank you.](https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2196?amount=25&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20231122_FR_mmfr_0_3MO_TonyEvers_NA_NA_mmfr.1.6&t=5&akid=6491%2E1827488%2EkHbc8b)

Onward,

Tony

body:
Reflecting on this year, I just want you to know how incredibly grateful I am for your overwhelming support for the Jane Fonda Climate PAC. ❤️

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73834065/439773635/931971737?refcode=BLU_EM_JANE_2023-11-22_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhkNGE2Y2U3LTdlODktZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=iSRz4SRhz1vmiC7Hn4EZ3_a8Rl1QlAcpAkl7hkYd_f8=)

| Hi, it’s Jane Fonda. Ahead of Thanksgiving tomorrow, I hope you and your loved ones have a great time, delicious food, and a heart full of gratitude!

**Reflecting on this year, I just want you to know how incredibly grateful I am for your overwhelming support for the Jane Fonda Climate PAC.** ❤️

I started this PAC with one mission: to elect climate champions at every level of government who are committed to building a livable future for future generations.

And because of your continued support, we had yet another successful cycle. We elected climate champions up and down the ballot in California, Virginia, Minnesota, Pennsylvania, and more.

As we look ahead to 2024, I am looking forward to continuing our work together.

With appreciation,

Jane Fonda [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73834066/439773636/931971737?refcode=BLU_EM_JANE_2023-11-22_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhkNGE2Y2U3LTdlODktZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=iSRz4SRhz1vmiC7Hn4EZ3_a8Rl1QlAcpAkl7hkYd_f8=)

clean_body: Reflecting on this year, I just want you to know how incredibly grateful I am for your overwhelming support for the Jane Fonda Climate PAC. ❤️ | = | Hi, it’s Jane Fonda. Ahead of Thanksgiving tomorrow, I hope you and your loved ones have a great time, delicious food, and a heart full of gratitude! Reflecting on this year, I just want you to know how incredibly grateful I am for your overwhelming support for the Jane Fonda Climate PAC. ❤️ I started this PAC with one mission: to elect climate champions at every level of government who are committed to building a livable future for future generations. And because of your continued support, we had yet another successful cycle. We elected climate champions up and down the ballot in California, Virginia, Minnesota, Pennsylvania, and more. As we look ahead to 2024, I am looking forward to continuing our work together. With appreciation, Jane Fonda = | | Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. body:
Hey Peter, it's Josh.
I want to check in before Thanksgiving and ask for some quick help.
Right now I’m facing new attacks from my opponent and national Republicans. And at the same time, our fundraising is slowing down as we approach the holidays.
I just checked and we’re still $15,000 from our November goal.
I know everyone is about to get super busy with the holiday, so I’m hoping you’ll help us hit this final goal for the month?
It would really mean a lot if we don’t need to stress about missing the goal over Thanksgiving.

name: Jerrad Christian
subject: Thank you for listening to my story
body:
What I want this campaign to be about is changing lives for the better.

| | | | | [](https://sptr.eomail6.com/f/a/yA15vP_L1rWDIyuIsE_7hg~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRnQPq6P0UgYjAxOGUzNDlmYjVmYWI0NzQyODY3OTE0MDU0MjgwMDJELmh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLmFjdGJsdWUuY29tL2RvbmF0ZS9qZXJyYWQtZW1haWxXBXNwY2V1QgplVbp1XmUmOIEpUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAABtDA~~)
---
| | ,
Tomorrow is Thanksgiving, one of my favorite holidays and a special time to reflect and share gratitude.
Giving thanks is, admittedly, not something that I have not always done or done well. But I have learned over time how important it is to tell the people in our lives what we appreciate about them.
Life is short, and there isn’t any time to waste being shy, proud, or timid—go give your loved ones some love, show appreciation to everyone you may meet, and allow yourself to be grateful for, and humbled by, the good things in your life.
I have recently shared with you and thousands others some very personal details about my story: what it was like growing up in rural Appalachian Ohio, joining the Navy and returning to see our small towns decimated and fading, and the human cost of the opioid epidemic. (In case you missed my prior email in which I told my own family story of my sister’s fight against addiction, you can find it directly below this message.)
And I wanted to take a moment to thank you for engaging with the messages, the stories, and the requests for support that me and my team are sending to you. It means a lot to me personally and as a Democrat running for office to know that there are countless supporters from across the country I can stand alongside.
So, thank you, and I hope that you have a memorable and enjoyable Thanksgiving holiday.
In Gratitude,
_Jerrad Christian _

[](https://sptr.eomail6.com/f/a/yA15vP_L1rWDIyuIsE_7hg~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRnQPq6P0UgYjAxOGUzNDlmYjVmYWI0NzQyODY3OTE0MDU0MjgwMDJELmh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLmFjdGJsdWUuY29tL2RvbmF0ZS9qZXJyYWQtZW1haWxXBXNwY2V1QgplVbp1XmUmOIEpUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAABtDA~~)
---
,

The opioid epidemic has decimated thousands of families across Appalachian Ohio, where our campaign is based, and millions of people across the nation. My own family is no exception: **my sister Morgan battled through the darkness of heroin addiction,** which saw her life hanging in the balance not once, but twice because of overdose. Hers is a harrowing tale of resilience and strength.

Because we lived in separate households growing up, Morgan and I would bond during holidays and special occasions; we connected almost immediately, but didn't really become close until she was in her early 20s. Around that time, we started to talk more and found out we had a lot in common. This was when we really started to understand and care for each other more, becoming good friends who shared their thoughts and feelings and helped each other during tough times.

When she was still a young woman, Morgan moved out of Ohio and her life took a challenging turn. She began experimenting with prescription drugs, influenced by her then-boyfriend. This marked the start of a troubling phase in her life, which eventually led her to heroin. Morgan faced many serious and life-altering struggles that altered the course of her life, and deeply affected our relationship.

During the worst of her struggle with addiction, she vanished from our lives, cutting off all contact. This sickening feeling is something that many of us supporting loved ones who are fighting addiction have experienced. It was a time of immense worry and uncertainty, never knowing where Morgan was or how she was doing.

Her first overdose was a shock to us all, and a painful reminder of the dangers she was facing and the demons she was fighting. It brought the severity of her situation into stark reality. Then, after a brief period of recovery, she relapsed and overdosed again. These incidents were not only terrifying, but also heartbreaking—highlighting the tragic and chaotic nature of addiction.

When she finally realized what her life had become, my sister had had enough. She began her road to recovery by contacting loved ones and rebuilding her life. When she was ready, myself and our family were waiting with open arms and loving hearts. I love my sister, and even through the hardest and most uncertain times tried my best to be her biggest supporter, in the hopes that she would be able to turn things around and come back to us.

After years of sobriety, Morgan is now married and lovingly taking care of two children, building a life that she can be proud of.

---
[](https://sptr.eomail6.com/f/a/6ChZful_2OEy4AIKG3XaDg~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRnQPq6P0UgNDlkMGJiMTNkZTc5Y2UzMWI4ZDk2OTIzMDUxNDMxZmVERWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLmFjdGJsdWUuY29tL2RvbmF0ZS9qZXJyYWQtZW1haWw_cmVmY29kZT10aGFua3NFT19waG90b1cFc3BjZXVCCmVVunVeZSY4gSlSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAG0M)
---
_Morgan on her wedding day. I am so proud of how far she’s come. _
---
I wish this story were unique. My cousin Bobby lost his life to overdose, as have so many other good people. All the while, behind the scenes, Big Pharma played a key role in causing the opioid crisis, promoting overly-aggressive marketing strategies and spreading misleading and false information about the risks of widespread use of opioid painkillers.

As Morgan’s story makes plain, this ever-worsening crisis has left us desperately in need of leaders who will prioritize the well-being of our loved ones over everything else. However, my opponent, Congressman Troy Balderson (R-OH) has a legislative track record that reflects the agenda of the big pharmaceutical companies that bankroll his campaign—**this year alone, Balderson’s campaign has received a staggering $37,500 from political action committees (PACs) affiliated with Big Pharma and health insurance companies.**

While folks in our communities battle the opioid epidemic every day, Troy Balderson blithely fills his campaign coffers with massive contributions from some of the very people who helped create the crisis in the first place.

Unlike Troy Balderson, I know the personal toll this crisis takes on real people. In Congress, I will work tirelessly on policies that support evidence-based treatment options, enhance recovery services, and hold Big Pharma accountable. When elected, I will work to expand access to life-saving drugs like naloxone, improve prescription drug monitoring programs to prevent abuse, and invest in community-based recovery services that provide holistic care and support for families.[](https://sptr.eomail6.com/f/a/52uQ9SbFHDCs1McveG1EUw~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRnQPq6P0UgZTE1Yjg0YzA4MmYxM2U5OTU2YjBkOTQ2M2Y2NzQxYjhETGh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLmFjdGJsdWUuY29tL2RvbmF0ZS9qZXJyYWQtZW1haWw_cmVmY29kZT1hZGRpY3Rpb25FTyZhbW91bnQ9MTBXBXNwY2V1QgplVbp1XmUmOIEpUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAABtDA~~)

clean_body: What I want this campaign to be about is changing lives for the better. | | | | | ~~ | | , Tomorrow is Thanksgiving, one of my favorite holidays and a special time to reflect and share gratitude. Giving thanks is, admittedly, not something that I have not always done or done well. But I have learned over time how important it is to tell the people in our lives what we appreciate about them. Life is short, and there isn’t any time to waste being shy, proud, or timid—go give your loved ones some love, show appreciation to everyone you may meet, and allow yourself to be grateful for, and humbled by, the good things in your life. I have recently shared with you and thousands others some very personal details about my story: what it was like growing up in rural Appalachian Ohio, joining the Navy and returning to see our small towns decimated and fading, and the human cost of the opioid epidemic. (In case you missed my prior email in which I told my own family story of my sister’s fight against addiction, you can find it directly below this message.) And I wanted to take a moment to thank you for engaging with the messages, the stories, and the requests for support that me and my team are sending to you. It means a lot to me personally and as a Democrat running for office to know that there are countless supporters from across the country I can stand alongside. So, thank you, and I hope that you have a memorable and enjoyable Thanksgiving holiday. In Gratitude, Jerrad Christian | | "DONATE" | –Begin Forwarded Message– ~~ , The opioid epidemic has decimated thousands of families across Appalachian Ohio, where our campaign is based, and millions of people across the nation. My own family is no exception: my sister Morgan battled through the darkness of heroin addiction, which saw her life hanging in the balance not once, but twice because of overdose. Hers is a harrowing tale of resilience and strength. Because we lived in separate households growing up, Morgan and I would bond during holidays and special occasions; we connected almost immediately, but didn't really become close until she was in her early 20s. Around that time, we started to talk more and found out we had a lot in common. This was when we really started to understand and care for each other more, becoming good friends who shared their thoughts and feelings and helped each other during tough times. When she was still a young woman, Morgan moved out of Ohio and her life took a challenging turn. She began experimenting with prescription drugs, influenced by her then-boyfriend. This marked the start of a troubling phase in her life, which eventually led her to heroin. Morgan faced many serious and life-altering struggles that altered the course of her life, and deeply affected our relationship. During the worst of her struggle with addiction, she vanished from our lives, cutting off all contact. This sickening feeling is something that many of us supporting loved ones who are fighting addiction have experienced. It was a time of immense worry and uncertainty, never knowing where Morgan was or how she was doing. Her first overdose was a shock to us all, and a painful reminder of the dangers she was facing and the demons she was fighting. It brought the severity of her situation into stark reality. Then, after a brief period of recovery, she relapsed and overdosed again. These incidents were not only terrifying, but also heartbreaking—highlighting the tragic and chaotic nature of addiction. When she finally realized what her life had become, my sister had had enough. She began her road to recovery by contacting loved ones and rebuilding her life. When she was ready, myself and our family were waiting with open arms and loving hearts. I love my sister, and even through the hardest and most uncertain times tried my best to be her biggest supporter, in the hopes that she would be able to turn things around and come back to us. After years of sobriety, Morgan is now married and lovingly taking care of two children, building a life that she can be proud of. Morgan on her wedding day. I am so proud of how far she’s come. I wish this story were unique. My cousin Bobby lost his life to overdose, as have so many other good people. All the while, behind the scenes, Big Pharma played a key role in causing the opioid crisis, promoting overly-aggressive marketing strategies and spreading misleading and false information about the risks of widespread use of opioid painkillers. As Morgan’s story makes plain, this ever-worsening crisis has left us desperately in need of leaders who will prioritize the well-being of our loved ones over everything else. However, my opponent, Congressman Troy Balderson (R-OH) has a legislative track record that reflects the agenda of the big pharmaceutical companies that bankroll his campaign—this year alone, Balderson’s campaign has received a staggering $37,500 from political action committees (PACs) affiliated with Big Pharma and health insurance companies. While folks in our communities battle the opioid epidemic every day, Troy Balderson blithely fills his campaign coffers with massive contributions from some of the very people who helped create the crisis in the first place. Unlike Troy Balderson, I know the personal toll this crisis takes on real people. In Congress, I will work tirelessly on policies that support evidence-based treatment options, enhance recovery services, and hold Big Pharma accountable. When elected, I will work to expand access to life-saving drugs like naloxone, improve prescription drug monitoring programs to prevent abuse, and invest in community-based recovery services that provide holistic care and support for families.~~ ~~ ~~ | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | | ~ "Donate $5" | ~~ "Donate $25" | "Donate $100" | | | ~~ "Donate $10" | ~~ "Donate $50" | "Donate $250" | Donate or When elected, I will always fight to ensure the FDA has everything they need to hold big pharma accountable. I will support legislation that protects our families from the lies and greed of corporations that are only driven by profit at any cost. Thank you for your support and for standing with me as I fight for Ohio families and everyone who has been affected by the tragedy of addiction. Jerrad | | | ~~ | | Jerrad Christian Candidate for Congress (OH-12) | | | | | ~~ "DONATE" To contribute via check, please address to: Jerrad Christian for OH-12 P.O. box 315, Galena, OHUnited States of America You received this email because you subscribed to our list. subject: want your input on the Border ☑️
body:
I want to know what YOU think.

Peter, our campaign just sent the below mailer to tens of thousands of voters sharing my four-point plan to tackle the crisis at the southern border (maybe you got one!)

I am closely following the breaking news around the explosion at the border check point at Rainbow Bridge in New York. The investigation is still ongoing, but it's already another scary reminder of how much is at stake.

I believe Congress needs to step up and act on four critical policies:
* Finish the border Wall.

* Increase border security funding and deploy the National Guard.

* Overhaul border laws to end catch-and-release.

* Fire Biden's failing Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas.

But I want to know what YOU think.

Can you take a moment to fill out our border security survey and let me know what YOU think we should do to secure our border? (https://secure.anedot.com/max-ukropina-for-congress-2024/survey_bordersecurity?utm_medium=Email&utm_source=Ukropina&utm_campaign=BorderSurvey_11_22_23&utm_source=Max+for+OC+Supporters&utm_campaign=6266023f7a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_24_03_09_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f436e3f042-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Here are the five most important things I think you should know before donating to reelect Joe and Kamala. | | |
---
Peter -- I know you probably get a ton of emails (and texts) just like this one asking for you to give to a political campaign or cause. I do, too! I even give to some of them. But the ones I typically donate to give me _good reason_ to. That is why I wanted to share five reasons why you should give to the Biden-Harris campaign today. [**If you’re already convinced, chip in $25 now.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZSwk4Ng1Q54wLQx9hPz1w92KaLsWQ6-0_eJ8N2-PXVXxDx6ZZHqYYjJ5wJeuXivhaSzxUPxPaGeLv2Y4T2eHqxDCE31pS-zOk3OPpdg7JZuwNfiYur_NX4WJwTK2PlUCuur_4pdcipi0oXaQyCCzdqKEEEI549xQat2MeeyBsaozALMecV5AfOCm7ykEXNpTEWuYQNayRFRJ_2iOIHBYiwTV4fbSIb7lZitxdAlvWBqQ-Gx8CSv9_ibAwWLRkmOKTnmLrkuZEv6dvxyevZ4rYuSRmf8Lbv58IJVdujx21lvg/41i/JrHC1q8NSYeimLogqjbLRQ/h0/upE52j9grWXMGq8zQrPsibzRy8j_dnwu0PK--zRcji8) **If not, keep reading below!** | | | [CHIP IN $5](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZSwk4Ng1Q54wLQx9hPz1w92KaLsWQ6-0_eJ8N2-PXVXxDx6ZZHqYYjJ5wJeuXivhaSzxUPxPaGeLv2Y4T2eHqxOy351Y5ptErMFkf_2SaozAfx6z-onxaqJQiefRZL8z5EaNRGjgJfM1-ciglLBaIN8btcS-posH9JJ64Mzi8dAj-h6l0wDpUR-aUk2Km5vUUDFAjglQa5wVnsNgUL2IWjckYdjcQphBWuYaetrVz2HZQrNCk1rl-FdUjh9_v8oB9wmHRXDw0C6NsDt4kwhEJbitXVyAb95BB3wa8MWsmEyQ97Gue8UOJiNZdZfmPzgnoySAN5BOf_wypNNsTLA8iUZlX_YD6W8zMJqHqdBCrSDKTfdsIECjhBtdfjIPKmO1BLycNFeZ3669pss0bYHd3mIyw9_00JnAB8ApbgTipop0/41i/JrHC1q8NSYeimLogqjbLRQ/h1/Q2rxmdwWER878EgZeZ-3bJh_RrbvaqIItH4n7PRa9vs)

**OK – here are the five most important things I think you should know before donating to reelect Joe and Kamala:**
👷 _President Biden and Vice President Harris have delivered historic results for the American people in their first term._ They helped create 14 million jobs, made the largest investment in climate and clean energy ever, lowered health care and prescription drug costs, passed the first major gun legislation in 30 years, and more. To protect all of the progress we’ve made, we must reelect the President and VP.
🗺️ _We have a pathway to victory in 2024, but it won’t be easy!_ Just like in 2020, we are going to have to fight for every single state on the map. The President and VP won Nevada, Arizona, and Georgia in 2020. We need to win those again in 2024. We also need to shore up support in Democratic strongholds like Wisconsin, Michigan, and Pennsylvania. And, we’re planning to fight tooth and nail to expand the map by winning states like North Carolina. We won’t be able to do it without your support.
🗣️ _We are getting our message out early!_ The campaign has invested millions of dollars to reach key voters where they are -- on TV or on digital platforms -- to share our winning message. Staying on air requires constant investment in this campaign.
🔑 _We are hiring staff in key battleground states!_ The campaign is already hiring coordinated staff in key states, to make sure that we’re organizing folks on the ground and online to help reelect the President and VP.
❤️ _We’re powered by grassroots donors ._ The majority of our campaign’s support comes from donors giving $5, $10, or $25 at a time. W**e’re counting on you to make a contribution today →**

[**So, now that I gave you five reasons, will you chip in $5 to help reelect the President and Vice President today? Whatever you give will be put straight to work to make sure we win four more years in the White House come November 2024.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZSwk4Ng1Q54wLQx9hPz1w92KaLsWQ6-0_eJ8N2-PXVXxDx6ZZHqYYjJ5wJeuXivhaSzxUPxPaGeLv2Y4T2eHqxDCE31pS-zOk3OPpdg7JZuxFMVCOXZ8ekHeLZ4hR3HhDI3CA9d0VkitaQ7gsR13r3WNP31p3OuIOxCXcpOZVyG4Os8GIUJwkfJ65Ygj1U_vMN3lrJiAgktbrkGA750_qJH3-XPb2RpE1sC2Bk7fnvkSflOXE2EaQKKc-019w3eqaFDI6-kICL0TgWDphcxM74Ky5_pC5Pc9AbYsU0cic93s/41i/JrHC1q8NSYeimLogqjbLRQ/h3/IUoDG0asdxrL2ZODM4YC6IBIaFWK6ppn5jVnV2gWHiM)

clean_body: Here are the five most important things I think you should know before donating to reelect Joe and Kamala. | | | Peter -- I know you probably get a ton of emails (and texts) just like this one asking for you to give to a political campaign or cause. I do, too! I even give to some of them. But the ones I typically donate to give me good reason to. That is why I wanted to share five reasons why you should give to the Biden-Harris campaign today. If not, keep reading below! | | | | | OK – here are the five most important things I think you should know before donating to reelect Joe and Kamala: 👷 President Biden and Vice President Harris have delivered historic results for the American people in their first term. They helped create 14 million jobs, made the largest investment in climate and clean energy ever, lowered health care and prescription drug costs, passed the first major gun legislation in 30 years, and more. To protect all of the progress we’ve made, we must reelect the President and VP. 🗺️ We have a pathway to victory in 2024, but it won’t be easy! Just like in 2020, we are going to have to fight for every single state on the map. The President and VP won Nevada, Arizona, and Georgia in 2020. We need to win those again in 2024. We also need to shore up support in Democratic strongholds like Wisconsin, Michigan, and Pennsylvania. And, we’re planning to fight tooth and nail to expand the map by winning states like North Carolina. We won’t be able to do it without your support. 🗣️ We are getting our message out early! The campaign has invested millions of dollars to reach key voters where they are -- on TV or on digital platforms -- to share our winning message. Staying on air requires constant investment in this campaign. 🔑 We are hiring staff in key battleground states! The campaign is already hiring coordinated staff in key states, to make sure that we’re organizing folks on the ground and online to help reelect the President and VP. ❤️ We’re powered by grassroots donors . The majority of our campaign’s support comes from donors giving $5, $10, or $25 at a time. We’re counting on you to make a contribution today → If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thanks for being on this team, Peter! It means the world. Jess Jessica Porter Grassroots Fundraising Director Biden-Harris 2024
