body:
| None of our accomplishments this year would have been possible without your support – it is because of our shared passion for defending our democracy that I’ve had the strength to uphold our country’s values.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4520%2E5257348%2EXE2Kkt)
Derek,
Thanksgiving is so close, I can almost taste it!
Before you shut off your devices to spend time with loved ones, I want to share a few things I'm thankful for.
First and foremost, I am grateful for my wonderful family. But I wanted to tell you also, how deeply appreciative I am of your support — each and every day. Truly. It makes my work possible and fortifies me for the struggle ahead.
You all stood by me when MAGA Republicans passed a partisan censure of me for holding Trump accountable with impeachment.
We’ve shielded more political attacks this year than anyone could have anticipated, and I can’t thank you enough for always being there for me.
None of our accomplishments this year would have been possible without your support – it is because of our shared passion for defending our democracy that I’ve had the strength to uphold our country’s values.
****[With that said, I want to thank you for all you’ve done to help this campaign. We rely on grassroots supporters like you to power everything we do. If you could chip in $5 ahead of our November fundraising deadline, I’d really appreciate it.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1230?c0=nov2023_abs_em.SJ7CRf&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20231122_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=4520%2E5257348%2EXE2Kkt)**

name: Mike Feuer
subject: A Note of Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MIKE FEUER FOR CONGRESS
body:
I am grateful to you and many others for demonstrating kindness, generosity, and resilience in the midst of everything we confront.

Mike Feuer for Congress [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73835075/439777481/1100932385?refcode=RS_EM_EN_2023.11.22_B1_Thanksgiving_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MjAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmE3ZGZkMjMtODU4OS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0FvgP0HzYCFvjYnms8cd6HDsyjHGOiLGICShctgQamY=&emci=bd8f1814-7989-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=fa7dfd23-8589-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=13691217) | Friend, **I wanted to send you a note from the Fairfax neighborhood (28th year of delivering Thanksgiving meals to homebound seniors through Jewish Family Service, this year with my son-in-law Matt, and joined here by my close friend and longtime JFS volunteer Karl) to wish you a happy, meaningful, and restful Thanksgiving with family and friends!** The last few weeks have been some of the most tumultuous and challenging in recent memory. Yet, I am grateful to you and many others for demonstrating kindness, generosity, and resilience in the face of everything we confront. I’ve been humbled by the experience of traveling across California’s 30th District and talking with people from all walks of life about their hopes for the future. I’ve been inspired by the organizers and volunteers I’ve met, who are working to make the change we need by tackling issues from housing insecurity to gun violence to the climate crisis. And I’ve been energized by everyone who has joined our campaign team. Whether you’ve donated, volunteered, or simply opened this email, I sincerely thank you for your time and support. **However you celebrate, please know I am thankful for everything you do! ** Have a wonderful Thanksgiving, and take care, — Mike Feuer [MEET MIKE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73835076/439777482/1100932385?refcode=RS_EM_EN_2023.11.22_B1_Thanksgiving_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MjAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmE3ZGZkMjMtODU4OS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0FvgP0HzYCFvjYnms8cd6HDsyjHGOiLGICShctgQamY=&emci=bd8f1814-7989-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=fa7dfd23-8589-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=13691217#meet_mike) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73835077/439777483/1693661536?refcode=RS_EM_EN_2023.11.22_B1_Thanksgiving_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MjAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmE3ZGZkMjMtODU4OS1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0FvgP0HzYCFvjYnms8cd6HDsyjHGOiLGICShctgQamY=)

| | Patriot,

A longtime _Obama_ strategist just ADMITTED what all the other Radical Democrats know to be true but are careful not to say out loud.
---
_He said that Joe Biden will have to_** _“CHEAT NATURE_** _” __to defeat me in 2024!_

---
Let me get this straight...

---
_I’ve_ _**_ALREADY_**_ _been ARRESTED as an innocent man..._

---
_Had a MUGSHOT taken of me..._

---
_Been GAGGED and CENSORED..._

---
_Dragged OFF the campaign trail and into courtrooms more times than I can count..._

---
_Had to fight back attempts to REMOVE my name from the ballot..._

---
_And even had to defend myself and my family from the “corporate death penalty.” _

---
**So, when Crooked Joe is**** _already_****engaging in the most blatant acts of ELECTION INTERFERENCE our country has ever seen, you can only imagine what next level “cheating” this Obama strategist could possibly have in mind.**

---
But as I’ve always said, the more we continue to surge in the polls as the undisputed _FRONTRUNNER_ , the more vicious the Left’s witch hunts will undoubtedly become.

---
_If you’re struggling right now due to the incompetent Crook who’s currently occupying the White House and destroying our country, then please don’t even think about donating._

---
But if you can contribute to peacefully defend our movement as the Democrats plot their next despicable witch hunt, just know that YOUR support truly means the world to me.

He said that Joe Biden will have to “CHEAT NATURE ” to defeat me in 2024! Let me get this straight... I’ve ALREADY been ARRESTED as an innocent man... Had a MUGSHOT taken of me... Been GAGGED and CENSORED... Dragged OFF the campaign trail and into courtrooms more times than I can count... Had to fight back attempts to REMOVE my name from the ballot... And even had to defend myself and my family from the “corporate death penalty.” So, when Crooked Joe is alreadyengaging in the most blatant acts of ELECTION INTERFERENCE our country has ever seen, you can only imagine what next level “cheating” this Obama strategist could possibly have in mind. But as I’ve always said, the more we continue to surge in the polls as the undisputed FRONTRUNNER , the more vicious the Left’s witch hunts will undoubtedly become. If you’re struggling right now due to the incompetent Crook who’s currently occupying the White House and destroying our country, then please don’t even think about donating. But if you can contribute to peacefully defend our movement as the Democrats plot their next despicable witch hunt, just know that YOUR support truly means the world to me. | | Thank you, Donald J. body:
Help us reach 5,000 comments to overcome corporate polluters.? Tell the EPA:
PROTECT COMMUNITIES FROM CHEMICAL DISASTERS
The EPA is now seeking public input on a new rule to require industrial facilities to disclose the hazardous chemical risks posed by their operations, take stronger actions to prevent accidents, and move quickly should an accident occur.

Corporate polluters have already killed this rule once, when Trump decided to allow these dangerous facilities to operate in secrecy. We cannot allow them to succeed again.

GOAL: 5,000 actions
TAKE ACTION https://links.messages.lcv. ? ?
? Peter ? a critical new rule from Biden's EPA would finally require dangerous industrial facilities to disclose any hazardous chemicals they contain ? and take steps to prevent and mitigate harmful accidents.

This rule will especially protect people living closest to these facilities, which are overwhelmingly low-wealth communities and communities of color, as well as workers. Decades of environmental racism ensured these hazardous facilities were located in the neighborhoods with the least resources to fight back, meaning these frontline communities are disproportionately exposed to chemical accidents and harmful pollutants that have jeopardized their health.

Here's the problem: powerful interests, like the oil and gas industry and the chemical industry, are demanding the EPA once again abandon these important protections. Unless our movement speaks up right now, we may miss out on this opportunity to advance environmental justice and worker safety, and create healthier communities and workplaces.

Please TAKE ACTION right now to protect communities from chemical hazards. To beat the chemical industry, we need to urgently deliver 5,000 comments supporting the EPA's proposed rule. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/yAyZM-

We've already seen the dangers these facilities can pose. In 2013, an explosion of ammonium nitrate fertilizer killed 15 people and destroyed a school, nursing home, and many homes in the city of West, Texas. The Obama administration began a painstaking process to prevent similar disasters, culminating in enhanced protections for minimizing and managing chemical risks.

But after an aggressive campaign from the chemical industry and other corporate polluters, the Trump administration abandoned the rule, choosing to prioritize corporate profits over the health of vulnerable communities and workers.

Under President Biden, the EPA can now reverse this dangerous decision and finally help protect people, especially environmental justice communities, from hazardous pollution and chemical disasters.

Don't let corporate polluters undermine critical environment protections. TAKE ACTION now to help us deliver 5,000 comments supporting environmental justice and corporate accountability. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/_4bqMrv~bXCZ/N2Z6THloeW5YM0FMNzhVL2JVUDBVc1dIazBQL1JHNisyUHYwU0dhRE80ZitFQjZuRS9QaUcxbXpVN004TU5MbUFqZjVvbVZESmpZNzVmbmRHM3JVNE15SzZmYXJncjlSNkFYUVhjTUgzcVE9S0/cFVpTFZueXlRZ1BFWVR5aVJ6TjJGTkFqNk51cHdZVTRQa1l4UWxHbkUvSGY4NUJqd1FxWlNLdUQ4Uk5Cb2VYWEZzOE9pQzVSU3lXdGJsMXB0VC9JeUFZRTBlVzgrMjYvS2ZkZ1pIUHorK1U9S0

Thank you for taking action to protect people and workers from environmental disasters.

Sincerely,

Madeleine Foote
Deputy Legislative Director

clean_body: Help us reach 5,000 comments to overcome corporate polluters.? Tell the EPA: PROTECT COMMUNITIES FROM CHEMICAL DISASTERS The EPA is now seeking public input on a new rule to require industrial facilities to disclose the hazardous chemical risks posed by their operations, take stronger actions to prevent accidents, and move quickly should an accident occur. Corporate polluters have already killed this rule once, when Trump decided to allow these dangerous facilities to operate in secrecy. We cannot allow them to succeed again. GOAL: 5,000 actions TAKE ACTION ? ? ? Peter ? a critical new rule from Biden's EPA would finally require dangerous industrial facilities to disclose any hazardous chemicals they contain ? and take steps to prevent and mitigate harmful accidents. This rule will especially protect people living closest to these facilities, which are overwhelmingly low-wealth communities and communities of color, as well as workers. Decades of environmental racism ensured these hazardous facilities were located in the neighborhoods with the least resources to fight back, meaning these frontline communities are disproportionately exposed to chemical accidents and harmful pollutants that have jeopardized their health. Here's the problem: powerful interests, like the oil and gas industry and the chemical industry, are demanding the EPA once again abandon these important protections. Unless our movement speaks up right now, we may miss out on this opportunity to advance environmental justice and worker safety, and create healthier communities and workplaces. Please TAKE ACTION right now to protect communities from chemical hazards. To beat the chemical industry, we need to urgently deliver 5,000 comments supporting the EPA's proposed rule. We've already seen the dangers these facilities can pose. In 2013, an explosion of ammonium nitrate fertilizer killed 15 people and destroyed a school, nursing home, and many homes in the city of West, Texas. The Obama administration began a painstaking process to prevent similar disasters, culminating in enhanced protections for minimizing and managing chemical risks. But after an aggressive campaign from the chemical industry and other corporate polluters, the Trump administration abandoned the rule, choosing to prioritize corporate profits over the health of vulnerable communities and workers. Under President Biden, the EPA can now reverse this dangerous decision and finally help protect people, especially environmental justice communities, from hazardous pollution and chemical disasters. Don't let corporate polluters undermine critical environment protections. TAKE ACTION now to help us deliver 5,000 comments supporting environmental justice and corporate accountability. Thank you for taking action to protect people and workers from environmental disasters. Sincerely, Madeleine Foote Deputy Legislative Director League of Conservation Voters ? ? ? ? ? This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, update your contact information . Click here to unsubscribe from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support. 740 15th St NW, 7th Floor Washington, DC 20005 202-785-8683 ? ? ? ?

nothing could have prepared us for this!

| Peter, it’s Emily from Team Ritchie.

Every year, we prepare for the inevitable _“Holiday Slump”_ — when our team of grassroots supporters log off during the holiday season and we get less donations.

But I’ll be frank: **We didn’t think it would happen this soon.** _Here’s a live look at our fundraising:_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73835420/439778841/-1359812268?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20231122_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDk1OTVkMy04ODg5LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D71EAw8rcrqW94elN0yUHFcS6zwDx5AuuZX92Hrw_kI=) **If we can’t turn this downward fundraising trend around, we’ll start 2024 off in the worst position possible:_Behind_ Republicans.**

[As one of our top grassroots supporters, I’m hoping we can count on you: Peter, will you chip in $3 or $7 to get this people-powered movement back on track in our fight to take back the House? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73835421/439778842/-1359812268?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20231122_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDk1OTVkMy04ODg5LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D71EAw8rcrqW94elN0yUHFcS6zwDx5AuuZX92Hrw_kI=) | [URGENT $10,000 MIDNIGHT GOAL: CHIP IN $3 TO JOIN RITCHIE IN THE FIGHT TO FLIP THE HOUSE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73835422/439778843/-1359812268?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20231122_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDk1OTVkMy04ODg5LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D71EAw8rcrqW94elN0yUHFcS6zwDx5AuuZX92Hrw_kI=)
---
There is too much on the line — from affordable housing to LGBTQ+ rights, and _so much more_ — for any of us to sit this one out. [Can we count on you, Peter? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73835423/439778844/-1359812268?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20231122_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDk1OTVkMy04ODg5LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D71EAw8rcrqW94elN0yUHFcS6zwDx5AuuZX92Hrw_kI=)

Thank you for stepping up,
— Emily (Team Ritchie)
| | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
www.torres.nyc

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

name: Annie & Renee
subject: How to have a safe holiday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Their Future PAC
body:
| | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yChnlDqOpClnTV1GUtYanKpRv0sLxduejfj04Ewx52f-5mkAUx91RaDIkaE5QVu_tK689EJRSKcJLgOJKJsME0JXAKqtaxuL8YX0QFE5WPbh7H9sxaknKgP7TXfbh8tce9b3AME0ryuA--pOtodRTQGq1Uu-hCo_I8l1Mcl6ZRbQuMBOLxxAHTqGsqtKGG2oM5U59tSW9YLR_w9fn9wwN9rOyC-AxbBPR8Ys-dIYuUKqot1wndOE4gBKjKqsukKD9ZI3q06sL69uWaq5XdWvlFGlp-FUqoNsMgatFKaBM6bkf_1GHAOALu_lkj7favvRixYSl3pnfz6LiCtAdMkkqj/41i/LqZq0SDySZ-ejC4jNYZyuQ/h0/Ur9sHNahbV4VF6_bDaYvCgH6fVo2nL4o9W5_NQ1WvwA)
We’re wishing everyone a wonderful, safe, and happy holiday weekend! But before we all head off to visit family and friends, we wanted to send a reminder that is not only true to our mission, but could also save kids' lives — **we need to talk about safe gun storage.**

As people across the country gather in kitchens and around dining tables preparing for a feast, we cannot forget that many of us and our children will likely be visiting unfamiliar homes, new environments, and families with varying rules around safety — and this increases the risk of children accessing unsecured firearms.

We cannot forget that in America, **_the most common cause of death in children is firearms — many of the deaths unintentional._**

Research has shown that children are at a 78% higher risk of unintentional injuries from firearms when a household does not securely store firearms. And nearly 4.6 million children live in homes with unsecured firearms.

**We can change that:** We’re working to elect candidates who support a Kids First Majority in Congress — that includes common sense gun legislation that will protect our kids from these preventable injuries and deaths. To date, 26 states have passed some form of secure storage laws — but that’s not good enough. **_[We need federal legislation that protects EVERY child in America: Join us with a donation of $10 or any amount today:](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yChnlDqOpClnTV1GUtYanKpRv0sLxduejfj04Ewx52f-5mkAUx91RaDIkaE5QVu_tK689EJRSKcJLgOJKJsME0JXAKqtaxuL8YX0QFE5WPbh7H9sxaknKgP7TXfbh8tcdz9r2lAA8JH0pv2VYSZ1umKe_4oOkQI3k-Ff4l6x9b4wqeCIx80EQk8fgaNXkw-kkmk5C6BzscPZGqi6BIwFKqKK8IUUVRsPTAxDs8ETx-msjD7nv1j6nVKF8QkqffNGOY-i_MbFyzjPkZVcacbqEtUyxAiBDQ3Mo6rGlxbhEPOJqnOXwwR-WTt4m4gjbpF4qYHBLfZeR_kW0LYGB04EfY/41i/LqZq0SDySZ-ejC4jNYZyuQ/h1/5p8mCo_RaVs-OpB-hT-LMzL9194mh6eQCJfEDCGgdUE)_**

| | [Support a Kids First Majority](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yChnlDqOpClnTV1GUtYanKpRv0sLxduejfj04Ewx52f-5mkAUx91RaDIkaE5QVu_tK689EJRSKcJLgOJKJsME0JXAKqtaxuL8YX0QFE5WPbh7H9sxaknKgP7TXfbh8tcdFqyukgX_Km0YB7anbLdVM43kngv1I5-dizWnJDnO_00nvQ48t-_76B5abqc4laYz-gaW8rHnX7MDIipNf6uDtEA6H4bIKqa8MCF69qGoRwRjQ_0gQZT3Pu_WY-I0DU4sGRcSwpUuu1cVRo6TJkhmzY6klYCz_CKH69D3uQkaepGUGDu1M9QheZCLab1Xbk_ZWmqu8dXNR8MxEIFZp9NLx/41i/LqZq0SDySZ-ejC4jNYZyuQ/h2/wP2Dx9HUmBDlrvGo46xYpz5JgNjrtOnpZPcSf6WVtAY)
---

This holiday, you can help keep our children and communities safe by making sure any firearms in your home or homes you are visiting are unloaded, any ammunition is stored separately, and firearms are locked away in secure storage.

Thank you for keeping our kids safe,
Annie & Renee
* * *
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zKMyJxzQ4bKAUZ6TCs94LCsp1duozFuMMPrhq3Yf_-WP5nnWGdMjNWxqO7vz8Sxtr4ODSFvREY1P_QklVg6mtzuLbZo9VsTzy8HJW27nDNZPFPGCd4xCjPvtNt1Y1a6cVTwyYlLVexnYeVD_4s2_XxPTxqnAKgisvLVWpYI7TZVep6xRKv6u8EuGpGXvsdnHhR1g1c35URgH6IzwNJbQzhxdm8S2foIRTu-MGj8kBw90af5iig8QSw0Gm5PanyPUua-wJ9bZYZkM2PqYvz4I_ZiX265-Wq8tiaWP67Vv-fjJTawo32vJKFqzur6e52-CTI47dImJpA1bqNw0rDY-4q/41i/LqZq0SDySZ-ejC4jNYZyuQ/h3/HV3AK_nrs57xOJm-4mJOHyVo_C5zHCfiM_LOO2qLFy4)
Their Future PAC is solely focused on mobilizing resources and support for leaders and lawmakers who pledge to put the needs of children first in policy decisions. Our focus areas are:

→ Climate action
→ Quality education
→ Affordable healthcare
→ Sensible gun legislation

clean_body: | | | We’re wishing everyone a wonderful, safe, and happy holiday weekend! But before we all head off to visit family and friends, we wanted to send a reminder that is not only true to our mission, but could also save kids' lives — we need to talk about safe gun storage. As people across the country gather in kitchens and around dining tables preparing for a feast, we cannot forget that many of us and our children will likely be visiting unfamiliar homes, new environments, and families with varying rules around safety — and this increases the risk of children accessing unsecured firearms. We cannot forget that in America, the most common cause of death in children is firearms — many of the deaths unintentional. Research has shown that children are at a 78% higher risk of unintentional injuries from firearms when a household does not securely store firearms. And nearly 4.6 million children live in homes with unsecured firearms. We can change that: We’re working to elect candidates who support a Kids First Majority in Congress — that includes common sense gun legislation that will protect our kids from these preventable injuries and deaths. To date, 26 states have passed some form of secure storage laws — but that’s not good enough. | | This holiday, you can help keep our children and communities safe by making sure any firearms in your home or homes you are visiting are unloaded, any ammunition is stored separately, and firearms are locked away in secure storage. Thank you for keeping our kids safe, Annie & Renee Their Future PAC is solely focused on mobilizing resources and support for leaders and lawmakers who pledge to put the needs of children first in policy decisions. Our focus areas are: → Climate action → Quality education → Affordable healthcare → Sensible gun legislation → Ending child hunger and poverty We’re powered by grassroots donations from people like you, so ** | | Paid for by Their Future PAC | | Sent via . | [](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/FYSWsSHHdmD_J0EuHdDEUw~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnQQs2P0TPaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIzMTEyMl9lbV9mcl9iMV9maW5hbmNpYWwtZGlzY2xvc3VyZV9lbl9ycyZjZG1jPTJZWTZsSWNPbUdZU2MwSEFZYzJSaldvZkRQQiZyZWZjb2RlMj0yWVk2bEljT21HWVNjMEhBWWMyUmpXb2ZEUEImcmVmY29kZWNkbWM9MllZNmxJY09tR1lTYzBIQVljMlJqV29mRFBCVwNzcGNCCmVVNoZeZT-8jrdSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAABp) Peter, I released my first-ever financial disclosure form as a member of Congress a few months ago. And get this: Republicans are attacking me on social media for... _trying to make ends meet during my campaign._

They can attack me all they want, but I have _no_ shame. The truth is, our political system makes it _really_ difficult for regular people like us to run for office. And I think Congress would work _a lot_ better if more working class folks were _able_ to run for office. But Republicans are pushing the idea that, because I don’t come from money, I shouldn’t have a seat in Congress. I’m going to keep fighting for those who are often ignored by these out of touch politicians, but I can’t win without your support, Peter. **[**_Can you contribute $27 to keep me in Congress and strengthen our movement in the face of these Republican attacks?_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/DgPFWeQ5AWTtN1CSH77hhw~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnQQs2P0TZaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIzMTEyMl9lbV9mcl9iMV9maW5hbmNpYWwtZGlzY2xvc3VyZV9lbl9ycyZhbW91bnQ9MjcmY2RtYz0yWVk2bEljT21HWVNjMEhBWWMyUmpXb2ZEUEImcmVmY29kZTI9MllZNmxJY09tR1lTYzBIQVljMlJqV29mRFBCJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJZWTZsSWNPbUdZU2MwSEFZYzJSaldvZkRQQlcDc3BjQgplVTaGXmU_vI63UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~)** | | | [DONATE $27 NOW →](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/DgPFWeQ5AWTtN1CSH77hhw~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnQQs2P0TZaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1wZ2U_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIzMTEyMl9lbV9mcl9iMV9maW5hbmNpYWwtZGlzY2xvc3VyZV9lbl9ycyZhbW91bnQ9MjcmY2RtYz0yWVk2bEljT21HWVNjMEhBWWMyUmpXb2ZEUEImcmVmY29kZTI9MllZNmxJY09tR1lTYzBIQVljMlJqV29mRFBCJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJZWTZsSWNPbUdZU2MwSEFZYzJSaldvZkRQQlcDc3BjQgplVTaGXmU_vI63UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~)

Peter, I drove for Uber while I first ran for office. I had bills to pay and no income, so that was my option, and I took it – like millions of people do every day.

And I have no doubt that tons of those working class people skip running for office because they can’t afford to step away from their job (or jobs, plural).
Instead of demonizing people for their struggles, we should be lifting the working poor up. We _need_ and _deserve_ representation that looks more like us and has struggled like us, Peter! And at an even more basic level, everyone deserves to be able to put food on the table and gas in the car – whether they drive it to a campaign event or just to work and school.
**[**I hate asking for campaign contributions, but it’s the only way working people like myself can break into the system and fight for real solutions to the problems that so many Americans face._My campaign needs to raise $5,415 by midnight to stay on track of my weekly fundraising goal. name: =?utf-8?Q?Nathaniel=20Moran?=
subject: The November Minuteman Honoree, Thanksgiving in Washington D.C., and More...
body:
This month, we are proud to honor Charles Helton. | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
# Welcome to the November edition of **The Moran Minuteman**.
This monthly newsletter is our way of recognizing extraordinary efforts in Texas Congressional District 1 and providing an inside look into what happens behind the scenes in the life of a Congressman.
---
|
---
| It is safe to say that this fall in Congress has not gone as anyone expected it would - the removal of a Speaker of the House by floor vote for the first time in U.S. History; the continued fight to pass all twelve appropriations bills and cut government spending; and spending ten straight weeks in session leading up to the Thanksgiving week (the longest consecutive streak in over 50 years).

Despite these challenges, this Thanksgiving season, I am grateful for the opportunity to serve each one of you, and grateful for the democratic system of government that drives this Republic. As messy as they may be, our institutions of democracy help give voice to the people and work to protect liberty by making the legislative process difficult and slow.

That being said, we in Congress have a job to do, and my pledge to East Texas is that I will continue to work hard to deliver on behalf of the people of the First District of Texas.
---
|
---
|
## Congratulations to our November Minuteman - Charles Helton
When I think of East Texans, I think of the [Minutemen of the Revolutionary War](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=ba3542a266&e=bbce4dd6ad). Loyal to country and community, dependable, selfless, and ready at a moment's notice, the Minutemen were American heroes who helped turn the tide of the Revolutionary War. **Today's East Texans reflect those traits.** You are patriotic, dependable, and deeply committed to making our communities better.

Each month, I will recognize an East Texan who has gone above and beyond in serving our region - someone who epitomizes the identity of a Minuteman. In addition to recognition in the monthly newsletter, we will send the person a Moran Minuteman t-shirt.

This month's Minuteman, Charles Helton, serves as the Community Relations Officer for the Henderson Police Department. In that role, he leads Henderson PD's National Night Out, where the entire community can come meet First Responders. Under his leadership, this event has grown every year, and as soon as it concludes, the community looks forward to the opportunity to attend again the next year.
---
|
---
| Lt. Helton also hosts a monthly “Coffee With A Cop,” where the public can meet their First Responders. In addition to his work with the Police Department, Officer Helton has served as a Past President of the Chamber of Commerce and continues to serve as a Chamber Ambassador. He is also an active member of the Henderson Lions Club, Rusk County Child Welfare Board, and the Ministerial Allowance group, and for the past decade, Lt. Helton has worked part-time as a funeral director at Garmon Funeral Home.

In her nomination of Lt. Helton, Bonnie Geddie said, “Lt. Helton is a leader who works well with everyone and genuinely cares about this community and all citizens. His dedication and dependability to our community always go above and beyond what is expected. He is truly a servant of God and our Country.”

Thank you, Lt. Helton, for all you do for our community. It is an honor to recognize you as the November 2023 Minuteman.

Do you know an East Texan who would be a great next recipient? Please submit their name **[here](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=ba523994ec&e=bbce4dd6ad).**

Our Moran Minuteman team will also be out and about serving at community events and in disaster relief efforts. Look for us, and we’ll toss you a t-shirt!
---
| [Nominate a Minuteman!](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=9b50747ce3&e=bbce4dd6ad "Nominate a Minuteman!")
---
|
---
|
## Delivering on Promises
When I ran for Congress, I promised to stand strong for border security and the enforcement of the rule of law. The recent deaths of eight people who were killed in Zavala County as a suspected human smuggler attempted to evade police again highlight the need for a secure border.

I want you to know that I continue fighting for funding for border security and fully support the impeachment of Secretary Mayorkas. The Biden administration must be held accountable for its failure to address the crisis on our southern border. Hear what I had to say about border security funding in a recent interview with KTBB.
---
| [ ](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=f1e4b1730a&e=bbce4dd6ad)
---
| Sincerely,

| Nathaniel Moran Congressman, First District of Texas

Fellow Conservative,

We hope this email finds you well. Thank you for your dedication to the Conservative cause and for standing up for America.

As you know, the midterm elections did not go as planned. We did not see the red wave we expected. We did take back the House majority, but we did not flip the Senate.

Fellow American,

**I need to be honest with you because your input following this email will make or break our future.**

My name is Alison Esposito. Last year I ran for New York State Lieutenant Governor alongside Lee Zeldin in his historic run for Governor of New York, after retiring from 25 years of service as a commanding officer in the NYPD, following in the footsteps of my father, who inspired me to protect my community.

I have seen the worst in people when criminals wreak havoc, but I have also seen the best in people who come together to protect our streets.

**I am also a Republican candidate in a HIGHLY contested U.S. Congressional seat in New York -- a race that could decide the future of the state.**

Radical progressives have already spent millions trying to wipe out Republican candidates in key districts across the country, including my own!

[**So, I 'm respectfully asking if you can pitch in a few dollars to help out.**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=e0b00ae4b005483095b64dd3494214e4&_e=oy14CtWs234PPCNKfjtolB5fWPr2XWhy0-0TuJtoppzqd5Z-OxYu5O8Cbo3qGlvyUl9he4tPItiBPSn3roY-E4tNcXtLVzRuaXKUJ1XDJYvH68hODZOJQVgvSvuPYfzBvLuwor2yJnMILreX-0BWFLP5M0eFD5IrVCNwRivBG7Rg_8rzUxvQhilvf6AXiYT3VPMQt8wAZft3bHneS9RP28Voea5snl8oTjO5wVXqi5neLfNWh-ynvWzyBIwflKWr_RtLGyrr15C3lFGu4ZqKvQVR64nOFvI99SqYf1j3yHepecIETX3WNGGzJoCxVSz8EI1SOIBlbw7X5AWBv1OZkVyESOTMLZz4jHTYOV_5qPdK8FpPgFUj389zmrpOGe45ljwAhwk4a6yBj7jxkP7FWw%3D%3D)
Biased progressive media will say I have no chance to win this race, but that's not what I hear in the community. Americans are eager for a political outsider.

I don't typically like asking for help because I'm used to stepping up for my community. But I honestly can't get my campaign off the ground without your help...

The Democrats are attacking us left and right because they don't like common-sense Republicans like you and I. They hate that we're fighting for all Americans and not just to push a specific political agenda.

[**_Will you please help us out?_**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=e0b00ae4b005483095b64dd3494214e4&_e=oy14CtWs234PPCNKfjtolB5fWPr2XWhy0-0TuJtoppzqd5Z-OxYu5O8Cbo3qGlvyUl9he4tPItiBPSn3roY-E4tNcXtLVzRuaXKUJ1XDJYvH68hODZOJQVgvSvuPYfzBvLuwor2yJnMILreX-0BWFLP5M0eFD5IrVCNwRivBG7Rg_8rzUxvQhilvf6AXiYT3VPMQt8wAZft3bHneS9RP28Voea5snl8oTjO5wVXqi5lJltWj8hKtJmtmBZgp62ozvvuVBwTvcoKnP7Aej7VscCryevamA3aiwEFK5lWGOyJQj0icjD3OPGKtEzBcqj5JGmrPpP5NRkdd4s6sHQtqG6RFqoUfaYkeQ5oalihtHEa7bn5rda_31ufPdW4U0ibMfdR7ce867_K-0jYtJTeC2Q%3D%3D)

I am opening up to you today because honesty, hard work, and passion are what I have to offer. As a former cop, I promise to be in this race for you. I am in this race to bring common sense to Washington, D.C., and to put People before Power.

Thank you,

Alison Esposito
Common Sense Republican
Candidate in NY-18

clean_body: challenge accepted >> | Fellow American, I need to be honest with you because your input following this email will make or break our future. My name is Alison Esposito. Last year I ran for New York State Lieutenant Governor alongside Lee Zeldin in his historic run for Governor of New York, after retiring from 25 years of service as a commanding officer in the NYPD, following in the footsteps of my father, who inspired me to protect my community. I have seen the worst in people when criminals wreak havoc, but I have also seen the best in people who come together to protect our streets. I am also a Republican candidate in a HIGHLY contested U.S. Congressional seat in New York -- a race that could decide the future of the state. Radical progressives have already spent millions trying to wipe out Republican candidates in key districts across the country, including my own! Biased progressive media will say I have no chance to win this race, but that's not what I hear in the community. Americans are eager for a political outsider. I don't typically like asking for help because I'm used to stepping up for my community. But I honestly can't get my campaign off the ground without your help... The Democrats are attacking us left and right because they don't like common-sense Republicans like you and I. They hate that we're fighting for all Americans and not just to push a specific political agenda. | Friend -- I don't have thousands of political connections and millions of dollars to help me win this race. I left my dream job as a police officer because I want to do what's right for my community. I want to protect the America that I know is still there. I am opening up to you today because honesty, hard work, and passion are what I have to offer. As a former cop, I promise to be in this race for you. I am in this race to bring common sense to Washington, D.C., and to put People before Power. Thank you, Alison Esposito Common Sense Republican Candidate in NY-18 Paid for by Esposito for Congress Copyright (C) 2023 Esposito for Congress, All rights reserved.

subject: Happy Thanksgiving, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terán for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_112223_thanksgiving [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_112223_thanksgiving]
Hi Peter,
Spending time with loved ones is a privilege and an opportunity to express our gratitude for each other. After a long day, I sit with Eddie and EJ, thinking about the holidays. I can’t help but feel grateful the three of us are healthy and safe. The holiday season makes me reflect on our communities’ past and future.
I recently read that Thanksgiving was first proclaimed by President Abraham Lincoln as a day of reflection after the Battle of Gettysburg’s victory that came with a big sacrifice. Learning this helped me navigate the feelings of gratitude and hope for what has been accomplished, but also strong feelings of how much more there is left to do.
I continue to give thanks for our community wins that defeated anti-immigrant policymakers, protected the Affordable Care Act, and elected Democrat leaders statewide to Arizona. These wins give us the strength to do more for one another. I carry our work every day on the campaign trail to get elected into Congress to serve the communities of Congressional District 3.
I wish you and your loved ones a Happy and reflective Thanksgiving.
If you’d like to read about Lincoln and the first Thanksgiving proclamation, please check it out here. [https://www.nps.gov/liho/learn/historyculture/lincoln-and-thanksgiving.htm#:~:text=Abraham%20Lincoln%27s%20Thanksgiving%20Proclamation,-In%20July%201863&text=On%20October%203%2C%201863%2C%20with,a%20day%20of%20Thanksgiving.]
Con mucho amor!
Raquel
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_112223_thanksgiving]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_112223_thanksgiving [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_112223_thanksgiving] Raquel Terán is running to represent Arizona's 3rd Congressional District as the first Latina congresswoman from Arizona.
For nearly 20 years, she's been fighting for higher wages for workers, healthcare for all, and better schools for our children.
She's helped build broad and diverse coalitions that have beaten Republicans like Donald Trump, Joe Arpaio, and Kari Lake.
Now she's ready to take the fight to Congress, but we'll need your support to win. Chip in today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_112223_thanksgiving]

body:
I had to reach out ASAP. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73835977/439780747/751461270?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_231122_2_2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhiYTRiMzExLThiODktZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fteH8GyP37rIDsnovOjRy8gMHMsNNVPu7_bFk0WsT6Q=)

Hey Peter, it’s Carville.

I’ll tell you right now: we’ve gotta get serious about Pennsylvania’s Senate race.

David McCormick — a mega-millionaire hedge fund guy who can spend HUGE sums of his own money and self-fund this race — is trying to flip PA’s Senate seat red.

So the biggest mistake grassroots Democrats can make right now is to sit by and think that re-electing Bob Casey is a shoo-in.

As someone who’s spent nearly half a century electing Democrats and winning tough elections across the country, I’m telling ya — this is gonna be a close one, and we gotta act now.

[Please, Peter will you split a donation of $15 or more between Bob Casey and Defeat Republicans? We CANNOT take Pennsylvania for granted.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73835978/439780751/751461270?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_231122_2_2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhiYTRiMzExLThiODktZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fteH8GyP37rIDsnovOjRy8gMHMsNNVPu7_bFk0WsT6Q=)
| **[CHIP IN NOW »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/73835979/439780752/751461270?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_231122_2_2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhiYTRiMzExLThiODktZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fteH8GyP37rIDsnovOjRy8gMHMsNNVPu7_bFk0WsT6Q=)**
---

The fact is, Peter, if we don’t rally for Bob RIGHT NOW, we’re toast. That’s how serious Mitch McConnell and his cronies are about winning this race.

**National Republicans are getting ready to spend potentially more than EVER in the Keystone State!!!**

subject: Anything…?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
Is there anything we can say to convince you to pitch in toward our end-of-month deadline? [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73836299/439781949/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20231122_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDE3NDI1NS04ZDg5LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-ZnrsZiJT_flJJC-r_nvHW7UkldEe6-uMTFbKC_09Ns=&emci=9c60d74e-8d89-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=74174255-8d89-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=252045)
---
Folks, is there anything we can say to convince you to **[pitch in toward our end-of-month deadline](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73836300/439781950/-2075268260?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20231122_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDE3NDI1NS04ZDg5LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-ZnrsZiJT_flJJC-r_nvHW7UkldEe6-uMTFbKC_09Ns=)** before you log off for Thanksgiving? What if we told you that Republicans are all-in to flip the _two_ seats they need to regain the Senate Majority? Not to mention, **Senate Republicans outraised Democrats last month** and GOP candidates are self-funding their campaigns in battleground Senate races like Ohio and Montana. Or what if we told you that Martin is counting on your help to boost our fundraising while he fights to create jobs, advance our clean energy future, counter House Republicans’ extremism, and more in the Senate? Or what if we shared that **fundraising tends to slow down around the holidays, but your support today is key to helping us meet our November fundraising goal?** **[Meeting each and every fundraising milestone will put us on a path to re-elect Martin and defend our Senate Majority. name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: Join Women With Nikki
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
|
#
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73836397/439782364/17193116?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20231122_PM3_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTAzNGI0NS04Zjg5LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gl3X0MHwLJeYr1pagkqkRMoX5viJyETQ3T9q6mPE2Ag=&emci=f4fb0f3f-8f89-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=e5034b45-8f89-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=13891387) Folks, This month, our campaign hosted our second annual Women with Nikki Luncheon in Springfield, Illinois. Over 300 women from Central and Southern Illinois joined us for an important discussion on how women are uniquely equipped to lead during challenging times. Every year, we’re going to grow this event, because as the first woman to represent Illinois’ 13th Congressional District, allowing space for conversations like this is incredibly important to me. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73836398/439782365/17193116?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20231122_PM3_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTAzNGI0NS04Zjg5LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gl3X0MHwLJeYr1pagkqkRMoX5viJyETQ3T9q6mPE2Ag=&emci=f4fb0f3f-8f89-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=e5034b45-8f89-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=13891387) I led a panel discussion featuring women mayors throughout the district who have firsthand experience in leading their communities through crises, including rebuilding cities post-COVID and extreme weather events that caused day long power outages. We all agreed that we need leaders who are sensitive to the stress and frustration people are feeling, who can pivot, and display honesty and integrity — traits that an analysis in the _Harvard Business Review_ found are more likely found in women leaders. **There are more men named “Mike” who serve as committee chairs in Congress than there are women committee chairs total. It’s time for a change.** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73836399/439782366/17193116?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20231122_PM3_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTAzNGI0NS04Zjg5LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gl3X0MHwLJeYr1pagkqkRMoX5viJyETQ3T9q6mPE2Ag=&emci=f4fb0f3f-8f89-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=e5034b45-8f89-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=13891387)** I’ve never been one to sit on the sidelines, and since coming to Congress, I’ve used compassion and understanding to listen to my constituents and work across the aisle to find solutions to the issues concerning them the most. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73836400/439782367/17193116?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20231122_PM3_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTAzNGI0NS04Zjg5LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gl3X0MHwLJeYr1pagkqkRMoX5viJyETQ3T9q6mPE2Ag=&emci=f4fb0f3f-8f89-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=e5034b45-8f89-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=13891387) I look forward to continuing my work and welcoming women of all backgrounds to step up and join me as a voice for working families and a more equal and just future in Congress. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73836401/439782368/17193116?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20231122_PM3_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTAzNGI0NS04Zjg5LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gl3X0MHwLJeYr1pagkqkRMoX5viJyETQ3T9q6mPE2Ag=&emci=f4fb0f3f-8f89-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=e5034b45-8f89-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=13891387) If our Women with Nikki luncheon showed us anything, it’s that women across our district are**fired up** and ready to keep fighting in Congress to advance our shared values. **[There’s too much on the line to stop building on our momentum, so I hope I can count on you to take the next step and join our efforts to reach voters across the district:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73836402/439782369/17193116?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20231122_PM3_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTAzNGI0NS04Zjg5LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gl3X0MHwLJeYr1pagkqkRMoX5viJyETQ3T9q6mPE2Ag=&emci=f4fb0f3f-8f89-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=e5034b45-8f89-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=13891387)** | [GET INVOLVED](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73836403/439782370/17193116?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20231122_PM3_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTAzNGI0NS04Zjg5LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gl3X0MHwLJeYr1pagkqkRMoX5viJyETQ3T9q6mPE2Ag=&emci=f4fb0f3f-8f89-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=e5034b45-8f89-ee11-8925-00224832e811&ceid=13891387)
---
Thank you for your support. I’ll be in touch with more updates soon!
— Nikki

clean_body: | Folks, This month, our campaign hosted our second annual Women with Nikki Luncheon in Springfield, Illinois. Over 300 women from Central and Southern Illinois joined us for an important discussion on how women are uniquely equipped to lead during challenging times. Every year, we’re going to grow this event, because as the first woman to represent Illinois’ 13th Congressional District, allowing space for conversations like this is incredibly important to me. I led a panel discussion featuring women mayors throughout the district who have firsthand experience in leading their communities through crises, including rebuilding cities post-COVID and extreme weather events that caused day long power outages. We all agreed that we need leaders who are sensitive to the stress and frustration people are feeling, who can pivot, and display honesty and integrity — traits that an analysis in the Harvard Business Review found are more likely found in women leaders. There are more men named “Mike” who serve as committee chairs in Congress than there are women committee chairs total. It’s time for a change. I’ve never been one to sit on the sidelines, and since coming to Congress, I’ve used compassion and understanding to listen to my constituents and work across the aisle to find solutions to the issues concerning them the most. I look forward to continuing my work and welcoming women of all backgrounds to step up and join me as a voice for working families and a more equal and just future in Congress. If our Women with Nikki luncheon showed us anything, it’s that women across our district arefired up and ready to keep fighting in Congress to advance our shared values. | Thank you for your support. I’ll be in touch with more updates soon! — Nikki = Nikki for Congress PO Box 5171 Springfield, IL 62705 United States ** | mailto:info@nikkiforcongress.com | Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress

name: Andrea Salinas
subject: Thankful for the people who made this meal possible
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
But this morning, I’m thinking about one former farm worker specifically: My dad.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73836487/439782659/809151987?refcode=em_eng_2023.11.23_b1_as_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODM3MmNkMC04Zjg5LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SObN1BpschnyuGRjUG1zqM7XlgUFnnB4X2OzmA8O_1M=)
---
Hi friend – Happy Thanksgiving! I hope you have a wonderful holiday with the ones you cherish the most.

Before the Thanksgiving festivities truly begin, I wanted to take a moment to thank the hardworking people who help make this holiday meal possible and get this food on our table.

The dozens of small and family farms throughout Oregon and across the country sit at the backbone of our local economies and communities. It’s their very product that helps to unite families and communities around the dinner table, especially on days like tomorrow.

But today, I’m thinking about one former farm worker specifically: My dad.

My dad immigrated from Mexico in 1950. He worked in the fields right alongside my grandparents whenever he wasn’t in school, picking tomatoes and cotton. After a few years of high school, my dad signed up to join the U.S. Marine Corps and served two tours in Vietnam. In exchange for his service, received his U.S. citizenship.

Through hard work and perseverance, my dad was able to turn the skills from the fields and his service into a good-paying union job that provided a middle-class upbringing for me and my sister.

He never had it easy. **But with hard-work and determination, my dad paved his way from the fields to the middle class, which opened previously closed doors for my family and me.**

My dad’s hardwork and determination got me where I am today. I want to spend every day trying to make him proud.

So tomorrow, as you sit down to the Thanksgiving meal, I hope you’ll join me in thinking of and thanking the thousands of hardworking farmers who helped make this meal possible.

I’ll be thinking of you, Dad.

Happy Thanksgiving,

Andrea ** **

name: Alexandra Rojas
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Ahead of Thanksgiving, I wanted to take a moment to reflect and say thank
you.

Thank you for standing with Justice Democrats, our bloc of diverse,
progressive, working-class candidates, and our fight for progress this
year — especially over these difficult last two months.

In light of the horrific events in Israel and Gaza, our candidates in the
Squad had the political courage to lead the call for peace. Calling for a
ceasefire and the release of all hostages was not a popular stance amongst
those in Washington; it still isn’t, even though the majority of voters
support it. But Cori Bush, Rashida Tlaib, Summer Lee, Jamaal Bowman, Ilhan
Omar, AOC, and Ayanna Pressley don’t care about what’s popular with the
political elite: they care about fighting for our shared values and human
rights for all.

We knew the retribution from our opponents would be swift, and it was.
Republicans and Democrats alike targeted Rashida, the only Palestinian
American in Congress, with ugly rhetoric, personal attacks, and a formal
censure to police her calls for peace. Rashida gracefully stood strong
with support from her progressive brothers and sisters, and we remembered
the fact that the second person to ever be censured in the House was
censured for introducing a motion to abolish slavery. History will not
look kindly on the 234 Congressmembers who took this bigoted stance
against Rashida.

Of course, AIPAC wasted no time launching attack ads against Rashida,
Summer, and Jamaal across their districts. We already knew they were
recruiting challengers to run against the Squad in 2024, but since our
candidates led the call for a ceasefire, they have committed to quadruple
their spending against them to $100,000,000.

Our progressive movement faced unprecedented attacks for calling out this
genocide and ethnic cleansing for what it is, but we also received an
incredible outpouring of support from people like you who refused to sit
in silence.

The 2024 election is less than one year away, and we know the fights ahead
won’t be easy — especially with corporate- and Republican-funded groups
like AIPAC and Moderate PAC using their war chests against us and our
candidates.

But with the support we’ve seen from folks like you, I am more hopeful
than ever that Justice Democrats and our progressive champions will once
again overcome the odds and continue to lead our movement for justice and
progress for all. Thank you again for your calls, petition signatures, and
contributions during this critical moment.

In solidarity,

Alexandra Rojas
Executive Director

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20231122-31971-footer&t=1001&refcode2=31971_1203867_oL1g9q&akid=31971%2E1203867%2EoL1g9q

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1002&akid=31971%2E1203867%2EoL1g9q

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: A quick note before the holiday.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

Hey, Peter.
It’s quiet at home today — calm before the storm, I guess. So I wanted to send you a quick note before we take some time off with our families and loved ones.
I missed a few Thanksgivings while I was in the Marines, whether I was on duty or deployed overseas. We’d observe it in our own way, but obviously it’s never the same as being home. You miss it a lot.
With tensions around the world as high as they are, a lot of brave people are overseas right now. They’ll be spending Thanksgiving with their brothers and sisters in arms, but I know they’ll be missing home.
So, today and tomorrow, I hope you’ll think of them and remember how lucky we are that they’re holding the line, keeping us safe.
And one final thing — thanks for sticking with me. I didn’t know what to expect when I launched this campaign, but having your support means a lot to me.
Hope you have a safe, happy, and restful Thanksgiving.
Ruben
🌵 Before you go! 🌵
[**Can you take a minute to personally endorse Ruben’s campaign for U.S. Senate in Arizona?**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/em_endorse_ruben_nov23/?source=em231122-1-30&refcode2=1480.734936.A55w42&akid=1480%2E734936%2EA55w42) It’s a small act, but it speaks volumes about the campaign we’re trying to build.

When the GOP gerrymandered districts across the state, they didn’t just break the law — they suppressed the voting rights of thousands of hardworking Tennessee voters. We have to stay vigilant to protect Tennesseans' right to vote.
**People should pick their representatives, not the other way around. If you believe in fair and equal representation, pitch in to support our fight today.**

| | Happy Thanksgiving, friend. Of the many things I have to be thankful for this season, I am grateful for the opportunity to represent New Jersey in Washington. I appreciate the trust you have put in me to be your voice in Congress. **Serving you each day is a great privilege and it is an honor that I will never take lightly.** I wish you all the best this holiday season. Be safe,
Tom
---
